translations.english: The first time? Thieving. The second time? Thieving. The third time? Thieving. It kind of keeps going like that.
translations.chinese: 第一次？偷东西。第二次？偷东西。第三次？还是偷东西。一直这样。

translations.chinese: 不。那是墨瑟为了快速逃跑设计的疯狂装置。

translations.english: I'd wager a well-placed shot at the ramp's mechanism would lower it in a hurry.
translations.chinese: 我敢打赌，只要瞄准坡道的机械装置射击，就会唰的一下降下来。

translations.english: Of course, you could just run him through and take what you need off of his corpse... I could care less.
translations.chinese: 当然，你也可以直接干掉他，然后从尸体上取走你需要的东西……我不太在乎。

translations.english: Your best bet would be to erase his debt with Maven Black-Briar. If you talk to her, she might be able to give you the details.
translations.chinese: 最好的办法就是消除他和玛雯·黑棘之间的债务。如果你和她谈谈，或许能知道更多细节。

translations.english: Sure, but he'll ask for a whole lot. I mean, you are asking him to betray Mercer Frey.
translations.chinese: 当然可以，但他会索要很多。我是说，你是在让他背叛墨瑟·弗雷。

translations.english: Talk to Vex. She used to know him very well... if you catch my meaning.
translations.chinese: 和小烦聊聊。她以前和沃德很熟……你懂得。

translations.english: Mercer's holding something over his head, keeping him loyal.
translations.chinese: 墨瑟拿住了他什么把柄，让他死心塌地的。

translations.english: That'd be Vald. A real piece of work, that one.
translations.chinese: 应该是沃德。那家伙很厉害。

translations.english: If you can get past his trained watchdog, I think your best bet might be the ramp to the second floor balcony in his backyard.
translations.chinese: 如果你能通过他那只训练有素的看门狗，我想最好的办法就是从他家后院通往二楼露台的坡道进去。

translations.english: Good question. I've only set foot inside a few times myself and that was in Mercer's company.
translations.chinese: 好问题。我也只进过几次，而且还是在墨瑟的陪同下。

translations.chinese: 简直不敢相信！你是怎么说服她的？

translations.english: Never mind, I don't care. I'm just glad I don't gotta' work for Maven anymore.
translations.chinese: 没关系，我不在乎。总算不用为玛雯工作了。

translations.english: Here, ya' did me a favor, I guess I owe you one.
translations.chinese: 你帮了我一个忙，我欠你的情。

translations.english: Here, it's your debt with Maven. You're free.
translations.chinese: 这是你打给玛雯的欠条。你自由了。

translations.chinese: 胆敢踏入院子一步，我就剁了你的脚。

translations.english: You ain't got enough coin to make my problems go away unless ya' can talk Maven Black-Briar into letting me outta' my debt.
translations.chinese: 你没有足够的钱来帮我解决问题，除非你能说服玛雯·黑棘豁免我的债务。

translations.chinese: 这里禁止入内。没有商量。现在赶紧滚，别把我惹毛了。

translations.english: Vald? Good side? I think you have the wrong person.
translations.chinese: 沃德？正道？你可能找错人了。

translations.english: The only thing Vald understands is gold. A man after my own heart.
translations.chinese: 沃德只认钱。和我差不多。

translations.english: All this talk of dragons returning to the world makes me more than a little nervous.
translations.chinese: 老是听到这些什么龙正重返世界的消息，让我非常紧张。

translations.english: Soon it will be time to replenish our supply of water.
translations.chinese: 快到补充我们水资源的时候了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00072BD9]

translations.english: Ah, I see. I've just remembered that I saved a few septims in case of an emergency. This is starting to feel like one.
translations.chinese: 啊，我知道了。我刚想起来我存了些塞普汀以防万一。看起来该派上用场了。

translations.english: Tell Erik that I've changed my mind, and we'll visit Whiterun soon to fit him for armor. And please don't hurt me!
translations.chinese: 跟艾瑞克说我改主意了吧，我们马上去白漫城买盔甲。请不要伤害我！

translations.chinese: 在这战争和巨龙归来的时期里，我在想我们是否应该离开天际去其他地方做我们的生意。

translations.english: Would've been fine dying for the Reach with my kinsmen, but the Silver-Bloods want their ore mined, so they threw me in here.
translations.chinese: 我本可以和我的族人一起为瑞驰而死，但银血家想要开采矿石，所以把我扔到这里来。

translations.english: I'm a Forsworn. One of our raids went bad, and I got captured.
translations.chinese: 我是个弃誓者。有次我们的突袭失败，我就被抓了。

translations.chinese: 有几年了？我来的时候还不是弃誓者，但进来以后我就入伙了。这样过得更容易些。

translations.english: Guards say I murdered someone. I was just sleeping off some mead in my aunt's house, but that didn't stop them from arresting me.
translations.chinese: 卫兵说我杀人了。我只是在姨妈家喝了蜜酒睡觉，但他们还是把我抓了。

translations.english: I don't even know who they said I killed.
translations.chinese: 我都不知道他们说我杀了谁。

translations.english: Not only that, but these Nords have no love for us. They look upon us and see only thieves and smugglers.
translations.chinese: 不仅如此，这些诺德人也根本不喜欢我们。在他们眼里，我们就只是盗贼和走私者。

translations.english: We are fortunate. We travel lightly, and can escape at a moment's notice. We have no home that a dragon can burn to the ground.
translations.chinese: 够走运的了。我们一直是轻装旅行，可以随时躲开它们。毕竟我们可没有什么可以被龙烧毁的屋子。

translations.chinese: 你愿意用自己的钱来帮我儿子？我被你的同情心打动了。

translations.chinese: 你的善举会有回报的，朋友。告诉艾瑞克我改主意了，我们马上去白漫城买盔甲。

translations.chinese: 我对……监狱和卫兵感到不适。我的合伙人被关着。算了，我还是在城外等你。

translations.english: Mara is the Goddess of Love. The temple spreads her gifts by tending to the sick, the poor, and the lost.
translations.chinese: 玛拉是爱之女神。神庙会通过周济病患、穷人和迷途者来传播她的恩赐。

translations.english: Wonderful. Where to begin?
translations.chinese: 太好了。从哪里开始说呢？

translations.english: We also perform wedding ceremonies for all the loving couples in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我们还为全天际相爱的情侣举办婚礼。

translations.chinese: 那就决定了。在天际，虽然人生短暂，但好在我们可以相伴。

translations.chinese: 没错，但并不容易。

translations.english: But you don't need to share the worries of an old warrior. This day is to rejoice in your bravery!
translations.chinese: 不过你不必替我这个老战士担心。今天就是要为你的勇敢欢呼的好日子！

translations.chinese: 有些人可能更喜欢在他的猎场获得永生，但我渴望获得松加德的友谊。

translations.english: Living as beasts draws our souls closer to the Daedric Lord Hircine.
translations.chinese: 如野兽般生活让我们的灵魂更加靠近迪德拉君主海尔辛。

translations.english: I worry that Shor won't call an animal to glory as he would a true Nord warrior.
translations.chinese: 我担心舒尔不会像对待真正的诺德战士那样让野兽也获得荣耀。

translations.english: Well, I grow old. My mind turns towards the horizon. To Sovngarde.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我年事已高。想法开始望向远方，松加德。

translations.english: Only if you don't know how to use it. All the great heroes have had to learn to use their power.
translations.chinese: 只有当你不懂得如何运用的时候才是。每位伟大的英雄都必须学会运用自己的力量。

translations.english: And there are the villains - those that misused their power. There's always a choice, and there's always a risk.
translations.chinese: 当然，也有人滥用力量成了恶人。有选择就意味着有风险。

translations.english: But if you live in fear of what might go wrong, you'll end up doing nothing. Like the Greybeards up on their mountain.
translations.chinese: 但如果你只是生活在对潜在错误的恐惧中，终将一事无成。就像山里的那群灰胡子一样。

translations.english: Those that shrank from their destiny... well, you've never heard of them, have you?
translations.chinese: 那些企图逃避命运的人……都泯然众人了，不是吗？

translations.english: Good. The Greybeards can teach you a lot, but don't let them turn you away from your destiny.
translations.chinese: 很好。灰胡子可以教会你很多东西，但不要被他们带离了自己的命运。

translations.english: You're Dragonborn, and you're the only one who can stop Alduin. Don't forget it.
translations.chinese: 你是龙裔，是唯一能阻止奥杜因的人。不要忘记这点。

translations.english: Here are the Akaviri - the Blades - you see their distinctive longswords.
translations.chinese: 这些是阿卡维尔的刀锋们，你看他们独特的长剑。

translations.english: Sadly, the Oblivion Crisis took its toll on Winterhold, in more ways than one. Then, the Great Collapse swallowed most of our beloved city.
translations.chinese: 遗憾的是，湮灭危机对冬堡造成了多方面的影响。然后，大坍陷吞噬了我们心爱的城市的大部分地区。

translations.english: I can assure you, though, that it was quite something in its prime. An early capital of Skyrim, you know.
translations.chinese: 不过我可以跟你保证，鼎盛时期的它确实了不得。甚至是天际早期的首都。

translations.english: I'm afraid the Winterhold you see before you is somewhat... underwhelming.
translations.chinese: 恐怕你眼前的冬堡显得有些……平庸。

translations.english: What's there to tell? It's mostly gone now, thanks to those damned mages in the College.
translations.chinese: 有什么好说的？现在差不多都没了，得好好谢谢学院里那些该死的法师。

translations.english: Someday there'll be proof they caused the Great Collapse. Most of a city just dropping off into the sea... That doesn't just happen.
translations.chinese: 总有一天会有证据证明就是他们造成了大坍陷。城市大部分都沉入海里……事情肯定不简单。

translations.english: Mortals call it Dawnbreaker, for it was forged in a holy light that breaks upon my foes, burning away corruption and false life.
translations.chinese: 凡人称之为“破晓者”，因为它在神圣之光中锻造，可以击碎我的敌人，烧毁腐败虚假的生命。

translations.english: You will enter my shrine, destroy Malkoran, and retrieve this mighty blade.
translations.chinese: 你需要进到我的神殿里，消灭莫克然，把这把宝剑带出来。

translations.english: Do I look like a guide? Only thing I do is sell meat. Now, are you going to buy or not?
translations.chinese: 我看着像导游吗？我唯一的工作就是卖肉。行了，你到底买不买？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075375]
Translations:

translations.english: Now, you're supposed to get something for your trouble, aren't you? How about some gold? People seem to like that, I notice.
translations.chinese: 现在，你是不是该为麻烦这一趟得到点什么了？来点金币怎么样？我发现人们似乎都很喜欢。

translations.english: Oh, that's right. I keep forgetting to pick that up. Poor Kerah, such a patient woman.
translations.chinese: 哦，对。我总是忘记收。可怜的克拉，真是有耐心。

translations.english: You aren't for hire, are you? A sellsword? I'll pay you if you can recover that statuette from the Forsworn.
translations.chinese: 你不是想找工作吗？你是佣兵吧？如果你能从弃誓者手里把雕像拿回来，我就付钱给你。

translations.english: This store would finally be on its feet if I hadn't lost my last shipment to Forsworn attacks. A specially-made Dibella statuette.
translations.chinese: 要不是因为我最后一批货被弃誓者袭击了，这家店本可以站稳脚跟的。那是个特制的迪贝拉小雕像。

translations.english: Oh, by the Divines is it that obvious? I swear, if my Gunnar was alive to see me now.
translations.chinese: 哦，圣灵啊，这不是很明显吗？我发誓如果我家甘那还在的话，绝不会是这样。

translations.english: Ah, there it is! This little gold delight is going to keep us afloat for a while. Thank you. Here's something for your hard work.
translations.chinese: 啊，它在那儿啊！这个小小的金色喜悦能让我们再维持一段时间。谢谢！这是对你辛勤工作的奖励。

translations.english: But you probably wanted to know about the fancy carvings and stonework, didn't you? Travelers always do.
translations.chinese: 但你是对那些奇特的雕刻和石雕感兴趣吧？旅行者都这样。

translations.english: Here, I have a delivery I need to make to Calcelmo. Why don't you take it to him? He knows the history of Markarth better than anyone.
translations.chinese: 嘿，我有份东西需要送给卡塞莫。要不你给他拿去？他比任何人都了解马卡斯的历史。

translations.english: My family came here centuries ago. We've made a good living smithing the silver that flows through the city.
translations.chinese: 我家在这里几百年了。我们靠铸造银器过上了好日子。

translations.english: To protect my research, for one. There are more cutthroat scholars out there who would steal my findings if they got the chance.
translations.chinese: 首先是为了保护我的研究。只要逮着机会，有的是残忍的学者想要偷走我的研究成果。

translations.english: And the excavations into Nchuand-Zel are dangerous. Dwemer machines and traps still function even after thousands of years.
translations.chinese: 而且尼楚安德-泽尔的挖掘工作很危险。锻莫机械和陷阱即使在几千年后还在运转。

translations.chinese: 你没必要告诉我的。

translations.chinese: 我以前也这么觉得。

translations.english: Oh... hello there. Didn't notice you come up. I was focusing my magicka.
translations.chinese: 哦……你好。没注意到你。我正在专注于我的魔力。

translations.english: Or at least, I thought I was. I don't really know what I'm doing.
translations.chinese: 至少我是这么认为的。我真的不知道自己该怎么做了。

translations.english: Gah! This staff is useless... I'm useless. The whole world is useless!
translations.chinese: 啊！这法杖没有用……我也没有用。全世界都没用！

translations.english: In fact. Keep it. I must have used up the magic in the staff or something. It's just a dumb stick of wood now.
translations.chinese: 其实，我一定是把法杖里的魔法都用光了。它现在就是根破木棍。

translations.english: Those kids are dead anyway. Killing me won't bring them back. I, on the other hand, have done quite a bit with my time on Mundus.
translations.chinese: 反正那些小娃娃也都死了。杀我也不会让他们复活。而且，我在梦达思度过了很长时间。

translations.english: Release me, and I'll share a bit of my wealth with you.
translations.chinese: 释放我，我可以把我的财富分一点给你。

translations.english: Where I belong is back aboard my ship, on the Abecean.
translations.chinese: 我应该回到我的船上，在阿贝希恩海。

translations.english: You've no hope of defeating me, pup. Don't bother. Why not broker a bargain, instead?
translations.chinese: 你赢不了我的，小东西。不用麻烦了。为什么不来场交易呢？

translations.english: Their souls are trapped in Oblivion all the same, and here I stay.
translations.chinese: 他们的灵魂仍旧困在湮灭，而我还在这里。

translations.english: Ah, I was beginning to think the day would never come. So you broke the binding spell, did you? Matters little.
translations.chinese: 啊，我还以为这一天永远不会到来呢。所以是你解除了封印魔法？无所谓。

translations.chinese: 聪明的小子。拿上地图吧。战利品就藏在那儿。只要一走近就能发现。

translations.chinese: 我这是在哪里？你！快说。

Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

translations.english: Years back, I had to ferret away some booty nearby. We'd sunk an Imperial Galleon off the coast. Good plunder, but we needed to travel light.
translations.chinese: 很多年前，我在这附近找了些战利品。我们在海岸击沉了一艘帝国帆船。虽然都是不错的宝贝，但我们得轻装上路。

translations.english: We stashed what we couldn't carry, and I hid it with a trick I know. I can point you in the right direction, and we'll each go our separate ways.
translations.chinese: 我们把带不走的东西用我的小技巧都藏了起来。我可以给你指路，然后咱们各奔东西。

translations.english: Under the authority of Mara, the Divine of Love, I declare this couple to be wed.
translations.chinese: 在爱之圣灵玛拉之权威下，我宣布这对夫妇喜结连理。

translations.english: I present the two of you with these matching rings, blessed by Mara's divine grace. May they protect each of you in your new life together.
translations.chinese: 这对婚戒送给你们，上面接受了玛拉神圣恩典的祝福。愿它们在你们的新生活里保佑你们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I present the two of you with these matching rings, blessed by Mara's divine grace. May they protect each of you in your new life together. | ZH: 这对婚戒送给你们，上面接受了玛拉神圣恩典的祝福。愿它们在你们的新生活里保佑你们。 | SID: 00AC7A

translations.english: You've embarrassed the temple and spat in the face of love. What do you want?
translations.chinese: 你让神庙蒙羞，还侮辱了爱情。你还想干什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CA3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've embarrassed the temple and spat in the face of love. What do you want? | ZH: 你让神庙蒙羞，还侮辱了爱情。你还想干什么？ | SID: 00D641

translations.english: Ah, here's the blushing bride now. Let's begin the ceremony.
translations.chinese: 啊，娇羞的新娘到了。那我们开始仪式吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CA4]

translations.english: Ah, here's the proud groom now. Let's begin the ceremony.
translations.chinese: 啊，害羞的新郎到了。那我们开始仪式吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CA5]

translations.english: Do you agree to be bound together, in love, now and forever?
translations.chinese: 你们愿意永远相爱吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CA6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do you agree to be bound together, in love, now and forever? | ZH: 你们愿意永远相爱吗？ | SID: 00F6E0

translations.english: It's our wedding day. I feel like all of Skyrim is focused on just the two of us.
translations.chinese: 今天是我们大喜的日子。我感觉全天际都在围绕着我们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CAB]
Translations:

translations.english: How could you? Just go.
translations.chinese: 你怎么能这样？躲开。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CAC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: How could you? Just go. | ZH: 你怎么能这样？躲开。 | SID: 00EF26

translations.english: Get out.
translations.chinese: 滚。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CAE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Get out. | ZH: 滚。 | SID: 005AAF

translations.english: Tomorrow. Same time as before.
translations.chinese: 明天。同一时间。

translations.english: "Forgiveness is the heart of Mara's blessings." Very well. We shall re-arrange your wedding.
translations.chinese: “宽恕正是玛拉慈爱之心”。好吧，我们重新给你安排婚礼。

translations.english: You're just going to walk away from your betrothal? Get out of the temple.
translations.chinese: 你就这么放弃你的婚约？滚出神庙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CB1]

translations.english: We must hurry if we're going to defeat Ancano.
translations.chinese: 想要打败安卡诺就得快点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CD0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We must hurry if we're going to defeat Ancano. | ZH: 想要打败安卡诺就得快点。 | SID: 00F3BB

translations.english: What's the bloody hold up in there? How long can it take to run through a few scraggly assassins?
translations.chinese: 里面到底怎么了？干掉几个杂牌刺客要这么久？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CDE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What's the bloody hold up in there? How long can it take to run through a few scraggly assassins? | ZH: 里面到底怎么了？干掉几个杂牌刺客要这么久？ | SID: 00AD58

translations.english: If they were easy to kill, don't you think we would have done it years ago? If our men aren't out in a few minutes, they're dead, trust me.
translations.chinese: 如果他们这么容易被杀，难道咱们不会早动手吗？如果我们的人几分钟内不出来，他们就是死了，相信我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CDF]
Translations:

translations.english: Anyway, I can smell the smoke. They've already set the place alight.
translations.chinese: 不过，我能闻到烟味了。他们应该已经点着了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CE1]

translations.english: And so ends the Dark Brotherhood, once and for all. About bloody time.
translations.chinese: 黑暗兄弟会终结了，永远完蛋了。血腥的时代过去了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00075CE4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And so ends the Dark Brotherhood, once and for all. About bloody time. | ZH: 黑暗兄弟会终结了，永远完蛋了。血腥的时代过去了。 | SID: 00AD5B

translations.english: Well I think your betrothed might feel otherwise. The two of you will need to work this out before the temple will marry you.
translations.chinese: 我想你的婚约者可不这么想。你俩得先把事情解决了，神庙才能为你们举办婚礼。

translations.english: Feel free to trade with our smiths for Orc weapons and armor. Train with my warriors, or purchase poisons from the wise woman.
translations.chinese: 你可以和我们的铁匠交易些兽人武器盔甲，也可以和我的战士们一起训练，或者到智妪那里买毒药。

translations.english: Few outsiders earn the right to enter our strongholds. Speak with more respect, or we might forget your gifts.
translations.chinese: 很少有外人有资格进入我们的要塞。说话放尊重点，否则我们可能会忘掉你拿来的礼物。

translations.english: What are you doing here, outlander? We don't deal with your kind.
translations.chinese: 外来者，你在这里做什么？我们不会和你们打交道的。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000762A9]

Translations:

translations.english: Outsiders. Nothing but trouble.
translations.chinese: 外来者。除了麻烦什么都不是。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000762AB]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Outsiders. Nothing but trouble. | ZH: 外来者。除了麻烦什么都不是。 | SID: 00D09D

translations.english: Malacath blesses us with this land. It's not for your kind.
translations.chinese: 玛拉凯斯为我们祝福了这片土地。与你们这些人无关。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007632B]

translations.english: We don't know you, and we don't want you here.
translations.chinese: 我们不认识你，也不欢迎你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007632C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We don't know you, and we don't want you here. | ZH: 我们不认识你，也不欢迎你。 | SID: 00EE0B

translations.english: By the Code of Malacath, I name you Blood-Kin to the Orcs. Let it be known among the strongholds that you are family, now.
translations.chinese: 根据玛拉凯斯法典，我将你视为兽人的血亲。各要塞会知道咱们是一家人了。

translations.english: I don't believe it. You found the Forgemaster's Fingers. You've impressed me, outlander. No one else has returned from this task before.
translations.chinese: 真不敢相信。你找到了锻炉大师的手指。不错么，外地人。以前没人能完成这项任务返回。

translations.chinese: 欢迎来到我们的要塞，血亲。

translations.english: You've no right to be here. This place is for Orcs. And Orcs alone.
translations.chinese: 你无权进入这里。这是兽人的领地。只属于兽人。

agentText:

translations.english: Outlanders should learn to not wander where they don't belong.
translations.chinese: 外来者应该学会不去不属于自己的地方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00076646]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Who will start? | ZH: 谁来开始？ | SID: 00A3F8

translations.english: I'll do it.
translations.chinese: 交给我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007664D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll do it. | ZH: 交给我。 | SID: 006250

translations.english: The original Companions. Their finest warriors rest with Ysgramor. You'll have to prove yourselves to them.
translations.chinese: 最初的战友团。他们最优秀的战士正与伊斯格拉默一起安眠。你得向他们证明自己。

translations.english: They just want to be sure that you're worthy. Be ready for an honorable battle.
translations.chinese: 他们只是想确认你的价值。为光荣的一战做好准备吧。

translations.english: It's not that you're intruding. I'd wager they've actually expected us.
translations.chinese: 并不是说你会打扰到他们。我敢打赌他们早就预料到我们的到来。

translations.chinese: 该死的外来者。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007664F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Damn outsiders. | ZH: 该死的外来者。 | SID: 009BDF

translations.english: You have no business in our stronghold, outlander.
translations.chinese: 你与我们的要塞无关，外来者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000766D0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have no business in our stronghold, outlander. | ZH: 你与我们的要塞无关，外来者。 | SID: 00584D

translations.english: Babette, my girl - pack your things. We're moving.
translations.chinese: 巴贝特，小姑娘，收拾自己的东西。我们走。

translations.english: Amaund Motierre? But that would mean...
translations.chinese: 阿蒙德·莫提雷？这么说……

translations.english: I must speak with Amaund Motierre once more.
translations.chinese: 我必须再和阿蒙德·莫提雷谈谈。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I was hoping you'd say that.
translations.chinese: 我正盼你这么说呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000769CB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I was hoping you'd say that. | ZH: 我正盼你这么说呢。 | SID: 000EF1

translations.english: By Sithis, what a mess. I guess this is the end.
translations.chinese: 西帝斯在上，真是一团糟。我看一切都结束了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000769CC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: By Sithis, what a mess. I guess this is the end. | ZH: 西帝斯在上，真是一团糟。我看一切都结束了。 | SID: 002252

translations.english: You just worry about fulfilling the contract. I'll take care of things on this end.
translations.chinese: 你只需要考虑契约的事就行了。我来处理这边的事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000769CD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You just worry about fulfilling the contract. I'll take care of things on this end. | ZH: 你只需要考虑契约的事就行了。我来处理这边的事。 | SID: 00C136

translations.english: I'll admit, I'm having trouble coming to terms with all of this. I'll just follow Nazir's lead.
translations.chinese: 我承认，我很难接受这一切。我会跟着纳兹尔走的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000769CE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll admit, I'm having trouble coming to terms with all of this. I'll just follow Nazir's lead. | ZH: 我承认，我很难接受这一切。我会跟着纳兹尔走的。 | SID: 00A517

translations.english: Please, make haste. The Emperor's ship won't stayed moored forever. We won't get a chance like this again.
translations.chinese: 请快点。皇帝的船不会一直停在那。我们不会再有这样的机会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000769CF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please, make haste. The Emperor's ship won't stayed moored forever. We won't get a chance like this again. | ZH: 请快点。皇帝的船不会一直停在那。我们不会再有这样的机会。 | SID: 002DC6

translations.english: Well I'll be damned. We heard you were dead. Motierre's in the back room, if you've got business.
translations.chinese: 吓我一跳。我们听说你死了。如果你有事的话，莫提雷就在里屋。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000769D0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well I'll be damned. We heard you were dead. Motierre's in the back room, if you've got business. | ZH: 吓我一跳。我们听说你死了。如果你有事的话，莫提雷就在里屋。 | SID: 00AD42

translations.english: Don't you have all the information you need? Please, the Emperor isn't going to kill himself. Hmph. Now wouldn't that be a blessing...
translations.chinese: 你不是得到需要的消息了吗？来吧，帝王不会自戕。嗯。这不是件好事吗……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000769D1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't you have all the information you need? Please, the Emperor isn't going to kill himself. Hmph. Now wouldn't that be a blessing... | ZH: 你不是得到需要的消息了吗？来吧，帝王不会自戕。嗯。这不是件好事吗…… | SID: 0099F9

translations.english: What? Well - what did she say?
translations.chinese: 什么？她，是怎么说的？

translations.english: Not exactly. The Night Mother has spoken to me again.
translations.chinese: 不全是。夜母又对我说话了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000769D2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? Well - what did she say? | ZH: 什么？她，是怎么说的？ | SID: 00AD2F
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Not exactly. The Night Mother has spoken to me again. | ZH: 不全是。夜母又对我说话了。 | SID: 00AD2E

translations.english: Ah, but when you're done, there's no use returning here, is there? I was thinking... the Dawnstar Sanctuary. We could make a proper home there.
translations.chinese: 啊，但等你完事之后，就没必要再回来了对吧？我在想……晨星圣所。我们可以在那里建个像样的家。

translations.english: Listen, when you're finished with this Emperor business, meet Babette and me there. I'll find some way to move the Night Mother. Don't worry. Now go!
translations.chinese: 听着，等处理完皇帝的事，就去找我和巴贝特吧。我会想办法把夜母搬走的。别担心。现在去吧！

translations.english: And come back with a barrel full of gold, hmm?
translations.chinese: 然后带一大桶金币回来啊。

translations.english: Hmph. All right, then. Go. Go, my Listener. Find out what that slimy bastard Motierre has to say, then send the Emperor to Sithis.
translations.chinese: 嗯，好吧。走，走吧，聆听者。问问那个混蛋莫提雷还有什么好说的，然后把皇帝送到西帝斯那去。

translations.english: Our Family lives on, Nazir. You have to trust me.
translations.chinese: 纳兹尔，我们的家庭还在。你必须相信我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000769D3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Ah, but when you're done, there's no use returning here, is there? I was thinking... the Dawnstar Sanctuary. We could make a proper home there. | ZH: 啊，但等你完事之后，就没必要再回来了对吧？我在想……晨星圣所。我们可以在那里建个像样的家。 | SID: 0071EA
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Listen, when you're finished with this Emperor business, meet Babette and me there. I'll find some way to move the Night Mother. Don't worry. Now go! | ZH: 听着，等处理完皇帝的事，就去找我和巴贝特吧。我会想办法把夜母搬走的。别担心。现在去吧！ | SID: 008717
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: And come back with a barrel full of gold, hmm? | ZH: 然后带一大桶金币回来啊。 | SID: 00AD38
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Hmph. All right, then. Go. Go, my Listener. Find out what that slimy bastard Motierre has to say, then send the Emperor to Sithis. | ZH: 嗯，好吧。走，走吧，聆听者。问问那个混蛋莫提雷还有什么好说的，然后把皇帝送到西帝斯那去。 | SID: 00AD3A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Our Family lives on, Nazir. You have to trust me. | ZH: 纳兹尔，我们的家庭还在。你必须相信我。 | SID: 00AD33

translations.english: Please, get me out of here!
translations.chinese: 拜托了，请救我出去！

translations.english: Derkeethus, from Darkwater Crossing.
translations.chinese: 暗水岔口的德吉图斯。

translations.english: Should have known better than to swim all the way to the falls.
translations.chinese: 早知道就不该游到瀑布来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00076B35]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Please, get me out of here! | ZH: 拜托了，请救我出去！ | SID: 007A25
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Derkeethus, from Darkwater Crossing. | ZH: 暗水岔口的德吉图斯。 | SID: 009966
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Should have known better than to swim all the way to the falls. | ZH: 早知道就不该游到瀑布来。 | SID: 00BC0D

translations.english: Ain't many visitors come to the dungeon. Every now and then Sybille Stentor will come by looking for... volunteers.
translations.chinese: 地牢里不常有人来。希比利·斯丹特时不时会来找些……志愿者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00076F19]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ain't many visitors come to the dungeon. Every now and then Sybille Stentor will come by looking for... volunteers. | ZH: 地牢里不常有人来。希比利·斯丹特时不时会来找些……志愿者。 | SID: 00590E

translations.english: There isn't someone less busy who can help you?
translations.chinese: 难道不能找个不忙的人帮你吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00076F1A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There isn't someone less busy who can help you? | ZH: 难道不能找个不忙的人帮你吗？ | SID: 00E4B4

translations.english: Jarl's been looking for someone who ain't superstitious though. Be lookin' for a fool if you ask me.
translations.chinese: 领主一直在找一个不信邪的人。要我说，就是在找个白痴。

translations.english: It's bad luck to talk about that place.
translations.chinese: 谈论那地方很不吉利。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00076F47]

translations.english: Have you seen Laelette? Have you seen my wife?
translations.chinese: 你有看见我老婆拉莱特吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00076F48]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have you seen Laelette? Have you seen my wife? | ZH: 你有看见我老婆拉莱特吗？ | SID: 00B070

translations.english: She's dead. Laelette is dead.
translations.chinese: 她死了。拉莱特死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00076F49]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: She's dead. Laelette is dead. | ZH: 她死了。拉莱特死了。 | SID: 000C88

translations.english: Laelette! She's dead!
translations.chinese: 拉莱特！她死了！

translations.english: Ysmir's beard! She's...she's a vampire!
translations.chinese: 伊斯米尔的胡子啊！她……她是吸血鬼！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00076F4A]
Translations:

translations.english: So you were right. Go tell the Jarl. Hurry!
translations.chinese: 所以你是对的。赶快告诉领主！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000771A6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So you were right. Go tell the Jarl. Hurry! | ZH: 所以你是对的。赶快告诉领主！ | SID: 004A8B

translations.english: Many folk think he set the fire himself.
translations.chinese: 但很多人都觉得是他自己放的火。

translations.english: Hroggar blames his wife for spilling bear fat in the fire.
translations.chinese: 赫鲁加怪自己老婆在火里撒了熊油。

translations.english: What does Hroggar say happened?
translations.chinese: 赫鲁加说是怎么回事？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

translations.english: Should you prove him guilty or innocent, I will reward you.
translations.chinese: 如果你能证明他是否有罪，我会酬谢你的。

translations.english: Sift through the ashes that others are too fearful to touch. See what they tell you.
translations.chinese: 去扫清其他人都不敢触碰的灰烬。看看它们会告诉你什么。

translations.english: On rumor and gossip? No. But you, a stranger, might find the truth for us.
translations.chinese: 单凭流言蜚语？不行，但是你，作为一个陌生人，也许能帮我们找到真相。

translations.english: So why haven't you arrested him?
translations.chinese: 那你为什么不逮捕他？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000771A8]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Sift through the ashes that others are too fearful to touch. See what they tell you. | ZH: 去扫清其他人都不敢触碰的灰烬。看看它们会告诉你什么。 | SID: 003A34
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: On rumor and gossip? No. But you, a stranger, might find the truth for us. | ZH: 单凭流言蜚语？不行，但是你，作为一个陌生人，也许能帮我们找到真相。 | SID: 004A74
- INFO:RNAM | EN: So why haven't you arrested him? | ZH: 那你为什么不逮捕他？ | SID: 00CB21

translations.english: Hroggar's house? He lost his wife and daughter in the blaze.
translations.chinese: 赫鲁加家？他在大火中失去了妻女。

translations.english: My people believe it to be cursed now. Who am I to gainsay them?
translations.chinese: 我的人民相信它是被诅咒了。我又有什么资格反驳他们？

translations.english: What happened to that burned down house?
translations.chinese: 那所被烧毁的房子是怎么回事？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000771A9]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: My people believe it to be cursed now. Who am I to gainsay them? | ZH: 我的人民相信它是被诅咒了。我又有什么资格反驳他们？ | SID: 00DD58
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What happened to that burned down house? | ZH: 那所被烧毁的房子是怎么回事？ | SID: 004D49

translations.english: I'm glad it was you and not me.
translations.chinese: 很高兴是你不是我。

translations.english: She's buried outside of town. That's where I'd look.
translations.chinese: 她就被埋在城外。去那里找找吧。

translations.english: You saw her ghost?
translations.chinese: 你看见她的鬼魂了？

translations.english: Helgi's ghost asked me to find her.
translations.chinese: 海尔吉的鬼魂让我去找她。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000771AA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I'm glad it was you and not me. | ZH: 很高兴是你不是我。 | SID: 000FB0

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Helgi's ghost asked me to find her. | ZH: 海尔吉的鬼魂让我去找她。 | SID: 00B0D1

translations.english: You've ruined everything!
translations.chinese: 全都让你搞砸了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000771AB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've ruined everything! | ZH: 全都让你搞砸了！ | SID: 00D55B

translations.english: The ashes were still warm when he pledged himself to Alva.
translations.chinese: 当他向阿尔瓦宣誓的时候，那些灰烬还是热的呢。

translations.english: Lust can make a man do the unthinkable.
translations.chinese: 欲望能让人不可理喻。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000771AC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The ashes were still warm when he pledged himself to Alva. | ZH: 当他向阿尔瓦宣誓的时候，那些灰烬还是热的呢。 | SID: 00248E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Lust can make a man do the unthinkable. | ZH: 欲望能让人不可理喻。 | SID: 00881A

translations.english: It is within you to succeed. Never forget that.
translations.chinese: 不要忘记，功成于心。

translations.english: Now, I am afraid I must leave you. We will continue to watch over you, and guide you as best we can.
translations.chinese: 现在，恐怕我得离开你了。我们会继续观察你，尽我们所能指引你。

translations.english: What happens now?
translations.chinese: 现在呢？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077262]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It is within you to succeed. Never forget that. | ZH: 不要忘记，功成于心。 | SID: 00ACF6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Now, I am afraid I must leave you. We will continue to watch over you, and guide you as best we can. | ZH: 现在，恐怕我得离开你了。我们会继续观察你，尽我们所能指引你。 | SID: 00ACF7
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What happens now? | ZH: 现在呢？ | SID: 00570D

translations.english: You set this chain of events in motion at Saarthal.
translations.chinese: 因为你在萨瑟尔的行为开启了这一连串事件。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077263]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You set this chain of events in motion at Saarthal. | ZH: 因为你在萨瑟尔的行为开启了这一连串事件。 | SID: 0032D4

translations.english: I'll be the one asking the questions.
translations.chinese: 我就是提问题的人。

translations.english: They have clashed with the Aldmeri Dominion before, and I have no intention of allowing that to happen here.
translations.chinese: 他们曾经和先祖神洲发生过冲突，我不打算让此事在此重演。

translations.english: All you need to know is that the Psijic Order is a rogue organization, believing themselves to be above the law.
translations.chinese: 你只需知道，赛伊克教团就是个流氓组织，以为可以凌驾法律。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077264]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I'll be the one asking the questions. | ZH: 我就是提问题的人。 | SID: 0023D9
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: They have clashed with the Aldmeri Dominion before, and I have no intention of allowing that to happen here. | ZH: 他们曾经和先祖神洲发生过冲突，我不打算让此事在此重演。 | SID: 004A32
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: All you need to know is that the Psijic Order is a rogue organization, believing themselves to be above the law. | ZH: 你只需知道，赛伊克教团就是个流氓组织，以为可以凌驾法律。 | SID: 00ACCC

translations.english: We believe the your efforts should be directed towards dealing with the aftermath, but we cannot predict what that will be.
translations.chinese: 我们认为，你们的努力应该指向处理灾后的问题，但我们无法预测到底是什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077265]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We believe the your efforts should be directed towards dealing with the aftermath, but we cannot predict what that will be. | ZH: 我们认为，你们的努力应该指向处理灾后的问题，但我们无法预测到底是什么。 | SID: 004594

translations.english: Unfortunately, the future is as obscured to us as it is to you. The overwhelming power of the Eye makes it difficult for us to see.
translations.chinese: 很不幸，未来对于你我来说都是模糊不清的。“眼”的强大力量使我们很难洞悉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077266]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Unfortunately, the future is as obscured to us as it is to you. The overwhelming power of the Eye makes it difficult for us to see. | ZH: 很不幸，未来对于你我来说都是模糊不清的。“眼”的强大力量使我们很难洞悉。 | SID: 00494F

translations.english: Please do not be alarmed. I mean you no harm.
translations.chinese: 请不必惊慌。我无意伤害你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077267]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please do not be alarmed. I mean you no harm. | ZH: 请不必惊慌。我无意伤害你。 | SID: 0077F6

translations.english: Nevertheless, my Order will not act directly. You must take it upon yourself to do so.
translations.chinese: 然而，本教团不会直接发挥作用。你必须自己承担其责任。

translations.english: I'm all too aware that my arrival has aroused suspicion, especially in Ancano, your Thalmor associate.
translations.chinese: 我很清楚我的到来会引起人们的怀疑，尤其是你的梭默同事安卡诺。

translations.english: You must understand, the Psijic Order does not typically... intervene directly in events.
translations.chinese: 你必须理解，赛伊克教团通常不会……直接干预事件。

translations.english: My presence here will be seen as an affront to some within the Order, and as soon as we have finished, I will be leaving your College.
translations.chinese: 我此行会被视为对教团的某些成员的冒犯，等我们说完，我就会离开你们学院。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077268]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Nevertheless, my Order will not act directly. You must take it upon yourself to do so. | ZH: 然而，本教团不会直接发挥作用。你必须自己承担其责任。 | SID: 00ACE0
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I'm all too aware that my arrival has aroused suspicion, especially in Ancano, your Thalmor associate. | ZH: 我很清楚我的到来会引起人们的怀疑，尤其是你的梭默同事安卡诺。 | SID: 00ACE1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: You must understand, the Psijic Order does not typically... intervene directly in events. | ZH: 你必须理解，赛伊克教团通常不会……直接干预事件。 | SID: 00AD49
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: My presence here will be seen as an affront to some within the Order, and as soon as we have finished, I will be leaving your College. | ZH: 我此行会被视为对教团的某些成员的冒犯，等我们说完，我就会离开你们学院。 | SID: 00DC6F

translations.english: I... I am unsure. He is somewhere within the College. Surely one of your colleagues must know his location.
translations.chinese: 我……我也不确定。他应该在学院的某个地方。你的同事们肯定知道他的位置。

translations.english: I am sorry I cannot provide you with further help, but this conversation requires a great deal of effort on my part.
translations.chinese: 很抱歉我无法再为你提供更多帮助，但这次谈话也需要我付出很大努力。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077269]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I... I am unsure. He is somewhere within the College. Surely one of your colleagues must know his location. | ZH: 我……我也不确定。他应该在学院的某个地方。你的同事们肯定知道他的位置。 | SID: 000022
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I am sorry I cannot provide you with further help, but this conversation requires a great deal of effort on my part. | ZH: 很抱歉我无法再为你提供更多帮助，但这次谈话也需要我付出很大努力。 | SID: 00ACF4

translations.english: This world is not ready for it. If it remains here, it will be misused.
translations.chinese: 这个世界还没准备好。如果它留在这里，就会被滥用。

translations.english: As you may have learned, this object... The Eye... is immensely powerful.
translations.chinese: 你可能已经知道，这个物体……那个眼睛……十分强大。

translations.english: Indeed, many in the Order believe it has already... Rather, something will happen soon, something that cannot be avoided.
translations.chinese: 事实上，教团的很多成员认为它已经……反正事情很快就会发生了，不可避免的事情。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007726A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: This world is not ready for it. If it remains here, it will be misused. | ZH: 这个世界还没准备好。如果它留在这里，就会被滥用。 | SID: 00A5F5
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: As you may have learned, this object... The Eye... is immensely powerful. | ZH: 你可能已经知道，这个物体……那个眼睛……十分强大。 | SID: 00ACE9
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Indeed, many in the Order believe it has already... Rather, something will happen soon, something that cannot be avoided. | ZH: 事实上，教团的很多成员认为它已经……反正事情很快就会发生了，不可避免的事情。 | SID: 00D616

translations.english: Technically, that is true. But I still report to the Aldmeri Dominion, and I cannot ignore this situation.
translations.chinese: 严格来说，没错。但我还是需要向先祖神洲进行汇报，我不能忽视这一情况。

translations.english: Don't worry, you can return to your petty squabbles and meaningless 'research' as soon as this matter is resolved.
translations.chinese: 别担心，等问题解决，你就可以回归你那琐碎的争吵和无意义的“研究”中了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007726B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Technically, that is true. But I still report to the Aldmeri Dominion, and I cannot ignore this situation. | ZH: 严格来说，没错。但我还是需要向先祖神洲进行汇报，我不能忽视这一情况。 | SID: 008D00
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Don't worry, you can return to your petty squabbles and meaningless 'research' as soon as this matter is resolved. | ZH: 别担心，等问题解决，你就可以回归你那琐碎的争吵和无意义的“研究”中了。 | SID: 00AEAA

translations.english: I merely wish to talk to you.
translations.chinese: 我只是想和你谈谈。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007726C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I merely wish to talk to you. | ZH: 我只是想和你谈谈。 | SID: 00ACD1

translations.english: The situation here at your College is of dire importance, and attempts to contact you as we have previously have failed.
translations.chinese: 贵学院的情况非常重要，我们曾试图联系你们，但都失败了。

translations.english: The longer it remains here, the more dangerous the situation becomes. And so I have come here personally to tell you it must be dealt with.
translations.chinese: 它在此停留时间越长，情况就会越危险。所以我亲自到此告诉你解决此事的必要性。

translations.english: I believe it is due to the very source of our concern. This object... The Eye of Magnus as your people have taken to calling it.
translations.chinese: 我认为这正是我们关切的根源所在。这个物体……你们称之为玛格努斯之眼。

translations.english: I've given us a chance to speak privately, but I'm afraid I can't do this for long. We must be brief.
translations.chinese: 我只是制造一个可以单独交谈的机会，但恐怕我坚持不了太久，所以一切从简吧。

translations.english: The energy coming from it has prevented us from reaching you with the visions you have already seen.
translations.chinese: 来自它的能量阻止了我们用景象来联络你们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007726D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: The situation here at your College is of dire importance, and attempts to contact you as we have previously have failed. | ZH: 贵学院的情况非常重要，我们曾试图联系你们，但都失败了。 | SID: 002185
- INFO:NAM1 [4/4] | EN: The longer it remains here, the more dangerous the situation becomes. And so I have come here personally to tell you it must be dealt with. | ZH: 它在此停留时间越长，情况就会越危险。所以我亲自到此告诉你解决此事的必要性。 | SID: 006E94
- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: I believe it is due to the very source of our concern. This object... The Eye of Magnus as your people have taken to calling it. | ZH: 我认为这正是我们关切的根源所在。这个物体……你们称之为玛格努斯之眼。 | SID: 0098FC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/4] | EN: I've given us a chance to speak privately, but I'm afraid I can't do this for long. We must be brief. | ZH: 我只是制造一个可以单独交谈的机会，但恐怕我坚持不了太久，所以一切从简吧。 | SID: 00ACD7
- INFO:NAM1 [3/4] | EN: The energy coming from it has prevented us from reaching you with the visions you have already seen. | ZH: 来自它的能量阻止了我们用景象来联络你们。 | SID: 00C1A9

translations.english: His perception may be more coherent than ours.
translations.chinese: 他的看法也许会比我们更清楚。

translations.english: I fear I have already overstepped the bounds of my Order, but I will offer this: seek out the Augur of Dunlain here in your College.
translations.chinese: 恐怕我已经超越了本教团的界限，但我建议你在学院里寻找占卜师杜兰。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007726E]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I fear I have already overstepped the bounds of my Order, but I will offer this: seek out the Augur of Dunlain here in your College. | ZH: 恐怕我已经超越了本教团的界限，但我建议你在学院里寻找占卜师杜兰。 | SID: 00D1F9

translations.english: He was once a student here at the College. Now he is... something different.
translations.chinese: 他曾经是这所学院的学生。但现在……是很不一样的东西了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007726F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He was once a student here at the College. Now he is... something different. | ZH: 他曾经是这所学院的学生。但现在……是很不一样的东西了。 | SID: 001583

translations.english: I'm afraid it's not that simple.
translations.chinese: 恐怕没那么简单。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077270]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm afraid it's not that simple. | ZH: 恐怕没那么简单。 | SID: 00D0B5

translations.english: The Thalmor see our Order as a threat because we have power, and we will not allow them to control us.
translations.chinese: 梭默忌惮我们教团的力量而将我们视为威胁，但我们不容他们操弄。

translations.english: I assure you that we mean you no harm.
translations.chinese: 我向你保证，我们无意伤害你。

translations.english: I presume you refer to Ancano's distaste for the Psijic Order?
translations.chinese: 我猜你指的是安卡诺对赛伊克教团的厌恶吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077271]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I assure you that we mean you no harm. | ZH: 我向你保证，我们无意伤害你。 | SID: 005AA7

translations.english: The same could be said for any of us, could it not? Are you so guiltless as to stand in judgment upon Paarthurnax?
translations.chinese: 这句话也适用于我们每个人，不是吗？难道你就是一身清白可以去审判帕图纳克斯？

translations.english: After all, repentance is something you deny to Paarthurnax by meting out your so-called justice.
translations.chinese: 毕竟，你在伸张你所谓正义的同时，也否决了帕图纳克斯的悔过。

translations.english: Listen to your inner Voice before acting. Do not allow the Blades to bully you into doing something you will later regret.
translations.chinese: 在行动前倾听自己内心的吼声。不要被刀锋威胁，做出追悔莫及的事。

translations.english: Now you see why I've warned you against them! Bloodthirsty barbarians!
translations.chinese: 现在你该知道我为什么警告你要防着他们了吧！这帮嗜血的野蛮人！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077358]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Now you see why I've warned you against them! Bloodthirsty barbarians! | ZH: 现在你该知道我为什么警告你要防着他们了吧！这帮嗜血的野蛮人！ | SID: 00AC9B

translations.english: So be it. If he believes it is necessary for you to learn this... we will bow to his wisdom.
translations.chinese: 那就这样吧。既然他认为你有学习的必要……那我们会服从他的智慧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077359]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So be it. If he believes it is necessary for you to learn this... we will bow to his wisdom. | ZH: 那就这样吧。既然他认为你有学习的必要……那我们会服从他的智慧。 | SID: 00A858

translations.english: Kynareth has placed the Voice of wisdom within you, Dragonborn. All you need do is learn to listen to it, and your path will be clear.
translations.chinese: 凯娜瑞丝已经在你心中放入了智慧的吼声，龙裔。你现在需要学会倾听，才能道路通明。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: So... you spoke to Paarthurnax. The dragonblood burns bright within you.
translations.chinese: 所以……你和帕图纳克斯谈过了。龙血在你体内熊熊燃烧。

translations.english: Did he tell you what you wanted to know? Did he teach you the Dragonrend Shout?
translations.chinese: 你得到你想要的了吗？他教会你龙魂撕裂了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Did he tell you what you wanted to know? Did he teach you the Dragonrend Shout? | ZH: 你得到你想要的了吗？他教会你龙魂撕裂了？ | SID: 00EC20

translations.english: Such blasphemies are the calling of mages, not followers of the Way.
translations.chinese: 这种亵渎之事非吼声之道追随者所应知，去找法师问吧。

translations.english: Take your question to the College of Winterhold. They may be able to help you.
translations.chinese: 去冬堡学院打听吧。他们大概能帮你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007735C]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Take your question to the College of Winterhold. They may be able to help you. | ZH: 去冬堡学院打听吧。他们大概能帮你。 | SID: 00775C

translations.english: They may be able to tell you something about the Elder Scroll you seek.
translations.chinese: 他们也许能告诉你如何寻找上古卷轴。

translations.english: We have never concerned ourselves with the Scrolls. The gods themselves would rightly fear to tamper with such things.
translations.chinese: 我们从未关注过上古卷轴。连诸神也会害怕用这些东西去干涉。

translations.english: As for where to find it... such blasphemies have always been the stock in trade of the mages of Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 至于去哪里找……这些渎神之事向来是冬堡法师们的老本行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007735D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: They may be able to tell you something about the Elder Scroll you seek. | ZH: 他们也许能告诉你如何寻找上古卷轴。 | SID: 007B3A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: We have never concerned ourselves with the Scrolls. The gods themselves would rightly fear to tamper with such things. | ZH: 我们从未关注过上古卷轴。连诸神也会害怕用这些东西去干涉。 | SID: 00ACAC
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: As for where to find it... such blasphemies have always been the stock in trade of the mages of Winterhold. | ZH: 至于去哪里找……这些渎神之事向来是冬堡法师们的老本行。 | SID: 00B8D3

translations.english: His noble spirit... the wisdom of ages... his deep understanding of our existence... all gone, and for what?
translations.chinese: 他高尚的精神……经年积累的智慧……对我们存在的深刻理解……全都没了，这是为了什么？

translations.english: This is how you repay our trust? Paarthurnax's trust?
translations.chinese: 这就是你回馈我们还有帕图纳克斯信任的方式？

translations.english: Begone, before even my philosophy is tested beyond the breaking point. We are men of peace, and you are not.
translations.chinese: 走吧，在我的哲学思想被考验到极限之前。我们爱好和平，但你不是。

translations.english: A mindless vendetta urged on you by a cabal of Akaviri barbarians!
translations.chinese: 这是那群阿卡维尔野蛮人阴谋集团给你安排的盲目复仇！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I trust that you will make the right choice, in the end. Listen to the Voice that Kynareth has placed within you, and your path will be clear.
translations.chinese: 我相信你最终会做出正确的抉择。聆听凯娜瑞丝放在你心中的吼声，你的道路会变得清晰。

translations.english: You're learning, Dragonborn. Doing nothing can be the wisest choice, although strangely often the most difficult.
translations.chinese: 你学到了，龙裔。什么都不做可能是最明智的选择，尽管也可能是最难的抉择。

translations.english: Drem Yol Lok. Greetings.
translations.chinese: 旦姆 约 洛克。你好。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077360]
Translations:

translations.english: The Blades said that Paarthurnax used to be Alduin's ally.
translations.chinese: 刀锋会说帕图纳克斯曾经是奥杜因的盟友。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077361]
Translations:
- INFO:RNAM | EN: The Blades said that Paarthurnax used to be Alduin's ally. | ZH: 刀锋会说帕图纳克斯曾经是奥杜因的盟友。 | SID: 00EBCC

translations.english: My oath binds me, Dragonborn. Until Paarthurnax is dead, you aren't welcome here.
translations.chinese: 我的誓言束缚着我，龙裔。在帕图纳克斯死前，你不会受到欢迎。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077362]
Translations:

translations.english: Do the right thing. Paarthurnax deserves to die.
translations.chinese: 做该做的事吧。帕图纳克斯必须死。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077363]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do the right thing. Paarthurnax deserves to die. | ZH: 做该做的事吧。帕图纳克斯必须死。 | SID: 00A79C

translations.english: We have nothing to talk about until Paarthurnax is dead.
translations.chinese: 在帕图纳克斯死前我们无话可谈。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077364]
Translations:

translations.english: You shouldn't be here, unless you've decided to bring Paarthurnax to justice.
translations.chinese: 除非你决定把帕图纳克斯公正裁决掉，就不该在这儿待着。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077365]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You shouldn't be here, unless you've decided to bring Paarthurnax to justice. | ZH: 除非你决定把帕图纳克斯公正裁决掉，就不该在这儿待着。 | SID: 00F17A

translations.english: What further business do you have with us?
translations.chinese: 你跟我们还有什么可谈的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077366]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What further business do you have with us? | ZH: 你跟我们还有什么可谈的？ | SID: 00828F

translations.english: You have made your choice, Dragonborn. You are not welcome here.
translations.chinese: 你已经作出了抉择，龙裔。这里不欢迎你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077367]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have made your choice, Dragonborn. You are not welcome here. | ZH: 你已经作出了抉择，龙裔。这里不欢迎你。 | SID: 00ACB8

translations.english: Speak, and then begone.
translations.chinese: 说完就赶紧走。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077368]
Translations:

translations.english: By the gods... you! But it can't be. You're dead. You... Yeaaaahhhh!
translations.chinese: 诸神在上……是你！这不可能。你已经死了。你……呀啊啊啊啊！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007736F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: By the gods... you! But it can't be. You're dead. You... Yeaaaahhhh! | ZH: 诸神在上……是你！这不可能。你已经死了。你……呀啊啊啊啊！ | SID: 00AC8D

translations.english: Oh, for the love of Mara, would you please just go?
translations.chinese: 哦，玛拉在上，你能走了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077370]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, for the love of Mara, would you please just go? | ZH: 哦，玛拉在上，你能走了吗？ | SID: 0066FE

translations.english: You know, I like it here. We should have moved to Dawnstar ages ago.
translations.chinese: 我挺喜欢这里的。咱们早就该搬到晨星来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077376]
Translations:

translations.english: I can't wait to see what the future brings.
translations.chinese: 我等不及要看未来会发生什么了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077377]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can't wait to see what the future brings. | ZH: 我等不及要看未来会发生什么了。 | SID: 000766

translations.english: I'll follow you till I'm dust in the breeze. You do realize that?
translations.chinese: 我会追随你直至化为风中尘埃。你知道吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00077378]
Translations:

translations.english: This place is already starting to feel like home. Must be all the bloodstains.
translations.chinese: 这地方开始有家的感觉了。肯定到处都是血迹。

translations.english: Is there anything more revolting than spiders? Too many legs...

translations.english: Hroggar's fate is in your hands.
translations.chinese: 赫鲁加的命运在你手里了。

Translations:

translations.chinese: （哼唱声）

EDID: [00077499]
Translations:

translations.english: Do they? How delightful!

translations.chinese: 乐意之至。根据玛拉凯斯的法典，我将你称为兽人的血亲姐妹。

translations.english: Give him a chance to speak. He's trying to help us.
translations.chinese: 给他个说话的机会。他只是想帮我们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078724]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Give him a chance to speak. He's trying to help us. | ZH: 给他个说话的机会。他只是想帮我们。 | SID: 00AC4C

translations.english: You're gouging me for what little coin I make and you can't even protect yourselves? Ridiculous!
translations.chinese: 你为了挣我这点钱而敲诈我，却连自己都保护不了？可笑！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007873B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're gouging me for what little coin I make and you can't even protect yourselves? Ridiculous! | ZH: 你为了挣我这点钱而敲诈我，却连自己都保护不了？可笑！ | SID: 00AC3E

translations.english: Ha! We'll see about that!
translations.chinese: 哈！那就试试看吧！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007873C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ha! We'll see about that! | ZH: 哈！那就试试看吧！ | SID: 00AC3B

translations.english: They owe our organization some serious coin and they've decided not to pay.
translations.chinese: 他们欠我们组织很多钱，而且决定不还了。

translations.english: I want you to explain to them the error of their ways.
translations.chinese: 我希望你让他们明白自己做错了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: No, and I never will. Now get out of my inn!
translations.chinese: 不，永远不会。滚出我的旅馆！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078740]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, and I never will. Now get out of my inn! | ZH: 不，永远不会。滚出我的旅馆！ | SID: 008B13

translations.english: His request is denied... I'm not paying him any more gold. This madness has to end.
translations.chinese: 我不会同意他的要求。我不会再给他钱了。这种疯狂必须结束。

translations.english: Then go back to your boss and tell him what I've already told him so many times, I lose count.
translations.chinese: 那就回去找你老板，告诉他，我说过很多次了，数都数不清。

translations.english: Take this. Every single coin I owe is there, I swear it.
translations.chinese: 拿着吧，我欠的钱都在这里，我发誓。

translations.english: Look, everything was all just a misunderstanding. I didn't mean to tell Brynjolf to go jump off the pier. You'll tell him I said sorry, yes?
translations.chinese: 听着，一切都是误会。我不是有意叫布林乔夫从码头跳下去的。你跟他说我很抱歉，好吗？

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Look, everything was all just a misunderstanding. I didn't mean to tell Brynjolf to go jump off the pier. You'll tell him I said sorry, yes? | ZH: 听着，一切都是误会。我不是有意叫布林乔夫从码头跳下去的。你跟他说我很抱歉，好吗？ | SID: 00895B

translations.english: I know who you are. You've been terrorizing the entire city.
translations.chinese: 我知道你是谁。你一直在满城散布恐惧。

translations.english: Please, there's no need for that here. Message understood. Here, I even have the payment!
translations.chinese: 拜托，没必要这样。我了解你的意思。来，我把钱准备好了！

translations.english: I knew when we were married, this would come between us one day. I don't want to lose what we have, so I'll pay him gladly.
translations.chinese: 在我们结婚的时候，我就知道有一天这事会搅乱我们。我不想失去我们拥有的，所以我愿意给他钱。

translations.english: Darling, Brynjolf sent me. We both know what that means.
translations.chinese: 亲爱的，布林乔夫派我来的。我们彼此对这意味着什么心知肚明吧？

agentText:

translations.english: Oh! And look, I even have the payment I owed. Here, take it.
translations.chinese: 哦！你看，钱都备好了。在这儿，拿上吧。

translations.english: Oh! There's no need for that. I know why you're here. Tell Brynjolf not to worry about it anymore.
translations.chinese: 哦！没必要。我知道你为什么来。告诉布林乔夫不用担心。

translations.english: Oh... yes... um... thank you. Here you go. Some gold for your assistance and your, discretion.
translations.chinese: 哦……对……呃……谢谢。给。给你些金币，算是感谢你的协助和……谨慎。

translations.chinese: 沃夫加大师会与你分享“达”的知识。

translations.english: With all three words together, this Shout is much more powerful. Use it wisely.
translations.chinese: 三个词叠加使用，这个龙吼就会更加强大。要明智地使用。

translations.chinese: 你已经准备好学习冷酷之力的最后一个词“达”，意思是“推动”。

translations.chinese: 博瑞大师现在要教给你的“勿”是“旋风”的意思。

translations.chinese: 博瑞大师现在要教给你的“纳”是“愤怒”的意思，是旋风冲刺的第二个词。

translations.english: Have you no thought beyond the blooding of your blade?
translations.chinese: 除了杀敌放血你就没点别的想法吗？

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You worry too much, brother. Victory will be ours.
translations.chinese: 你想得太多了，兄弟。是我们赢了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078B51]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You worry too much, brother. Victory will be ours. | ZH: 你想得太多了，兄弟。是我们赢了。 | SID: 00AC33

translations.english: Hakon! A glorious day, is it not!
translations.chinese: 哈肯！多荣耀的一天啊！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078B52]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hakon! A glorious day, is it not! | ZH: 哈肯！多荣耀的一天啊！ | SID: 00794D

translations.english: The battle below goes ill. If Alduin does not rise to our challenge, I fear all may be lost.
translations.chinese: 山下战事不利。如果奥杜因不理会我等的挑战，那就全完了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078B53]

translations.english: This library used to be filled with arcane volumes. Now look at it; almost everything's been burned.
translations.chinese: 这个图书馆堆满了奥术典籍。找找看吧，不过大部分都被烧毁了。

translations.english: I hope the tome we need is still intact.
translations.chinese: 但愿我们要找的书还完好无损。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Sorry, I'm not buying any goods until you straighten this out with Vex.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，在你和小烦说清楚前，我是不会买你任何东西的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078B92]

translations.english: Mirabelle Ervine... Or Tolfdir. They're qualified to discuss him. Not me, definitely not.
translations.chinese: 米拉贝勒·厄文……或是托夫迪尔。他们有资格讨论。但我不会，绝对不会。

translations.english: What? The Augur? Oh no, I'm quite sure that's... He's nothing I'm involved in. No, no.
translations.chinese: 什么？占卜师？哦不，我很确定……他和我没什么关系。没有，没有。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078C1C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Mirabelle Ervine... Or Tolfdir. They're qualified to discuss him. Not me, definitely not. | ZH: 米拉贝勒·厄文……或是托夫迪尔。他们有资格讨论。但我不会，绝对不会。 | SID: 00322B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: What? The Augur? Oh no, I'm quite sure that's... He's nothing I'm involved in. No, no. | ZH: 什么？占卜师？哦不，我很确定……他和我没什么关系。没有，没有。 | SID: 00C679

translations.english: It's not enough that you've stolen the spotlight with this Eye thing, now you're looking for the Augur?
translations.chinese: 你靠那个“眼睛”抢了这么多关注度还不够，现在又要去找占卜师？

translations.english: I'm not sure what you're playing at, but you'd do well to remember your place around here.
translations.chinese: 我不知道你想玩什么，但你最好认清自己在这里的位置。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078C1D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's not enough that you've stolen the spotlight with this Eye thing, now you're looking for the Augur? | ZH: 你靠那个“眼睛”抢了这么多关注度还不够，现在又要去找占卜师？ | SID: 00424C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'm not sure what you're playing at, but you'd do well to remember your place around here. | ZH: 我不知道你想玩什么，但你最好认清自己在这里的位置。 | SID: 007C72

translations.english: Perhaps I'll ask Tolfdir what really happened. I understand he was here at the time.
translations.chinese: 也许我该问问托夫迪尔到底发生了什么。那时候他应该在这儿。

translations.english: The Augur? Tragic story, really. At least, the way I heard it. But that was a long time ago.
translations.chinese: 占卜师？那可是个悲剧，真的。至少我是这么听说的。但那已经是很久前的事了。

translations.english: It was some experiment gone horribly wrong. Ghastly results, I was told. And his ghost still roams the halls, they say.
translations.chinese: 听说是某个实验出了严重错误。结果很可怕。据说他的鬼魂仍旧在各殿厅里游荡。

translations.english: Of course, on further reflection, that may have simply been an attempt to scare me. Hmm.
translations.chinese: 当然，仔细想想，那可能只是为了吓唬我也说不定。嗯嗯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078C1E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Perhaps I'll ask Tolfdir what really happened. I understand he was here at the time. | ZH: 也许我该问问托夫迪尔到底发生了什么。那时候他应该在这儿。 | SID: 00ACED
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: The Augur? Tragic story, really. At least, the way I heard it. But that was a long time ago. | ZH: 占卜师？那可是个悲剧，真的。至少我是这么听说的。但那已经是很久前的事了。 | SID: 00D635
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: It was some experiment gone horribly wrong. Ghastly results, I was told. And his ghost still roams the halls, they say. | ZH: 听说是某个实验出了严重错误。结果很可怕。据说他的鬼魂仍旧在各殿厅里游荡。 | SID: 00D8F4
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Of course, on further reflection, that may have simply been an attempt to scare me. Hmm. | ZH: 当然，仔细想想，那可能只是为了吓唬我也说不定。嗯嗯。 | SID: 00F871

translations.english: I've never heard of anything like that. Did you ask Tolfdir? He's been here a long time, and seems to know almost everything.
translations.chinese: 我从来没听说过。你问过托夫迪尔没有？他在这里很长时间了，而且好像什么都知道的样子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078C1F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I've never heard of anything like that. Did you ask Tolfdir? He's been here a long time, and seems to know almost everything. | ZH: 我从来没听说过。你问过托夫迪尔没有？他在这里很长时间了，而且好像什么都知道的样子。 | SID: 00BB32

translations.english: Comes with living to a ripe old age, people start thinking there's something magical about you. Then, the insults.
translations.chinese: 随着年龄增长，人们会开始觉得你拥有一些神奇的东西。然后就是，侮辱。

translations.english: See? I even have a little potion for the Steward. Mind handing it over to him? Just say it should solve that problem he has.
translations.chinese: 知道吗？我甚至给总管配了些小药水。介意帮我交给他吗？就说这能解决他的麻烦。

translations.english: Still, a little knowledge of plants and potions can get you by. Not that anyone likes to admit buying things from you.
translations.chinese: 尽管如此，有些关于植物和药剂的小知识还是能帮你度过难关。没人愿意承认从你这里买过东西。

translations.english: For Skyrim!
translations.chinese: 为了天际！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00078DF6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: For Skyrim! | ZH: 为了天际！ | SID: 00AC2F

translations.english: Daar sul thur se Alduin vokrii. Today Alduin's lordship will be restored.
translations.chinese: 达尔 苏 苏尔 瑟 奥杜因 沃克瑞。奥杜因的统治即将重现。

translations.english: But I honor your courage. Krif voth ahkrin. Die now, in vain.

translations.english: Several months ago I ordered a special silver mold from some artisans in Valenwood by way of a Khajiit Caravan.
translations.chinese: 几个月前，我通过卡吉特商队从威伦森林的工匠那里订购了一个特殊的铸银模具。

translations.english: Yes, indeed. The only thing I can tell you is that the mold was taken to the bandit's hideout... a small cottage called Pinewatch.

translations.english: I assure you, I have nothing of value. I'm nothing but a poor woodcutter just trying to make ends meet.
translations.chinese: 我可以向你保证，我没有什么值钱的东西。我只是个勉强度日的可怜樵夫。

translations.chinese: 你已经证明盗贼公会在我们的城市里站稳了脚跟，而且赢得了奖励。

translations.english: If you're ever looking to sell any illegally obtained merchandise, I'd also provide my services as a fence. It's the least I can do.
translations.chinese: 如果你需要销赃的话，我也可以提供服务充当中间人。我会尽我所能。

translations.chinese: 虽然不确定模具的具体位置，但我想起来了些什么。

translations.chinese: 我家的壁炉对面的墙上有个奇怪的按钮。我一直想知道那是干什么用的。

translations.english: Before my ma and da passed, I told them that one day, I'd become the best trader in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 在我父母去世前，我就告诉他们总有一天我会成为天际最棒的商人。

translations.english: You're looking to become a merchant?
translations.chinese: 你想成为商人？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00079ADA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I met one of the caravan leaders, Ma'dran. He said he'd help get me started if I could bring him a mammoth's tusk. Easier said than done. | ZH: 我遇到了一个商队首领，叫玛'德兰。他说如果我能给他一根猛犸牙，他就会帮我起步。说起来容易做起来难啊。 | SID: 000A09
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Before my ma and da passed, I told them that one day, I'd become the best trader in Skyrim. | ZH: 在我父母去世前，我就告诉他们总有一天我会成为天际最棒的商人。 | SID: 006E23
- INFO:RNAM | EN: You're looking to become a merchant? | ZH: 你想成为商人？ | SID: 006E22

translations.english: You'd do that? If you find one, I could teach you a thing or two about trading. Help you get a fair bargain in the future.
translations.chinese: 你会帮我？如果你能找到一份，我可以教你几招贸易技巧。帮你以后讨个更公道的价钱。

translations.english: Maybe I can help you.
translations.chinese: 也许我可以帮你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00079ADC]
Translations:

translations.english: I'll do my best.
translations.chinese: 我会努力的。

translations.english: Good luck with that.
translations.chinese: 祝你好运吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00079AE1]

translations.english: As promised, let me show you a thing or two about bargaining. Don't want some shifty merchant giving you a raw trade.
translations.chinese: 按原先说好的，我来给你展示一两个讨价还价小技巧。我可不想让你被奸商坑了。

translations.english: Thank you. This should turn that old cat's gaze. Maybe I'll be able to become a caravaneer myself, one day.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。这样应该能引起那只老猫的注意了。也许有一天，我也能成为一名商队主。

translations.english: Here's your mammoth tusk.
translations.chinese: 这是你要的猛犸牙。

translations.chinese: 拿到之后，把它放在沃夫船长的箱子里。剩下的就交给我。

translations.english: You'll need to get your hands on some Balmora Blue from Sabine Nyette down by the docks. She's the first mate on another ship, the Red Wave.
translations.chinese: 你得从码头的撒比尼·尼耶蒂那弄些巴尔莫拉蓝调。她是赤红波浪号的大副。

translations.chinese: 你也该来了。

translations.english: I'm not accustomed to dealing with people who are unreliable. That's why I asked Delvin to send me his best.
translations.chinese: 我不习惯和不可靠的人打交道。所以我让戴尔文把他那最好的人派来。

translations.english: Captain Volf of the Dainty Sload has decided to test my patience on this matter by neglecting to honor a trade agreement we had established.
translations.chinese: 优雅斯洛德号的沃夫船长打算考验我在这上面的耐心，无视了我们达成的贸易协议。

translations.english: Nothing raises my ire more than having an agreement broken. It's bad for business and it wastes time.
translations.chinese: 没有什么比协议被撕毁更让我气愤的。这对生意很不利，而且浪费时间。

translations.chinese: 现在就去……在任务完成前，我不想见你。

translations.english: Captain Volf is ashore right now and I want the authorities waiting for him when he gets back.
translations.chinese: 沃夫船长现在在岸上，我要让执法的等他回去。

translations.chinese: 哦，替我向戴尔文问好。告诉他我很乐意为他重新打开独孤城的门。

translations.english: Our contract is complete. Here's a token of my gratitude for your efforts.
translations.chinese: 我们的契约完成。这是我一点心意，感谢你的努力。

translations.english: Yes, I know. In fact, by now, Captain Volf should be on his way to the prisons.
translations.chinese: 是，我知道。其实现在，沃夫船长已经在去监狱的路上了。

translations.chinese: 我需要你给他一个教训，让他明白自己犯了什么错误。偷偷溜进斯洛德号，把违禁品放进去。

translations.english: Change Arn's entry in the book to anything you want and they'll be forced to let him go after he serves a few weeks.
translations.chinese: 把阿恩的记录改成任何东西都行，他们关他几周就得放他。

translations.english: My sources tell me you can find that book in a study in his quarters.
translations.chinese: 我的线人告诉我，册子就放在他住处的书房里。

translations.english: It's a well-known fact that the steward keeps all of the records on Whiterun's prisoners in a large book.
translations.chinese: 众所周知，总管把全白漫囚犯的记录都写在一本大册子里。

translations.english: Fortunately, his identity isn't known to the authorities in Whiterun, so there's still a chance to save him.
translations.chinese: 所幸白漫官方还不知道他的身份，所以还有机会救他。

translations.english: The city guard in Solitude is seeking Arn for a serious crime. When he fled here, he was arrested for drunken behavior. Can you imagine?
translations.chinese: 独孤城的卫兵正在因重罪而搜捕阿恩。他逃到这里来以后，因为酗酒被抓了。能想的到？

translations.chinese: 我猜这证明你完成了工作。这是你的报酬。

translations.english: Tell Delvin that he has my support and all the weight it carries in Whiterun from now on. I think he'll be quite pleased.
translations.chinese: 告诉戴尔文，从现在起我会全力支持他和他在白漫城的影响。我猜他会很高兴的。

translations.english: Arn? Never heard of him.

translations.chinese: 现在又轮到我去救他了……这次是去独孤城的法场。

translations.english: A close friend of mine. We fought together on the battlefield for many years until old age got the better of us.
translations.chinese: 我的挚友。我们是在战场上多年的同袍，直到岁月战胜了我们。

translations.english: I have eyes within Dragonsreach. They tell me that all correspondence from other holds are sent to the Jarl's private chambers.
translations.chinese: 我在龙临宫里安插了眼线。他们告诉我，其他领地的信件都会送到领主的私人房间里。

translations.english: If it was easy, I would have hired a local thug instead of a professional.
translations.chinese: 如果容易的话，我就直接雇个混混了，谁还会找你们这群专业的。

translations.english: One more thing. If you get caught, I can't afford to be connected to you. Remember that before you do anything stupid.
translations.chinese: 先说好。如果你被抓了，我可不能跟你扯上关系。做傻事前先想清楚。

translations.chinese: 其次，把阿恩在监狱登记簿上的名字换成他的新身份。

translations.english: My daughter Fjotli... she was murdered a few months ago. Left her laying on the ground in a pool of her own blood.
translations.chinese: 我女儿芙优蒂……前几个月时被谋杀了。横尸在地，倒在血泊里。

translations.english: Look, I... I...
translations.chinese: 那个，我……我……

translations.english: Look, um... Thanks. And I'm sorry for my unneighborly reaction. If you talk to Cicero, you be sure and tell him I'll be down to help soon.
translations.chinese: 那个，嗯……谢谢了。我为自己的不友善反应感到抱歉。你去找西塞罗的时候，告诉他我马上过去帮忙。

translations.english: You're right. You're right. Feller might be nutters, might not. But fact is, he needs help. I turn him away, what kind of man am I, hmm?
translations.chinese: 你说得对，说得对。他是可能疯了，也可能没疯。但他确实需要帮助。我却拒绝了他，我这算什么爷们？

translations.english: You know you should help him. (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 你知道应该帮他的（说服）

translations.chinese: 都瓦克因。你经受了灰胡子之吼而安然无恙，霍斯加修道院之门向你敞开。

translations.english: If anyone should be thanked, it should be you.
translations.chinese: 如果有人应该被感谢，那也应该是你。

translations.english: There's no need to thank me. What you did was for the people of Dawnstar.
translations.chinese: 不用谢我。你所做的一切都是为了晨星的人民。

translations.english: My intention was to spend the rest of my years here, burying the past and praying for forgiveness.
translations.chinese: 我打算在此度过残生，埋葬过去，祈求宽恕。

translations.english: But instead, I wish to offer my services to you. If you ever wish to journey with me, I'll be here.
translations.chinese: 但我也愿意为你效劳。如果你想和我一起旅行，可以随时来这儿找我。

translations.english: I'd constructed a meager shrine to Mara in the antechamber where we entered.
translations.chinese: 我在咱们进来的前厅为玛拉建了一座小神龛。

translations.english: Being a humble servant of Mara, I have little in the way of gold or coin, but perhaps I can offer you something better... companionship.
translations.chinese: 作为玛拉卑微的追随者，我没有多少钱，但也许能给你更好的东西……友谊。

translations.english: Yes. The Skull has been destroyed and Dawnstar is safe.
translations.chinese: 没错。头骨被摧毁了，晨星也就安全了。

translations.chinese: 不能毫无抵抗地撤退！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007EA59]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not without a fight it isn't! | ZH: 不能毫无抵抗地撤退！ | SID: 00AAF6

translations.english: I assume everyone's gone ahead of us as planned. I just swept through the castle, no one's here.
translations.chinese: 我想大家已经按计划走在我们前面了。刚才在城堡里看了一圈，没人。

translations.english: Now. We really must be going, sir.
translations.chinese: 现在，我们得走了，阁下。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007EA5A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I assume everyone's gone ahead of us as planned. I just swept through the castle, no one's here. | ZH: 我想大家已经按计划走在我们前面了。刚才在城堡里看了一圈，没人。 | SID: 002797
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Now. We really must be going, sir. | ZH: 现在，我们得走了，阁下。 | SID: 00AAF9

translations.english: As soon as we can muster our forces, we'll be back.
translations.chinese: 只要我们集合军队，就能杀回来。

translations.english: That's the battle you need to fight. Not this. This will be suicide. And to what end?
translations.chinese: 到时候你有仗可打，但不是现在。这是毫无目的地自杀！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007EA5B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: As soon as we can muster our forces, we'll be back. | ZH: 只要我们集合军队，就能杀回来。 | SID: 0002B6
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: That's the battle you need to fight. Not this. This will be suicide. And to what end? | ZH: 到时候你有仗可打，但不是现在。这是毫无目的地自杀！ | SID: 00AAF7

translations.english: Fine. Let's go.
translations.chinese: 好吧。我们走。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007EA5C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fine. Let's go. | ZH: 好吧。我们走。 | SID: 00571B

translations.english: Oh, it doesn't matter now. Gavros is never coming back, and he was supposed to have the crystal. Without that, we're lost.
translations.chinese: 哦，都无所谓了。加弗罗斯再也回不来了，水晶在他手里。没了那东西，我们就迷失了。

translations.english: So congratulations, whoever you are, you've found the Synod. Just me, alone, surrounded by angry machines and angrier Falmer.
translations.chinese: 恭喜恭喜，不管你是谁，你都成功找到希诺了。只不过就我一个，而且还被愤怒的机械和超愤怒的伐莫包围着。

translations.english: It's all been for nothing.
translations.chinese: 一切都白费了。

translations.english: And just why would you be doing that?
translations.chinese: 你有什么目的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007EAA6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Oh, it doesn't matter now. Gavros is never coming back, and he was supposed to have the crystal. Without that, we're lost. | ZH: 哦，都无所谓了。加弗罗斯再也回不来了，水晶在他手里。没了那东西，我们就迷失了。 | SID: 00352A
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: So congratulations, whoever you are, you've found the Synod. Just me, alone, surrounded by angry machines and angrier Falmer. | ZH: 恭喜恭喜，不管你是谁，你都成功找到希诺了。只不过就我一个，而且还被愤怒的机械和超愤怒的伐莫包围着。 | SID: 003DC2
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: It's all been for nothing. | ZH: 一切都白费了。 | SID: 00AAE5
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: And just why would you be doing that? | ZH: 你有什么目的？ | SID: 00AAE6

translations.english: Well, I was right, wasn't I? Focused completely wrong by the time we got here! The cold had warped it!
translations.chinese: 哎，结果还是我对了，不是吗？我们到这儿的时候就完全搞错了！寒冷让它扭曲了！

translations.english: It didn't work the first time. I tried to tell Gavros, but he wouldn't listen. "No, it won't be too cold" he said.
translations.chinese: 第一次没有成功。我本想告诉加弗罗斯，但他不听。他说，“不，不会太冷的”。

translations.english: Gavros had to cart it all the way back to Cyrodiil. Left the rest of us here to fend off the damnable Falmer.
translations.chinese: 加弗罗斯不得不把它一路送回希罗帝尔。把我们留在这里抵挡该死的伐莫。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007EAA7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Well, I was right, wasn't I? Focused completely wrong by the time we got here! The cold had warped it! | ZH: 哎，结果还是我对了，不是吗？我们到这儿的时候就完全搞错了！寒冷让它扭曲了！ | SID: 00A5A8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: It didn't work the first time. I tried to tell Gavros, but he wouldn't listen. "No, it won't be too cold" he said. | ZH: 第一次没有成功。我本想告诉加弗罗斯，但他不听。他说，“不，不会太冷的”。 | SID: 00AAE8
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Gavros had to cart it all the way back to Cyrodiil. Left the rest of us here to fend off the damnable Falmer. | ZH: 加弗罗斯不得不把它一路送回希罗帝尔。把我们留在这里抵挡该死的伐莫。 | SID: 00D649

translations.english: What are you doing here? What've you done with Gavros?
translations.chinese: 你来这里做什么？你把加弗罗斯怎么了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007EAA8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What are you doing here? What've you done with Gavros? | ZH: 你来这里做什么？你把加弗罗斯怎么了？ | SID: 00EBE0

translations.english: Really?
translations.chinese: 真的？

translations.english: Well, I do recall warning them it might not be the safest of locations. I hope this doesn't become a problem for us.
translations.chinese: 我警告过他们，那里不安全。希望这不会给咱们找上麻烦。

translations.english: Were you able to learn anything?
translations.chinese: 你有找到什么吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007EAA9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Really? | ZH: 真的？ | SID: 00A56D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Well, I do recall warning them it might not be the safest of locations. I hope this doesn't become a problem for us. | ZH: 我警告过他们，那里不安全。希望这不会给咱们找上麻烦。 | SID: 00D48F
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Were you able to learn anything? | ZH: 你有找到什么吗？ | SID: 00E6CC

translations.english: Hmm. I can't say I've any idea what they were up to. Have you found this observatory?
translations.chinese: 嗯。我不知道他们在做什么。你找到观测台了吗？

translations.english: You might be able to learn something from it. Keep looking, but be careful.
translations.chinese: 也许你能从中学到些东西。继续找找看，但要小心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007EAAA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Hmm. I can't say I've any idea what they were up to. Have you found this observatory? | ZH: 嗯。我不知道他们在做什么。你找到观测台了吗？ | SID: 00004C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You might be able to learn something from it. Keep looking, but be careful. | ZH: 也许你能从中学到些东西。继续找找看，但要小心。 | SID: 00AACE

translations.english: And you. If you're here for treasure, or wisdom, or anything, I'm afraid you've wasted your time.
translations.chinese: 至于你。如果你是来寻找宝物、智慧，或是别的什么，恐怕你是在浪费时间了。

translations.english: If Gavros is gone, there's no hope. He was supposed to return with the crystal... Without that, all our efforts are wasted.
translations.chinese: 如果加弗罗斯死了，就没希望了。他本该带着水晶回来的……没了它，一切努力都白费了。

translations.english: It was the Falmer, wasn't it? Curse them! They've ruined everything!
translations.chinese: 是伐莫干的对吧？诅咒它们！它们毁了这一切！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0007EAAB]

translations.english: Maven and I worked out a little deal. If Sabjorn ends up in jail, she's going to take over his meadery.
translations.chinese: 玛雯和我做了个小交易。撒布乔恩入狱后，她就会接管这座酒庄。

translations.english: If this plan works, not only is my debt gone, but I'll be set up for life.
translations.chinese: 如果这个计划成功了，那不仅能清空我的债务，我也会从此衣食无忧。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: You're welcome to take a look around Sabjorn's office. He keeps most of his papers stashed in his desk. | ZH: 欢迎参观撒布乔恩的办公室。他把大部分文件都藏在书桌里了。 | SID: 0065B6
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Here, this should help. | ZH: 给，你应该用得上。 | SID: 00A8E8

translations.english: I don't think that could have gone any better.
translations.chinese: 我觉得没有比这更好的结果了。

translations.english: Anything else you need before you head back to Riften?
translations.chinese: 你在回裂谷城前还有什么需要么？

translations.english: Silent means I don't tell and it's none of your business.
translations.chinese: 沉默意味着我不会告诉你，这与你无关。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Tell the people of Markarth that their dead are safe. My work is done here.
translations.chinese: 告诉马卡斯的人，他们的死人都安全了。我在这里的工作完成了。

translations.english: Very well. But should the hunger call out to you, I'll be waiting outside Reachcliff Cave.
translations.chinese: 很好。但如果饥饿召唤你，就来延崖洞穴外找我吧。

agentText:

translations.english: Then the hunger set in. Curiosity. What's the harm in just one bite?
translations.chinese: 然后，饥饿、好奇。吃一口又有什么害处呢？

translations.english: It's okay, now. You've found a friend who understands you. You can let go of your guilt.
translations.chinese: 没关系。现在，你有知音了。你可以放下自己的内疚了。

translations.english: You were young when you first tasted human flesh, weren't you? A brother or sister had died? An accident, of course.
translations.chinese: 你第一次品尝人肉的时候还很年轻吧？有兄弟姐妹死了？当然，这是意外。

translations.english: Meet me there. We will fight our way to Namira's embrace together.
translations.chinese: 到那儿和我会合。我们会一路奋战投入娜米拉的怀抱。

translations.english: Until then, tell the people of Markarth that their dead won't be disturbed, anymore. We have bigger plans ahead.
translations.chinese: 在那之前，去告诉马卡斯城的人吧，他们的尸体不会再被打扰了。我们有更大的计划。

translations.english: It's inside Reachcliff Cave. But the dead have stirred from their slumber recently, and I was forced here.
translations.chinese: 延崖洞穴内部。但最近亡者从沉睡中苏醒，我被迫来到这里。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Until then, tell the people of Markarth that their dead won't be disturbed, anymore. We have bigger plans ahead. | ZH: 在那之前，去告诉马卡斯城的人吧，他们的尸体不会再被打扰了。我们有更大的计划。 | SID: 00A8CE

translations.english: Namira covets your ugliness.
translations.chinese: 娜米拉垂涎你的丑陋。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Blessed are the forgotten. The wretched.
translations.chinese: 祝福那些被遗忘者和可怜人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Blessed are the forgotten. The wretched. | ZH: 祝福那些被遗忘者和可怜人。 | SID: 00BE5B

translations.english: The dead exist to feed the living.
translations.chinese: 死者的存在就是为了供养生者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000819DB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The dead exist to feed the living. | ZH: 死者的存在就是为了供养生者。 | SID: 00AB15

translations.english: Divines preserve you, you're a hero. We'll re-open the Hall right away.
translations.chinese: 圣灵保佑你。你是个英雄。我们会很快重新开放大厅。

translations.english: Here. Take my amulet as a reward.
translations.chinese: 来。我这个护符算是谢礼。

translations.english: Restore to me my beacon, that I might guide you toward your destiny.
translations.chinese: 把我的信标归还。我会指引你走向自己的命运。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00081C4F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Restore to me my beacon, that I might guide you toward your destiny. | ZH: 把我的信标归还。我会指引你走向自己的命运。 | SID: 008805

translations.english: If they love me not, how can my love reach them?
translations.chinese: 如果他们不爱我，我的爱又如何触及他们？

translations.english: Look at my temple, lying in ruins. So much for the constancy of mortals, their crafts and their hearts.
translations.chinese: 看看我的神庙，倒在废墟当中。凡人的坚定、技艺还有虔诚也就如此而已。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: But first, you must restore to me my beacon.
translations.chinese: 但首先，你得先取回我的信标。

translations.english: I shall guide you unto it. Find it and return here. And great shall be your reward.
translations.chinese: 我会指引你到那去。找到它并回到这里。到时候你会收到巨大的奖赏。

translations.english: Return my beacon to Mount Kilkreath.
translations.chinese: 把我的信标带回基尔克瑞斯山。

translations.english: And I will make you the instrument of my cleansing light.
translations.chinese: 我会让你成为我洁净之光的工具。

agentText:

EDID: [00081C52]
