translations.english: Return to my figure on Mount Kilkreath, and I shall make you the instrument of my cleansing light.
translations.chinese: 到基尔克瑞斯山找到我的神像，我会让你成为我洁净之光的工具。

translations.english: But it is not time for rejoicing. The defiler continues to profane my temple.
translations.chinese: 但还不是高兴的时候。亵渎者还在玷污我的神庙。

translations.english: You have found my beacon.
translations.chinese: 你已经找到了我的信标。

translations.english: Take my beacon to the mount above Kilkreath.
translations.chinese: 带着我的信标去基尔克瑞斯山。

translations.english: Do you prefer heedlessness to my luminous glory? Go!
translations.chinese: 你敢对我的辉煌荣耀如此漫不经心？快去！

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: A Light that could illuminate Skyrim and her people.
translations.chinese: 能够照亮天际与她的人民的光芒。

translations.english: Fool! He is perverting my Light.
translations.chinese: 笨蛋！他在扭曲我的光芒。

translations.chinese: 不在这儿。在延崖洞穴见面。

EDID: [00081C7E]

translations.chinese: 那我等你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00081C7F]

translations.english: I was hoping you would say that.
translations.chinese: 我正等着你说呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00081CC5]

translations.english: You've come. The draugr infesting Namira's sanctuary are inside.
translations.chinese: 你来了。侵扰娜米拉圣所的尸鬼就在里面。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00081D00]

translations.english: He made it safe for our kind.
translations.chinese: 他庇护了我族的安全。

translations.english: Wuuthrad was the blade held by Ysgramor when he cut through the elven hordes that once swarmed this land.
translations.chinese: 巫斯拉德是伊斯格拉默斩杀曾经盘踞这片土地的精灵部落时手持的武器。

agentText:

translations.english: This is a simple errand, but the time is right for it to be your Trial. Carry yourself with honor, and you'll become a true Companion.
translations.chinese: 这是个简单的任务，但现在是时候给你一次试炼了。带着荣誉成为真正的战友吧。

translations.english: I hope I didn't scare you.
translations.chinese: 希望没有吓到你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00081DE1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope I didn't scare you. | ZH: 希望没有吓到你。 | SID: 009089

translations.english: We've decided this will be your Trial. Do well, and you'll be counted among the Companions.
translations.chinese: 我们决定把这个作为你的试炼。做得好的话，你就可以算作真正的战友团成员了。

translations.english: There's a fine line between respect and boot-licking, new blood. But I like your spirit.
translations.chinese: 尊敬与马屁之间有着微妙的差别，新人。不过我很喜欢你的精神。

translations.english: Wuuthrad is a relic of Ysgramor. Through that weapon, we trace our line straight to the first harbinger of makind in this land.
translations.chinese: 巫斯拉德是伊斯格拉默的遗物。我们藉由那件武器，追寻着这片土地上的首位先驱。

translations.english: What fragments we have are displayed in honor, but we always seek more.
translations.chinese: 我们持有的所有碎片都被展示出来以示敬意，但我们还在设法找回更多碎片。

translations.chinese: 嗯？有事吗，我很忙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008256F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes? Make it quick, I'm a busy man. | ZH: 嗯？有事吗，我很忙。 | SID: 00D2F1

translations.english: Does he have information about our wonderful discovery?
translations.chinese: 他有关于我们伟大发现的信息吗？

translations.english: Did he now?
translations.chinese: 是吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: This marvelous object. It practically radiates magicka, and yet it's unlike anything I've felt before.
translations.chinese: 真是个奇妙的物体。散发着魔法的气息，但我却从未有过这种感觉。

translations.english: If you'd allow me to indulge myself for a moment, I thought I might make a few observations...
translations.chinese: 如果你允许我放纵一下，我可以发表些看法……

translations.english: I just can't seem to tear myself away. Whatever this is, its beauty is like nothing I've ever seen before.
translations.chinese: 我好像就是舍不得离开一样。不管这到底是什么，我从未见过如此美的东西。

translations.chinese: 我会重新去读一遍，细节有些记不清了。

translations.english: Is that the one about something buried beneath Saarthal? Something that men and mer fought over?
translations.chinese: 是关于萨瑟尔下面埋着的东西吗？那是人莫共同争夺的东西？

translations.chinese: 我们要合力阻止这些巨龙，即使要把它们挨个打回地里。

translations.english: Now our purpose is clear. I'm all that's left of the Blades, and you're the Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 现在我们的目的明确了。我是刀锋会残存的全部，而你是龙裔。

translations.english: The Blades have always guarded and guided the Dragonborn. But we'd forgotten why.
translations.chinese: 刀锋会一直在守护、指引着龙裔。不过我们忘记了原因。

translations.english: No doubt exactly as the Thalmor intended.
translations.chinese: 不用说，这正是梭默想要的。

translations.english: The Nords didn't like the peace treaty much either. Thirty years later, the Empire ends up with the Stormcloak rebellion on its hands.
translations.chinese: 诺德人不喜欢这份和平条约。三十年过去了，帝国还是因风暴斗篷叛乱而分崩离析了。

translations.english: Part of the cost of peace. Emperor Titus Mede saved his Empire at a very high price. A price that included the Blades.
translations.chinese: 这是和平代价的一部分。提图斯·迈德皇帝以高昂的代价拯救了他的帝国。一份包括刀锋会在内的代价。

translations.chinese: 多亏了白金协定，他们才能在帝国各地穿梭却不受惩罚。

translations.chinese: 他们相信如果我们能够找到一位龙裔，就必须保护她不受梭默的伤害。

translations.chinese: 但现在当务之急是，你到底是不是龙裔。

translations.chinese: 梭默啊。我们是老对手了。如果我猜的没错，龙族回归就和他们有关。

translations.chinese: 你了解萨瑟尔吗？

translations.chinese: 他曾一度追寻自己的目标，现在却拿着我的馈赠自娱自乐。只有我才能享有娱乐之权。

translations.chinese: 记住：心有所愿，即能实现。

translations.english: Now go. I have strings to pull that require my full attention. You may pursue your own course wherever it leads you.
translations.chinese: 去吧。我还有需要专心处理的事。去追寻自己的道路吧。

translations.english: You may keep my Ebony Mail, a token of my appreciation to my new champion. Its gifts will resonate with your talents.
translations.chinese: 留下我的黑檀链甲，作为我对新勇士的酬谢。它之天赋与你之才能相得益彰。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Now go. I have strings to pull that require my full attention. You may pursue your own course wherever it leads you. | ZH: 去吧。我还有需要专心处理的事。去追寻自己的道路吧。 | SID: 00ABA6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: You may keep my Ebony Mail, a token of my appreciation to my new champion. Its gifts will resonate with your talents. | ZH: 留下我的黑檀链甲，作为我对新勇士的酬谢。它之天赋与你之才能相得益彰。 | SID: 00DC46

translations.english: Once his corpse lays cold upon the ground, and all trace of his followers erased, retrieve my Ebony Mail. A gift fit only for my true champion.
translations.chinese: 等他尸横于地，所有追随者被抹杀殆尽，就拿回我的黑檀链甲。这份礼物只能由我真正的勇士持有。

translations.english: Slay him in the coldest of blood. Do not give him the dignity of defending himself.
translations.chinese: 冷血无情地杀戮他。不要给他辩白的尊严。

translations.english: Kill every single member of his band. Do so as silently and invisibly as you can, for this is not about you. You are to be my instrument in this.
translations.chinese: 杀掉他的所有同伴。尽量悄无声息地杀死他们。因为这不关你事，你只是我的工具。

translations.english: If you're looking for anything to sell for a fair price, I run the Pawned Prawn over by the market.
translations.chinese: 如果你想找什么能卖个好价钱的东西，我在市场旁边开了一家叫典当小虾的店。

translations.english: If you're ever in the market, I deal in specialty goods from Morrowind at one of the stands.
translations.chinese: 路过市场来我的摊位看看，都是晨风的特产。

translations.english: Come see me in the market if you're looking for the finest custom jewelry in all of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 如果你在寻找全天际最好的定制珠宝，可以到市场来找我。

translations.english: Enjoy the city. It will suit you well.
translations.chinese: 好好享受这座城市吧。很适合你。

translations.english: You disappoint me. I expected someone from outside Riften to be different, but I see corruption's reach holds little regard for boundaries.
translations.chinese: 你让我很失望。我原以为裂谷城以外的人会有些不同，但我发现腐败的影响范围简直没有界限。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Enjoy the city. It will suit you well. | ZH: 好好享受这座城市吧。很适合你。 | SID: 008EF4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You disappoint me. I expected someone from outside Riften to be different, but I see corruption's reach holds little regard for boundaries. | ZH: 你让我很失望。我原以为裂谷城以外的人会有些不同，但我发现腐败的影响范围简直没有界限。 | SID: 00A80A

translations.english: Draw the harmonic energy into the reagent or allow it to generate its own field?
translations.chinese: 把谐波能量引入试剂还是让它产生自己的力场？

translations.english: Putting aside Ralston's Constant of Universal Inversion for a moment, how would you approach the problem?
translations.chinese: 先不管拉尔斯顿的通用反转常数了，你是怎么解决这个问题的？

translations.english: Ah ha! So you're a student of theoretical applied harmonics!
translations.chinese: 啊哈！你是谐波理论应用的啊！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083A8E]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Putting aside Ralston's Constant of Universal Inversion for a moment, how would you approach the problem? | ZH: 先不管拉尔斯顿的通用反转常数了，你是怎么解决这个问题的？ | SID: 00113E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Ah ha! So you're a student of theoretical applied harmonics! | ZH: 啊哈！你是谐波理论应用的啊！ | SID: 003505

translations.english: That's a shame. Too many people in Riften share your view and look where its getting them.
translations.chinese: 太可耻了。裂谷城有太多人和你想的一样，看看他们的下场吧。

translations.english: It's going to take more than just myself and Aerin to help this city... it has to want to help itself first.
translations.chinese: 要帮助这座城市，光靠我和艾灵是不够的……它必须首先学会自救。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083A90]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It's going to take more than just myself and Aerin to help this city... it has to want to help itself first. | ZH: 要帮助这座城市，光靠我和艾灵是不够的……它必须首先学会自救。 | SID: 00A804

translations.english: You know, I'm beginning to respect you. Other than Aerin, you seem to be the only other person I've met I might be able to trust.
translations.chinese: 你知道吗，我开始尊重你了。除了艾灵之外，你几乎是我见过的人里唯一值得信任的。

translations.english: Since we share the same opinion of them, let me warn you that they're recruiting others to join their "guild" and you should be cautious.
translations.chinese: 既然我们对他们看法相同，那我得提醒你，他们正在拉人加入他们的“公会”，你最好谨慎些。

translations.english: When my strength returned and he told me about the problems plaguing Riften, I decided fate brought me here for a reason... so I stayed.
translations.chinese: 当我力量恢复以后，他告诉我裂谷城的困难时，我认定命运把我带到这里来是有原因的……所以我留下来了。

translations.english: It was Aerin who found me dying outside of a Dwemer ruin. If he hadn't brought me here and nursed me back to health, I would have died.
translations.chinese: 是艾灵发现我在锻莫遗迹外垂死。如果不是他带我来这里照顾我恢复健康，我早就死了。

agentText:

EDID: [00083A92]

translations.english: Astonishing. To think you actually were able to reach it and yet return to tell the tale.
translations.chinese: 太惊人了。你居然能到达那里却还活着回来讲这段故事。

translations.english: I see I still have much to learn. If you'd permit me, I'd be honored to accompany you in your travels for a time.
translations.chinese: 看来我还有很多东西要学。如果你允许的话，我很愿意陪你旅行一段时间。

translations.english: Rarely in my travels have I encountered those who possess skills equal to your own.
translations.chinese: 在我旅行当中，很少遇到你这样有本事的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I see I still have much to learn. If you'd permit me, I'd be honored to accompany you in your travels for a time. | ZH: 看来我还有很多东西要学。如果你允许的话，我很愿意陪你旅行一段时间。 | SID: 00B0EE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Rarely in my travels have I encountered those who possess skills equal to your own. | ZH: 在我旅行当中，很少遇到你这样有本事的人。 | SID: 00C892

translations.english: That has to be the most brilliant and unexpected solution I've heard in a long time. It solves all of my problems and keeps the field stable!
translations.chinese: 这肯定是我这么长时间以来听过最聪明和意想不到的解决方案了。我所有问题都解决了，力场可以稳定了！

translations.english: Are you completely insane? Swallow a soul gem?
translations.chinese: 你是疯了吗？吞噬灵魂石？

translations.english: Now all I need... wait, what were we talking about?
translations.chinese: 现在我需要……等等，我们在说什么？

translations.english: That completely takes care of all your basic problems, magicka burn, dimensional collapse and thermic drift!
translations.chinese: 这完全解决了你所有的基本问题，魔能燃烧、空间坍缩和热量漂移！

translations.english: You've done it! Now, if I can only remember what we were originally talking about.
translations.chinese: 你成功了！现在，如果我还记得我们最初在说什么。

translations.english: Of course! Nine is the most basic of magical principles. Oh, how stupid of me.
translations.chinese: 没错！第九定律是最基本的魔法原理。哦，我真笨啊。

translations.english: The Thieves Guild has been pushing hard to regain a foothold in this city. Rumor has it they're falling apart from the inside.
translations.chinese: 盗贼公会一直在努力争取重新在城里立足。有传言说他们正在分崩离析。

translations.english: Please be careful, I don't wish to be the reason for your death.
translations.chinese: 请小心，我不想害死你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083A97]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please be careful, I don't wish to be the reason for your death. | ZH: 请小心，我不想害死你。 | SID: 00262B

translations.english: Safe travels.
translations.chinese: 一路安全。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083A9A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Safe travels. | ZH: 一路安全。 | SID: 007E01

translations.english: Genius! And I'm sure you've completely worked out how to counteract complete dimensional collapse, right?
translations.chinese: 天才想法！你已经能对抗完全的空间坍缩了吧？

translations.english: Hold on, you've given me a brilliant idea. Just as calipers hold materials in place, a soul siphon can hold magic fields in place.
translations.chinese: 等下，你给了我一个绝妙的想法。就像卡钳把材料固定在合适的位置上一样，灵魂虹吸管也可以把魔法力场固定好位置。

translations.english: Calipers? That's utterly ridiculous. Maybe long ago, you could just find calipers in every household across Tamriel, but not anymore.
translations.chinese: 卡钳？太荒谬了。也许很久以前，你在泰姆瑞尔家家户户都能找到卡钳，但现在不行了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Hold on, you've given me a brilliant idea. Just as calipers hold materials in place, a soul siphon can hold magic fields in place. | ZH: 等下，你给了我一个绝妙的想法。就像卡钳把材料固定在合适的位置上一样，灵魂虹吸管也可以把魔法力场固定好位置。 | SID: 00A7F1

translations.english: The blue thing? But even the simplest harmonic field is composed of entirely...
translations.chinese: 蓝色的？但就算是最简单的调和力场也是完全由……

translations.english: But wait. What about soul reversal? You must be aware of the consequences when using the apparatus near an open magic field.
translations.chinese: 但还是等一下。灵魂逆转怎么办？必须得意识到在开放的魔法力场附近使用装置的后果。

translations.english: Wait just a moment. The blue thing. Yes, yes, yes! I can see your point. Draw out the necessary energies using a Jarol Apparatus!
translations.chinese: 稍等一下。蓝色的。对，对，对！我明白你的意思了。用迦罗尔装置吸取必要的能量！

translations.english: Ah, you're back. What have you discovered?
translations.chinese: 啊，你回来了。有什么发现么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083AA2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, you're back. What have you discovered? | ZH: 啊，你回来了。有什么发现么？ | SID: 0051D8

translations.english: Well met, friend. How can I help you?
translations.chinese: 你好，朋友。有什么可以帮你的吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083AA3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well met, friend. How can I help you? | ZH: 你好，朋友。有什么可以帮你的吗？ | SID: 000BD8

translations.english: You're a stranger here too, eh?
translations.chinese: 你对这里也不熟吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083AA4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're a stranger here too, eh? | ZH: 你对这里也不熟吧？ | SID: 00C874

translations.english: I mean, it would take months... years to work out the differentials. But what a revolutionary concept.
translations.chinese: 我是说，这会花好几个月时间……要数年时间才能算出差异。但这个概念太革命性了。

translations.english: Wait, wait. I can see a minor problem in your theory. Without a soul siphon, how would you prevent permanent magicka burn?
translations.chinese: 等等，等等。我从你的理论里看出一个小问题。没有灵魂虹吸，你是怎么防止永久性的魔能燃烧的？

translations.english: Seven. Astonishing. I hadn't considered that.
translations.chinese: 第七定理。太惊人了。我没有考虑到这点。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Seven. Astonishing. I hadn't considered that. | ZH: 第七定理。太惊人了。我没有考虑到这点。 | SID: 00A7E9

translations.english: He requests more barrels of ichor to be delivered to the Arcanex tomorrow.
translations.chinese: 他要求我们明天再往奥术室送更多桶脓液。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083FF7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He requests more barrels of ichor to be delivered to the Arcanex tomorrow. | ZH: 他要求我们明天再往奥术室送更多桶脓液。 | SID: 00A7C9

translations.english: Orchendor promised a place where we would be accepted and taken care of.
translations.chinese: 奥尘多答应给我们找一个能够得到接纳和照顾的地方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083FF8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Orchendor promised a place where we would be accepted and taken care of. | ZH: 奥尘多答应给我们找一个能够得到接纳和照顾的地方。 | SID: 00A7D9

translations.english: Yes, what is it?
translations.chinese: 啊，什么事？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083FF9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, what is it? | ZH: 啊，什么事？ | SID: 00A7C8

translations.english: We've been here so long and what do we have to show for it?
translations.chinese: 我们在这里待了这么久，又证明了什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083FFA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We've been here so long and what do we have to show for it? | ZH: 我们在这里待了这么久，又证明了什么？ | SID: 003598

translations.english: I'm sorry to wake you, my Brother. I have a request from Orchendor.
translations.chinese: 很抱歉把你吵醒了，兄弟。奥尘多有个任务。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083FFB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm sorry to wake you, my Brother. I have a request from Orchendor. | ZH: 很抱歉把你吵醒了，兄弟。奥尘多有个任务。 | SID: 0026EB

translations.english: I know you can't hear me, brother. I don't like what we've become.
translations.chinese: 我知道你听不到我说话，兄弟。我不喜欢我们的现状。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083FFC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I know you can't hear me, brother. I don't like what we've become. | ZH: 我知道你听不到我说话，兄弟。我不喜欢我们的现状。 | SID: 00A7D7

translations.english: Keep your eyes and ears open my Brothers and Sisters. Orchendor needs us to keep vigilant while he convenes with Peryite in the Arcanex.
translations.chinese: 睁大眼睛，竖起耳朵，兄弟姐妹们。奥尘多要我们在他在奥术室与魄伊特会面时保持警戒。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083FFD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Keep your eyes and ears open my Brothers and Sisters. Orchendor needs us to keep vigilant while he convenes with Peryite in the Arcanex. | ZH: 睁大眼睛，竖起耳朵，兄弟姐妹们。奥尘多要我们在他在奥术室与魄伊特会面时保持警戒。 | SID: 00A7C6

translations.english: Are you asleep?
translations.chinese: 你睡着了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083FFE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Are you asleep? | ZH: 你睡着了吗？ | SID: 001160

translations.english: Yes, suffer for you.
translations.chinese: 没错，为您忍受痛苦。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00083FFF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, suffer for you. | ZH: 没错，为您忍受痛苦。 | SID: 002CD1

translations.english: Yes, yes, as with you. Now be off.
translations.chinese: 好，好，也与你同在。走开吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084000]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, yes, as with you. Now be off. | ZH: 好，好，也与你同在。走开吧。 | SID: 0081BE

translations.english: Yes, show yourself to us. Until that day, we will continue to devote our lives to you and suffer for you.
translations.chinese: 没错，请降临吧。在那一天到来之前，我们会继续为您奉献我们的生命，为您忍受痛苦。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008401B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, show yourself to us. Until that day, we will continue to devote our lives to you and suffer for you. | ZH: 没错，请降临吧。在那一天到来之前，我们会继续为您奉献我们的生命，为您忍受痛苦。 | SID: 0039B7

translations.english: I know this place will eventually kill us. I have come to accept that. But I will always regret that day I introduced you to Orchendor.
translations.chinese: 我知道这地方最后一定会害死咱们。我已经接受了。但我后悔那天把你介绍给了奥尘多。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084055]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I know this place will eventually kill us. I have come to accept that. But I will always regret that day I introduced you to Orchendor. | ZH: 我知道这地方最后一定会害死咱们。我已经接受了。但我后悔那天把你介绍给了奥尘多。 | SID: 0035B6

translations.english: Yes, my Brother. Forgive me. May the blessing of Peryite be with you.
translations.chinese: 好的，兄弟。原谅我。愿魄伊特的祝福与你同在。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840B9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, my Brother. Forgive me. May the blessing of Peryite be with you. | ZH: 好的，兄弟。原谅我。愿魄伊特的祝福与你同在。 | SID: 00738E

translations.english: Yes, a sign. We are lost without your guidance.
translations.chinese: 没错，一个启示。没有您的指引，我们已经迷失了方向。

translations.english: On the ninth of Rain's Hand our prayers went unanswered, yet here we stand, not faltering in our belief that soon you will show yourself to us.
translations.chinese: 雨手月九日的祈祷没有得到回应，但我们仍旧恭候在此，坚信您很快会降临到我们面前。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840BA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yes, a sign. We are lost without your guidance. | ZH: 没错，一个启示。没有您的指引，我们已经迷失了方向。 | SID: 00A7C0
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: On the ninth of Rain's Hand our prayers went unanswered, yet here we stand, not faltering in our belief that soon you will show yourself to us. | ZH: 雨手月九日的祈祷没有得到回应，但我们仍旧恭候在此，坚信您很快会降临到我们面前。 | SID: 00AF50

translations.english: But who am I kidding, I know you wouldn't let me leave, brother. You truly believe in Orchendor and his promises.
translations.chinese: 但我这是自欺欺人，我知道你不会让我离开的，兄弟。你是真的相信奥尘多和他的承诺。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840BB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But who am I kidding, I know you wouldn't let me leave, brother. You truly believe in Orchendor and his promises. | ZH: 但我这是自欺欺人，我知道你不会让我离开的，兄弟。你是真的相信奥尘多和他的承诺。 | SID: 00611E

translations.english: Now leave me to my sleep. My strength and patience are waning.
translations.chinese: 现在，让我睡觉吧。我的力量和耐心都在衰退。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840BC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Now leave me to my sleep. My strength and patience are waning. | ZH: 现在，让我睡觉吧。我的力量和耐心都在衰退。 | SID: 00A7D3

translations.english: If we do not please you, give us a sign so that we may understand why.
translations.chinese: 我们若不蒙您的欣悦，请您给我们一个启示，让我们明白其中的缘故吧。

translations.english: Yes, a blessing. For many months we have sought your guidance, yet we have heard nothing from you.
translations.chinese: 没错，一种赐福。几个月以来我们一直在寻求您的指引，但我们没有收到任何启示。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840BD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If we do not please you, give us a sign so that we may understand why. | ZH: 我们若不蒙您的欣悦，请您给我们一个启示，让我们明白其中的缘故吧。 | SID: 00A7B8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yes, a blessing. For many months we have sought your guidance, yet we have heard nothing from you. | ZH: 没错，一种赐福。几个月以来我们一直在寻求您的指引，但我们没有收到任何启示。 | SID: 00A7BD

translations.english: I want out. I want to leave this place. I long for the fresh air of the Reach. This place only makes us sicker.
translations.chinese: 我想出去。我想离开这个地方。我想呼吸瑞驰的新鲜空气。这个地方只会让我们更虚弱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840BE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I want out. I want to leave this place. I long for the fresh air of the Reach. This place only makes us sicker. | ZH: 我想出去。我想离开这个地方。我想呼吸瑞驰的新鲜空气。这个地方只会让我们更虚弱。 | SID: 00D59E

translations.english: I'm sorry my Brother.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，兄弟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840BF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm sorry my Brother. | ZH: 抱歉，兄弟。 | SID: 00A7CE

translations.english: He has shown us that our suffering is not a punishment, but a blessing.
translations.chinese: 他告诉我们，我们的苦痛不是惩罚，而是一种赐福。

translations.english: Peryite, heed our call if you deem us worthy. Our leader, Orchendor, has led us here and for that we are thankful.
translations.chinese: 魄伊特，如果您认为我们值得，请聆听我们的召唤吧。我们的领袖，奥尘多，将我们带领到了这里，为此我们心怀感激。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840C0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: He has shown us that our suffering is not a punishment, but a blessing. | ZH: 他告诉我们，我们的苦痛不是惩罚，而是一种赐福。 | SID: 00A049
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Peryite, heed our call if you deem us worthy. Our leader, Orchendor, has led us here and for that we are thankful. | ZH: 魄伊特，如果您认为我们值得，请聆听我们的召唤吧。我们的领袖，奥尘多，将我们带领到了这里，为此我们心怀感激。 | SID: 00A7B6

translations.english: Forgive me for saying this, brother, but I have not felt Peryite's presence.
translations.chinese: 但原谅我这么说，兄弟，我没有感受到魄伊特的存在。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840C1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Forgive me for saying this, brother, but I have not felt Peryite's presence. | ZH: 但原谅我这么说，兄弟，我没有感受到魄伊特的存在。 | SID: 00A7DE

translations.english: This is the reason you wake me? I already have Orchendor's request taken care of.
translations.chinese: 这就是你叫醒我的理由？我已经把奥尘多的要求完成了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840C2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is the reason you wake me? I already have Orchendor's request taken care of. | ZH: 这就是你叫醒我的理由？我已经把奥尘多的要求完成了。 | SID: 00A7CA

translations.english: He promised Peryite would be present at all times and give us comfort in our suffering.
translations.chinese: 他承诺魄伊特永远与我们同在，能在我们痛苦的时候给我们安慰。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000840C3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He promised Peryite would be present at all times and give us comfort in our suffering. | ZH: 他承诺魄伊特永远与我们同在，能在我们痛苦的时候给我们安慰。 | SID: 00A7DC

translations.english: Skyforge Steel is all the Companions will use, for good reason.
translations.chinese: 天空锻炉钢被每个战友团成员使用不是没理由的。

translations.english: The Skyforge? Aye, my clan-fathers have worked it since the first Gray-Manes came to Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 天空锻炉吗？是啊，自从第一批灰鬃氏族人来到白漫城，我的先祖就在这里工作了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084794]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Skyforge Steel is all the Companions will use, for good reason. | ZH: 天空锻炉钢被每个战友团成员使用不是没理由的。 | SID: 00BDC7
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The Skyforge? Aye, my clan-fathers have worked it since the first Gray-Manes came to Whiterun. | ZH: 天空锻炉吗？是啊，自从第一批灰鬃氏族人来到白漫城，我的先祖就在这里工作了。 | SID: 00CDE8

translations.english: Skyforge Steel is my art and honor. The Companions need the best, so they come to me.
translations.chinese: 天空锻炉钢是我的杰作和荣誉。战友团需要最好的装备，所以他们找我。

translations.english: Why? Who says I have to be?
translations.chinese: 什么？谁说我必须得是了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084796]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Skyforge Steel is my art and honor. The Companions need the best, so they come to me. | ZH: 天空锻炉钢是我的杰作和荣誉。战友团需要最好的装备，所以他们找我。 | SID: 00A79A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Why? Who says I have to be? | ZH: 什么？谁说我必须得是了？ | SID: 00ACBF

translations.english: We've got honor. Wealth and titles, too. Aye, and buxom women to warm your bed on a cold Skyrim night.
translations.chinese: 我们拥有荣耀、财富和头衔。是啊，还有丰满的女人在天际的寒夜给你暖床。

translations.english: "For Clan Battle-Born!" they cry in the mead halls. "First into the fray and last to quit their ale!"
translations.chinese: 他们在蜜酒大厅呼喊“为了战狂氏族！”。“一马当先，最后放弃！”

translations.english: Battle-Born is a name out of legend, sung in the songs of old and heard in deeds of valor for a hundred generations.
translations.chinese: 战狂是个传奇的名号，传唱于古老的诗歌，百代英雄的事迹中时有耳闻。

translations.english: Now if that don't answer your question, then no words will.
translations.chinese: 如果这还不能解答你的问题，那也就没什么可说的了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084797]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: We've got honor. Wealth and titles, too. Aye, and buxom women to warm your bed on a cold Skyrim night. | ZH: 我们拥有荣耀、财富和头衔。是啊，还有丰满的女人在天际的寒夜给你暖床。 | SID: 001223
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: "For Clan Battle-Born!" they cry in the mead halls. "First into the fray and last to quit their ale!" | ZH: 他们在蜜酒大厅呼喊“为了战狂氏族！”。“一马当先，最后放弃！” | SID: 006181
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Battle-Born is a name out of legend, sung in the songs of old and heard in deeds of valor for a hundred generations. | ZH: 战狂是个传奇的名号，传唱于古老的诗歌，百代英雄的事迹中时有耳闻。 | SID: 008876
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Now if that don't answer your question, then no words will. | ZH: 如果这还不能解答你的问题，那也就没什么可说的了。 | SID: 00DD44

translations.english: Uncivilized, pelt-wearing axe-draggers. It's a wonder they don't still live in a cave like those ancestors they keep boasting about.
translations.chinese: 不开化、穿皮带毛、拿着斧头的落后者。他们没学他们祖宗去住山洞真是个奇迹。

translations.english: It's true the Vignar Gray-Mane and his lot are one of Whiterun's oldest and, depending on who you ask, most respected clans. I don't dispute that.
translations.chinese: 确实，维吉纳·灰鬃和他的氏族是白漫最古老的家族之一，也是最受尊敬的家族。我对此无异议。

translations.english: But it's one thing to take pride in your lineage, and another to cling blindly to the past. What they call honor and tradition, I call ignorance.
translations.chinese: 但为自己的血统感到骄傲是一回事，盲目固守过去是另一回事。他们所谓的荣誉和传统，在我看来就是无知的代名词。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084798]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Uncivilized, pelt-wearing axe-draggers. It's a wonder they don't still live in a cave like those ancestors they keep boasting about. | ZH: 不开化、穿皮带毛、拿着斧头的落后者。他们没学他们祖宗去住山洞真是个奇迹。 | SID: 0001BB
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: It's true the Vignar Gray-Mane and his lot are one of Whiterun's oldest and, depending on who you ask, most respected clans. I don't dispute that. | ZH: 确实，维吉纳·灰鬃和他的氏族是白漫最古老的家族之一，也是最受尊敬的家族。我对此无异议。 | SID: 00A7AA
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But it's one thing to take pride in your lineage, and another to cling blindly to the past. What they call honor and tradition, I call ignorance. | ZH: 但为自己的血统感到骄傲是一回事，盲目固守过去是另一回事。他们所谓的荣誉和传统，在我看来就是无知的代名词。 | SID: 00F41A

translations.english: We've got the same pride, the same honor, and we've got wealth. No wonder they envy us.
translations.chinese: 我们拥有同样的骄傲和荣誉，但我们拥有财富。难怪他们羡慕嫉妒。

translations.english: Oh, and they hate it, too. All their big talk of pride and honor, and what have they got to show for it? Beggar's rags and stale bread.
translations.chinese: 哦，他们也讨厌钱。他们喜欢大谈骄傲和荣誉，他们有什么可炫耀的？穿着破布头子啃老面包。

translations.english: The Gray-Manes have deep roots in Whiterun, but so do we. Difference is, we're rich, and Vignar hates it.
translations.chinese: 灰鬃氏族和我们在白漫城都是树大根深。不同在于，我们有钱，而维吉纳讨厌这一点。

translations.english: Money, you laggard! What else? It always comes down to coin.
translations.chinese: 钱，笨蛋！还能有什么？归根到底还是钱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084799]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: We've got the same pride, the same honor, and we've got wealth. No wonder they envy us. | ZH: 我们拥有同样的骄傲和荣誉，但我们拥有财富。难怪他们羡慕嫉妒。 | SID: 008950
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Oh, and they hate it, too. All their big talk of pride and honor, and what have they got to show for it? Beggar's rags and stale bread. | ZH: 哦，他们也讨厌钱。他们喜欢大谈骄傲和荣誉，他们有什么可炫耀的？穿着破布头子啃老面包。 | SID: 00A7AE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The Gray-Manes have deep roots in Whiterun, but so do we. Difference is, we're rich, and Vignar hates it. | ZH: 灰鬃氏族和我们在白漫城都是树大根深。不同在于，我们有钱，而维吉纳讨厌这一点。 | SID: 00A7B1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Money, you laggard! What else? It always comes down to coin. | ZH: 钱，笨蛋！还能有什么？归根到底还是钱。 | SID: 00A7B2

translations.english: Somethin' out there is piss-drunk mad at us. I don't know who or what it is, but it's beyond just you and me. We've been cursed.
translations.chinese: 有什么东西在对我们感到愤怒。我不知道是谁，或者是什么，但这不是你我之间的事而已。我们都被诅咒了。

translations.english: Look, I know the others think I'm a bit daft for sayin' stuff like this, but I'm gonna give it to you straight.
translations.chinese: 听着，我知道别人觉得我这些话有点傻，但我还是得直言。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084803]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Somethin' out there is piss-drunk mad at us. I don't know who or what it is, but it's beyond just you and me. We've been cursed. | ZH: 有什么东西在对我们感到愤怒。我不知道是谁，或者是什么，但这不是你我之间的事而已。我们都被诅咒了。 | SID: 00A78C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Look, I know the others think I'm a bit daft for sayin' stuff like this, but I'm gonna give it to you straight. | ZH: 听着，我知道别人觉得我这些话有点傻，但我还是得直言。 | SID: 00A78D

translations.english: On the other hand, takin' some of these extra jobs off my hands, now that'll get you to the top of my list.
translations.chinese: 另外，我这里有些额外的工作，我可以为你优先安排。

translations.english: Lyin' to my face isn't gonna win you any favors with me, I can promise you that.
translations.chinese: 在我面前撒谎不会让你获得我一丁点好感，我保证。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084804]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: On the other hand, takin' some of these extra jobs off my hands, now that'll get you to the top of my list. | ZH: 另外，我这里有些额外的工作，我可以为你优先安排。 | SID: 0098C5
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Lyin' to my face isn't gonna win you any favors with me, I can promise you that. | ZH: 在我面前撒谎不会让你获得我一丁点好感，我保证。 | SID: 00A784

translations.english: And, while you're at it, make a little bit of coin on the side. Not a bad deal, eh?
translations.chinese: 而且，你做这些的时候，还能赚些钱。很不错的交易吧？

translations.english: You can get out there and start making a name for us again... make them start fearing us like they did long ago.
translations.chinese: 你可以走出去，为我们再次扬名……让他们像以前一样畏惧我们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008483B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And, while you're at it, make a little bit of coin on the side. Not a bad deal, eh? | ZH: 而且，你做这些的时候，还能赚些钱。很不错的交易吧？ | SID: 00A77A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You can get out there and start making a name for us again... make them start fearing us like they did long ago. | ZH: 你可以走出去，为我们再次扬名……让他们像以前一样畏惧我们。 | SID: 00A77F

translations.english: I'm not going to sugar-coat it for you. We're in a bad way down here.
translations.chinese: 我也不遮遮掩掩的了。我们现在的处境很糟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084841]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm not going to sugar-coat it for you. We're in a bad way down here. | ZH: 我也不遮遮掩掩的了。我们现在的处境很糟。 | SID: 00E770

translations.english: Now, it's time to get your feet wet and I don't want to waste a lot of time talking about anything but business.
translations.chinese: 现在，是时候去试一试了。除了业务上的事，我不想浪费时间谈别的。

translations.english: Then we understand each other... good.
translations.chinese: 那我们就达成共识了……很好。

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Then we understand each other... good. | ZH: 那我们就达成共识了……很好。 | SID: 00A766

translations.english: Brynjolf, huh? Lemme guess. He plucked you off the street and dropped you into the thick of things without tellin' you which way is up. Am I right?
translations.chinese: 布林乔夫吗？我猜猜。他从大街上把你拉下来，把你扔到纷繁复杂之中却不告诉你该往那边走，对吧？

translations.english: Oh, and talk to Tonilia in the Flagon... she'll set you up with your new armor.
translations.chinese: 哦，还有，去漏壶和托尼利亚谈谈……她会给你新的护甲。

translations.english: You should talk with Delvin Mallory and Vex. They know their way around this place and they'll be able to kick some extra jobs your way.
translations.chinese: 你该跟戴尔文·马洛里和小烦谈谈。他们对这里很熟悉，可以给你提供一些额外的工作。

translations.english: Simple. Do as you're told and keep your blade clean. We can't turn a profit by killing.
translations.chinese: 简单。照我说的做，刀刃别沾血。杀人赚不到钱。

translations.english: A few decades ago, this place was as busy as the Imperial City. Now, you're lucky if you don't trip over a skeever instead.
translations.chinese: 几十年前，这里如帝都一般繁华。现在，能不被恶鼠绊倒都是万幸。

translations.english: Look around you. The Flagon, the Guild... it's all fallin' apart.
translations.chinese: 看看你周围吧，漏壶、公会……一切都衰落了。

translations.english: If you want my opinion I say it's just plain old bad luck.
translations.chinese: 要我说，这就是普通的走霉运而已。

translations.english: Who knows. Old Delvin thinks it's some kind of a curse. I think he's crazy.
translations.chinese: 谁知道呢。老戴尔文觉得这是诅咒。我看他是疯了。

translations.english: Now you I like. I've been getting sick of the pushovers that usually walk in here.
translations.chinese: 我就喜欢你这样的。我已经受够了进来的那些软蛋。

translations.english: I think you and I are going to get along just fine.
translations.chinese: 我觉得咱们能相处得很好。

translations.english: Now, it's time to get your feet wet and I don't want to waste a lot of time talking about anything but business.
translations.chinese: 现在，是时候去试一试了。除了业务上的事，我不想浪费时间谈别的。

translations.english: Before we begin, I want to make two things perfectly clear.
translations.chinese: 在我们开始前，我要明确两件事。

translations.english: One, I'm the best infiltrator this rathole of a Guild's got, so if you think you're here to replace me, you're dead wrong.
translations.chinese: 第一，我是公会里最好的潜行者，如果你觉得自己能取代我，那就大错特错了。

translations.english: And two, you follow my lead and do exactly as I say... no questions, no excuses.
translations.chinese: 第二，听我指挥，按我说的做……没有疑问，没有借口。

translations.english: Welcome to the family, lad. I'm expecting you to make us a lot of coin, so don't disappoint me.
translations.chinese: 欢迎来到新家，小子。希望你能给我们赚大钱，所以千万别让我失望。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Welcome to the family, lass. I'm expecting you to make us a lot of coin, so don't disappoint me.
translations.chinese: 欢迎来到新家，姑娘。希望你能给我们赚大钱，所以千万别让我失望。

translations.english: Please. You're in the presence of a born huntsman. I can hear the sweat sliding down your forehead.
translations.chinese: 拜托。你面前可是个天生的猎人。我能听到汗水从你额头上流下来。

translations.english: I have my ways, but it's not easy these days.
translations.chinese: 我有自己的办法，但这段时间确实不容易。

translations.english: The Blackblood Marauders have been plundering ships off the coast. A lot of people been hurt by their foolishness.
translations.chinese: 黑血掠夺者一直在沿海抢掠船只。很多人被他们的愚蠢伤害到了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008497C]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The Blackblood Marauders have been plundering ships off the coast. A lot of people been hurt by their foolishness. | ZH: 黑血掠夺者一直在沿海抢掠船只。很多人被他们的愚蠢伤害到了。 | SID: 00AA20

translations.english: Oh, very brisk. When the snow sets in, even the hardiest Nord needs some spiced wine to warm the blood.
translations.chinese: 哦，非常好。下雪时，即使是最顽强的诺德人，也需要来点香料酒暖和暖和。

translations.english: Down at the docks. There are a few good spots, if you can avoid the East Empire Company workers and those Red Wave thugs.
translations.chinese: 码头那边。如果能避开东帝国公司的工人和赤红波浪的暴徒，那里有几个好地方。

translations.english: Well, as it turns out, I had a pet skeever when I was a boy and he used to wink.
translations.chinese: 我小时候养过一只宠物恶鼠，他经常眨眼睛。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084987]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, as it turns out, I had a pet skeever when I was a boy and he used to wink. | ZH: 我小时候养过一只宠物恶鼠，他经常眨眼睛。 | SID: 002338

translations.english: Radiant Raiment has the finest attire in all of Skyrim. That is how we get business.
translations.chinese: 锦衣服饰店有天际最好的服装。这就是我们拿到生意的办法。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Radiant Raiment has the finest attire in all of Skyrim. That is how we get business. | ZH: 锦衣服饰店有天际最好的服装。这就是我们拿到生意的办法。 | SID: 003DF2

translations.english: Nothing at all. It's very... nice. If you want something with a little more style, however, you should see what we have available.
translations.chinese: 并没有。已经很……好了。不过，如果你想要更独具风格，应该看看我们的货品。

translations.english: You could say I'm a King's man at heart. Hmph. I guess that's "Jarl's man" now.
translations.chinese: 你可以这么说，我实际上是至高王的子民。嗯，我猜现在应该说是“领主的子民”了。

translations.english: Ah... To be honest, no. But High King Torygg supported them, and now her lady Elisif has thrown in with them.
translations.chinese: 啊……说实话，没有。但至高王托依格支持他们，现在他的夫人艾利西弗也加入了他们。

translations.english: My loyalty lies with Solitude. So where Jarl Elisif leads, I follow.
translations.chinese: 我忠于独孤，所以艾利西弗领主说去哪儿，我就会跟到哪儿。

translations.english: All you need to do is ask and we can both come out of this smellin' like a rose.
translations.chinese: 你需要的只是来问我找工作，我们就都能走出泥潭回归荣光。

translations.english: I'll tell you what we do. We spit in that curse's face and turn things around down here. Put things back the way they were.
translations.chinese: 我来告诉你怎么做。我们得向那个诅咒啐口水，把这里的一切扭转回来。把一切恢复原样。

translations.english: That's where you come in. I've got plenty of work available that could guide us down the road to recovery.
translations.chinese: 这就是你的作用所在。我有很多工作可以帮助咱们走出困境。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084AB3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: All you need to do is ask and we can both come out of this smellin' like a rose. | ZH: 你需要的只是来问我找工作，我们就都能走出泥潭回归荣光。 | SID: 001550
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I'll tell you what we do. We spit in that curse's face and turn things around down here. Put things back the way they were. | ZH: 我来告诉你怎么做。我们得向那个诅咒啐口水，把这里的一切扭转回来。把一切恢复原样。 | SID: 009C84
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: That's where you come in. I've got plenty of work available that could guide us down the road to recovery. | ZH: 这就是你的作用所在。我有很多工作可以帮助咱们走出困境。 | SID: 00A78F

translations.english: So, if you've got the nerve, I've got plenty of extra jobs to help get the Guild back on its feet.
translations.chinese: 所以，只要你有勇气，我这里有的是额外工作，可以帮助公会重回正轨。

translations.english: See, that kind of attitude comes from someone who wants to get rich and stay alive long enough to enjoy it. We're goin' to get along nicely.
translations.chinese: 你看，有这种态度的人，才能够变得富贵且能够长久享受富贵。我们会相处很好的。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: See, that kind of attitude comes from someone who wants to get rich and stay alive long enough to enjoy it. We're goin' to get along nicely. | ZH: 你看，有这种态度的人，才能够变得富贵且能够长久享受富贵。我们会相处很好的。 | SID: 006194

translations.english: I thought so.
translations.chinese: 我也这么想。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084AB6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I thought so. | ZH: 我也这么想。 | SID: 00E6CF

translations.english: If something's being handed to you on a silver platter, then there's a catch... steal the platter instead. You get it?
translations.chinese: 如果有东西放在银盘上送到你手里，记住……连着盘子一起端走。明白吗？

translations.english: Let me give you a small bit of advice. Nothing in this line of work is easy. If it was, every dreg in the Ratway would be robbing Riften blind.
translations.chinese: 给你些小建议吧。做这行的，没有轻松可言。如果有的话，那鼠道里的人渣岂不是都能去裂谷城偷东西了。

translations.english: Easy, huh? So, should I just hand you purses of coin or are you going to work to earn your keep?
translations.chinese: 放松？那到底是我直接给你钱，还是你自己出去工作养活自己？

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Let me give you a small bit of advice. Nothing in this line of work is easy. If it was, every dreg in the Ratway would be robbing Riften blind. | ZH: 给你些小建议吧。做这行的，没有轻松可言。如果有的话，那鼠道里的人渣岂不是都能去裂谷城偷东西了。 | SID: 00A76A

translations.english: I'm afraid there's not much to be said. Winterhold is hardly what it used to be.
translations.chinese: 恐怕没什么好说的了。冬堡比过去差太多了。

translations.english: Most of the business we get is from folks here to visit the College, though even that's dried up some.
translations.chinese: 我们大部分生意都来自参观学院的人，尽管这种生意现在也少了些。

translations.english: You can talk to Birna if you need to buy anything. She doesn't have much, but could certainly use the coin. And then there's our little inn.
translations.chinese: 如果想买东西，可以去找比尔娜。她东西不多，但肯定有能用的。然后就是我们的小旅店了。

translations.english: What can you tell me about Winterhold?
translations.chinese: 你能跟我说说冬堡吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00084B89]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I'm afraid there's not much to be said. Winterhold is hardly what it used to be. | ZH: 恐怕没什么好说的了。冬堡比过去差太多了。 | SID: 001D6D
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Most of the business we get is from folks here to visit the College, though even that's dried up some. | ZH: 我们大部分生意都来自参观学院的人，尽管这种生意现在也少了些。 | SID: 0093A8

translations.english: If you're thinking of applying, talk to Viarmo in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 如果你想申请入学，去独孤城和维阿墨谈谈吧。

translations.english: It's a school that teaches music, poetry, that sort of thing. Most bards in Skyrim have been to the college at some point.
translations.chinese: 教授音乐和诗歌的学校。天际大多数吟游诗人都曾经去学院进修过。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's a school that teaches music, poetry, that sort of thing. Most bards in Skyrim have been to the college at some point. | ZH: 教授音乐和诗歌的学校。天际大多数吟游诗人都曾经去学院进修过。 | SID: 007870

translations.english: That's about the truth of it. Write tales about the sights I've seen. The battles I've fought.
translations.chinese: 没错。写下我曾经看过的风景，经历的战斗。

translations.english: Earned quite a name for myself when I was younger. The Bards College still teaches some of my work to their students.
translations.chinese: 我年轻时就已经扬名立万了。吟游诗人学院至今还在拿我的作品教授学生。

translations.english: Perhaps, but necessary. My cousin, Fura, is somewhere out there in Skyrim right now, fighting Ulfric Stormcloak and his damned insurrectionists.
translations.chinese: 也许吧，但是有必要。我的表妹，芙拉，现在就在天际的某个地方与乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷还有他该死的叛乱分子战斗着。

translations.english: She wouldn't have to be there at all, if it weren't for Roggvir.
translations.chinese: 如果不是因为罗吉维尔，她根本不需要去。

translations.chinese: 我不应该说的。妈妈说如果我说话，人们就会问起罗吉维尔舅舅。

translations.english: The person who writes it.
translations.chinese: 是书写它的人。

translations.english: And why wouldn't I be? We sing tales of kings, queens and their politics, 'tis true. But do you know who really makes history?
translations.chinese: 为什么不呢？我们歌唱国王女王，还有他们的政治故事，这些都是真的。但你知道是谁真正创造了历史吗？

translations.chinese: 谢谢你！我才刚刚开始我的课程，但“六指”因格院长……她说我很会吹奏笛子。

translations.english: She still mourns greatly for her husband, High King Torygg. So she leaves many of the courtly details to me.
translations.chinese: 她还在为她的丈夫，至高王托依格哀悼。所以很多宫廷细务都交给我了。

translations.english: I believe I was put here to protect this place from the darkness that pervades Solitude.
translations.chinese: 我相信，我被关在这里就是为了保护这地方免受弥漫在独孤城的黑暗所袭扰。

translations.english: All my life. I practically grew up in the Hall. My father and mother were the priest and priestess of Arkay before me, you see.
translations.chinese: 一辈子了。我几乎就是在这个大厅里长大的。我父母就是我前任的阿尔凯祭司。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: All my life. I practically grew up in the Hall. My father and mother were the priest and priestess of Arkay before me, you see. | ZH: 一辈子了。我几乎就是在这个大厅里长大的。我父母就是我前任的阿尔凯祭司。 | SID: 00F822

translations.english: And far to the west lies a ruin. Volskygge. Inside, there is said to be a wall, black as night. And it speaks! In the ancient Dragon tongue!
translations.chinese: 西边远处有一座废墟，叫沃尔斯盖吉。据说里面有一堵墙，漆黑如夜，而且还会说话！用古老的龙语！

translations.english: There are wonders in this place I never dreamed imaginable.
translations.chinese: 这地方有我做梦也想不到的奇迹。

translations.english: Aye, but I'll be here in Solitude for longer still. Fihada's skill as a fletcher drew me to this place. I wanted to learn.
translations.chinese: 是啊，但我还要在独孤城多待些日子。费哈达的造箭技巧吸引我来此。我很想学习。

translations.english: And there is still much of Skyrim I wish to see. I hear there is a city, Wind-Helm, that is nearly white with... What do you call it? Ah yes! Snow.
translations.chinese: 而且我还希望再多见识一下天际。我听说有个叫风舵的城市，那里几乎被东西盖成白色的了……你们管它叫什么来着？哦对！雪。

translations.english: I was there. I fought in the Great War. I was on the field at Anvil. And when I was struck down, they left me.
translations.chinese: 我参加过浩大战争。就在安维尔的战场上。当我倒下时，他们把我丢下了。

translations.english: What? You see a man fallen on hard times, and you think he's been like that forever?
translations.chinese: 什么？你看到有人处在困境，他就是从始至终一直这样吗？

translations.english: You understand? They left me for dead. I didn't leave them.
translations.chinese: 你明白吗？是他们丢下我等死。不是我离开了他们。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: What? You see a man fallen on hard times, and you think he's been like that forever? | ZH: 什么？你看到有人处在困境，他就是从始至终一直这样吗？ | SID: 004083

translations.english: Then you didn't know Roggvir, and you have no idea what it means to be a Nord of Skyrim!
translations.chinese: 那你就是不了解罗吉维尔，你不知道身为天际的诺德人意味着什么！

translations.english: He did the honorable thing, even when he knew it would cost him everything.
translations.chinese: 他做的事很光荣，即使他知道这会让他付出一切。

translations.english: My brother was the best man in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 我的兄弟是独孤城最好的男人。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He did the honorable thing, even when he knew it would cost him everything. | ZH: 他做的事很光荣，即使他知道这会让他付出一切。 | SID: 00A29A

translations.english: I'm a Thane. In the future, you may want to gain that information before talking with someone. Risk of looking like an idiot, and all that.
translations.chinese: 我是武卫。将来，你可能会想在和别人交谈之前了解了解。不要总是冒着被看成白痴的风险。

translations.english: Yes. My older brother and the person you probably want to be speaking to right now.
translations.chinese: 是。你或许以为我哥哥现在是独孤城的话事人了。

translations.english: But really, since Torygg's death, Falk Firebeard wields the true power of the Jarl's court. My brother is nothing more than a pompous little fop.
translations.chinese: 但事实上，自从托依格死后，“火胡”佛可就掌握了领主宫廷的实权。我哥哥不过是个爱炫耀的小花花公子罢了。

agentText:

translations.english: Yes, I'm afraid we're aware of Sarthis's presence in the warehouse.
translations.chinese: 是，我们已经注意到萨迪斯正藏在仓库里。

translations.english: Unfortunately, we're certain he has informants within the city guard. Every time we've made a move to arrest him, he's escaped.
translations.chinese: 可惜，我们确信他在卫兵内部有线人。每次我们要逮捕他时，他都逃之夭夭了。

translations.english: Ah yes, Sarthis... a thorn in my side for the last few years.

translations.english: Although I suppose a little mead now and then would be harmless...
translations.chinese: 不过我想偶尔喝点蜜酒总没害处吧……

translations.english: All my gold... completely gone. Now I have to start over. I'll never use skooma again!
translations.chinese: 我所有的钱……全都没了。现在我要重新开始。我再也不会吃斯库玛了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085D3A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: If it wasn't for skooma, I'd already be on my way out of this horrible city. | ZH: 如果不是因为斯库玛，我已经在离开这可怕城市的路上了。 | SID: 00A63C
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Although I suppose a little mead now and then would be harmless... | ZH: 不过我想偶尔喝点蜜酒总没害处吧…… | SID: 00B338
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: All my gold... completely gone. Now I have to start over. I'll never use skooma again! | ZH: 我所有的钱……全都没了。现在我要重新开始。我再也不会吃斯库玛了！ | SID: 00C27D

translations.english: It's not worth dying over.
translations.chinese: 但也不值得我去死。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085D3C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's not worth dying over. | ZH: 但也不值得我去死。 | SID: 00A62B

translations.english: Look, I don't think I should say. I mean, they could kill me!
translations.chinese: 听着，我觉得我不该说。我是说，他们会杀了我！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085D3D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Look, I don't think I should say. I mean, they could kill me! | ZH: 听着，我觉得我不该说。我是说，他们会杀了我！ | SID: 00A0CD

translations.english: Hm. Well, if you change your mind, come see me again.
translations.chinese: 嗯，好吧，如果你改主意，再来找我吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085D3E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hm. Well, if you change your mind, come see me again. | ZH: 嗯，好吧，如果你改主意，再来找我吧。 | SID: 00DD8A

translations.english: Let me give you a word of advice.
translations.chinese: 给你一句忠告。

translations.english: Think about your choices carefully from now on. You'll go much farther in Riften with me on your side.
translations.chinese: 现在开始要仔细考虑自己的选择。在裂谷城里支持我，才能让你走得更远。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085D3F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Let me give you a word of advice. | ZH: 给你一句忠告。 | SID: 00A650
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Think about your choices carefully from now on. You'll go much farther in Riften with me on your side. | ZH: 现在开始要仔细考虑自己的选择。在裂谷城里支持我，才能让你走得更远。 | SID: 00F9CD

translations.english: I can't say I'm happy with your decision. If you change your mind, let me know.
translations.chinese: 我对你的决定并不满意。想好了再告诉我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085DF1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can't say I'm happy with your decision. If you change your mind, let me know. | ZH: 我对你的决定并不满意。想好了再告诉我。 | SID: 00783E

translations.english: I'm very disappointed. I'd advise you to rethink that decision soon.
translations.chinese: 我很失望。建议你重新考虑。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085DF2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm very disappointed. I'd advise you to rethink that decision soon. | ZH: 我很失望。建议你重新考虑。 | SID: 00747E

translations.english: Good. Report back to me when your task is complete.
translations.chinese: 好，任务完成之后向我汇报。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085DF3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. Report back to me when your task is complete. | ZH: 好，任务完成之后向我汇报。 | SID: 002A78

translations.english: Good. Make sure not one of them escapes alive.
translations.chinese: 好，一个活口也别留。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085DF4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good. Make sure not one of them escapes alive. | ZH: 好，一个活口也别留。 | SID: 00E30D

translations.english: Then there's no time to lose. It won't take long for Sarthis's associates to learn of his death.
translations.chinese: 那就别浪费时间了。萨迪斯的同伙很快就会知道他的死讯。

translations.english: Do this task for me and you'll be well on your way to a title in Riften.
translations.chinese: 为我完成这个任务，你就能在裂谷城获得一个头衔。

translations.english: The source of the poison must be destroyed once and for all, otherwise another dealer will simply take his place.
translations.chinese: 毒品的源头必须消灭，否则另外的毒贩很快就会取而代之。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085DF5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Then there's no time to lose. It won't take long for Sarthis's associates to learn of his death. | ZH: 那就别浪费时间了。萨迪斯的同伙很快就会知道他的死讯。 | SID: 004D2C
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Do this task for me and you'll be well on your way to a title in Riften. | ZH: 为我完成这个任务，你就能在裂谷城获得一个头衔。 | SID: 00A617
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: The source of the poison must be destroyed once and for all, otherwise another dealer will simply take his place. | ZH: 毒品的源头必须消灭，否则另外的毒贩很快就会取而代之。 | SID: 00DD70

translations.english: Do this task for me and you'll be well on your way to a title in Riften.
translations.chinese: 为我完成这个任务，你就能在裂谷城获得一个头衔。

translations.english: I can't afford to have another Sarthis blunder into Riften because they think we're too lazy to disrupt their pitiful operation.
translations.chinese: 我不能让因为他们觉得我们懒得破坏他们的行动，再放另一个萨迪斯进入裂谷城。

translations.english: Then I want you to head out there immediately and eliminate all of them.
translations.chinese: 那我要你立刻去把他们都消灭掉。

translations.english: They're at Cragslane Cavern.
translations.chinese: 他们在崖道洞窟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085DF6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Do this task for me and you'll be well on your way to a title in Riften. | ZH: 为我完成这个任务，你就能在裂谷城获得一个头衔。 | SID: 0040FB
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I can't afford to have another Sarthis blunder into Riften because they think we're too lazy to disrupt their pitiful operation. | ZH: 我不能让因为他们觉得我们懒得破坏他们的行动，再放另一个萨迪斯进入裂谷城。 | SID: 00A615
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Then I want you to head out there immediately and eliminate all of them. | ZH: 那我要你立刻去把他们都消灭掉。 | SID: 00A616
- INFO:RNAM | EN: They're at Cragslane Cavern. | ZH: 他们在崖道洞窟。 | SID: 00F7D7

translations.english: It's nice to receive good news for a change. Did you recover anything else from the warehouse worth mentioning?
translations.chinese: 收到这个消息真是太好了。你在仓库还找到什么有价值的东西吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085DF7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's nice to receive good news for a change. Did you recover anything else from the warehouse worth mentioning? | ZH: 收到这个消息真是太好了。你在仓库还找到什么有价值的东西吗？ | SID: 003972

translations.english: Did you happen to discover where the fetcher was getting his skooma from?
translations.chinese: 有没有发现那个费彻是从哪儿搞到的斯库玛？

translations.english: Results speak volumes over words and you've just proved it.
translations.chinese: 你已经证明了，结果重于言语。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085DF8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Did you happen to discover where the fetcher was getting his skooma from? | ZH: 有没有发现那个费彻是从哪儿搞到的斯库玛？ | SID: 0072B7
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Results speak volumes over words and you've just proved it. | ZH: 你已经证明了，结果重于言语。 | SID: 00B15E

translations.english: I should say so. I'd be careful in the future before you confront someone without all of the facts!
translations.chinese: 我也是。以后在你不知道具体情况就和别人对质前我会小心的！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085FBC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I should say so. I'd be careful in the future before you confront someone without all of the facts! | ZH: 我也是。以后在你不知道具体情况就和别人对质前我会小心的！ | SID: 006D75

translations.english: Come on, what are trying to do? Insult me?
translations.chinese: 得了吧，你想干什么？侮辱我吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00085FBD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come on, what are trying to do? Insult me? | ZH: 得了吧，你想干什么？侮辱我吗？ | SID: 002E08

translations.english: When you showed up here, I knew you were the one the Greybeards sent, and not some Thalmor plant.
translations.chinese: 你一来这儿，我就知道你是灰胡子派来的，不是梭默间谍。

translations.english: I knew the Greybeards would send you there if they thought you were Dragonborn. They're nothing if not predictable.
translations.chinese: 我知道如果灰胡子认为你是龙裔，他们就会派你去的。他们没那么高深莫测。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008649A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: When you showed up here, I knew you were the one the Greybeards sent, and not some Thalmor plant. | ZH: 你一来这儿，我就知道你是灰胡子派来的，不是梭默间谍。 | SID: 00A603
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I knew the Greybeards would send you there if they thought you were Dragonborn. They're nothing if not predictable. | ZH: 我知道如果灰胡子认为你是龙裔，他们就会派你去的。他们没那么高深莫测。 | SID: 00A605

translations.english: We're going to go there, and you're going to kill that dragon. If we succeed, I'll tell you anything you want to know.
translations.chinese: 我们得赶过去，然后杀了那头龙。如果成功了，我自会向你解释一切。

translations.english: And I've figured out where the next one will come back to life.
translations.chinese: 我知道下一个要复活的在哪。

translations.english: I know they are. I've visited their ancient burial mounds and found them empty.
translations.chinese: 我当然知道。我去过它们的古代埋葬地，结果发现墓穴空了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008649C]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: And I've figured out where the next one will come back to life. | ZH: 我知道下一个要复活的在哪。 | SID: 0068F2
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I know they are. I've visited their ancient burial mounds and found them empty. | ZH: 我当然知道。我去过它们的古代埋葬地，结果发现墓穴空了。 | SID: 00F323

translations.english: I can't wait to see Sabjorn squirm.
translations.chinese: 我等不及要看撒布乔恩出糗了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086786]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can't wait to see Sabjorn squirm. | ZH: 我等不及要看撒布乔恩出糗了。 | SID: 00D207

translations.english: You're supposed to be at the meadery.
translations.chinese: 你应该去蜜酒庄了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086787]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're supposed to be at the meadery. | ZH: 你应该去蜜酒庄了。 | SID: 007E1D

translations.english: If you're in the area and you ever need anything fenced, you just let me know.
translations.chinese: 如果你在附近，有任何需要销赃的东西，尽管来找我。

translations.english: She's put me in charge of keeping the mead flowing, so that's exactly what I'm going to do.
translations.chinese: 她让我负责保持蜜酒流通，所以我必须这么做。

translations.english: Start changing it over to the Black-Briar Meadery West as soon as possible. That was Maven's part of the deal.
translations.chinese: 尽快把它改成黑棘蜜酒庄西部分号。这也是和玛雯交易的一部分。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008681C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: If you're in the area and you ever need anything fenced, you just let me know. | ZH: 如果你在附近，有任何需要销赃的东西，尽管来找我。 | SID: 00A5FE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: She's put me in charge of keeping the mead flowing, so that's exactly what I'm going to do. | ZH: 她让我负责保持蜜酒流通，所以我必须这么做。 | SID: 00A5FF
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Start changing it over to the Black-Briar Meadery West as soon as possible. That was Maven's part of the deal. | ZH: 尽快把它改成黑棘蜜酒庄西部分号。这也是和玛雯交易的一部分。 | SID: 00D96F

translations.english: Of course.
translations.chinese: 当然。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008682B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course. | ZH: 当然。 | SID: 002362

translations.english: What is there to know? It's in the temple, you bring it out. You bring it to me, I pay you. Now get moving.
translations.chinese: 有什么好说的？就在神殿里，拿出来给我。我付钱给你。赶紧行动吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008682C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What is there to know? It's in the temple, you bring it out. You bring it to me, I pay you. Now get moving. | ZH: 有什么好说的？就在神殿里，拿出来给我。我付钱给你。赶紧行动吧。 | SID: 00404D

translations.english: My little girl. Always strong. Do you know where you have to go?
translations.chinese: 宝贝闺女。总是这么坚强。你知道要去哪里吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008682D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My little girl. Always strong. Do you know where you have to go? | ZH: 宝贝闺女。总是这么坚强。你知道要去哪里吗？ | SID: 00BEA6

translations.chinese: 父亲！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008682E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Father! | ZH: 父亲！ | SID: 00500D

translations.english: I'm to go to the temple in Markarth. I... I'll have to leave you and mother.
translations.chinese: 我得去马卡斯的神殿了。我……我要离开你和妈妈了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008682F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm to go to the temple in Markarth. I... I'll have to leave you and mother. | ZH: 我得去马卡斯的神殿了。我……我要离开你和妈妈了。 | SID: 00A5FA

translations.english: You're... probably right. Just hurry, please. Who knows what those things are doing to her.
translations.chinese: 你……你说得对。请快点。谁知道那些混账要对她干什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086830]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're... probably right. Just hurry, please. Who knows what those things are doing to her. | ZH: 你……你说得对。请快点。谁知道那些混账要对她干什么。 | SID: 00A5F4

translations.english: Please, lead on.
translations.chinese: 请带路吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086831]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please, lead on. | ZH: 请带路吧。 | SID: 00E0E5

translations.english: Thank you, friend.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你，朋友。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086832]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you, friend. | ZH: 谢谢你，朋友。 | SID: 000428

translations.english: Let's get to the Forsworn camp. Her life could be in danger.
translations.chinese: 我们去弃誓者营地吧。她可能会有生命危险。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086833]
Translations:

translations.english: Let's find Fjotra. This place gives me the creeps.
translations.chinese: 我们得赶紧找到弗洛格拉。这地方太瘆人了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086834]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let's find Fjotra. This place gives me the creeps. | ZH: 我们得赶紧找到弗洛格拉。这地方太瘆人了。 | SID: 00F877

translations.english: It's our honor to have you there.
translations.chinese: 养育你是我们的荣幸。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086835]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's our honor to have you there. | ZH: 养育你是我们的荣幸。 | SID: 00267D

translations.english: Fjotra, dear. Did they hurt you?
translations.chinese: 弗洛格拉，宝贝。他们伤到你了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086836]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fjotra, dear. Did they hurt you? | ZH: 弗洛格拉，宝贝。他们伤到你了吗？ | SID: 002088

translations.english: This man is going to take you to Markarth. Are you ready?
translations.chinese: 这个人会带你去马卡斯城。准备好了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086837]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This man is going to take you to Markarth. Are you ready? | ZH: 这个人会带你去马卡斯城。准备好了吗？ | SID: 00AA8E

translations.english: This woman is going to take you to Markarth. Are you ready?
translations.chinese: 这个人会带你去马卡斯城。准备好了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This woman is going to take you to Markarth. Are you ready? | ZH: 这个人会带你去马卡斯城。准备好了吗？ | SID: 000086

translations.english: Of course not. My spirit remains strong.
translations.chinese: 当然没有。我很坚强的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086839]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course not. My spirit remains strong. | ZH: 当然没有。我很坚强的。 | SID: 009605

translations.english: You were not invited here. You are not welcome here.
translations.chinese: 没人邀请你们。这里不欢迎你们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086852]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You were not invited here. You are not welcome here. | ZH: 没人邀请你们。这里不欢迎你们。 | SID: 0051F4

translations.chinese: 等一下。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086853]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: One moment. | ZH: 等一下。 | SID: 006128

translations.english: Fine. Let's get this over with.
translations.chinese: 很好。赶紧了结这件事吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086854]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fine. Let's get this over with. | ZH: 很好。赶紧了结这件事吧。 | SID: 00A5F0

translations.english: We're here to arrange a temporary truce to allow the Dragonborn here to deal with the dragons. Nothing more.
translations.chinese: 我们来这里只是为了让龙裔有条件对付龙族而暂时休战。仅此而已。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086855]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We're here to arrange a temporary truce to allow the Dragonborn here to deal with the dragons. Nothing more. | ZH: 我们来这里只是为了让龙裔有条件对付龙族而暂时休战。仅此而已。 | SID: 008355

translations.english: I just want to make clear that the only reason I agreed to attend this council was to deal with the dragon menace.
translations.chinese: 我只想说清楚，我同意参加会议的唯一原因就是对付龙的威胁。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00086856]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I just want to make clear that the only reason I agreed to attend this council was to deal with the dragon menace. | ZH: 我只想说清楚，我同意参加会议的唯一原因就是对付龙的威胁。 | SID: 00677B

translations.english: We have as much right to be at this council as all of you. More, actually, since we were the ones that put the Dragonborn on this path.
translations.chinese: 我们与其他人一样有权参会。事实上，我们更有资格。因为是我们带领龙裔走上了这条路。

EDID: [00086858]

translations.english: We have no need to negotiate when the rebels are so clearly losing the war.

translations.chinese: 他们对战争乐此不疲。远没疲倦。你知道古诺德人如何形容战争吗？“无休之季”……事实证明所言非虚。

translations.english: Peace? I doubt it. They may put their weapons down for a moment, but only to gather strength for the next bloodletting.
translations.chinese: 和平？我表示怀疑。他们可能会暂时放下武器，但那只是为下一次流血积蓄力量。

translations.chinese: 对，我肯定是听到了什么东西。

EDID: [000877DA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, I'm positive I heard something. | ZH: 对，我肯定是听到了什么东西。 | SID: 0073C5

translations.english: I hear Mara has sent one of her priests to the inn to try to calm people down, but I don't know how much words will do now.
translations.chinese: 我听说玛拉派来祭司试图安抚大家，就在旅馆那边。不知道他得费多少口舌才行。

translations.english: Not a single man or woman in Dawnstar has gotten a good night's rest in days. We keep having the same nightmare, over and over.
translations.chinese: 这些天，在晨星没人能安然入睡。我们一直重复做着同样的噩梦。

translations.english: If people aren't tired, they're angry, and if they aren't angry, they're afraid. It's made keeping order a mess.
translations.chinese: 人们不是疲惫不堪就是性情暴躁，再不然就是感到恐惧。连维持秩序都变得不容易了。

translations.english: I came at a bad time? What's wrong?
translations.chinese: 我来的不是时候？怎么回事？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00087906]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I hear Mara has sent one of her priests to the inn to try to calm people down, but I don't know how much words will do now. | ZH: 我听说玛拉派来祭司试图安抚大家，就在旅馆那边。不知道他得费多少口舌才行。 | SID: 0084E1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Not a single man or woman in Dawnstar has gotten a good night's rest in days. We keep having the same nightmare, over and over. | ZH: 这些天，在晨星没人能安然入睡。我们一直重复做着同样的噩梦。 | SID: 008F32
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: If people aren't tired, they're angry, and if they aren't angry, they're afraid. It's made keeping order a mess. | ZH: 人们不是疲惫不堪就是性情暴躁，再不然就是感到恐惧。连维持秩序都变得不容易了。 | SID: 00DEA0
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I came at a bad time? What's wrong? | ZH: 我来的不是时候？怎么回事？ | SID: 007A79

translations.english: That priest of Mara who came here before you says the Divines will cure us.
translations.chinese: 在你之前来这里的玛拉祭司说圣灵会治愈我们。

translations.english: That's right. Dawnstar. My Dawnstar is plagued with nightmares. I haven't slept properly in days.
translations.chinese: 没错。晨星，我的晨星被噩梦所扰。我都好几天没睡好了。

translations.english: Well, until they do, I don't have any business to discuss with outsiders.
translations.chinese: 哎，问题还在持续，我不想再和外来者讨论了。

translations.english: Nightmare problem?
translations.chinese: 噩梦问题？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: That's right. Dawnstar. My Dawnstar is plagued with nightmares. I haven't slept properly in days. | ZH: 没错。晨星，我的晨星被噩梦所扰。我都好几天没睡好了。 | SID: 0029C4

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Nightmare problem? | ZH: 噩梦问题？ | SID: 0022BE

translations.english: I've heard that a priest of Mara has come, saying that the Divines will lift this curse somehow, but that remains to be seen.
translations.chinese: 我听说有个玛拉祭司来了，还说圣灵会解除诅咒，但还没见效。

translations.english: People are having nightmares they swear are real. They go to bed, but they wake up more tired than yesterday.
translations.chinese: 人们都发誓说噩梦是真的。他们上床睡觉，结果醒来比昨天还累。

translations.english: You haven't heard? All of Dawnstar hasn't had a decent night's rest in days.
translations.chinese: 你没听说过么？全晨星城的人都好久没能安歇了。

translations.english: What's this about nightmares?
translations.chinese: 噩梦是怎么回事？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00087909]

translations.english: I hear there's a priest of Mara visiting the inn. Maybe the Divines will cure us.
translations.chinese: 听说玛拉祭司来了。也许圣灵会治愈我们吧。

translations.english: A bad dream I can handle, but everyone having the same bad dream, every night? It's a curse, I say.
translations.chinese: 我一个人做噩梦好说，但每人每晚重复同样的噩梦？那我说这就是诅咒。

translations.english: Nightmares. I haven't met a single man or woman who doesn't admit to having them.
translations.chinese: 噩梦。所有人都遇到了这种情况。

translations.english: No one's getting any rest? Why not?
translations.chinese: 没人休息？为什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: It's these nightmares. Me and every one of my workers can't catch a nod without having one.
translations.chinese: 噩梦。我和我的员工连打盹都会做噩梦。

translations.english: They're almost... real. They say a priest of Mara has arrived in town. We'll see if faith can cure this curse.
translations.chinese: 它们……太真实了。听说有玛拉祭司来了。看看信仰能不能治愈诅咒吧。

translations.english: Why aren't you getting much sleep?
translations.chinese: 你为什么睡不好？

translations.english: Everyone else though.... They're horrible. Imagine dying over and over again in your dreams night after night.
translations.chinese: 其他人就没这么幸运了……太可怕了。想象一下，自己在梦里夜复一夜的死去。

translations.english: New in town? You're lucky. Dreams aren't affecting travelers.
translations.chinese: 你是刚来吗？真幸运。外来者不会做梦。

translations.english: They say a priest of Mara is visiting the Windpeak Inn. Says the Divines will take care of everything. We'll see about that.
translations.chinese: 听说有个玛拉祭司在风岳旅店。他说圣灵会治愈一切。到时候看吧。

translations.chinese: 你将有幸为主菜带来新鲜的食材。我知道有个完美人选。

translations.english: I am at the Arch-Mage's disposal if he requires advice.

translations.english: Falion said he hated what this place was becoming. So he just left. Aren found a note on his desk, and that was it.
translations.chinese: 阿冉在他桌上发现张纸条，法利昂说他讨厌这里变成这样。就这些。

translations.english: He didn't like the Arch-Mage. Hated dealing with him, hated having to answer to him.
translations.chinese: 他不喜欢大法师。讨厌和他打交道，也讨厌事事向他汇报。

translations.english: I understand he settled down in Hjaalmarch, and his presence there caused something of a problem.
translations.chinese: 我听说他在希雅陲定居了，他在那儿出现还引起了一些问题。

translations.chinese: 法利昂是我所知唯一公开行动的人。他曾经是我在这里的老师，但几年前离开了学院。

translations.english: Not within society, no. Many who practice within the school of Conjuration do so on their own, secretly.
translations.chinese: 社会上不常见。许多研究召唤学派的人，都是私下进行的。

translations.chinese: 我很高兴终于有机会来看看这里。

translations.english: If you can arrange an end to the fighting, Dragonsreach is at your disposal.
translations.chinese: 如果你能促成休战，那龙临宫随时听你差遣。

translations.chinese: 我知道这次会议是你的主意，龙裔。但恐怕成功希望不大。

translations.chinese: 我们得快开始了。奥杜因只会越变越强。

translations.english: We consider even sitting down to talk with these rebels more than generous.

translations.english: I knew he wouldn't be able to resist.
translations.chinese: 我就知道他会这样。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008875C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I knew he wouldn't be able to resist. | ZH: 我就知道他会这样。 | SID: 00A007

translations.english: That's why the inn is called Dead Man's Drink, the farm is called Corpselight Farm, and so on. I suppose it's sort of a running joke.
translations.chinese: 这就是为什么酒馆叫做“亡者之饮”，农场叫“尸光农场”等等等等。我想这算是个流传很广的玩笑吧。

translations.english: But what you must understand about Falkreath is that our town is defined, for better or wrose, by the large and ancient cemetery here.
translations.chinese: 但关于佛克瑞斯，你必须明白，我们这个小镇无论好坏，都是由这里这座古老而巨大的墓地定义的。

translations.english: I know it's a bit strange. Not exactly a name to bring comfort to the sick and ailing who come to buy a poultice or salve.
translations.chinese: 我知道这听着有些怪。这个名字不太适合给那些买药的人带来安慰。

translations.english: For one thing, I won't empty Falkreath's coffers to buy myself fine clothes an' expensive mead.
translations.chinese: 首先，我不会掏空佛克瑞斯的钱库给自己买漂亮衣服和昂贵的蜜酒。

translations.english: For another, I won't get mixed up with criminals and other sorts who take advantage of the honest folk for profit.
translations.chinese: 另外，我不会和罪犯以及其他利用善民牟利的人混在一起。

translations.english: I might be old, but I haven't forgotten that a Jarl's first duty is to look after his people.
translations.chinese: 我可能老了，但我没有忘记一个领主的首要职责就是照顾他的人民。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I might be old, but I haven't forgotten that a Jarl's first duty is to look after his people. | ZH: 我可能老了，但我没有忘记一个领主的首要职责就是照顾他的人民。 | SID: 00F3AB

translations.english: The Imperial City's so far from here, it might as well be on one of the moons. And yet the Empire thinks it can tell us what to do an' how to live.
translations.chinese: 帝都离这里太远了，和在月亮上没差。然而帝国却认为他们能够告诉我们该怎么做，该怎么生活。

translations.english: You think some Emperor sitting on a gilded throne in Cyrodiil is going to know what's best for Skyrim?
translations.chinese: 你觉得某个坐在希罗帝尔镀金宝座上的皇帝会知道什么对天际是最好的吗？

translations.english: I'm no man's fool. I know Ulfric Stormcloak's selfish and power-hungry, but he's the devil I know. Does that put it plain enough for you?
translations.chinese: 我不是傻瓜。我知道乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷自私且渴望权力，但至少这混球是自家人。这么说够清楚了吗？

translations.english: Now, maybe I don't pick up a blade in Ulfric's name no more, but I still hold with his ideals. Skyrim is Nord land, and we ought to rule it.
translations.chinese: 现在，也许我不再以乌弗瑞克的名义拿起武器，但我仍然坚持他的理想。天际是诺德人的，我们应该来统治它。

translations.english: We don't need no help from the Empire on that count.
translations.chinese: 我们不需要帝国的帮助。

translations.english: I was once, but not any more. I was wounded in a skirmish up near Windhelm. This was years ago, mind you.
translations.chinese: 曾经是，现在不是了。我在风舵附近的战斗中负伤了。注意，这是几年前的事了。

translations.english: His name's Bolund. He's the one who works the lumber mill down by the river.
translations.chinese: 他叫波伦德。在河边的木材厂工作。

translations.english: If you meet him, don't expect much in the way o' conversation. He ain't one for talking, especially with folk he don't know.
translations.chinese: 如果你见到他，不要对聊天抱什么希望。他三棍子打不出个屁，尤其是和陌生人的时候。

translations.english: So, when he was made Jarl again, he didn't wait a moment to name me his Steward. He said I was the only choice.
translations.chinese: 所以当他再次当上领主的时候，毫不犹豫地任命我当总管了。他说我是唯一的人选。

translations.english: Everywhere he looks, he sees assassins, spies an' plots against him. I'm the only one he confides in.
translations.chinese: 他随时随地都能看到刺客、奸细、阴谋。我成了他唯一可以倾诉的对象。

translations.english: Comes down to trust, I expect. After Dengeir gave up his seat to his nephew, he didn't trust anyone.
translations.chinese: 我想这是信任问题吧。丹格尔把位子让给侄子以后就不再信任任何人了。

translations.english: Why would I do that? For money? Because I swore an oath? No, it was because he was a good man and a true friend.
translations.chinese: 为什么我要这么做？为了钱吗？还是因为我发过誓？不，只是因为他是个好人，是真正的朋友。

translations.english: A true Nord places loyalty and honor above all else.
translations.chinese: 真正的诺德人会把忠诚和荣誉置于一切之上。

translations.english: I was Dengier's personal guard for years. I risked my hide more than once to protect him.
translations.chinese: 我给丹格尔当过多年的侍卫。不止一次冒着风险保护了他。

translations.english: When I found this town, with its huge cemetery, I felt right at home. I opened the shop and I've never looked back. This is where I belong.
translations.chinese: 当我找到这个小镇和这片巨大的墓地时，我就感觉像是到家了一样。我开了这家店，而且没有后悔过。这才是我的归宿。

translations.english: Well, my family back in Hammerfell didn't approve of my interest in lethal poisons and death in general. So I left, and wandered north.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我在落锤的家人不赞成我研究致命毒药和死亡的兴趣。所以我离开了，向北流浪。

translations.english: Try not to judge Falkreath too harshly, visitor - the war has been hard on us.
translations.chinese: 别对佛克瑞斯太苛刻了，外来者，战争对我们来说太残酷了。

translations.english: Truth is, I found out about all the Imperial spies crawling around Falkreath. A few well-placed bribes, and they bought themselves some friends.
translations.chinese: 事实上，我发现了在佛克瑞斯周围活动的所有帝国奸细。只消几笔贿赂，他们就给自己买到了几个朋友。

translations.english: They named me Thane, and they got my nephew Siddgeir in my place. A real friend to Cyrodiil, that one.
translations.chinese: 他们给我一个武卫头衔，还让我侄子西德盖尔取代了我。那小子真是希罗帝尔的好朋友啊。

translations.english: Suddenly the nobles are calling for a new Jarl, and all the while their pockets are jingling with the sound of Imperial septims.
translations.chinese: 突然之间，贵族们就开始呼吁换个新领主，他们所有人的口袋里都能听到塞普汀叮当作响。

translations.english: Aye, not so long ago. Some'll tell you I stepped down on account of my old age.
translations.chinese: 嗯，不久之前。有人会跟你说，我是因为年纪大了才辞职的。

translations.english: Mortal. I am Namira, the Lady of Decay. Your consumption of the blood and bile of Arkay's own is pleasing to me.
translations.chinese: 凡人。我乃娜米拉，腐烂女士。你饮用了阿尔凯祭司的血与胆汁，我很欣慰。

translations.english: I give you my ring. Wear it, and when you feast on the flesh of the dead, I will grant you my power.
translations.chinese: 我将我的戒指给你。戴上它，当你享用死者的血肉时，我会赐予你力量。

translations.english: Be grateful for what time I give you until then.
translations.chinese: 珍惜我给你的时间吧。

translations.english: I cannot stay. Not here, not in Whiterun. It likely won't be safe for Avulstein, either.
translations.chinese: 我不能在这里或者白漫城待着了。对阿武斯特恩也不安全。

translations.english: But would you do me a favor? Tell my mother to suffer the winter's cold wind, for it bears aloft next summer's seeds. She'll know what it means.
translations.chinese: 但你能帮我个忙吗？告诉我母亲，“忍过冬日的寒风，因为它承载着夏天的种子”。她会明白这是什么意思的。

translations.english: Our best hope now is to fall in with the ranks of the Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 我们现在最大的希望就是去加入风暴斗篷的队伍。

translations.english: I thank you again, friend. You've given me my life back.
translations.chinese: 再次感谢，朋友。你让我重获新生了。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But would you do me a favor? Tell my mother to suffer the winter's cold wind, for it bears aloft next summer's seeds. She'll know what it means. | ZH: 但你能帮我个忙吗？告诉我母亲，“忍过冬日的寒风，因为它承载着夏天的种子”。她会明白这是什么意思的。 | SID: 00A3EA
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Our best hope now is to fall in with the ranks of the Stormcloaks. | ZH: 我们现在最大的希望就是去加入风暴斗篷的队伍。 | SID: 00B4BF
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I thank you again, friend. You've given me my life back. | ZH: 再次感谢，朋友。你让我重获新生了。 | SID: 00F70C

translations.english: Though shall mourn my brother, I thank you, friend. You've given me my life back.
translations.chinese: 尽管我要哀悼我的兄弟，但我还是要谢谢你，朋友。你让我重获新生了。

translations.english: I don't dare return to Whiterun. But my mother... She'll need some consolation.
translations.chinese: 我不敢回白漫城了。但我母亲……应该安慰她一下。

translations.english: Tell her... tell her to suffer the winter's cold wind, for it bears aloft next summer's seeds. She'll understand.
translations.chinese: 告诉她……“忍过冬日的寒风，因为它承载着夏天的种子”。她会明白这是什么意思的。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I don't dare return to Whiterun. But my mother... She'll need some consolation. | ZH: 我不敢回白漫城了。但我母亲……应该安慰她一下。 | SID: 00DDEE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Tell her... tell her to suffer the winter's cold wind, for it bears aloft next summer's seeds. She'll understand. | ZH: 告诉她……“忍过冬日的寒风，因为它承载着夏天的种子”。她会明白这是什么意思的。 | SID: 00FB6D

translations.english: They'll go looking for me, and Whiterun will be the first place they search.
translations.chinese: 他们会去找我，而白漫就是他们第一个要搜查的地方。

translations.english: A wise decision, but I fear he may not be safe there anymore.
translations.chinese: 明智的觉得，但我担心他在那里可能不安全了。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: A wise decision, but I fear he may not be safe there anymore. | ZH: 明智的觉得，但我担心他在那里可能不安全了。 | SID: 00A3E2

translations.english: I don't dare go back in now. I'll just have to hope that in the confusion he can slip out.
translations.chinese: 我现在不敢回去。只希望他能在混乱中脱身。

translations.english: So he might still be in there?
translations.chinese: 所以他可能还在那儿？

translations.english: He came in with me, but I'm not sure what happened to him.
translations.chinese: 他和我一起来的，但我不确定他怎么样了。

translations.english: What is my freedom worth, if the price is my brother's life?
translations.chinese: 我的自由有什么价值，值我兄弟一条命？

translations.english: Avulstein... you stupid boy...
translations.chinese: 阿武斯特恩……你个傻小子……

translations.english: He... didn't make it.
translations.chinese: 他……没活下来。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Avulstein... you stupid boy... | ZH: 阿武斯特恩……你个傻小子…… | SID: 002D76

translations.english: Yes, the incense. Fetch for me a deathbell flower, one silver ingot, a flawless ruby, and some vampire dust. Then I will show you how.
translations.chinese: 对，熏香。给我带一朵丧钟花、一块银锭、一颗无瑕红宝石，再加上吸血鬼灰烬。之后我来告诉你怎么做。

translations.english: Ah, a wanderer, yes? No? Pilgrim, perhaps? Have you come to commune with Peryite, Taskmaster and blighted Lord?
translations.chinese: 啊，旅行者吗？不是？那你是来朝圣的？是来和工头、枯萎之主魄伊特交流的吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00089983]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, a wanderer, yes? No? Pilgrim, perhaps? Have you come to commune with Peryite, Taskmaster and blighted Lord? | ZH: 啊，旅行者吗？不是？那你是来朝圣的？是来和工头、枯萎之主魄伊特交流的吗？ | SID: 0083E2

translations.english: I worship Peryite, yes, because sometimes the world can only be cleansed by disease.
translations.chinese: 对，我信仰魄伊特。因为世界有时只能通过疾病来净化。

translations.english: He is the pus in the wound. Oh, proper ones curl their noses, but it's pus that drinks foul humors and restores the blood.
translations.chinese: 他就是伤口上的脓液。哦，正常人自然对此嗤之以鼻。但恰恰是它能够吸收腐烂体液，再造新鲜血液。

translations.english: Not everyone has the stomach required to entreat my Lord. But Kesh likes you, friend. There is a way Peryite may speak to us who will take Him in.
translations.chinese: 不是每个人都有向我主恳求的勇气。但凯石喜欢你，朋友。有个办法能让魄伊特跟召唤者说话。

translations.english: If you wish to commune with Him, we'll need the incense.
translations.chinese: 想要和他交流，就需要熏香。

agentText:
