- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If you wish to commune with Him, we'll need the incense. | ZH: 想要和他交流，就需要熏香。 | SID: 00A3CB

translations.english: My guards told me. Poor Margret. And witnesses report that the attacker was shouting some nonsense about being a Forsworn.
translations.chinese: 我的卫兵已经报告过了。可怜的玛格丽特。目击者说袭击者在大喊什么“弃誓者”之类的废话。

translations.english: They're only a threat in the hills and along the roads, where they live. Everywhere else, we are in control.
translations.chinese: 他们确实在他们生活的山区和大路沿线构成了威胁。但在其他地方，我们才是掌控者。

translations.english: I want to make things clear. Markarth has its troubles, but there are no Forsworn in this city.
translations.chinese: 事情得说清楚。马卡斯自有麻烦在此，但城里绝没有弃誓者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000899B5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: My guards told me. Poor Margret. And witnesses report that the attacker was shouting some nonsense about being a Forsworn. | ZH: 我的卫兵已经报告过了。可怜的玛格丽特。目击者说袭击者在大喊什么“弃誓者”之类的废话。 | SID: 007D97
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: They're only a threat in the hills and along the roads, where they live. Everywhere else, we are in control. | ZH: 他们确实在他们生活的山区和大路沿线构成了威胁。但在其他地方，我们才是掌控者。 | SID: 008CC6

translations.english: It's unfortunate that we live in such violent times, but there you have it.
translations.chinese: 不幸的是，我们生活在这样一个暴力遍布的时代，但事实就是如此。

translations.english: So don't concern yourself with it. Markarth is safe. You have my word.
translations.chinese: 所以不要太在意了。马卡斯很安全。我可以向你保证。

translations.english: Now I've been told that the attacker claimed to be a Forsworn. It's nonsense. More likely he was just sick in the head.
translations.chinese: 有人跟我说，袭击者自称是弃誓者。纯属无稽之谈。大概率只是他头脑不清醒。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: So don't concern yourself with it. Markarth is safe. You have my word. | ZH: 所以不要太在意了。马卡斯很安全。我可以向你保证。 | SID: 006282

translations.english: Astrid did the right thing, and now it's your turn. End her suffering.
translations.chinese: 阿斯垂德做得对。现在轮到你了，结束她的痛苦吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00089A8B]
Translations:

translations.english: Oh, Astrid...
translations.chinese: 哦，阿斯垂德……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00089A8C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, Astrid... | ZH: 哦，阿斯垂德…… | SID: 00743C

translations.english: I suppose it would be inappropriate of me to ask how you obtained this, so I simply won't.
translations.chinese: 询问获得的方式好像不太合适。所以我也不问了。

translations.english: A rubbing, eh? Odd. I expected notes.
translations.chinese: 是拓片？奇怪，我还以为是笔记呢。

translations.english: I undertstand. Now, let me take a good look at this. Over here, please.
translations.chinese: 我理解。现在先让我好好看看这个。请在这儿稍等。

translations.english: Another soul for the master!
translations.chinese: 师傅又有灵魂了！

translations.english: Hmm? What is it?
translations.chinese: 嗯？怎么回事？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008A19A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hmm? What is it? | ZH: 嗯？怎么回事？ | SID: 00C518

translations.english: If I am to die today, so be it. But you'll not soon forget the Dark Brotherhood.
translations.chinese: 如果我今天会死，那就死吧。但你不会这么快忘掉黑暗兄弟会的。

translations.english: Oh, excuse me, milady. I'll be glad to sell you an elixir after I'm done with these fine people.
translations.chinese: 哦，抱歉，夫人。在我跟大家说完之后，我很乐意卖你一剂药。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008A917]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, excuse me, milady. I'll be glad to sell you an elixir after I'm done with these fine people. | ZH: 哦，抱歉，夫人。在我跟大家说完之后，我很乐意卖你一剂药。 | SID: 00BCA9

translations.english: Why a little boy would want to contact a group of murderers is beyond me, but he is inviting evil into this city.
translations.chinese: 真不明白一个小男孩为什么要联系一群杀人犯，但他肯定是要把邪恶引进这座城来。

translations.english: Hmm. Yes, it is quite sad. A young boy, Aventus Aretino, lost his mother recently, and was sent to an orphanage.
translations.chinese: 嗯。对，太悲哀了。有个叫阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺的小男孩刚刚失去母亲，就被送去孤儿院了。

translations.english: But he has returned home, and people have heard strange chanting. They say it's the Black Sacrament, the ritual to contact the Dark Brotherhood.
translations.chinese: 但他回家了，人们还听到了奇怪的吟唱。他们说那是黑色圣礼，是用来联络黑暗兄弟会的仪式。

translations.english: Did I hear you say something about a cursed child?
translations.chinese: 我听说有个孩子被诅咒了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008AF48]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Why a little boy would want to contact a group of murderers is beyond me, but he is inviting evil into this city. | ZH: 真不明白一个小男孩为什么要联系一群杀人犯，但他肯定是要把邪恶引进这座城来。 | SID: 003906
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Hmm. Yes, it is quite sad. A young boy, Aventus Aretino, lost his mother recently, and was sent to an orphanage. | ZH: 嗯。对，太悲哀了。有个叫阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺的小男孩刚刚失去母亲，就被送去孤儿院了。 | SID: 00A3BC
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But he has returned home, and people have heard strange chanting. They say it's the Black Sacrament, the ritual to contact the Dark Brotherhood. | ZH: 但他回家了，人们还听到了奇怪的吟唱。他们说那是黑色圣礼，是用来联络黑暗兄弟会的仪式。 | SID: 00BFDE
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Did I hear you say something about a cursed child? | ZH: 我听说有个孩子被诅咒了？ | SID: 0076D4

translations.english: Oh, Grimvar... always with the nonsense. No, no, of course not. Those are just tales...
translations.chinese: 哦，格瑞姆瓦……总是喜欢说些怪话。不，不，当然不是。那些都是传言……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Fine. Then I'll invite him out to play. He lives right there. I'm going to knock on his door...
translations.chinese: 太好了。那我去邀他出来玩。他就住在那里，我去敲门……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008AF4A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fine. Then I'll invite him out to play. He lives right there. I'm going to knock on his door... | ZH: 太好了。那我去邀他出来玩。他就住在那里，我去敲门…… | SID: 0038C4

translations.english: Then it's true, what everyone is saying? That Aventus Aretino is doing the Black Sacrament? Trying to summon the Dark Brotherhood?
translations.chinese: 那大家说的都是真的了？阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺在搞黑色圣礼？他想召唤黑暗兄弟会？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008AF4B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Then it's true, what everyone is saying? That Aventus Aretino is doing the Black Sacrament? Trying to summon the Dark Brotherhood? | ZH: 那大家说的都是真的了？阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺在搞黑色圣礼？他想召唤黑暗兄弟会？ | SID: 001C49

translations.english: All right. I won't deny it, child. What you heard is true. But Aventus Aretino walks a dark path. His actions can lead only to ruin.
translations.chinese: 好吧。孩子，我不否认。你听到的是真的。但阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺走上了一条黑暗的道路。他的行为只会招致毁灭。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008AF4C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: All right. I won't deny it, child. What you heard is true. But Aventus Aretino walks a dark path. His actions can lead only to ruin. | ZH: 好吧。孩子，我不否认。你听到的是真的。但阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺走上了一条黑暗的道路。他的行为只会招致毁灭。 | SID: 008AA1

translations.english: Ha! Then I'm right. I knew it. He's trying to have somebody killed!
translations.chinese: 哈！那我说对了。我就知道。他想杀人！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008AF4E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ha! Then I'm right. I knew it. He's trying to have somebody killed! | ZH: 哈！那我说对了。我就知道。他想杀人！ | SID: 00FB28

translations.english: No, child! Wait! That boy, that house - they're cursed.
translations.chinese: 不，孩子！那个男孩，那个房子，都被诅咒了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008AF50]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, child! Wait! That boy, that house - they're cursed. | ZH: 不，孩子！那个男孩，那个房子，都被诅咒了。 | SID: 0093C6

translations.english: You mean before he died? We had a break in. Thieves didn't touch anything on the shelves, or any coin, just one thing.
translations.chinese: 你是说他生前那次吗？有贼闯进来。货架和钱都没有被动过，只是抢走了一件东西。

translations.english: A solid gold ornament, in the shape of a dragon's claw.
translations.chinese: 一个龙爪形状的纯金装饰品。

translations.english: What were you arguing about with Lucan?
translations.chinese: 你和卢坎在争什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 我努力保护格瑞姆瓦的安全，但现在太危险了。

translations.english: Now. Enough. We will speak no more of this. I am the only friend you need.
translations.chinese: 现在。够了。不要再谈这件事了。你唯一需要的朋友就是我。

translations.english: Faralda can teach Destruction spells, and offers training in that school.
translations.chinese: 法劳达可以教授毁灭系魔法，而且在学院提供训练课程。

translations.english: Never underestimate the ability to influence others. Whether they're friends or foes, they're almost all susceptible to Illusion spells.
translations.chinese: 永远不要低估影响他人的能力。无论是敌是友，都很容易受幻术系法术的影响。

translations.english: They can turn the tide of a battle in a moment's notice.
translations.chinese: 可以瞬间扭转战局。

translations.english: Oh my, that's quite a difficult question.
translations.chinese: 哦，天啊，这问题可不好回答。

translations.english: There are also spells that help in avoiding conflict altogether. Invisibility is tricky to master, but exceptionally useful.
translations.chinese: 也有一些法术可以帮你规避正面冲突。隐身术虽然难以掌握，但非常有用。

translations.english: It's lies. All of it. I don't care what she told you, it's all lies.
translations.chinese: 那是谎言。全部都是。不管她跟你说了什么，都是谎言。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008B598]

translations.english: But you can hear me, obviously. Something still isn't quite right. At least I'm making progress.
translations.chinese: 但很明显你能听见我说话。还有地方不太对。不过至少我在进步了。

translations.english: Confound it all. I was quite sure I was invisible, or at least transparent.
translations.chinese: 全乱了。我肯定是隐形了啊，至少应该是透明的才对。

translations.english: Throw in the Oblivion Crisis, which was caused by magic-users, and the troubles now with the Aldmeri Dominion, who are elves and magic users.
translations.chinese: 而湮灭危机又是使用魔法的人引起的，再加上现在和先祖神洲的争端，谁叫他们又是精灵又是使魔法的呢。

translations.english: And finally take the fact that the College is the only thing left standing after most of Winterhold was destroyed. It's all fairly damning.
translations.chinese: 最关键的是，在冬堡城大部分被摧毁的时候，只有学院幸存下来。这一切促成了现在的厌恶。

translations.english: Well, look at the evidence. Nords generally don't trust magic, so it's not off to a good start.
translations.chinese: 哎，看看吧。诺德人一般都不相信魔法，所以开端就不太好。

translations.chinese: 你……你能看见我？

Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You... You can see me? | ZH: 你……你能看见我？ | SID: 00A39A

translations.english: Not at all. I consider it a blessing.
translations.chinese: 还好吧。我觉得这是好事。

translations.english: My family was convinced coming here was a death sentence, or worse. It took years of insisting that this is what I'm meant to do.
translations.chinese: 我家里人觉得来这儿和判了死刑差不多，甚至更糟。我坚持了很多年，才得到了想要的。

translations.english: And finally, there's Colette. She may be... difficult to get along with, she's very knowledgeable when it comes to Restoration magic.
translations.chinese: 还有柯莱特。她可能……很难相处，但对恢复系魔法很在行。

translations.english: Magic is seen as something for elves, and weaker races.
translations.chinese: 魔法被看做是精灵和弱小种族才会用的东西。

translations.english: Magic is shunned by most. If it can't be swung over your head and used to crack skulls, most Nords want nothing to do with it.
translations.chinese: 他们大多都很避讳魔法。如果不能用来敲碎头骨，那大多数诺德人是不屑一顾的。

translations.chinese: 德莱维斯可以教你很多幻术系的知识，前提是你能找到他然后引起他的注意。

translations.english: Faralda. Don't act like she didn't say anything. I know her, I know what she's been up to.
translations.chinese: 法劳达。别装作她什么都没说。我了解她，知道她在做什么。

translations.english: Don't let Tolfdir fool you; he's the pre-eminent scholar on Alteration. One of the best in Tamriel, and always willing to pass on his knowledge.
translations.chinese: 别被小瞧托夫迪尔，他是变化系的杰出学者。也算是泰姆瑞尔这方面最好的之一了，而且总是愿意传授自己的知识。

translations.english: Phinis is one of the best Conjurers in all of Skyrim, and can help with spells from that school.
translations.chinese: 菲尼斯是天际最优秀的召唤师之一，可以教你召唤系法术。

translations.english: Certainly. Destruction spells come in different forms, each useful for various purposes.
translations.chinese: 当然有。毁灭法术形式不一，用途也有差别。

translations.english: Concentration spells can be cast immediately, though they're weaker. Good for a tight spot, and less costly if you miss.
translations.chinese: 集束型法术释放速度快，但威力较弱。适合用于你错失更好时机的紧张关头。

translations.english: Focusing solely on flame spells will make them more powerful, but you may find yourself at a disadvantage against foes immune to fire.
translations.chinese: 专注于火焰法术自然能使它们更加强大，可一旦遇到免疫火焰的敌人，你就处于劣势了。

translations.english: You'll also need to decide whether to devote yourself to a single type of spell.
translations.chinese: 你还需要决定是否专注于一类法术。

translations.english: The way things have been going around here, it's a relief that our plan went off without a hitch.
translations.chinese: 从这里发生的事情来看，我们的计划进行的很顺利，真是令人欣慰。

translations.english: And here you go... your payment, just as I promised.
translations.chinese: 来给你……说好的报酬。

translations.english: Can't say I'm surprised with the way things have been going around here.
translations.chinese: 对这里发生的一切我也没感到惊讶。

translations.english: I didn't think you'd get pinched.
translations.chinese: 我没想到你会被抓。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I didn't think you'd get pinched. | ZH: 我没想到你会被抓。 | SID: 0049B9

translations.english: Mutual advantage! Any fool can see that.
translations.chinese: 优势互补！傻子都能看出来。

translations.english: In exchange, the people of Cyrodiil sleep peacefully, knowing their northern border is guarded by the fiercest warriors in all Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 作为交换，希罗帝尔的人们可以安心入眠，因为他们知道北部的边界正被泰姆瑞尔最凶悍的战士保卫着。

translations.english: For centuries, we have benefited from the Empire's protection, and prosperous trade with the south.
translations.chinese: 千百年来，我们一直受益于帝国的保护，以及和南方的繁荣贸易。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Mutual advantage! Any fool can see that. | ZH: 优势互补！傻子都能看出来。 | SID: 005A4B
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: In exchange, the people of Cyrodiil sleep peacefully, knowing their northern border is guarded by the fiercest warriors in all Tamriel. | ZH: 作为交换，希罗帝尔的人们可以安心入眠，因为他们知道北部的边界正被泰姆瑞尔最凶悍的战士保卫着。 | SID: 008FD1
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: For centuries, we have benefited from the Empire's protection, and prosperous trade with the south. | ZH: 千百年来，我们一直受益于帝国的保护，以及和南方的繁荣贸易。 | SID: 00F586

translations.english: My family was convinced coming here was a death sentence, or worse. It took years of insisting that this is what I'm meant to do.
translations.chinese: 我家里人觉得来这儿和判了死刑差不多，甚至更糟。我坚持了很多年，才得到了想要的。

translations.english: Not at all. I consider it a blessing.
translations.chinese: 还好吧。我觉得这是好事。

translations.english: Is it difficult being away from your family?
translations.chinese: 离开家人会觉得很艰难吗？

agentText:

translations.english: Skyrim was not J'zargo's first choice, but Winterhold is removed from politics, dedicated to study. This is the place for J'zargo to become great.
translations.chinese: 天际不是杰'扎格的首选，但冬堡学院远离政治，致力研究。这才是能让杰'扎格变强的地方。

translations.english: Mages in Cyrodiil are all about politics. The Synod and the College of Whispers are too busy guarding secrets to bother to teach.
translations.chinese: 希罗帝尔的法师醉心政治。希诺和低语学院都在忙于遮掩秘密，根本无心教学。

translations.english: Why did you become a student at the College?
translations.chinese: 你为什么来学院就读？

agentText:

translations.english: I just want to learn, I don't want to think about what's expected of me.
translations.chinese: 我只是想要学习，不想整日应对别人的期望。

translations.english: So far, if only because no one is telling me how great I ought to be.
translations.chinese: 到目前吧，因为没人会敦促我该变得多好。

translations.english: Do you like it here at the College?
translations.chinese: 你喜欢学院吗？

translations.english: Dragonsreach occupies the highest, which we call the Cloud District. From here, the Jarl can see all that goes on within his city.
translations.chinese: 龙临宫占据了最高位，我们称这里为云顶区。从这里，领主可以俯瞰到他城中发生的一切。

translations.english: Most of the city's residents live in the Wind District, which is the middle of the three.
translations.chinese: 城里大部分居民都住在中间的风区。

translations.english: The Plains District is so named because it's the closest of the three to the plains that surround the city. The inn and marketplace are found there.
translations.chinese: 平原区得名于离城外平原最近。旅店集市都集中在那边。

translations.english: Well, there are three of them. Arranged in three tiers, as you may have noticed.
translations.chinese: 嗯，你也应该注意到了，这里有三个区。城被分成了三层。

translations.english: So we scrounge whatever we can from around the tundra.
translations.chinese: 所以我们只能在冻土带附近搜刮搜刮。

translations.english: We got the mill up and running before we found out that the big stand of trees on the hill was sacred.
translations.chinese: 在我们发现山上那些树是神树前，我们就把木材厂修好了。

translations.english: Now we can't cut them, and can't afford to buy another mill somewhere else.
translations.chinese: 现在不能砍树，又没钱在别的地方再盖木材厂。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: So we scrounge whatever we can from around the tundra. | ZH: 所以我们只能在冻土带附近搜刮搜刮。 | SID: 000706
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: We got the mill up and running before we found out that the big stand of trees on the hill was sacred. | ZH: 在我们发现山上那些树是神树前，我们就把木材厂修好了。 | SID: 002B85
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Now we can't cut them, and can't afford to buy another mill somewhere else. | ZH: 现在不能砍树，又没钱在别的地方再盖木材厂。 | SID: 00A359

translations.english: Ever tried making your own? It's... not easy. Trust me.
translations.chinese: 你有试过自己做吗？不过……不容易。相信我。

translations.english: A lifetime of study, you might say. The best comes from Riften, but I haven't been there in years.
translations.chinese: 你可以当是一辈子的研究吧。最好的蜜酒是裂谷城产的，但我很多年没去过了。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: A lifetime of study, you might say. The best comes from Riften, but I haven't been there in years. | ZH: 你可以当是一辈子的研究吧。最好的蜜酒是裂谷城产的，但我很多年没去过了。 | SID: 00CB69

translations.english: Haven't heard from him in a long while.
translations.chinese: 但好久没听到他的消息了。

translations.english: Those falls... dangerous place. Derkeethus thought he could find some good fish in the pools.
translations.chinese: 那些瀑布……很危险。德吉图斯说能在那边的池塘找到好鱼。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Those falls... dangerous place. Derkeethus thought he could find some good fish in the pools. | ZH: 那些瀑布……很危险。德吉图斯说能在那边的池塘找到好鱼。 | SID: 00A362

translations.english: Not much to it, really. We fish, and keep to ourselves. Try to keep from upsetting the Empire or the Stormcloaks, and so far the war's left us alone.
translations.chinese: 没什么可说的。我们在这里打渔谋生，不和外人来往。也尽量不惹上帝国或是风暴斗篷，到现在我们还没被战争波及到。

translations.english: A bunch of lazy rabble trying to make a living. Can't get better workers in because everyone's afraid of the tomb up above the mine.
translations.chinese: 一群想要谋生的懒虫。不过也找不到更好的工人了，大家都害怕矿场上面的坟冢。

translations.english: Dead dragons... it hasn't moved since Ysgramor and it's not going to start now. Superstitious milk drinkers.
translations.chinese: 里面埋着死龙……不过自打伊斯格拉默开始就没动过，现在也不会。一群迷信的懦夫。

translations.english: All we can do now is rebuild.
translations.chinese: 我们现在能做的也只有重建了。

translations.english: So it seems the milk drinkers were right. That dragon was nearly the death of us.
translations.chinese: 看来那些懦夫是对的。那头龙差点害死我们。

translations.english: I'm lucky enough that none of my friends have been killed. Of course we have soldiers coming through all the time.
translations.chinese: 我还算比较走运，没有朋友死于战争。当然，我们这里经常有士兵路过。

translations.english: We love you, Grelod. Thank you for your kindness.
translations.chinese: 我们爱您，桂罗。谢谢您的善意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008BAC3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We love you, Grelod. Thank you for your kindness. | ZH: 我们爱您，桂罗。谢谢您的善意。 | SID: 00BF1C

translations.english: Now, what do you all say?
translations.chinese: 现在，你们该说什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008BAC4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Now, what do you all say? | ZH: 现在，你们该说什么？ | SID: 009DE2

translations.english: Yes, Grelod.
translations.chinese: 是，桂罗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008BAC5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, Grelod. | ZH: 是，桂罗。 | SID: 002014

translations.english: We love you, Grelod. Thank you for your kindness.
translations.chinese: 我们爱您，桂罗。谢谢您的善意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008BAC6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We love you, Grelod. Thank you for your kindness. | ZH: 我们爱您，桂罗。谢谢您的善意。 | SID: 00049D

translations.english: And one more thing! I will hear no more talk of adoptions! None of you riff-raff is getting adopted. Ever! Nobody needs you, nobody wants you.
translations.chinese: 还有一件事！别再和我说什么领养了！你们这些渣滓都不可能被收养！没人需要你们，也没人会想领你们。

translations.english: Those who shirk their duties will get an extra beating. Do I make myself clear?
translations.chinese: 胆敢逃避责任的会额外挨打。我讲清楚了吗？

translations.english: That's better. Now scurry off, my little guttersnipes.
translations.chinese: 这就好。快走吧，我的小流浪儿们。

translations.english: That, my darlings, is why you're here. Why you will always be here, until the day you come of age and get thrown into that wide, horrible world.
translations.chinese: 亲爱的孩子们，这就是你们来这里的原因。你们会一直待在这里，直到成年的那一天，被扔进那个广阔、可怕的世界。

translations.english: Aventus Aretino. He was sent to live here after his mother died. He escaped. And...
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里。他逃走了。而且……

translations.english: Word out on the street is that he went home to Windhelm, and people have heard strange chanting coming from his house. He's really doing it!
translations.chinese: 街上有消息说，他回到了风舵城的家里，人们听到他家里传出奇怪的诵经声。他真的在做了！

translations.english: Before he left, he said he was going to do the Black Sacrament. You know, to call the Dark Brotherhood. So they'd come and kill old Grelod!
translations.chinese: 他离开前，说他会执行黑色圣礼。就是召唤黑暗兄弟会。所以他们会来杀掉老桂罗！

translations.english: Who is Aventus?
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯是谁？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008BBCA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Aventus Aretino. He was sent to live here after his mother died. He escaped. And... | ZH: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里。他逃走了。而且…… | SID: 007167
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Word out on the street is that he went home to Windhelm, and people have heard strange chanting coming from his house. He's really doing it! | ZH: 街上有消息说，他回到了风舵城的家里，人们听到他家里传出奇怪的诵经声。他真的在做了！ | SID: 00A34B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Before he left, he said he was going to do the Black Sacrament. You know, to call the Dark Brotherhood. So they'd come and kill old Grelod! | ZH: 他离开前，说他会执行黑色圣礼。就是召唤黑暗兄弟会。所以他们会来杀掉老桂罗！ | SID: 00A34D
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Who is Aventus? | ZH: 阿文图斯是谁？ | SID: 00A34A

translations.english: He ran away. Back home to Windhelm. Samuel told me he's trying to get some murderer people to come here and kill Grelod. I really hope he does.
translations.chinese: 他逃走了。回了风舵城的家里。萨穆埃尔告诉我他正在试着找杀手来杀桂罗。我真希望他能成功。

translations.english: A little boy who lived here. Aventus Aretino. He was nice, but really quiet, and sad, because his mother just died.
translations.chinese: 一个住在这里的小男孩。阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他人很好，但太安静了，而且很伤心，因为他母亲刚去世。

translations.english: Who is Aventus?
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯是谁？

translations.english: Oh, Aventus Aretino. He was sent here when his mother died, but he ran away.
translations.chinese: 哦，阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺。他母亲死了以后被送到这里，但他逃走了。

translations.english: I heard he went back to his house in Windhelm, and is trying to get the Dark Brotherhood to come and murder Grelod. That would be so wonderful.
translations.chinese: 我听说他回了他在风舵城的家，想让黑暗兄弟会来杀桂罗。那可太好了。

translations.chinese: 阿文图斯是谁？

translations.english: But Samuel told me he's back home in Windhelm, and is doing some kind of dark ritual. He's trying to summon some killers to come get old Grelod.
translations.chinese: 萨穆埃尔告诉我他回了在风舵城的家，正在举行什么黑暗仪式。他想叫杀手来杀掉老桂罗。

translations.english: Aventus Aretino? He only lived here for awhile. I think his mother got sick and died or something. Anyway, he's gone now. He ran away.
translations.chinese: 阿文图斯·艾瑞提诺？他只在这里住过一阵。他妈妈好像是病死了。不管怎么样，他已经离开了。逃跑了。

translations.english: Kill one person, and you can solve so many problems. I wonder at the possibilities.

translations.english: We have lived in Skyrim since before the Nords came. Our way is simple, all work to make the tribe strong.
translations.chinese: 我们在诺德人到来前就住在天际了。我们的生活方式很简单，一切为了壮大部落。

translations.english: Wise women like myself are mothers of chieftains. We guide the tribe and advice our kin on what is most pleasing to Malacath.
translations.chinese: 像我这样的智妪都是酋长的母亲。我们指导部落，教导族人怎样博取玛拉凯斯欢心。

translations.english: Only the bravest are allowed to lead, and to marry. A great chief is able to attract many wives and raise bold children.
translations.chinese: 只有最勇敢的人才被允许领导大家并享有婚配。强大的酋长能吸引很多妻子，养育勇敢的孩子。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Wise women like myself are mothers of chieftains. We guide the tribe and advice our kin on what is most pleasing to Malacath. | ZH: 像我这样的智妪都是酋长的母亲。我们指导部落，教导族人怎样博取玛拉凯斯欢心。 | SID: 00608B

translations.english: Malacath teaches us to honor all words with action. To demand blood from your enemies and strength from your allies.
translations.chinese: 玛拉凯斯教导我们用行动来荣耀一切言语。向敌人索取鲜血，向盟友索取力量。

translations.english: He is our creator and master. The Daedric Lord of the Sworn Oath and the Bloody Curse.
translations.chinese: 他是我们的创造者和主。背弃誓言与血腥诅咒的迪德拉君王。

translations.english: He watches over all Orcs as his children. A truth those who leave the stronghold are quick to forget.
translations.chinese: 他把所有兽人视为孩子。离开要塞的人很容易忘记这个真理。

translations.english: By tradition, a mother always teaches her children how to smith. If a chief has a second wife, she is called the "Forge-wife" in honor of this.
translations.chinese: 按照传统，母亲都会教导孩子们如何锻造。如果酋长娶了第二位妻子，她就会被称为“锻妻”来纪念这一习俗。

translations.english: It is said that an Orc first learns to wield a hammer in her mother's womb.
translations.chinese: 俗话都说兽人打娘胎里就学会抡大锤了。

translations.english: The code is not written anywhere. It is known and carried on by the Orcs, and all who live in the strongholds follow it.
translations.chinese: 法典不是写在纸上的东西。每个兽人都知道并传承着它，所有住在要塞里的人都要遵守它。

translations.english: For an outlander, following it is simple. Do not steal or attack anyone in the stronghold, or be ready to pay in gold or blood.
translations.chinese: 对于外来者，条文其实很简单。不要偷盗，不要攻击要塞里的人，否则就准备好金子或者鲜血来偿还。

translations.english: The Code of Malacath. It is both tradition and law in the strongholds. Break the code, and you must pay Blood Price.
translations.chinese: 《玛拉凯斯法典》，这是要塞的传统和律法。打破法典，就要支付“血价”。

translations.english: Come now, my friend. Haven't we played this game long enough? Untie me, and we can all go our separate ways.
translations.chinese: 行了，朋友。游戏还没玩儿够吗？给我松绑，然后各走各路吧。

translations.english: I am a child of Hammerfell, born of the sands of the mighty Alik'r. In that great desert, blood is a shade of crimson I can scarce describe.
translations.chinese: 我是生于大阿里克'尔沙漠的落锤娃娃。在那片大沙漠，鲜血都是我难以形容的殷红。

translations.english: Ah, well, I'm Redguard, as I'm sure you've noticed. Though not like you. Hmph. No, definitely not like you.
translations.chinese: 啊，你肯定也注意到我是红卫人了。虽然和你不太像。嗯，绝对不像你。

translations.english: My past is long and storied, and not altogether proud. But the Dark Brotherhood saved me from myself. And I have never looked back.
translations.chinese: 我的过去漫长曲折，并不全是值得骄傲的事。但黑暗兄弟会给我了自我救赎的机会，我也从此没再回头。

translations.english: Don't you sweet talk me, Alvor. Not after last night. I'll bring you water when I'm done with my other chores.
translations.chinese: 别用甜言蜜语哄我，阿尔沃。昨晚以后就不行了。等我干完其他杂物再给你拿水。

translations.chinese: 女人，你快把我害死了。好吧，慢慢来，把我渴死在锻炉边上得了。

translations.chinese: 嗯。她帮我做家务，甚至还在铁匠铺帮她父亲。

translations.english: Thank Shor I have a lot of years before I have to worry about that!

translations.english: It seems like Dorthe grows a head taller every season.
translations.chinese: 朵西看着每季都要长高一头啊。

translations.chinese: 西格利！我一生的挚爱！有空的话给我端杯水吧。

translations.english: Inside, you will find an elven mage who can turn the brightest star as black as night.
translations.chinese: 里面有个精灵法师能够将明亮的星辰变成如夜般漆黑。

translations.english: It is cryptic, I know, but Azura's signs are never wrong. I believe the fortress may refer to Winterhold. Ask if they know this elven enchanter.
translations.chinese: 我知道这很含糊。但阿祖拉的指示从不会错。我觉得这个堡垒说的是冬堡。去问问那里的人认不认识这个精灵附魔师。

translations.english: You must go to a fortress, endangered by water, yet untouched by it.
translations.chinese: 你必须前往一座被水所围，但尚未完全沉没的堡垒。

translations.english: Calcelmo's orders- no one gets through to the tower. Kill any intruders on sight. Call for backup if you need to.
translations.chinese: 卡塞莫的命令，任何人不能进入塔楼。杀死任何视线内的入侵者。如果需要，立刻呼叫救援。

translations.english: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!
translations.chinese: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008D292]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ha ha ha ha ha ha ha! | ZH: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！ | SID: 00A2ED

translations.english: But it wasn't long before I realized you'd make a more interesting bearer of my not-quite-holy staff than this waste of flesh.
translations.chinese: 但没过多久，我就意识到，比起白白放浪形骸，你更适合成为我那根不怎么神圣的法杖的有趣传人。

translations.english: I know, I know, how could I lie to you? Well, how could I trust you until we've shared a few drinks?
translations.chinese: 我知道，我知道。不喝几杯咱们是无法信任彼此的。

translations.english: I am Sanguine, Daedric Prince of Debauchery!
translations.chinese: 桑吉恩，放荡的迪德拉君王！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: You came to visit! It's so much better here with Grelod gone. Thanks to you.
translations.chinese: 你来了！自从桂罗死了这里好多了。谢谢你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008D2BE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You came to visit! It's so much better here with Grelod gone. Thanks to you. | ZH: 你来了！自从桂罗死了这里好多了。谢谢你。 | SID: 001931

translations.english: I'll go back to the Orphanage in a while. I'll give them time to, you know... clean up the mess.
translations.chinese: 我一会儿就回孤儿院去。总得给他们些时间……收拾残局。

translations.english: When I grow up, I'm going to be an assassin. That way I can help lots of children, just like you.
translations.chinese: 等我长大了，我也要当刺客。这样我就能像你一样去帮很多孩子了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: When I grow up, I'm going to be an assassin. That way I can help lots of children, just like you. | ZH: 等我长大了，我也要当刺客。这样我就能像你一样去帮很多孩子了。 | SID: 003181

translations.english: But you wouldn't know anything about that, would you? Hmmm? No. No... Of course not. Because then Cicero would get angry, and that would be... ugly.
translations.chinese: 但你一无所知对吧？不。不……当然不。因为西塞罗会生气的，那样很……丑陋。

translations.english: Now Loreius. Loreius has learned the meaning of ugly.
translations.chinese: 现在罗瑞尤斯。罗瑞尤斯知道丑字怎么写了。

translations.english: Someone lied. Someone told the guard poor Cicero did something he did not. We were detained, delayed! The Night Mother kept from her new home!
translations.chinese: 有人撒谎了。有人向卫兵污蔑了可怜的西塞罗。我们就被耽搁了，被耽搁了！夜母离她的新家又远了！

translations.english: But I...
translations.chinese: 但我……

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Valthume
translations.chinese: 瓦尔图梅

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008D5D6]
Translations:
- REFR:FULL | EN: Valthume | ZH: 瓦尔图梅 | SID: 0060BC

translations.english: I guess I shouldn't be surprised with the way things are going around here.
translations.chinese: 我想我也不该对这里的事感到惊讶。

translations.english: Lost it? Well, at least you showed signs of initiative by telling me.
translations.chinese: 搞丢了？好吧，至少你主动告诉我了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008DC20]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I guess I shouldn't be surprised with the way things are going around here. | ZH: 我想我也不该对这里的事感到惊讶。 | SID: 003F1A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Lost it? Well, at least you showed signs of initiative by telling me. | ZH: 搞丢了？好吧，至少你主动告诉我了。 | SID: 006588

translations.english: But I cannot travel to Malacath's shrine. The ritual must be done here, and I do not have the materials I need.
translations.chinese: 但我没法去玛拉凯斯的祭坛。仪式必须在这里进行，可是我缺乏仪式需要的素材。

translations.english: Yamarz has demanded we stay inside the walls. We cannot leave.
translations.chinese: 亚马兹命令我们待在围墙内。我们不能离开。

translations.english: I must petition Malacath for relief. This curse must be lifted.
translations.chinese: 我必须向玛拉凯斯恳求救赎。这个诅咒必须被解除。

translations.english: I beg of you, can you bring me Troll Fat and a Daedra Heart? I have no wish to depend on a stranger, but I have no choice.
translations.chinese: 算我求你，给我带点巨魔脂肪，还要一颗迪德拉之心，可以吗？我也不想依赖陌生人，但我别无选择。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Yamarz has demanded we stay inside the walls. We cannot leave. | ZH: 亚马兹命令我们待在围墙内。我们不能离开。 | SID: 00A2D3

translations.english: Otherwise you could talk to the Jarl's pet wizard in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 或者你可以跟领主的宠物巫师聊聊。

translations.english: Nords don't care much for magic. The College in Winterhold is about the only place it's not looked down on.
translations.chinese: 诺德人不太关心魔法。冬堡学院是唯一不会轻视它的地方。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Although Ulfric's court wizard has been known to take on apprentices once in a while.
translations.chinese: 尽管乌弗瑞克的宫廷巫师偶尔也会收徒的。

translations.english: The College of Winterhold is the only place in Skyrim open-minded enough to teach magic.
translations.chinese: 冬堡学院是天际唯一开放到可以传授魔法的地方。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008EC36]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The College of Winterhold is the only place in Skyrim open-minded enough to teach magic. | ZH: 冬堡学院是天际唯一开放到可以传授魔法的地方。 | SID: 008CF1

translations.english: Better that than dealing with Ulfric's wizard like some do.
translations.chinese: 去那儿总比找乌弗瑞克的宫廷巫师好。

translations.english: Magic? Goodness, not here! Nothing dangerous like that! That's all kept to that College up in Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 魔法？天啊，别在这儿！没有比这更危险的东西了！那都是冬堡学院保存的东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008EC37]

translations.english: Of course there is Farengar. He might be the Jarl's wizard, but at least he's a Nord.
translations.chinese: 当然还有法仁加。他虽然是领主的宫廷巫师，但好歹是诺德人。

translations.english: Magic is for the weak. Elves, I mean. They keep to that College in Winterhold. They know their place.
translations.chinese: 魔法是为弱者准备的。我是说精灵。他们一直待在冬堡那所学院里。他们很明白自己的位置。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0008EC38]
Translations:

translations.english: You'd never think to learn from a Nord like the Jarl's wizard.
translations.chinese: 你从没想过向像领主的诺德巫师去学习。

translations.english: The Jarl's court wizard was taught there. That one's full of secrets.
translations.chinese: 领主的宫廷巫师就是在那里学习的，那里充满秘密。

translations.english: I don't even like our Jarl havin' a court wizard.
translations.chinese: 我甚至不喜欢我们领主还雇了个宫廷巫师。

translations.english: Either that or go see the Jarl's court wizard.
translations.chinese: 要么去那儿，要么去找领主的宫廷巫师。

translations.chinese: 如果你想当个大傻子，那就去冬堡学院吧。

translations.english: Events in the last several hundred years resulted in a significant loss of our history, I'm afraid.
translations.chinese: 过去几百年的事恐怕导致了我们自己历史的重大损失。

translations.english: I've seen documents dating back to the late Second Era. Beyond that, it's hard to say.
translations.chinese: 我阅读过的文件最早可以追溯到第二纪元晚期。在此之前就难说了。

translations.english: Take this with our gratitude.
translations.chinese: 请收下我们的谢礼。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009018C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Take this with our gratitude. | ZH: 请收下我们的谢礼。 | SID: 00CF42

translations.english: The soil beneath our feet is steeped in the blood of our ancestors. We've fought for this land and... died for it.
translations.chinese: 我们脚下的土地，浸透了我们祖先的鲜血。我们为这片土地而战……为它而死。

translations.english: They mean to take our history and crush it all in the name of some damn treaty.
translations.chinese: 他们想以某个该死的条约的名义夺走并摧毁我们的历史。

translations.english: I lost my own daughter to the Imperial dogs, and by Talos I'll not lose anyone else!
translations.chinese: 我的女儿被帝国狗害死了，我再也不想失去任何人了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: And that's why I won't rest easy until every single Imperial soldier joins her, and Ulfric sits upon the throne of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 这就是我为什么不会轻易安歇，我要等到所有帝国兵都下去陪她，等到乌弗瑞克登上天际的宝座。

translations.english: It didn't matter. The Imperial soldiers cut her down... killed her like a dog and left her body to rot in the mud.
translations.chinese: 但这并不重要。帝国兵把她砍倒，像杀一条狗一样把她杀死了，让她的尸体倒在烂泥中腐烂。

translations.english: She served as a Battle Maiden, using her healing arts to help those that fell on the battlefield. Never even lifted a blade in her life.
translations.chinese: 她作为战地护士用自己的治疗技能帮助那些在战场上倒下的人们。她这辈子连刀都没拿过。

translations.english: Lilija joined the Stormcloaks many years ago, when the first of the skirmishes broke out across Skyrim. I was so proud of her.
translations.chinese: 莉莉雅许多年前就加入了风暴斗篷，当时天际才刚刚爆发小规模冲突。我为她感到骄傲。

translations.english: Suit yourself. If you change your mind, I'll be around.
translations.chinese: 随你便，如果你想好了，我就在你身边。

translations.english: We recently heard she'd been killed... I... I find it difficult to talk about. Perhaps you'd be better off speaking to my parents about it.
translations.chinese: 我们最近听说她战死了……我……我觉得这件事不好说。或许你最好去和我父母谈这件事。

translations.english: Anyway, I'm glad my work at the Black-Briar Meadery keeps me busy. Helps me keep my mind off of things.
translations.chinese: 不管怎样，我很高兴黑棘蜜酒庄让我保持忙碌的状态，不去想这些事。

translations.english: It was my sister, Lilija. She served as a Battle Maiden with the Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 是我妹妹，莉莉雅。她曾经是风暴斗篷的战地护士。

translations.english: Good thing she makes so much money. Makes it easier for merchandise like this to fall through the cracks.
translations.chinese: 幸好她买卖大赚得多。这样一来这样的商品就更容易漏网了。

translations.english: Sure. How do you think I get my hands on the good stuff and offer it so cheap? You think old Maven is just giving it away to anyone?
translations.chinese: 没错。不然你以为我是怎么弄到这么好还这么便宜的东西的？你觉得老玛雯会轻易把它给别人吗？

translations.english: My mother is the Priestess of Talos. She tends to the shrine and teaches his ways. I'm just not so sure she's delivering the right message.
translations.chinese: 我母亲是塔洛斯祭司。她经常去祭坛，传播他的教义。我只是不确定她传达的信息是否正确。

translations.english: My father was a Stormcloak soldier in his younger days. Now he just walks the streets spewing his hatred and propaganda.
translations.chinese: 我父亲年轻的时候是个风暴斗篷士兵。现在他只会在大街上散布他的仇恨和口号。

translations.english: Riften's biggest exports used to be fishing and honey, until the Black-Briar family moved in. Now the meadery is the biggest game in town.

translations.chinese: 西比·黑棘对他前任情人试图谋杀他的事很愤怒，正在千方百计寻找她。

translations.english: All I know is that the sap makes you feel as healthy as a cave troll, but slow as a drunk horker. And that and it fetches good coin.
translations.chinese: 我只是知道这种汁液能让你感觉自己像洞里的巨魔一样强壮，但又像喝多了的海象一样迟钝。这样能赚好多钱。

translations.english: I've also heard that it was a spore that fell from an island floating in the sky, but that just sounds like nonsense.
translations.chinese: 我还听说那是从一个浮空岛上掉下来的孢子，但听起来像是胡说八道。

translations.english: Some say that when Vvardenfell erupted, a piece was blown to the middle of Skyrim and from the crater grew the tree.
translations.chinese: 有人说，是瓦登费尔的火山爆发时，一块碎片被吹到了天际中央地带，然后那棵树就在坑里长起来了。

translations.english: How the tree came to grow there is a bit of a mystery...
translations.chinese: 那棵树是怎么在那里生长的有点神秘。

translations.english: Drowning your troubles in mead? A lot of folks are doing that these days. You'll want the Windpeak Inn.
translations.chinese: 想把烦恼扔进蜜酒里？现在很多人都这样。那你可以去风岳旅店。

translations.chinese: 没错。我是在浩大战争之后接触到阿尔凯的。死在我手上，我的魔法之下的人太多了。

translations.english: I'm fortunate that Kust and the people of Falkreath have come to accept me as one of their own.
translations.chinese: 我很幸运，得到了卡斯特还有佛克瑞斯人民的接纳。

translations.english: Could you do an old elf a favor? I misplaced my journal in a cave I was exploring. I'll pay for its return.
translations.chinese: 你能帮老精灵一个忙吗？我把日记丢在了一个山洞里。如果你能找回来，我会付钱的。

translations.english: Giants are a common problem in the Pale. The Empire always demanded I leave them be, but the Empire isn't here now.
translations.chinese: 巨人在苍原是个常见麻烦了。帝国一直要求我远离他们，但现在帝国管不着这里了。

translations.chinese: 他们一开始分我的还不错，但现在到了该清理的时候了。去把他们料理了。

translations.chinese: 是。我父亲在那场对抗精灵的浩大战争里去世，这里也就留给我了。

translations.english: I just finished giving my old war companion, Berit, a proper burial by fire. Old hard head hated the idea of being lost cold in the ground.
translations.chinese: 我刚刚火化了我的老战友贝瑞特。那个老顽固不想直接冻在地里。

translations.english: Falkreath is known for its graveyard, traveler. We've buried more dead than you can imagine.
translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯的墓地很出名的，旅行者。我们这里埋的死人比你想的还要多。

translations.english: Could you deliver the ashes to Runil, the priest of Arkay? He'll know the right blessings to make for Berit's soul.
translations.chinese: 你能把骨灰交给阿尔凯祭司鲁尼尔吗？他知道该如何为贝瑞特的灵魂祈祷的。

translations.english: You said something about a burial?
translations.chinese: 你提到了葬礼？

translations.chinese: 也许这是我补过的机会。我可以按马林发疯前的计划，继续完成他的研究。

translations.english: Then one day I walked in and Malyn had... killed a student, and in a horrific moment of inspiration, he started using her soul for his work.
translations.chinese: 有一天我走进去发现……马林杀了一个学生，然后突发奇想，用她的灵魂进行研究。

translations.english: Azura is no ordinary Daedra. She commands an entire realm inside of Oblivion. The more Malyn worked on the Star, the more she was able to damn him.
translations.chinese: 阿祖拉不是寻常迪德拉。她掌控着一整个湮灭位面。马林对那颗星研究越多，所受到的诅咒也就越多。

translations.english: It started slowly at first. Malyn would see things that weren't there. Then he would yell at students over words they hadn't said.
translations.chinese: 开始还是很缓慢的。马林开始出现幻视，接着，他就因为幻听而呵斥学生。

translations.chinese: 我会和阿祖拉交流。

translations.english: He's still in town, getting by plying spells to the people inside the Frozen Hearth. Disgraceful.
translations.chinese: 他现在还住在镇子上，在冻炉旅店研究魔法。真可耻。

translations.english: There was an... unfortunate incident a few years ago. An elven mage named Nelacar was exiled from the College over it.
translations.chinese: 那是……几年前的悲剧。一个叫内拉卡的精灵法师因此被逐出学院。

translations.english: Then again, Nelacar might know. He's an old-timer from the College, but he has a room here.
translations.chinese: 话说回来，内拉卡可能知道。他是学院的老资格了，不过他在这里住。

translations.english: The mages are up in the College. You can ask them, if they'll let you in.
translations.chinese: 法师都在学院里，如果能进去的话，你可以问他们。

translations.english: You can only store white souls in the Star, belonging to the lesser creatures. Azura's magic won't allow black souls to enter it.
translations.chinese: 那颗星只能存储低等生物的白色灵魂。阿祖拉的魔法隔绝了黑色灵魂进入其中。

translations.english: As a mortal, Malyn's soul was black, so part of his work was breaking past Azura's rules. He was close before... well, I already told you.
translations.chinese: 马林身为凡人，灵魂是黑色的。所以他以前的一部分工作就是要打破阿祖拉的规则。他已经很接近目的了……但是，后面的事你也知道了。

translations.english: I mentioned how the Star is a soul gem, only it never gets depleted? There's another rule the artifact follows.
translations.chinese: 我刚刚说了吧？那颗星是永不枯竭的灵魂石。它还遵循着另一条规则。

translations.chinese: 好吧，在你接任前咱们还有些事要办，所以现在先别对着我多愁善感了。

translations.english: I'm good at what I do, maybe even one of the best. But it's all I know.
translations.chinese: 我很擅长这行的工作，也许还是最好的那种。但这是我的极限了。

translations.english: I've never been one to lead. Never desired it, never cared for it. Don't want it.
translations.chinese: 我从没当过领袖。也从没这样想过，从来没有。一点也不想干。

translations.english: I've been at this game a long time, my friend. A long time. I've stolen trinkets from nobles and framed priests for murder.
translations.chinese: 我干这行很久了，朋友。很长时间。我偷过贵族的饰品还诬陷过祭司谋杀。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00091944]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I'm good at what I do, maybe even one of the best. But it's all I know. | ZH: 我很擅长这行的工作，也许还是最好的那种。但这是我的极限了。 | SID: 009313
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I've never been one to lead. Never desired it, never cared for it. Don't want it. | ZH: 我从没当过领袖。也从没这样想过，从来没有。一点也不想干。 | SID: 00A111
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I've been at this game a long time, my friend. A long time. I've stolen trinkets from nobles and framed priests for murder. | ZH: 我干这行很久了，朋友。很长时间。我偷过贵族的饰品还诬陷过祭司谋杀。 | SID: 00B1A3

translations.english: Until then, we have quite the task ahead.
translations.chinese: 在那之前，任务艰巨啊。

translations.english: Then it's decided. When this entire sorry affair is over, we'll handle the details.
translations.chinese: 那就这么决定了。等这个糟心事结束后，我们再谈细节吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00091945]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Until then, we have quite the task ahead. | ZH: 在那之前，任务艰巨啊。 | SID: 007FA5
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Then it's decided. When this entire sorry affair is over, we'll handle the details. | ZH: 那就这么决定了。等这个糟心事结束后，我们再谈细节吧。 | SID: 00A121

translations.english: Then it's decided. When this is all over and Delvin's contacts assure me that we've regained our footing in Skyrim, we'll handle the details.
translations.chinese: 那就这么决定了。等一切结束，戴尔文的联络人们向我保证咱们在全天际重新站稳脚跟，我们再谈细节吧。

translations.english: Until then, we have quite the task ahead.
translations.chinese: 在那之前，任务艰巨啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00091946]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Until then, we have quite the task ahead. | ZH: 在那之前，任务艰巨啊。 | SID: 006EF0

translations.english: Ha! Spoken like the leader of the Thieves Guild.
translations.chinese: 哈！口气就像盗贼公会头子一样。

translations.english: Just don't lose yourself in the role. We have a bit of an errand to run before your coronation.
translations.chinese: 只是别在角色里出不来了。在你接任前还有事要办呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00091947]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ha! Spoken like the leader of the Thieves Guild. | ZH: 哈！口气就像盗贼公会头子一样。 | SID: 0059EB
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Just don't lose yourself in the role. We have a bit of an errand to run before your coronation. | ZH: 只是别在角色里出不来了。在你接任前还有事要办呢。 | SID: 00A118

translations.english: And now they know Mercer never genuinely cared about the Guild. He lacked the loyalty you obviously possess.
translations.chinese: 现在他们知道了墨瑟从未真正关心过公会。他缺乏你这样明显的忠诚。

translations.english: I can't think of anyone better.
translations.chinese: 我想不出更好的人选了。

translations.english: Look. Everyone in the Guild admires what you've done. Maybe they won't come out and simply tell you, but I promise you it's true.
translations.chinese: 听着。公会所有人都很欣赏你所做的一切。也许他们不会直截了当跟你说，但我保证这是真的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00091948]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: And now they know Mercer never genuinely cared about the Guild. He lacked the loyalty you obviously possess. | ZH: 现在他们知道了墨瑟从未真正关心过公会。他缺乏你这样明显的忠诚。 | SID: 009031
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I can't think of anyone better. | ZH: 我想不出更好的人选了。 | SID: 009C6D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Look. Everyone in the Guild admires what you've done. Maybe they won't come out and simply tell you, but I promise you it's true. | ZH: 听着。公会所有人都很欣赏你所做的一切。也许他们不会直截了当跟你说，但我保证这是真的。 | SID: 00DF9F

translations.english: Karliah and I had a long discussion before you arrived here.
translations.chinese: 在你来之前，卡莱亚和我聊了很久。

translations.english: As a result, we both feel that you'd make an excellent replacement for Mercer as leader of the Thieves Guild.
translations.chinese: 因此，我们都觉得你适合取代墨瑟成为盗贼公会的领袖。

translations.english: Thanks to your efforts, the Guild's been restored to it's full strength and you've exposed the traitor in our midst.
translations.chinese: 多亏了你的努力，公会已经恢复了它全部的力量，你也揭出了我们中的叛徒。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: As a result, we both feel that you'd make an excellent replacement for Mercer as leader of the Thieves Guild. | ZH: 因此，我们都觉得你适合取代墨瑟成为盗贼公会的领袖。 | SID: 00A109
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Thanks to your efforts, the Guild's been restored to it's full strength and you've exposed the traitor in our midst. | ZH: 多亏了你的努力，公会已经恢复了它全部的力量，你也揭出了我们中的叛徒。 | SID: 00A10D

translations.english: As a result, we both feel that you have the potential of replacing Mercer as leader of the Thieves Guild.
translations.chinese: 因此，我们都觉得你有潜力取代墨瑟成为盗贼公会的领袖。

translations.english: Thanks to your efforts, Mercer's treachery has been exposed. After we deal with him, all that remains is restoring the Guild to its full strength.
translations.chinese: 多亏你的努力，墨瑟的阴谋得以揭穿。等把他做掉以后，剩下的就是恢复公会的全部力量了。

translations.english: Karliah and I had a long discussion before you arrived here.
translations.chinese: 在你来之前，卡莱亚和我聊了很久。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Thanks to your efforts, Mercer's treachery has been exposed. After we deal with him, all that remains is restoring the Guild to its full strength. | ZH: 多亏你的努力，墨瑟的阴谋得以揭穿。等把他做掉以后，剩下的就是恢复公会的全部力量了。 | SID: 004E6E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Karliah and I had a long discussion before you arrived here. | ZH: 在你来之前，卡莱亚和我聊了很久。 | SID: 0070AB

translations.english: Just give me a moment.
translations.chinese: 给我一点时间。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00091AE2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Just give me a moment. | ZH: 给我一点时间。 | SID: 00B362

translations.english: These fissures and cracks aren't encouraging. Malyn obviously was growing more desparate once he left the College.
translations.chinese: 看看这残破的样子。马林离开学院之后一定变得更绝望了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00091AE3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: These fissures and cracks aren't encouraging. Malyn obviously was growing more desparate once he left the College. | ZH: 看看这残破的样子。马林离开学院之后一定变得更绝望了。 | SID: 00D0E1

translations.english: Dawnstar has a history of being the site of battles that have crippled the fate of the Empire. I hope this remains true.
translations.chinese: 晨星曾是削弱帝国国运的战场。我希望这是真的。

translations.english: The Stormcloaks are destined to win this fight. Talos is with us, and when you fight under a Divine's blessing, victory is assured.
translations.chinese: 风暴斗篷注定会赢得这场战争。塔洛斯与我们同在，当你在圣灵的护佑下战斗，胜利就是必然的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009232E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Dawnstar has a history of being the site of battles that have crippled the fate of the Empire. I hope this remains true. | ZH: 晨星曾是削弱帝国国运的战场。我希望这是真的。 | SID: 0029DE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The Stormcloaks are destined to win this fight. Talos is with us, and when you fight under a Divine's blessing, victory is assured. | ZH: 风暴斗篷注定会赢得这场战争。塔洛斯与我们同在，当你在圣灵的护佑下战斗，胜利就是必然的。 | SID: 0099F2

translations.english: The only reason dragons are attacking is because Talos is angry with us for turning our backs on him.
translations.chinese: 龙族袭击的唯一原因就是因为塔洛斯对我们的背弃感到愤怒。

translations.english: As soon as we drive the Empire out of Skyrim, the dragons will vanish. Mark my words.
translations.chinese: 一旦我们把帝国赶出天际，龙就会消失。记住我说的话。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00092330]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The only reason dragons are attacking is because Talos is angry with us for turning our backs on him. | ZH: 龙族袭击的唯一原因就是因为塔洛斯对我们的背弃感到愤怒。 | SID: 006679
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: As soon as we drive the Empire out of Skyrim, the dragons will vanish. Mark my words. | ZH: 一旦我们把帝国赶出天际，龙就会消失。记住我说的话。 | SID: 00FC99

translations.english: We were forced to arrest all of them. Ulfric Stormcloak, their leader, used the whole thing as proof that the Empire had abandoned Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我们被迫将他们全部逮捕。他们的首领乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷借此证明了帝国已经放弃了天际。

translations.english: We promised a group of Nord militia free worship in exchange for their help retaking the Hold. Then the Elves found out about it.
translations.chinese: 我们答应让一群诺德民兵以自由信仰为条件将瑞驰领夺回来。后来精灵发现了这件事。

translations.english: The rebels called it "The Markarth Incident." It was the founding day for the Stormcloaks, and where this war really started.
translations.chinese: 叛军把这叫做“马卡斯事件”。那天就是风暴斗篷成立的日子，也是这场战争真正爆发的日子。

translations.english: It all started here. This rebellion. When the Empire lost the Reach during the Great War, we became desperate.
translations.chinese: 一切都从这里开始。这场叛乱。当帝国在浩大战争中丢掉瑞驰之后，我们变得绝望。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00092331]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: We were forced to arrest all of them. Ulfric Stormcloak, their leader, used the whole thing as proof that the Empire had abandoned Skyrim. | ZH: 我们被迫将他们全部逮捕。他们的首领乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷借此证明了帝国已经放弃了天际。 | SID: 0031D4
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: We promised a group of Nord militia free worship in exchange for their help retaking the Hold. Then the Elves found out about it. | ZH: 我们答应让一群诺德民兵以自由信仰为条件将瑞驰领夺回来。后来精灵发现了这件事。 | SID: 007A61

translations.english: Yes. Ever since mother died a few winters ago. I play songs and help with the drinks when I have the time.
translations.chinese: 是的。自从我母亲几年前的冬天去世后。有空的时候我会唱曲或者帮忙倒酒。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00092332]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes. Ever since mother died a few winters ago. I play songs and help with the drinks when I have the time. | ZH: 是的。自从我母亲几年前的冬天去世后。有空的时候我会唱曲或者帮忙倒酒。 | SID: 00A0F9

translations.english: Well, you are lovely to look at, and there's so many things I could teach you, but I'm afraid the Temple isn't taking in new students.
translations.chinese: 嗯，你长得是挺可爱的，我也可以教你很多东西，但恐怕神庙不再收新学生了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00092333]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, you are lovely to look at, and there's so many things I could teach you, but I'm afraid the Temple isn't taking in new students. | ZH: 嗯，你长得是挺可爱的，我也可以教你很多东西，但恐怕神庙不再收新学生了。 | SID: 00EB70

translations.english: The White-Gold Concordat. Our treaty with the Elves after the Great War forbids free worship of Talos.
translations.chinese: 因为白金协定。我们在浩大战争之后与精灵签订了条约禁止自由信仰塔洛斯。

translations.english: So when they did find out, it was either we arrest Ulfric and the militia, or enter into yet another war with the Aldmeri Dominion.
translations.chinese: 所以，当他们发现的时候，我们要么逮捕乌弗瑞克和民兵，要么和先祖神洲再打一仗。

translations.english: But that's what we promised Ulfric and his men. It seems foolish looking back, but at the time we were hoping the Elves wouldn't find out.
translations.chinese: 但我们答应过乌弗瑞克和他的部下。回头想想似乎有些愚蠢，但当时我们希望精灵不会发现。

translations.english: The choice was clear. And now, Ulfric threatens the thinly veiled peace we sacrificed so much for.
translations.chinese: 选择不言而喻。现在，乌弗瑞克威胁到了我们为之牺牲甚多的和平。

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: The choice was clear. And now, Ulfric threatens the thinly veiled peace we sacrificed so much for. | ZH: 选择不言而喻。现在，乌弗瑞克威胁到了我们为之牺牲甚多的和平。 | SID: 0098AA

translations.english: The Imperials were weak. They created this Forsworn problem, but now that we're in charge we'll solve it.
translations.chinese: 帝国人很弱。他们制造了弃誓者问题，但现在我们说了算，我们会解决的。

translations.english: Then the Forsworn will be where they belong. In the mines, bringing us wealth.
translations.chinese: 那些弃誓者会回到他们该去的地方。到矿场里给我们提供财富。

translations.english: Once the war is over, I'll petition Ulfric to send the militia and we'll cleanse the Reach of this menace.
translations.chinese: 一旦战争结束，我会请乌弗瑞克派义勇军来，我们会为瑞驰清除这个威胁。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009233C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The Imperials were weak. They created this Forsworn problem, but now that we're in charge we'll solve it. | ZH: 帝国人很弱。他们制造了弃誓者问题，但现在我们说了算，我们会解决的。 | SID: 0032BC
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Then the Forsworn will be where they belong. In the mines, bringing us wealth. | ZH: 那些弃誓者会回到他们该去的地方。到矿场里给我们提供财富。 | SID: 006409
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Once the war is over, I'll petition Ulfric to send the militia and we'll cleanse the Reach of this menace. | ZH: 一旦战争结束，我会请乌弗瑞克派义勇军来，我们会为瑞驰清除这个威胁。 | SID: 00A0DF

translations.english: It was little more than a chaotic uprising, but the Reach was removed from Imperial authority for two years before we reclaimed it.
translations.chinese: 那只不过是一场混乱的起义，但在我们收复之前，瑞驰从帝国手中被分离了两年。

translations.english: When the Aldmeri Dominion invaded the Imperial City, the Legion all but turned a blind eye to the other provinces.
translations.chinese: 当先祖神洲入侵帝都时，军团几乎无暇顾及其他省份。

translations.english: But the leaders of the uprising refused our offers of peace. They fled into the hills and became the Forsworn.
translations.chinese: 但起义的领导人们拒绝了我们的和平提议，逃到了山里，成了弃誓者。

translations.english: Many of the disgruntled natives of the Reach used the opportunity to depose the Empire, and founded what they called an independent kingdom.
translations.chinese: 许多不满的原住民就趁机推翻了帝国，建立了他们所谓的独立王国。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: It was little more than a chaotic uprising, but the Reach was removed from Imperial authority for two years before we reclaimed it. | ZH: 那只不过是一场混乱的起义，但在我们收复之前，瑞驰从帝国手中被分离了两年。 | SID: 00193E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: When the Aldmeri Dominion invaded the Imperial City, the Legion all but turned a blind eye to the other provinces. | ZH: 当先祖神洲入侵帝都时，军团几乎无暇顾及其他省份。 | SID: 009868

translations.english: And then, at a time we are still not sure when, they disappeared. The whole people, all at once. Leaving behind only their works.
translations.chinese: 然后，在我们仍不能确定的某个时间，他们都消失了。所有人，同时消失了。只留下了他们的作品。

translations.english: Yes. Their history and culture is all around us in Markarth. A race of stonecutters, artisans, and engineers.
translations.chinese: 没错。他们的历史和文化在马卡斯随处可见。一个盛产石匠、工匠和工程师的种族。

translations.english: They invented machines and built elaborate underground cities where they researched powers to rival the gods themselves.
translations.chinese: 他们发明机械，建造精密的地下城市，在那里研究与神灵抗衡的力量。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00092346]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: And then, at a time we are still not sure when, they disappeared. The whole people, all at once. Leaving behind only their works. | ZH: 然后，在我们仍不能确定的某个时间，他们都消失了。所有人，同时消失了。只留下了他们的作品。 | SID: 008D2E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Yes. Their history and culture is all around us in Markarth. A race of stonecutters, artisans, and engineers. | ZH: 没错。他们的历史和文化在马卡斯随处可见。一个盛产石匠、工匠和工程师的种族。 | SID: 00A0BF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: They invented machines and built elaborate underground cities where they researched powers to rival the gods themselves. | ZH: 他们发明机械，建造精密的地下城市，在那里研究与神灵抗衡的力量。 | SID: 00F619

translations.english: The stone structure the Dwarves have left makes us invincible. Let the dragons singe a few carpets. They'll never topple Markarth.
translations.chinese: 矮人留下的石头建筑让我们战无不胜。那些龙烧几块地皮无所谓。他们永远也推翻不了马卡斯。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00092347]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The stone structure the Dwarves have left makes us invincible. Let the dragons singe a few carpets. They'll never topple Markarth. | ZH: 矮人留下的石头建筑让我们战无不胜。那些龙烧几块地皮无所谓。他们永远也推翻不了马卡斯。 | SID: 002712

translations.english: Finally. Now get lost.
translations.chinese: 总算给了。现在躲开吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00092348]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Finally. Now get lost. | ZH: 总算给了。现在躲开吧。 | SID: 007698

translations.english: And everything is made of stone. Even the beds. We'll have no trouble from dragon's fire here.
translations.chinese: 一切都是石头做的。连床都是。龙炎不会带来多大麻烦的。

translations.english: Yes, I know. We have some advantages if they come here. The city is built into the mountainside, so it's hard to reach into even from the skies.
translations.chinese: 是，我知道。如果他们来这里，我们还是有些优势的。这座城市建在山腰上，即使从天上飞来也很难抵达。

translations.english: But that's the kind of talk an old warhorse shouldn't be making. Don't worry. I have my problems with the Empire, but I'm still a soldier first.
translations.chinese: 但这不是个老兵该说的。别担心。我即使对帝国有些不满，但还是个军人。

translations.english: We'll keep peace and order in Dawnstar.
translations.chinese: 我们会维持晨星的和平与秩序。

translations.english: The Empire has stretched itself too far. This rebellion in Skyrim is one problem, but solving it won't fix everything.
translations.chinese: 帝国已经拉的太长了。天际的叛乱确实是个问题，但解决它不代表解决所有问题。

translations.english: Let me show you where they are. Maybe they welcome you. Maybe they put an arrow in your face. Who knows?
translations.chinese: 我来告诉你他们的位置吧。也许他们会欢迎你，或是朝你脸上射一箭。谁知道呢？

translations.english: Now having an Orc for a wife would be something, yes. Strong and bulky. Too bad they don't let people go beyond the walls.
translations.chinese: 娶个兽人当老婆也不错。又强大又健壮。可惜他们不让她们走出要塞高墙。

translations.english: The answer is simple. Orcs. There is a stronghold nearby whose hunters can butcher a deer in seconds.
translations.chinese: 答案很简单。兽人。附近有个要塞，那里的猎人几秒钟内就能杀死一头鹿。

translations.english: Ah, now that is a good question. Where does Hogni get the finest, freshest meat from all over the Reach?
translations.chinese: 哦，好问题。霍尼从哪儿买到了全瑞驰最好最新鲜的肉？

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Now having an Orc for a wife would be something, yes. Strong and bulky. Too bad they don't let people go beyond the walls. | ZH: 娶个兽人当老婆也不错。又强大又健壮。可惜他们不让她们走出要塞高墙。 | SID: 00654A

translations.english: Through neglect. During the Great War, they let the unwashed natives retake the Reach and declare their own sovereignty.
translations.chinese: 因为忽视。浩大战争期间，他们让这些未开化的土著重新夺回了瑞驰并宣布主权。

translations.english: In the end, we took back Markarth, but those damn Forsworn still stalk the hills and roads, looking for revenge.
translations.chinese: 最后，我们夺回了马卡斯，但那些该死的弃誓者还在山野徘徊，伺机复仇。

translations.english: The Stormcloaks were forced to retake the Reach on our own, but that taste of independence emboldened them. And the Forsworn were born.
translations.chinese: 风暴斗篷不得不靠我们自己的力量重新夺回瑞驰，但那种独特的独立滋味让他们更加大胆了。弃誓者就这么诞生了。

translations.english: No. We're completely exposed. Bows and arrows are in short supply. Every building is made of thatch and wood.
translations.chinese: 不。我们完全暴露了。弓弩箭矢都供应不足。这里的建筑都是茅草和木头搭建的。

translations.english: I've given standing orders to the guards to prepare water bucket runs to the harbor in case of a fire, but that's all we can do.
translations.chinese: 我已经命令卫兵在通往港口的地方准备好水桶以防止发生火灾，但我们只能做这么多了。

translations.english: I fought in the Great War. I cut enough young lives short, I'm not going to do it again.
translations.chinese: 我参加过浩大战争。我夺去了很多年轻人的生命，我不会再这么做了。

translations.english: If you could call it that. The Jarl can make all the demands in the world, I'm not setting one foot on the battlefield.
translations.chinese: 这么说也没错。但就算领主可以提出世界上所有的要求，我也不会踏足战场的。

translations.english: Dibella is the Divine of Beauty. She is a patron deity to artists and bards and those who seek life's simple pleasures.
translations.chinese: 迪贝拉是美之圣灵。她是艺术家、诗人和那些寻求生活中简单快乐者的守护神。

translations.english: A heathen. Lovely. Oh, don't put on that angry look. I'm just teasing you.
translations.chinese: 真是可爱的异教徒。哦，别生气。我逗你玩呢。

translations.english: The temple offers her blessings to pilgrims and instruction in enjoying all life has to offer.
translations.chinese: 神庙会为朝拜者提供她的祝福，并教导他们如何享受生活。

translations.english: I'm sorry, the Temple of Dibella is closed. You can receive your blessing, if you wish, but the other sisters are in seclusion.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，迪贝拉神殿已经关门了。如果你愿意，可以自行膜拜接受祝福，但其他祭司都在隐修当中。

translations.english: Why have taxes not come in from Granite Hill, Nenya? We should send some guards down there.
translations.chinese: 为什么花岗岩山丘没有税收上来，南雅？我们该派点卫兵过去。

translations.english: I don't know about you, tekla, but all my prayers are silent and who I pray to is still my own to decide.
translations.chinese: 我不知你怎么想，苔卡拉，但我所有的祈祷都是默念的，我向谁祈祷仍然由我自己做主。

translations.english: Narri, do you think the war will ever end?
translations.chinese: 纳里，你觉得战争会结束吗？

translations.english: Hmmf. Maybe you're the one talking to him then...

translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯是个好地方啊，波伦德。

translations.english: Falkreath is our home, a place where we have good jobs under a good Jarl. Until the war comes to us we stay put.
translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯是我们的家，我们在这里有好领主，好工作。直到战争来临前，我们都会在这里。

translations.chinese: 最近想要准备防御很困难，每次收到新的战争报告，我们的需求都会改变。

translations.chinese: 阁下，我会让他们振作起来的，但随着战争的进行，再克扣他们的薪资是不明智的。

translations.chinese: 这对我们来说都是一段艰难的日子。希望你也能找到自己的避风港，马西斯。

translations.english: Her marriage band? Then there's hope - she was here!
translations.chinese: 她的婚戒？那就有希望了，她来过这里！

translations.chinese: 抱歉。戒指请你收下吧。我承受不了它们在我心中的重量，现在我必须一个人走了。谢谢……谢谢你。

translations.chinese: 但他的灵魂还盘踞其中，被他的魔法保护着。在他被净化前，我的神器对你毫无用处。

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Unless you intend to bury someone, this isn't the place you're looking for, traveler. | ZH: 除非你想来埋人，这里不是你要找的地方，旅人。 | SID: 00CBC1

translations.english: Falkreath was once full of wanderers and warriors like yourself. Those were better days.
translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯曾经充满像你一样的漂泊者和战士。那真是个好时候。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Falkreath was once full of wanderers and warriors like yourself. Those were better days. | ZH: 佛克瑞斯曾经充满像你一样的漂泊者和战士。那真是个好时候。 | SID: 0035A8

translations.english: Skyrim's history of war is well documented here in Falkreath's graveyard.
translations.chinese: 天际的战争历史被很好地记录在佛克瑞斯的墓地。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00092F24]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Skyrim's history of war is well documented here in Falkreath's graveyard. | ZH: 天际的战争历史被很好地记录在佛克瑞斯的墓地。 | SID: 00CBBF

translations.english: My brother Dengeir can be... difficult. Take his words with a grain of salt.
translations.chinese: 我兄长丹格尔有些……困难。他的话半信半疑就行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00092F25]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My brother Dengeir can be... difficult. Take his words with a grain of salt. | ZH: 我兄长丹格尔有些……困难。他的话半信半疑就行。 | SID: 00CBBD

translations.english: If we don't do something, the enchantment will eventually fade, and the Star will slip back into Oblivion. Azura will have the last laugh.
translations.chinese: 如果我们无所作为，等附魔消失，星辰回归湮灭。阿祖拉就成了最大赢家。

translations.english: He's already dead. Worse, the enchantment keeping him intact requires black souls. I don't know how many people he must have killed.
translations.chinese: 他已经死了。更恶劣的是，维持他自身完整的附魔需要黑色灵魂。真不知道他杀了多少人。

translations.english: Oh yes, there have been attempts on the Jarl's life. More than one would-be assassin has met his end at the tip of my blade.
translations.chinese: 没错，总有人企图谋害领主。不止一个想当杀手的死在我的剑下了。

translations.english: Powerful men have many enemies. More so, in times of strife. So you can imagine the dangers.
translations.chinese: 当权者总会有很多敌人。冲突时期更甚。所以其中危险可想而知。

translations.english: I am charged with protecting the Jarl from any and all threats.
translations.chinese: 我负责保护领主不受任何威胁。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I am charged with protecting the Jarl from any and all threats. | ZH: 我负责保护领主不受任何威胁。 | SID: 009F74

translations.english: Balgruuf and I share a battle bond. We met as youths, and forged our friendship in the fires of war.
translations.chinese: 我和巴尔古夫是战友。年轻时候就认识了，在战火中结下了友谊。

translations.english: Gods, you are curious. Almost... dangerously so.
translations.chinese: 神啊，你太好奇了吧。太险了……

translations.english: When he became Jarl, I insisted on serving as his protector. He had no cause to argue.
translations.chinese: 当他当了领主，我坚持要保护他。他也没理由拒绝。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: In mortal life, Talos was a Nord possessed of unmatched tactical skill, limitless wisdom and the power to see into men's hearts.
translations.chinese: 在凡人时期，塔洛斯是一个拥有无比战争才能、无限智慧和洞察人心力量的诺德人。

translations.english: If you want to know more, I'm sure you can find any number of tomes on the subject.
translations.chinese: 如果你想知道更多，相关的典籍那是多得是啊。

translations.english: Talos mastered the power of the Voice, and with it he united the lands of men into a great Empire.
translations.chinese: 塔洛斯掌握着吼声的力量，用它把人类的领土整合成了一个伟大的帝国。

translations.english: In southern lands, he was known by the name Tiber Septim. Here in Skyrim, we honor him by his proper Nord name.
translations.chinese: 在南方，他被称为泰伯·塞普汀。在天际，我们会用他的真名来纪念他。

translations.english: Hello, my friend! If you seek knowledge about mighty Talos, you have most certainly come to the right person.
translations.chinese: 你好啊，我的朋友！如果你想了解强大的塔洛斯，那你算是找对人了。

translations.english: So great was his reign in life, when he ascended to the heavens he was made lord of the Divines.
translations.chinese: 当他荣升天堂的时候，由于他生前伟大的统治，他成为了众圣灵之主。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/5] | EN: In mortal life, Talos was a Nord possessed of unmatched tactical skill, limitless wisdom and the power to see into men's hearts. | ZH: 在凡人时期，塔洛斯是一个拥有无比战争才能、无限智慧和洞察人心力量的诺德人。 | SID: 004DD7
- INFO:NAM1 [5/5] | EN: If you want to know more, I'm sure you can find any number of tomes on the subject. | ZH: 如果你想知道更多，相关的典籍那是多得是啊。 | SID: 0062CC

- INFO:NAM1 [4/5] | EN: So great was his reign in life, when he ascended to the heavens he was made lord of the Divines. | ZH: 当他荣升天堂的时候，由于他生前伟大的统治，他成为了众圣灵之主。 | SID: 00F39B

translations.english: Long ago, there lived a mighty hero of the Nords. Olaf One-Eye. Olaf did battle with a fearsome dragon named Numinex.
translations.chinese: 很久以前，诺德有个大英雄叫“独眼”奥拉夫。奥拉夫与一头名为怒米奈科斯的可怕巨龙打过一仗。

translations.english: The struggle between Olaf and the dragon culminated in a mighty duel atop Mount Anthor, with Olaf the victor.
translations.chinese: 奥拉夫与巨龙在安索尔山山巅爆发了一场激烈大战，奥拉夫赢了。

translations.english: Olaf returned in triumph to Whiterun. By his decree, the city's keep was rebuilt as a prison for Numinex.
translations.chinese: 后来他凯旋而归。按照他的命令，城里的这个城堡被重建成了关押怒米奈科斯的监狱。

translations.english: And so, from that time until this, our great keep has been called "Dragonsreach."
translations.chinese: 所以自那之后这里就叫做“龙临宫”了。

translations.english: That is an old tale, but well known to those of us who serve in the keep.
translations.chinese: 这是个古老的故事了，但我们这些在城堡里服侍的人都知道。

translations.english: Ulfric Stormcloak's head on a pike.
translations.chinese: 直到把乌弗瑞克的脑袋插在长矛上。

translations.english: He's nothing more than a barbarian renegade, whose lust for power has cost the lives of countless innocents.
translations.chinese: 他不过就是个野蛮的叛徒，他的权力欲害死了无数无辜的人。

translations.english: Do you think Ulfric really cares about Skyrim's independence, or the welfare or its people? I promise you, he doesn't.
translations.chinese: 你真以为乌弗瑞克在乎天际的独立或者人民的福祉？我可以保证，不可能。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009312D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Ulfric Stormcloak's head on a pike. | ZH: 直到把乌弗瑞克的脑袋插在长矛上。 | SID: 0077CC
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: He's nothing more than a barbarian renegade, whose lust for power has cost the lives of countless innocents. | ZH: 他不过就是个野蛮的叛徒，他的权力欲害死了无数无辜的人。 | SID: 00974B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Do you think Ulfric really cares about Skyrim's independence, or the welfare or its people? I promise you, he doesn't. | ZH: 你真以为乌弗瑞克在乎天际的独立或者人民的福祉？我可以保证，不可能。 | SID: 009F4E

translations.english: Today, Whiterun is the jewel of Skyrim. I can say without boast that is the greatest city in all the holds.
translations.chinese: 如今，白漫城就是天际的明珠。我可以毫不自夸地讲，这是所有领地里最伟大的城市。

translations.english: The history of Whiterun begins with Jorrvaskr, the hall of the Companions. For a long time, it was the only building on the mountain.
translations.chinese: 白漫城的历史起源自战友团的大厅，月瓦斯卡。很长一段时间，它都是山上唯一的建筑。

translations.english: As time passed, a thriving community sprang up around Jorrvaskr, as was common with mead halls.
translations.chinese: 随着时间推移，就像很多蜜酒大厅那样，月瓦斯卡周围兴起了一个繁荣的社群。

translations.english: Ah, splendid! Our fine city has a proud history, and I'm happy to share what I know.
translations.chinese: 啊，太好了！我们这座美丽的城市有着自豪的历史，我很乐意分享我所知道的。

translations.english: Hopefully that answer will satisfy you. Good day.
translations.chinese: 希望这个答案能让你满意。日安。

translations.english: I'll put it simply, so you'll understand. I advise the Jarl in matters of magic.
translations.chinese: 我简单点说，省得你听不明白。我在魔法方面为领主提供建议。

translations.english: If the hold is faced with any threats or mysteries of a magical nature, I am called upon to explain things and suggest a course of action.
translations.chinese: 如果领地面临任何魔法性质的威胁或神秘事件，我会应要求做出解释并提供行动方案。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009312F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Hopefully that answer will satisfy you. Good day. | ZH: 希望这个答案能让你满意。日安。 | SID: 0013A9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I'll put it simply, so you'll understand. I advise the Jarl in matters of magic. | ZH: 我简单点说，省得你听不明白。我在魔法方面为领主提供建议。 | SID: 0013B4
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: If the hold is faced with any threats or mysteries of a magical nature, I am called upon to explain things and suggest a course of action. | ZH: 如果领地面临任何魔法性质的威胁或神秘事件，我会应要求做出解释并提供行动方案。 | SID: 00936B

translations.english: Let them come! I have no fear, for Talos is my ally and I am his prophet. His word is upon my lips, his voice in my throat.
translations.chinese: 让他们放马过来！我不怕，塔洛斯就是我的盟友，我是他的先知。他之言语在我之唇舌，他之声音蕴于我之咽喉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00093130]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let them come! I have no fear, for Talos is my ally and I am his prophet. His word is upon my lips, his voice in my throat. | ZH: 让他们放马过来！我不怕，塔洛斯就是我的盟友，我是他的先知。他之言语在我之唇舌，他之声音蕴于我之咽喉。 | SID: 007BDC

translations.english: But our greatest weapon? Courage. For if we cannot kill the beast, we must at least have the tenacity to drive it back.
translations.chinese: 但我们最大的武器是什么？勇气。就算我们不能杀死这些畜生，至少也有毅力把它赶出去。

translations.english: With good planning and constant vigilance.
translations.chinese: 紧密筹划，保持警惕。

translations.english: Until brave heroes step forward to destroy these monsters, that is the best we can do.
translations.chinese: 直到有勇敢的英雄们站出来消灭这些怪物，我们能做的也就这些了。

translations.english: We must also have ample reserves of water to combat the fires that will surely spread after an attack.
translations.chinese: 我们必须储备足够的水来扑灭龙袭后蔓延的大火。

translations.english: Even now, my court wizard, Farengar, continues his research into ways we might drive back these terrors.
translations.chinese: 就连现在，我的宫廷巫师法仁加还在研究击退这些恐怖生物的办法。

translations.english: I wish only an end to the fighting, so that I can tend to the temple once more.
translations.chinese: 我只希望战争能够结束，这样我就能回归神庙职责了。

translations.english: As more of the sick and injured came to the temple, my work as a healer became more important than my duties as a priestess.
translations.chinese: 随着越来越多的伤病号来到神庙，我身为治疗师的工作也变得比当祭司更重要了。

translations.english: When the wounded soldiers began to return from battle, I did what I could to help them.
translations.chinese: 当受伤的士兵开始从战场上回来，我会尽我所能帮他们。

translations.english: Somewhat, yes. At first it seemed a distant thing, heard only in the idle speech of guards and traders.
translations.chinese: 某种程度上是的。起初事不关己，只是在卫兵和商人的闲谈里有个耳闻。

translations.english: Has the Stormcloak uprising affected your duties?
translations.chinese: 风暴斗篷起义影响到你的职责了吗？

translations.english: As long as I'm left alone to pursue my research, I don't care who gives the orders.
translations.chinese: 只要能让我一个人安安静静做研究，谁来下命令无所谓。

translations.english: If I said that was a tedious question, would you be smart enough to know what I meant? Probably not.
translations.chinese: 如果我说这个问题很无聊，你会聪明地直接领会我的意思吗？可能是不会。

translations.english: Now, I'm a busy man and your pointless questions are boring me terribly. Good day.
translations.chinese: 我是个大忙人，你那些毫无意义的问题把我烦透了。日安吧。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: If I said that was a tedious question, would you be smart enough to know what I meant? Probably not. | ZH: 如果我说这个问题很无聊，你会聪明地直接领会我的意思吗？可能是不会。 | SID: 009F80
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Now, I'm a busy man and your pointless questions are boring me terribly. Good day. | ZH: 我是个大忙人，你那些毫无意义的问题把我烦透了。日安吧。 | SID: 00CD69

translations.english: What a fascinating conversation that would be!
translations.chinese: 那将是一次多么有趣的交谈啊！

translations.english: Perhaps some hero will bring one to Dragonsreach, like old Olaf One-Eye once did.
translations.chinese: 也许会有英雄带一头到龙临宫来，就像古时候的“独眼”奥拉夫一样。

translations.english: Sadly, no. My work affords me few opportunities for such an adventure.
translations.chinese: 很遗憾，没有。我的工作很少能提供冒险的机会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Perhaps some hero will bring one to Dragonsreach, like old Olaf One-Eye once did. | ZH: 也许会有英雄带一头到龙临宫来，就像古时候的“独眼”奥拉夫一样。 | SID: 009F7B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Sadly, no. My work affords me few opportunities for such an adventure. | ZH: 很遗憾，没有。我的工作很少能提供冒险的机会。 | SID: 00E693

translations.english: Oh yes! He agreed to banish the worship of Talos at the tip of an Aldmeri sword. They called it the "White-Gold Concordat."
translations.chinese: 哦没错！他同意了在先祖神洲的剑尖下废除了塔洛斯崇拜。他们管这个叫“白金协定”。

translations.english: Well, I call it blasphemy! A true son of the Empire would never have turned his back on our greatest hero, not at any price.
translations.chinese: 哼，我看这就是亵渎！真正的帝国之子绝不会背叛我们最伟大的英雄，无论付出什么代价都不会！

translations.english: Because the so-called Emperor is a coward! That's right, I said coward!
translations.chinese: 因为所谓的皇帝就是个懦夫！没错，我说他就是懦夫！

translations.english: Well, let me tell you something, friend. Cyrodiil is a long way from here, and in Skyrim, we will never forsake mighty Talos!
translations.chinese: 朋友，我跟你说。希罗帝尔离这儿远着呢，我们永远不会抛弃强大的塔洛斯！

translations.english: Well, not yet, anyway.
translations.chinese: 好吧，至少现在做不到。

translations.english: Every day, he deals with obsequious functionaries and incompetent bureaucrats. Sadly, I'm not allowed to eliminate them.
translations.chinese: 每天他都要对付谄媚的职员和无能的官僚。可惜我又不能把他们排除在外。

translations.english: And those are just the physical threats. Assaults on his sanity are another matter entirely.
translations.chinese: 这些只是人身威胁。攻击他的理智就是另一回事了。

translations.english: Take your pick. Dragons, Stormcloak assassins, ambitious and unscrupulous nobles... Sometimes I think his own children want him dead.
translations.chinese: 那可多了。龙族、风暴斗篷刺客、野心勃勃的无耻贵族……有时候我觉得他自己的孩子都想要他死。

translations.english: Indeed. The temple here in the city is my charge.
translations.chinese: 没错。我负责城里的神庙。

translations.english: The goddess's divine blessings have no doubt helped make Whiterun a thriving and prosperous city.
translations.chinese: 毫无疑问，正是有女神的神圣祝福，白漫才能成为一个繁荣昌盛的城市。

translations.english: After all, it is she who brings rain to our crops and fair weather on the harvest days.
translations.chinese: 毕竟是她在播种时带来雨水，在收获时带来晴日。

translations.english: You're a priestess of Kynareth?
translations.chinese: 你是凯娜瑞丝祭司吗？

agentText:

- INFO:RNAM | EN: You're a priestess of Kynareth? | ZH: 你是凯娜瑞丝祭司吗？ | SID: 009F98

translations.english: You're a traveler, right? I have this letter for him. Let him know how much of a failure he is.
translations.chinese: 你是旅行者吧？我有封信给他。让他知道自己多失败。

translations.english: That's right. Old inn to the south. The oaf doesn't even bother to visit these days. What am I supposed to do if the dragons burn down the farm?
translations.chinese: 对。南边那个老旅店。这白痴现在连回来看看都懒得来了。如果龙把农场烧了，我该怎么办？

translations.english: Good. You make sure the lug tips you when he gets it.
translations.chinese: 好。送到之后别忘了找那笨蛋要点钱。

translations.chinese: 我想有些事永远不会改变。谢谢你带过来给我。给你，麻烦了。

translations.chinese: 我不太喜欢这些阿里克'尔战士躲在这里。他们可能会是麻烦。

translations.chinese: 他们只要一找到人就会走。咱们还能拿更多的钱。

translations.english: The Stormcloaks are here. In force. Get down to the front line. This is it. We must hold the city. Move it!
translations.chinese: 风暴斗篷大军压境。快下前线去。就现在。我们必须守住城市。快去！

translations.english: The Imperials are here. All lined up pretty-like in their shiny armor. We'll put a few dents in those bastards before we give up the city. Move it!
translations.chinese: 帝国军来了。穿得闪闪发亮排排站好了。在放弃这座城之前得先把他们的盔甲打出几个瘪子。快去！

translations.english: How can I help?
translations.chinese: 我能帮上什么？

translations.english: If you can get Braith to leave me alone, I'll be your best friend... forever! I'll pay you, too! My whole life's savings - two septims!
translations.chinese: 如果你能让布赖斯离我远点，我就是你最好的朋友……永远永远！我会给你钱的！我一生攒下来的所有积蓄都给你，两个塞普汀！

translations.english: Yes. Braith bullies me all the time. All the elders think I'm a milk drinker 'cause I can't fight. Nobody understands.
translations.chinese: 是，布赖斯一直欺负我。所有长辈都觉得我是个不会打架的懦夫。没人理解我。

translations.english: Having trouble?
translations.chinese: 有麻烦吗？

translations.chinese: 我知道他很苦恼，但说他是梭默？我希望我能说我不相信。谢谢你告诉我。

translations.english: Burying the past is much harder than burying remains. I'm... I'm afraid of what you will think of me if I tell you about the things I've done.
translations.chinese: 埋葬过去比埋葬遗骸要难得多。我……我害怕如果告诉你我做过的事，你会怎样看我。

translations.english: First off, let's keep this between us. I picked these up from the graves in town so don't go blabbing about it to Kust.
translations.chinese: 首先，这件事就你知我知。这些是我从镇上的公墓捡回来的，所以别告诉卡斯特。

translations.english: You have to understand, Gentle Repose is a fallow festering place I should have left a long time ago. This is one of the few ways I make any money.
translations.chinese: 你要明白，我早该远离温柔休眠了。这是我为数不多的赚钱方式之一。

translations.english: It was that power that brought me to the attention of the Thalmor. In the Summerset Isles it is a great honor to be chosen to serve the Thalmor.
translations.chinese: 正是这种力量让我引起了梭默的注意。在夏暮岛，被选去为梭默效劳是莫大的荣幸。

translations.english: Although I have not practiced in a long time I was once a wizard. Even when I was young my magic was undeniably powerful.
translations.chinese: 虽然我很长时间没有练习了，但我曾经是个巫师。想当年年轻的时候，我的魔法那是不可否认的强大。

translations.english: Men, women, children, no one was spared my wrath. I destroyed whole villages.
translations.chinese: 男女老少，无人能在我的怒火下幸免于难。我摧毁过不少村庄。

translations.english: They are the governing council of the Aldmeri Dominion. They lead us to attack the Empire and forced the Empire to agree to stop worshiping Talos.
translations.chinese: 他们是先祖神洲的管理委员会。他们带领我们进攻帝国，并迫使帝国同意停止塔洛斯崇拜。

translations.english: It was during the war with the Empire that I was at the height of my power. As a Thalmor battlemage I laid waste the enemy.
translations.chinese: 正是在与帝国战争期间，我的力量达到了顶峰。身为梭默的战斗法师，我摧毁了不少敌人。

translations.chinese: 我的意思是，给你也不会花我一分钱，而且死者也不会注意到他们的东西不见了。哈。

translations.english: I knew something was up. I'll make sure he doesn't disrespect this place anymore. Honesty is a rare thing to find these days. Thank you.
translations.chinese: 我就知道出事了。我会保证他不会继续不尊重这个地方。现如今诚实是很难能可贵的。谢谢你！

translations.english: Many of the Empire's troops were Nords at that point. Some of them could even have been from around here.
translations.chinese: 当时帝国军有很多诺德人。甚至有些可能就是来自这附近。
