translations.english: As was destined, you are free to use my Star as you see fit.
translations.chinese: 注定，你可以随意使用我之星辰。

translations.english: My Star has been restored and Malyn's soul has been consigned to Oblivion. You have done well, mortal.
translations.chinese: 我之星恢复原状，马林的灵魂也被送进湮灭。做得好，凡人。

translations.chinese: 恭喜你。你改变了一件迪德拉神器的命运，并成功活了下来。

translations.english: Go ahead. Take it. I'd sooner finally put this chapter of my life behind me.
translations.chinese: 请吧，拿上它。我希望快点忘记这段过往。

translations.english: Now? You could use it for what we meant it for. Using black souls for enchanting.
translations.chinese: 现在？你可以随意使用它了。用黑色灵魂进行附魔。

translations.english: The Black Star will never decay, but it can no longer hold the white souls of lesser creatures.
translations.chinese: 黑星不会破碎，但不能再容纳低级生物的灵魂了。

translations.chinese: 我们成功了。这颗星和阿祖拉的联系被切断了。虽然马林的灵魂消散了，但也算是让他安息了。

translations.english: Easy there. The numbness will pass. Just don't strain yourself.
translations.chinese: 放松点。麻木感会消失的。但不要太勉强自己。

translations.english: Farewell, mortal. Know that Azura will be guarding over the threads of your fate in the Twilight.
translations.chinese: 再会了，凡人。记住，阿祖拉会在暮色中守护你的命运之线。

translations.english: Go now. I have seen the threads of your fate in the Twilight, and you still have much to accomplish.
translations.chinese: 走吧。我在暮光中看到你命运之线，你还有很多事情要做。

translations.english: Dagur and I have an understanding. He gives me privacy, and I make sure my experiments don't blow up his inn.
translations.chinese: 达古尔和我达成共识。他给我私人空间，我则确保实验不会炸了他的旅馆。

translations.chinese: 嘿。悬旗母马有瓶阿尔贡麦芽酒。好东西。帮我拿过来。他们甚至发现不了它不见了。拜托了……

translations.english: But damn if I ain't almost sober.
translations.chinese: 但我能清醒才怪呢。

translations.english: Only if I can help it.
translations.chinese: 只要还能喝的下。

translations.english: Are you always drunk?

translations.english: Hanse was in line to be High King of Skyrim, you know. Having that might get the ear of the other Holds and give me some authority.
translations.chinese: 你也知道，汉斯曾经有资格成为天际至高王。如果别的领地听说，应该能给我带来一点威信。

translations.english: I've heard rumors of the resting place of the Helm of Winterhold, the very same helm that Jarl Hanse wore in the First Era.
translations.chinese: 我得知了冬堡之盔的下落，那是第一纪元的汉斯领主所戴的头盔。

translations.english: Winterhold has lost much of its history, and with that much of its power. I aim to change that.
translations.chinese: 冬堡城已经失去了太多历史，也失去了很多权力。我打算改变这一点。

translations.english: Nothing. I'm busy, and I don't like being bothered unless I'm expecting something from you.
translations.chinese: 没事。我很忙，而且不喜欢被打扰，除非我有事找你。

translations.english: Oh, don't give me that look. Fine. I supposed I can find some menial task to set your mind on. Hmm....
translations.chinese: 哦，别用那种眼神看着我。好吧。我是有些小事可以让你做。嗯……

translations.english: We have something of a vampire problem. Bodies have been found with blood drained. I know of a den nearby you can wipe out as a precaution.
translations.chinese: 我们碰上些关于吸血鬼的麻烦。尸体被发现的时候被抽干了血。我知道附近有个小藏身处，你可以把那清除干净。

translations.english: If I needed something from you, you would know it.
translations.chinese: 如果我需要你的帮助，会告诉你的。

agentText:

EDID: [00094040]

translations.english: You're right. What would my forefathers think if they knew I wasn't paying my debts? Tell Haran I'll bring her the gold I owe.
translations.chinese: 你说得对。要是我祖宗知道我欠钱不还，他们该怎么想？告诉哈兰我会把欠她的钱还上的。

translations.english: You owe her gold. Pay it. (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 你欠她的。还是付钱吧。（说服）

translations.english: It'd be good to have that staff in case the Jarl starts wondering if I actually have a real connection to the College.
translations.chinese: 如果我能拿到那把法杖，就能省得领主起疑，察觉我和学院压根没关系了。

translations.english: Me? Nothing. And I hope to keep it that way. The Jarl is convinced I have some connection with the College, so he goes easy on me.
translations.chinese: 我？没什么可做。我希望还能维持现状。领主认为我和学院有关联，因此他待我很宽厚。

translations.english: Maybe you'd like to help me keep up appearances? Old Nelacar has a mage's staff in his room in the Frozen Hearth.
translations.chinese: 也许你愿意帮我伪装一下？内拉卡那老家伙在他冻炉旅店的房间里有根法杖。

translations.english: What do you do around here?
translations.chinese: 你在这里是做什么的？

translations.english: She had a book with her, "Song of the Alchemists," that I used to read over and over. I miss having a copy.
translations.chinese: 她随身带着一本叫《炼金术士之歌》的书，我曾经读过好多遍。真怀念有份副本的日子。

translations.english: I picked up the trade when I was a girl. One of the temple healers staying here on a pilgrimage showed me the basics.
translations.chinese: 从还是个小女孩开始就在干这行了。一个来朝圣的神庙治疗师教给我一些基础知识。

translations.english: How long have you studied alchemy?
translations.chinese: 你学习炼金术多久了？

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Ever seen a book called "The Mirror"? We used to hand it out to boys looking to learn basic shield work.
translations.chinese: 有见过一本叫《镜》的书吗？我们曾经把它分发给想学习基本盾牌技能的小伙子们。

translations.english: Thinking of asking the General for some training books. Give the soldiers something to do while they're on rest. Something besides drinking.
translations.chinese: 我得向将军要些训练书籍。让这些士兵在休息时除了喝酒还能做些事。

translations.english: That I am. Train the recruits. Turn boys into men. That sort of thing.
translations.chinese: 没错。负责训练新兵。让小孩变成爷们。就是这类事。

translations.english: Are you with the Legion?
translations.chinese: 你是军团的吗？

translations.chinese: 想让我证明吗？我赌一百金币，赤手空拳拿下你。

translations.english: Best warrior in Morthal, huh?
translations.chinese: 莫萨尔最强战士，啊？

translations.english: He's had some troubles in his life, but I can't have him drinking here without at least paying back some of the coin he owes.
translations.chinese: 他生活上有些不如意，但我不能让他再这么喝下去了，至少也要把欠的钱还上。

translations.english: He owes this tavern enough coin to burn it down, build it back up, then burn it down again just for laughs.
translations.chinese: 他欠这家酒馆的钱，足够把这里烧了再盖，盖了再烧玩几次的了。

translations.english: What's wrong with Ranmir?
translations.chinese: 兰米尔怎么了？

translations.chinese: 我们带他去过白漫城的凯娜瑞丝神庙，请治疗师们确认他的健康状况，但他们都说他没事。

translations.english: Are you heading to Whiterun? Could you take this letter to the priestess, Danica Pure-Spring? It's a note about Joric's health.
translations.chinese: 你要去白漫城吗？能否把这封信捎给“洁春”丹尼卡呢？这里是乔利克的健康状况记录。

translations.english: My brother is... sensitive. He has trouble focusing his attention on things.
translations.chinese: 我弟弟有些……敏感。他很难集中注意力。

translations.chinese: 给，这是我承诺的奖励。冬堡很感谢你。

translations.english: Can you believe that this hold used to contend for the throne of the High King? Now perhaps others will listen.
translations.chinese: 你能相信，这个领曾经是至高王宝座的有力竞争者吗？也许现在会有人愿意听我们说话了。

translations.english: I have a couple of Ranmir's things that he traded to us back when he was still paying regularly. I say you've earned them.
translations.chinese: 我这里有几件兰米尔的东西，是他还能定期付款时卖给我们的。我想这是你应得的。

translations.english: Ranmir's agreed to pay his debts.
translations.chinese: 兰米尔同意还他欠的钱。

translations.chinese: 我比较喜欢像这样漂亮的东西。给你吧，作为你的酬劳。另外，免费给你演示一下幻术系法术，怎么样？

translations.english: Filthy creatures, aren't they? Living in the darkness, like they do. So uncivilized.
translations.chinese: 他们都是些肮脏的生物，是吧？一直以来，都生活在黑暗中。野蛮。

translations.english: If you're not afraid of little exploring, I'll pay good gold to get those salts.
translations.chinese: 如果你不怕来次小冒险的话，我愿意出高价买回这些盐。

translations.english: Take the last trade we did. Some Fine-Cut Void Salts from the College of Winterhold. Plenty of coin if you know who to sell it to.
translations.chinese: 就拿上次的生意说吧。冬堡学院的精制虚无盐。如果你知道卖给谁的话，就知道钱肯定少不了了。

translations.english: By inheritance, as my men are fond of saying. Can't blame them, my mother ran the Sea Squall as strictly as she ran the house.
translations.chinese: 和我手下总说的一样，是继承来的。这也不怪他们，我母亲在海飑号时就像在家里一样严格。

translations.english: I've been trying to find new areas of business, trying to win the sailors' respect, but I keep having problems.
translations.chinese: 我一直在开拓新业务，希望赢得水手们的尊重，但总是遇到问题。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Take the last trade we did. Some Fine-Cut Void Salts from the College of Winterhold. Plenty of coin if you know who to sell it to. | ZH: 就拿上次的生意说吧。冬堡学院的精制虚无盐。如果你知道卖给谁的话，就知道钱肯定少不了了。 | SID: 000A2B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: By inheritance, as my men are fond of saying. Can't blame them, my mother ran the Sea Squall as strictly as she ran the house. | ZH: 和我手下总说的一样，是继承来的。这也不怪他们，我母亲在海飑号时就像在家里一样严格。 | SID: 0083B3
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I've been trying to find new areas of business, trying to win the sailors' respect, but I keep having problems. | ZH: 我一直在开拓新业务，希望赢得水手们的尊重，但总是遇到问题。 | SID: 00CAC0

translations.english: Fine work. Here's your pay. Don't spend it all on mead.
translations.chinese: 干得好。这是你的报酬。别都拿去喝酒了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009414E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fine work. Here's your pay. Don't spend it all on mead. | ZH: 干得好。这是你的报酬。别都拿去喝酒了。 | SID: 009D72

translations.english: Coward.
translations.chinese: 胆小鬼。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009414F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Coward. | ZH: 胆小鬼。 | SID: 00AE41

translations.english: That's the spirit.
translations.chinese: 这就对了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094150]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's the spirit. | ZH: 这就对了。 | SID: 009D6D

translations.english: You looking for work? Got a sailor who thought running a gang of thieves would be more money than hauling my cargo.
translations.chinese: 你在找工作吗？有个水手觉得经营一伙盗贼比在我这儿搬货更赚。

translations.english: You make an example of that gang, I'll give you a year's worth of pay.
translations.chinese: 你要是给那伙人立个榜样，我付你一年的酬劳。

translations.english: The North Wind is my mistress, and I'm her master. I don't tolerate any disloyalty.
translations.chinese: 北风号就是我的情人，我是她的主人。我不容许任何不忠。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094151]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: You looking for work? Got a sailor who thought running a gang of thieves would be more money than hauling my cargo. | ZH: 你在找工作吗？有个水手觉得经营一伙盗贼比在我这儿搬货更赚。 | SID: 000606
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: You make an example of that gang, I'll give you a year's worth of pay. | ZH: 你要是给那伙人立个榜样，我付你一年的酬劳。 | SID: 00697C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: The North Wind is my mistress, and I'm her master. I don't tolerate any disloyalty. | ZH: 北风号就是我的情人，我是她的主人。我不容许任何不忠。 | SID: 008A0A

translations.english: For the first time in a long while, I truly believe that there are brighter days ahead.
translations.chinese: 这么久了，我第一次真正相信，未来会有更光明的日子。

translations.english: Unlike Ulfric, Brunwulf has shown a great willingness to work with the other races and make us feel more at home here.
translations.chinese: 不像乌弗瑞克，布伦武夫表现出了和其他种族合作的极大意愿，让我们在这里感觉更自在。

translations.english: Still, having a just and honorable man like Brunwulf in charge can only be an improvement.
translations.chinese: 不过，有个像布伦武夫这样公正可敬的人统治，是一种进步。

translations.english: Well, not yet. The Empire hasn't been in charge for that long, and real change takes time.
translations.chinese: 哦，还没有。帝国统治的时间并不长，真正的改变是需要时间的。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Unlike Ulfric, Brunwulf has shown a great willingness to work with the other races and make us feel more at home here. | ZH: 不像乌弗瑞克，布伦武夫表现出了和其他种族合作的极大意愿，让我们在这里感觉更自在。 | SID: 009D27

translations.english: You have no idea.
translations.chinese: 你不懂。

translations.english: I'm joking, of course, but I'm a lot happier seeing the Empire running things in Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 当然，我是在开玩笑，但我更高兴看到帝国在风舵城管事了。

translations.english: Did you know it was his decree that forbade the Argonians from living inside the city walls?
translations.chinese: 你不知道他的法令禁止阿尔贡住进城内？

translations.english: I hope in his next life, he's reborn as an Argonian forced to live in a slum because of some bigoted Nord dictator.
translations.chinese: 我希望他下辈子投胎当个阿尔贡，然后因为某个顽固的诺德统治者被迫住在贫民窟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094172]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: You have no idea. | ZH: 你不懂。 | SID: 001D5E

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Did you know it was his decree that forbade the Argonians from living inside the city walls? | ZH: 你不知道他的法令禁止阿尔贡住进城内？ | SID: 009D22

translations.english: The folk of the Empire have always had a more cosmopolitan view of the world, so I'm glad to see them in charge.
translations.chinese: 帝国人对世界的看法比较国际化，所以我很高兴看到他们掌权。

translations.english: Yes, markedly so. Ulfric and his Stormcloaks made no secret of their disdain for the Dark Elves.
translations.chinese: 嗯，很明显。乌弗瑞克和他的风暴斗篷们毫不掩饰对暗精灵的蔑视。

translations.english: In fact, they didn't seem to care much for anyone who wasn't a Nord.
translations.chinese: 事实上，他们对诺德以外的民族都不太关心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094173]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: The folk of the Empire have always had a more cosmopolitan view of the world, so I'm glad to see them in charge. | ZH: 帝国人对世界的看法比较国际化，所以我很高兴看到他们掌权。 | SID: 009D17
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Yes, markedly so. Ulfric and his Stormcloaks made no secret of their disdain for the Dark Elves. | ZH: 嗯，很明显。乌弗瑞克和他的风暴斗篷们毫不掩饰对暗精灵的蔑视。 | SID: 009D1B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: In fact, they didn't seem to care much for anyone who wasn't a Nord. | ZH: 事实上，他们对诺德以外的民族都不太关心。 | SID: 00DB54

translations.english: I've taken the first steps toward doing so already.
translations.chinese: 我已经为此迈出了第一步。

translations.english: But I swore an oath to our Dunmer friends that, for as long as I sit on the throne of Windhelm, their needs will not be ignored.
translations.chinese: 但我向我们的丹莫朋友发过誓，只要我还在风舵城的王座上，就不会忽视他们的需求。

translations.english: First we'll need to refill our coffers and stockpile stone and wood. The war took a heavy toll on Windhelm's resources.
translations.chinese: 首先，我们得填充我们的金库和储蓄的石材木料。战争让风舵城的资源损失惨重。

translations.english: I met with several of the Dark Elves to discuss improvements in the Gray Quarter, but we have no real plans as of yet.
translations.chinese: 我和几个暗精灵讨论过灰民区的改进问题，只是尚无计划出台。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094174]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: I've taken the first steps toward doing so already. | ZH: 我已经为此迈出了第一步。 | SID: 004882
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: But I swore an oath to our Dunmer friends that, for as long as I sit on the throne of Windhelm, their needs will not be ignored. | ZH: 但我向我们的丹莫朋友发过誓，只要我还在风舵城的王座上，就不会忽视他们的需求。 | SID: 009D4B

translations.english: Old habits don't die easily, and we Nords can be as stubborn as stone.
translations.chinese: 旧习不会轻易消失，而我们诺德人就像石头一样顽固。

translations.english: Until those people learn to accept the Argonians, they must remain outside, for their own safety.
translations.chinese: 在那些人学会接受阿尔贡以前，为了自身安全，他们必须待在外面。

translations.english: Most of the folk in the city believe as Ulfric did, that outsiders should not be trusted.
translations.chinese: 城里大多数人都和乌弗瑞克一样认为外人不可信任。

translations.english: I'd like to, but it's not as simple as that.
translations.chinese: 我也想，但事情没那么简单。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094175]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Old habits don't die easily, and we Nords can be as stubborn as stone. | ZH: 旧习不会轻易消失，而我们诺德人就像石头一样顽固。 | SID: 008568
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Until those people learn to accept the Argonians, they must remain outside, for their own safety. | ZH: 在那些人学会接受阿尔贡以前，为了自身安全，他们必须待在外面。 | SID: 009D46

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: I'd like to, but it's not as simple as that. | ZH: 我也想，但事情没那么简单。 | SID: 009D48

translations.english: Unfortunately, a sword can't repair damaged buildings, feed hungry people or undo years of prejudice.
translations.chinese: 不幸的是，舞刀弄剑修不好建筑，养不活饥民，也消除不了积年的偏见。

translations.english: I just wish things were simpler. In my days as a soldier, I knew who the enemy was, and how to defeat him.
translations.chinese: 我只是希望事情能简单些。我当兵的时候，我知道敌人是谁，怎么打败他们。

translations.english: Every day is a struggle, but a Nord doesn't back down from a fight when the cause is honorable.
translations.chinese: 每天都是一场斗争，但诺德人不会在光荣的战斗中退缩。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Unfortunately, a sword can't repair damaged buildings, feed hungry people or undo years of prejudice. | ZH: 不幸的是，舞刀弄剑修不好建筑，养不活饥民，也消除不了积年的偏见。 | SID: 009D3F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I just wish things were simpler. In my days as a soldier, I knew who the enemy was, and how to defeat him. | ZH: 我只是希望事情能简单些。我当兵的时候，我知道敌人是谁，怎么打败他们。 | SID: 009D40
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Every day is a struggle, but a Nord doesn't back down from a fight when the cause is honorable. | ZH: 每天都是一场斗争，但诺德人不会在光荣的战斗中退缩。 | SID: 009D42

translations.english: Those true sons and daughters of Skyrim will never cease to worship mighty Talos. If we cannot do so in our temples, we will do so in our hearts.
translations.chinese: 那些真正的天际儿女是永远不会放弃对伟大塔洛斯的信仰的。如果我们不能在神庙礼敬，我们也会在心里去做。

translations.english: Now at last, the Thalmor will get their way. The worship of Talos will finally be stamped out. Or so they think.
translations.chinese: 现在，梭默总算要得逞了。塔洛斯信仰要被消灭了。至少他们是这么想的。

translations.english: Oblivion take the Thalmor! I'll never give up Talos, not even if it means my life. Let them come and make me a martyr!
translations.chinese: 让湮灭带走梭默！我永远不会放弃塔洛斯，即使这意味着牺牲我的生命，有本事就让他们把我变成殉道者吧！

translations.english: I don't care what the Imperials say -- when Ulfric Stormcloak died, one of Skyrim's greatest heroes was lost.
translations.chinese: 我不管帝国怎么说，乌弗瑞克死的时候，天际最伟大的一位英雄就消失了。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Oblivion take the Thalmor! I'll never give up Talos, not even if it means my life. Let them come and make me a martyr! | ZH: 让湮灭带走梭默！我永远不会放弃塔洛斯，即使这意味着牺牲我的生命，有本事就让他们把我变成殉道者吧！ | SID: 009D3A

translations.english: Aye, that I do. I ain't sayin' he was perfect, but he knew what it meant to be a Nord.
translations.chinese: 哎，没错。我不会说他完美无缺，但他知道身为诺德人意味着什么。

translations.english: I guess what I'm sayin' is, Ulfric stood up for us, an' for all Skyrim. So who's goin' to stand up for us now?
translations.chinese: 我想说的是，乌弗瑞克为我们天际所有人挺身而出，那现在又有谁来为我们仗义执言呢？

translations.english: They outlawed the worship of Talos, Skyrim's most beloved son. There's thanks for you.
translations.chinese: 禁止了塔洛斯信仰，他可是最受敬爱的天际之子。这就是他们的谢意。

translations.english: The Empire's always taken us for granted. Nords died by the thousands in the Great War, and what did the Empire do?
translations.chinese: 帝国一直对我们想当然。诺德人在浩大战争牺牲成千上万，他们又做了什么？

agentText:

translations.english: That girl's determination won me over. I suppose it didn't hurt that she said she only wanted to learn from the best smith in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 那个姑娘的决心征服了我。她说只想向天际最好的铁匠学习，我觉得这并不坏。

translations.english: I couldn't let her run off to that pretender Eorlund Gray-Mane, could I?
translations.chinese: 我总不能让她去找那个冒名顶替的厄伦德·灰鬃吧？

translations.english: I was ready to pack my things when Hermir came to me. She wanted to make sure I'd finish teaching her the smithing trade.
translations.chinese: 我正在准备收拾东西，赫米尔来找我。她想让我教完她锻造手艺。

translations.english: I almost didn't. I wasn't sure I could stomach having some Imperial tell me how to live my life.
translations.chinese: 不太想了。我不确定自己能否忍受由帝国人指示我该如何生活。

translations.english: You'd better have a damned good reason for being here...
translations.chinese: 你最好有来这儿的理由……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009417A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You'd better have a damned good reason for being here... | ZH: 你最好有来这儿的理由…… | SID: 000C19

translations.english: It takes a brave soul to wander onto my deck. It'll take more than that to leave in one piece.
translations.chinese: 站在我的甲板上需要拥有勇敢的灵魂。想要完好无损离开，那就需要更多。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009417B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It takes a brave soul to wander onto my deck. It'll take more than that to leave in one piece. | ZH: 站在我的甲板上需要拥有勇敢的灵魂。想要完好无损离开，那就需要更多。 | SID: 00F523

translations.english: I'd say you're either brave or stupid, but I can already tell which one it is.
translations.chinese: 我本想说你要么是勇敢要么是愚蠢，但现在我已经知道是哪个了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009417C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'd say you're either brave or stupid, but I can already tell which one it is. | ZH: 我本想说你要么是勇敢要么是愚蠢，但现在我已经知道是哪个了。 | SID: 00A461

translations.english: You must have a death wish.
translations.chinese: 你想死是吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009417D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You must have a death wish. | ZH: 你想死是吧。 | SID: 003386

translations.english: You reek. A little friendly advice - take a bath and get some new clothes.
translations.chinese: 你身上好臭啊。给你个友善的建议，洗个澡，换身新衣裳。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009417E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You reek. A little friendly advice - take a bath and get some new clothes. | ZH: 你身上好臭啊。给你个友善的建议，洗个澡，换身新衣裳。 | SID: 004349

translations.english: Whatever you're about to say, don't bother. I don't want to hear it.
translations.chinese: 不管你想说什么，不要费心思了。我不想听。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009417F]
Translations:

translations.english: When a new government takes charge, records can be lost, taxes can be forgotten and laws aren't always enforced.
translations.chinese: 新的政府掌权时，记录可能会遗失，税收可能被忘记，法律也不一定能执行。

translations.english: The new guards are often too busy learning their responsibilities to notice a few smuggled goods or minor robberies.
translations.chinese: 新的卫兵总是忙于学习他们的新职责，而没有注意到一些走私和小劫案。

translations.english: Not that I'd ever get involved in any of those kinds of things, of course.
translations.chinese: 当然，并不是说我永远不会卷进这些事。

translations.english: In some ways, yes, but there is often opportunity in chaos.
translations.chinese: 某些方面，没错，但混乱中往往也有机会。

translations.english: Things have been a lot worse around here since Ulfric took over.
translations.chinese: 自从乌弗瑞克接管这里以后，情况变得更糟了。

translations.english: Everyone says Eorlund Gray-Mane is the best smith in Skyrim. I plan to change a few minds about that.
translations.chinese: 人人都说厄伦德·灰鬃是天际最好的铁匠。我会改变一些人的想法。

translations.chinese: 我一生都在为塔洛斯服务。我不打算就此停下来，不管帝国说了什么。

translations.english: The dark elves and Argonians won't soon forget Ulfric's prejudice, but I'm doing what I can to repair that rift.
translations.chinese: 暗精灵和阿尔贡不会很快忘却乌弗瑞克的偏见，但我会试图修复裂缝。

translations.chinese: 成为领主并非我愿，但如果能帮助人们，那我愿意。

translations.english: Got no time for a Nord who thinks he's better than everyone else. Keep walking.
translations.chinese: 我没时间跟一个自以为是的诺德人说话。走开吧。

translations.chinese: 我以为灰民区会是我们族人的天堂，可是我错了。

translations.english: Fools! You will not hold me here any longer, Valdar!
translations.chinese: 蠢货！你再也不能把我关在这里了，沃达尔！

translations.chinese: 看我啐死你，该死的姐妹。

translations.chinese: 哦，我的客厅。没有比这更好煮眼珠的地方了，没有……

translations.chinese: 佩特拉，你个该死的叛徒！死吧！

translations.english: But Shor restrained our wrathful onslaught - perhaps, deep-counselled, your doom he foresaw.
translations.chinese: 但舒尔克制了我们的暴怒进攻……也许，他早已预见了你的到来。

translations.english: A fateful errand. No few have chafed to face the Worm since first he set his soul-snare here at Sovngarde's threshold.
translations.chinese: 命中注定的使命。自从他第一次把灵魂陷阱设在松加德门外，不少人想要干掉这大虫子。

translations.english: By what right do you request entry?
translations.chinese: 你是以什么名义要求通过？

translations.english: No shade are you, as usually here passes, but living, you dare the land of the dead.
translations.chinese: 只有幽影方可通过此地，你这生者竟有胆量踏足死者之地。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: No shade are you, as usually here passes, but living, you dare the land of the dead. | ZH: 只有幽影方可通过此地，你这生者竟有胆量踏足死者之地。 | SID: 009D10

translations.english: Thank you. Please, take these few coins, for services rendered.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。请收下这点钱吧，算是报酬了。

translations.english: Ah, this must be that weapon for the Jarl. Poor girl, so eager to prove herself. I'll present it to Balgruuf when his mood is... agreeable.
translations.chinese: 啊，这一定是献给领主的武器。可怜的姑娘，太想证明自己了。等巴尔古夫领主的情绪……愉快的时候，我再给他吧。

translations.english: From Adrianne?
translations.chinese: 阿德里安？

translations.english: I have a sword for you, from your daughter.
translations.chinese: 你女儿让我把这剑给你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000946F6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Thank you. Please, take these few coins, for services rendered. | ZH: 谢谢。请收下这点钱吧，算是报酬了。 | SID: 009CFF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Ah, this must be that weapon for the Jarl. Poor girl, so eager to prove herself. I'll present it to Balgruuf when his mood is... agreeable. | ZH: 啊，这一定是献给领主的武器。可怜的姑娘，太想证明自己了。等巴尔古夫领主的情绪……愉快的时候，我再给他吧。 | SID: 009D02
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: From Adrianne? | ZH: 阿德里安？ | SID: 009D04
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I have a sword for you, from your daughter. | ZH: 你女儿让我把这剑给你。 | SID: 006E2F

translations.english: It's a sword. I made it for the Jarl, Balgruuf the Greater. It's a surprise, and I don't even know if he'll accept it. But...
translations.chinese: 是一把剑。我为领主，“伟岸者”巴尔古夫打造的。这是个惊喜，所以我不知道他会不会接受。但是……

translations.english: Aye, that I do. I've got to, if I hope to be as good as Eorlund Gray-Mane some day. In fact, I just finished my best piece of work.
translations.chinese: 是，没错。如果我希望有一天能如厄伦德·灰鬃一般出色的话，我就必须如此。事实上，我刚刚完成了我最好的作品。

translations.english: Listen, could you take the sword to my father, Proventus Avenicci? He's the Jarl's steward. He'll know the right time to present it to him.
translations.chinese: 那个，你能帮我把这把剑带给我父亲普罗万图斯·阿文尼奇吗？他是领主的总管。他会挑合适的时候献给他的。

translations.english: Goodness, no!
translations.chinese: 神啊，没有！

translations.english: He's perfectly polite, if a bit guarded.
translations.chinese: 他很有礼节，只是有些戒心。

translations.english: They're simply scholars, they mean no one harm. I've had... several conversations with Arch-Mage Aren over the years.
translations.chinese: 他们只不过是一群学者，不想伤害任何人。我……过去几年里和大法师阿冉交谈过几次。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000949C3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Goodness, no! | ZH: 神啊，没有！ | SID: 0074CF

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: They're simply scholars, they mean no one harm. I've had... several conversations with Arch-Mage Aren over the years. | ZH: 他们只不过是一群学者，不想伤害任何人。我……过去几年里和大法师阿冉交谈过几次。 | SID: 009CAC

translations.english: Some believed the mages were behind the whole thing, and others felt they could have at least prevented it.
translations.chinese: 有些人认为是法师们在背后操纵，而有些人则觉得他们至少可以阻止这一切发生。

translations.english: Arch-Mage Aren assures me that his people had nothing to do with it, and I believe him. But Winterhold never recovered.
translations.chinese: 大法师阿冉向我保证，他们与这件事无关，我相信他。但冬堡再也没恢复起来。

translations.english: In the middle of it all, the College was practically untouched. Many of the survivors were suspicious.
translations.chinese: 经历了这一切，学院却几乎没受到影响。很多幸存者都对此表示怀疑。

translations.english: Just about eighty years ago, there was a terrible disaster. The cliffs overlooking the Sea of Ghosts collapsed, taking most of Winterhold with them.
translations.chinese: 大概八十年前，发生了一场可怕的灾难。俯瞰幽灵海的悬崖坍塌了，冬堡城的大部分城区也随之消失了。

agentText:

translations.english: A good many dark elves were driven from the city, and people became... uncomfortable with the presence of the College.
translations.chinese: 许多暗精灵被赶出了城市，人们变得……对学院的存在感到不安。

translations.english: You may have noticed the College, just to the north there. Very prestigious place. Mages from all over Tamriel traveled here to seek knowledge.
translations.chinese: 你应该注意到学院了吧，就在北面。是个很有名的地方，泰姆瑞尔各地的法师都会来这里寻求知识。

translations.english: After the Oblivion Crisis was over, many felt that magic users were to blame. Elves, to be specific. It created a great deal of tension.
translations.chinese: 自从湮灭危机结束，很多人都觉得魔法使用者是罪魁祸首。具体来说，就是精灵。这造成了很大的紧张感。

translations.english: Yeah, but raising Draugr to take on both the Imperials and the Stormcloaks? That's just crazy.
translations.chinese: 是啊，但复活尸鬼去对抗帝国军和风暴斗篷？简直疯了。

translations.english: I think it's sweet Lu'ah is so worked up over her dead soldier...
translations.chinese: 卢'阿对她的亡灵士兵可真是太好了……

translations.english: Markarth Military Camp
translations.chinese: 马卡斯军营

translations.english: Shor's Bones! Look at that monstrosity.
translations.chinese: 舒尔的骨头！快看那怪物。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C4D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Shor's Bones! Look at that monstrosity. | ZH: 舒尔的骨头！快看那怪物。 | SID: 009C81

translations.english: This is where we saw Mercer. We must be getting close.
translations.chinese: 刚才墨瑟就在这个位置。我们一定是快到了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C4E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is where we saw Mercer. We must be getting close. | ZH: 刚才墨瑟就在这个位置。我们一定是快到了。 | SID: 003C11

translations.english: I can hear water rushing through these pipes. We must be beneath a lake.
translations.chinese: 我能够听到水流过管道的声音。咱们一定是在湖底。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C4F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can hear water rushing through these pipes. We must be beneath a lake. | ZH: 我能够听到水流过管道的声音。咱们一定是在湖底。 | SID: 009C99

translations.english: Aye, lass... and we'll be ready for him.
translations.chinese: 没错，姑娘……咱们会做好准备的。

translations.english: Let's keep moving.
translations.chinese: 继续走。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C50]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Aye, lass... and we'll be ready for him. | ZH: 没错，姑娘……咱们会做好准备的。 | SID: 003814
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Let's keep moving. | ZH: 继续走。 | SID: 008D6D

translations.english: Looks like we can take the low road or the high road across this chamber. Your choice.
translations.chinese: 看来穿过这里可以走上下两条路。你选吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C51]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Looks like we can take the low road or the high road across this chamber. Your choice. | ZH: 看来穿过这里可以走上下两条路。你选吧。 | SID: 004F72

translations.english: Aye. Whatever you want to do, we're with you.
translations.chinese: 嗯。不管你想怎么办，我们都支持你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C52]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Aye. Whatever you want to do, we're with you. | ZH: 嗯。不管你想怎么办，我们都支持你。 | SID: 009C8C

translations.english: The stench... this place reeks of Falmer.
translations.chinese: 恶臭……这地方到处都是伐莫的气息。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C53]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The stench... this place reeks of Falmer. | ZH: 恶臭……这地方到处都是伐莫的气息。 | SID: 00562D

translations.english: It's a Dwarven Centurion. Very tough and very deadly.
translations.chinese: 是矮人百夫长。坚不可摧且极度致命。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C54]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's a Dwarven Centurion. Very tough and very deadly. | ZH: 是矮人百夫长。坚不可摧且极度致命。 | SID: 00AAB8

translations.english: It's Mercer! Look... down there!
translations.chinese: 是墨瑟！看……在那里！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C55]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's Mercer! Look... down there! | ZH: 是墨瑟！看……在那里！ | SID: 00FA7A

translations.english: So this is what we heard. The entire tower collapsed.
translations.chinese: 和我们听到的一样。整座塔楼都塌了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C56]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So this is what we heard. The entire tower collapsed. | ZH: 和我们听到的一样。整座塔楼都塌了。 | SID: 0076A9

translations.english: Wait a moment... what's that?
translations.chinese: 等等……那是什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C57]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wait a moment... what's that? | ZH: 等等……那是什么？ | SID: 004859

translations.english: Falmer patrol up ahead. I don't think they know we're here.
translations.chinese: 伐莫在前面巡逻。他们应该没发现咱们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C58]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Falmer patrol up ahead. I don't think they know we're here. | ZH: 伐莫在前面巡逻。他们应该没发现咱们。 | SID: 007113

translations.english: Look at the size of this place. Have you ever seen anything like it in your life, lass?
translations.chinese: 看看这地方有多大。姑娘，你这辈子见过这样的东西吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C59]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Look at the size of this place. Have you ever seen anything like it in your life, lass? | ZH: 看看这地方有多大。姑娘，你这辈子见过这样的东西吗？ | SID: 004E77

translations.english: We have to catch up to him before it's too late.
translations.chinese: 我们得尽快抓住他。

translations.english: Brynjolf and I found them like that. Mercer's doing.
translations.chinese: 布林乔夫和我发现他们时就已经这样了。墨瑟干的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C5B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We have to catch up to him before it's too late. | ZH: 我们得尽快抓住他。 | SID: 009C72
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Brynjolf and I found them like that. Mercer's doing. | ZH: 布林乔夫和我发现他们时就已经这样了。墨瑟干的。 | SID: 009C73

translations.english: This must be their hive. We'll have to keep silent if we want to avoid drawing their attention.
translations.chinese: 这里一定是他们的巢穴。不想引起注意的话，就保持沉默。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C5C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This must be their hive. We'll have to keep silent if we want to avoid drawing their attention. | ZH: 这里一定是他们的巢穴。不想引起注意的话，就保持沉默。 | SID: 00F621

translations.english: We'll have to find another way around.
translations.chinese: 我们得另寻出路了。

translations.english: The only reason to do that would be to block pursuit. It must be Mercer.
translations.chinese: 唯一的原因就是为了阻止追捕。肯定是墨瑟干的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C5D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We'll have to find another way around. | ZH: 我们得另寻出路了。 | SID: 00AF86
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The only reason to do that would be to block pursuit. It must be Mercer. | ZH: 唯一的原因就是为了阻止追捕。肯定是墨瑟干的。 | SID: 00BBC1

translations.english: Damn it! There's no way through.
translations.chinese: 该死！没有过去的路。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C5E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Damn it! There's no way through. | ZH: 该死！没有过去的路。 | SID: 008B36

translations.english: Mercer must have triggered these pistons. We're going to have to search for a way to open them.
translations.chinese: 肯定是墨瑟触发了这些东西。我们得想办法打开它们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C5F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Mercer must have triggered these pistons. We're going to have to search for a way to open them. | ZH: 肯定是墨瑟触发了这些东西。我们得想办法打开它们。 | SID: 001E44

translations.english: He's close. I'm certain of it. We must prepare ourselves.
translations.chinese: 咱们离他很近了。我敢肯定。做好准备。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C60]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He's close. I'm certain of it. We must prepare ourselves. | ZH: 咱们离他很近了。我敢肯定。做好准备。 | SID: 00C426

translations.english: I'm on it, lass.
translations.chinese: 我来了，姑娘。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C61]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm on it, lass. | ZH: 我来了，姑娘。 | SID: 002EC9

translations.english: Even the Falmer don't deserve the pain these implements must have inflicted. The dwarves were a cruel race.
translations.chinese: 即便是伐莫也不该承受这些工具的折磨。矮人实在是个残忍的种族。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C63]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Even the Falmer don't deserve the pain these implements must have inflicted. The dwarves were a cruel race. | ZH: 即便是伐莫也不该承受这些工具的折磨。矮人实在是个残忍的种族。 | SID: 009C8B

translations.english: I'll bet my last septim that there's a mechanism around here somewhere.
translations.chinese: 我打赌这附近肯定有机械装置。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C65]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll bet my last septim that there's a mechanism around here somewhere. | ZH: 我打赌这附近肯定有机械装置。 | SID: 005BAF

translations.english: He's toying with us. He wants us to follow.
translations.chinese: 他在戏耍我们。他要引咱们过去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C66]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: He's toying with us. He wants us to follow. | ZH: 他在戏耍我们。他要引咱们过去。 | SID: 007582

translations.english: Then this is it. We do this for Gallus and for the Guild.
translations.chinese: 就是这样。我们这是为了加卢斯和公会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C68]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Then this is it. We do this for Gallus and for the Guild. | ZH: 就是这样。我们这是为了加卢斯和公会。 | SID: 00A23F

translations.english: We can take the beast on or sneak around. It's your call, lad. We're right behind you.
translations.chinese: 我们可以选择对付这些野兽，也可以偷偷绕过去。你选择吧，小子。我们支持你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C69]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We can take the beast on or sneak around. It's your call, lad. We're right behind you. | ZH: 我们可以选择对付这些野兽，也可以偷偷绕过去。你选择吧，小子。我们支持你。 | SID: 004C50

translations.english: We can take the beast on or sneak around. It's your call, lass. We're right behind you.
translations.chinese: 我们可以选择对付这些野兽，也可以偷偷绕过去。你选择吧，姑娘。我们支持你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C6A]
Translations:

translations.english: Can't say that I have. Imagine the riches hidden within these walls.
translations.chinese: 没见过。想象一下这些墙后面藏着多少财富。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C6B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Can't say that I have. Imagine the riches hidden within these walls. | ZH: 没见过。想象一下这些墙后面藏着多少财富。 | SID: 00B7A0

translations.english: There's a mass of the Falmer in this chamber. We can sneak through or take them down... I don't care. As long as we get to Mercer.
translations.chinese: 这个房间里有大量伐莫。我们可以偷偷溜过去或者直接干掉他们……我不在乎。只要能够找到墨瑟就行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094C6C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There's a mass of the Falmer in this chamber. We can sneak through or take them down... I don't care. As long as we get to Mercer. | ZH: 这个房间里有大量伐莫。我们可以偷偷溜过去或者直接干掉他们……我不在乎。只要能够找到墨瑟就行。 | SID: 00007C

translations.english: It's the past! Dead oaths on dead lips. Let it stay there.
translations.chinese: 都过去了！死人的誓言就留在过去吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094D7C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's the past! Dead oaths on dead lips. Let it stay there. | ZH: 都过去了！死人的誓言就留在过去吧。 | SID: 007F5F

translations.english: Your ancestors wouldn't want this, Silus!
translations.chinese: 你的祖先不会希望你这样的，希鲁斯！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094D7D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Your ancestors wouldn't want this, Silus! | ZH: 你的祖先不会希望你这样的，希鲁斯！ | SID: 0094B5

translations.english: The museum is opening, Madena.
translations.chinese: 博物馆就要开放了，玛迪娜。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094D7E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The museum is opening, Madena. | ZH: 博物馆就要开放了，玛迪娜。 | SID: 009C68

translations.english: Why should I hide from it? This is my family's legacy!
translations.chinese: 我为什么要逃避？这是我家族的遗产！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094D7F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Why should I hide from it? This is my family's legacy! | ZH: 我为什么要逃避？这是我家族的遗产！ | SID: 00EEA8

translations.english: There's a new museum opening up in Dawnstar. The owner is asking me to hand out invitations to travelers.
translations.chinese: 晨星新开了一家博物馆。馆长让我给旅行者们发请帖。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094D80]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There's a new museum opening up in Dawnstar. The owner is asking me to hand out invitations to travelers. | ZH: 晨星新开了一家博物馆。馆长让我给旅行者们发请帖。 | SID: 00C49C

translations.english: Without that amulet, I'm powerless to confront them. Would you be willing to search for it?
translations.chinese: 没有那个护身符，我无力对抗他们。你愿意帮我找找吗？

translations.english: I misplaced it in the catacombs. I'd look for it, but I've been hearing noises down there. I fear the dead have become... restless.
translations.chinese: 我把它丢在地下墓穴里了。我本想找找，但我听到下面有响动。恐怕死者已经变得……焦躁不安了。

translations.english: My Amulet of Arkay. It's the source of my divine powers and also a sacred badge of office.
translations.chinese: 我的阿尔凯护身符。这既是我神圣力量的源泉，也是神圣的职业勋章。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094E33]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Without that amulet, I'm powerless to confront them. Would you be willing to search for it? | ZH: 没有那个护身符，我无力对抗他们。你愿意帮我找找吗？ | SID: 00926F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I misplaced it in the catacombs. I'd look for it, but I've been hearing noises down there. I fear the dead have become... restless. | ZH: 我把它丢在地下墓穴里了。我本想找找，但我听到下面有响动。恐怕死者已经变得……焦躁不安了。 | SID: 009C3D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: My Amulet of Arkay. It's the source of my divine powers and also a sacred badge of office. | ZH: 我的阿尔凯护身符。这既是我神圣力量的源泉，也是神圣的职业勋章。 | SID: 009C42

translations.english: Oh, but I suppose you expect some compensation. Um... here, these potions should suffice.
translations.chinese: 哦，但我想你是在等报酬吧。嗯……给你，这些药水应该足够了。

translations.english: Ah, splendid, splendid. It's for a special brew I'm working on. A love elixir like none other. Maybe I'll test it on Farengar first...
translations.chinese: 啊，太好了，太好了。这正是我现在需要的原料。无与伦比的爱之灵药。也许我应该先在法仁加身上试试。

translations.english: I have some Frost Salts for you, from Farengar.
translations.chinese: 法仁加让我给你带些霜盐来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094E34]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Oh, but I suppose you expect some compensation. Um... here, these potions should suffice. | ZH: 哦，但我想你是在等报酬吧。嗯……给你，这些药水应该足够了。 | SID: 000E1B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ah, splendid, splendid. It's for a special brew I'm working on. A love elixir like none other. Maybe I'll test it on Farengar first... | ZH: 啊，太好了，太好了。这正是我现在需要的原料。无与伦比的爱之灵药。也许我应该先在法仁加身上试试。 | SID: 009C55
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I have some Frost Salts for you, from Farengar. | ZH: 法仁加让我给你带些霜盐来。 | SID: 00EA9E

translations.english: I'll make sure the Emperor himself hears of all you've accomplished. You've made Skyrim a better place.
translations.chinese: 我会向皇帝陛下转达你的成就。你的作为让天际变得更加美好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094E35]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll make sure the Emperor himself hears of all you've accomplished. You've made Skyrim a better place. | ZH: 我会向皇帝陛下转达你的成就。你的作为让天际变得更加美好。 | SID: 00453C

translations.english: My agents have recently acquired the passphrase to their Sanctuary. It is, "Silence, my brother." Every assassin in that hole must be put down!
translations.chinese: 我的密探们最近拿到了他们圣所的密语。“是沉寂，我的兄弟。”必须把那洞里的刺客全部干掉！

translations.english: Ha! This is a stroke of good fortune. Long have I watched the Dark Brotherhood's movements... waiting for the time to strike. That time is now!
translations.chinese: 哈！真是幸运。我一直在观察黑暗兄弟会的动向……伺机出击。现在时候到了！

translations.english: The leader of the Dark Brotherhood? You mean Astrid? Dead? And this is no jest?
translations.chinese: 黑暗兄弟会的首领？你是说阿斯垂德？不开玩笑？

translations.english: You, my friend. You've slain their leader. This honor should be yours. Do this, and you will be rewarded most handsomely!
translations.chinese: 朋友。你杀了他们的首领。这个荣誉应该属于你。做完之后，奖赏丰厚！

translations.english: A guard sent me. I killed the leader of the Dark Brotherhood.
translations.chinese: 卫兵派我来的。我杀了黑暗兄弟会的首领。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094E36]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: My agents have recently acquired the passphrase to their Sanctuary. It is, "Silence, my brother." Every assassin in that hole must be put down! | ZH: 我的密探们最近拿到了他们圣所的密语。“是沉寂，我的兄弟。”必须把那洞里的刺客全部干掉！ | SID: 009C5D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Ha! This is a stroke of good fortune. Long have I watched the Dark Brotherhood's movements... waiting for the time to strike. That time is now! | ZH: 哈！真是幸运。我一直在观察黑暗兄弟会的动向……伺机出击。现在时候到了！ | SID: 009C5E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: The leader of the Dark Brotherhood? You mean Astrid? Dead? And this is no jest? | ZH: 黑暗兄弟会的首领？你是说阿斯垂德？不开玩笑？ | SID: 009C5F
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: You, my friend. You've slain their leader. This honor should be yours. Do this, and you will be rewarded most handsomely! | ZH: 朋友。你杀了他们的首领。这个荣誉应该属于你。做完之后，奖赏丰厚！ | SID: 00B961
- INFO:RNAM | EN: A guard sent me. I killed the leader of the Dark Brotherhood. | ZH: 卫兵派我来的。我杀了黑暗兄弟会的首领。 | SID: 0054AA

translations.english: We have a chance to destroy the Dark Brotherhood, forever. It's all up to you.
translations.chinese: 我们有机会一举摧毁黑暗兄弟会。一切看你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094E37]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We have a chance to destroy the Dark Brotherhood, forever. It's all up to you. | ZH: 我们有机会一举摧毁黑暗兄弟会。一切看你了。 | SID: 002E87

translations.english: This is a great day, my friend. You have struck a blow against darkness that will not soon be forgotten! Here, as promised - a most generous reward!
translations.chinese: 朋友，这是伟大的一天。你对黑暗的打击不会被很快忘记！来，这是我答应你的，丰厚报酬！

translations.english: By all I hold holy... Can it be true? Have you actually done it?
translations.chinese: 天啊……是真的？你真的成功了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00094E38]

translations.english: Ha! You can't resist, can you?
translations.chinese: 哈！你忍不住了吧？

translations.english: I was blinded. Blinded by dark treachery masquerading as friendship.
translations.chinese: 我被蒙蔽了，被伪装成友谊的背叛所蒙蔽。

translations.english: I'm afraid so. I'm weakening, and I can feel myself slipping away. The years without restoration of my power have taken their toll.
translations.chinese: 恐怕如此。我越发衰弱了，能够感觉到自己渐渐消逝。多年来我的力量始终得不到补充。

translations.english: When Mercer stole the Key, that conduit closed, severely limiting our ties to her.
translations.chinese: 当墨瑟将钥匙偷走，通道关闭了，大大限制了我们与她的联系。

translations.english: Yes, absolutely. Your skill is your own... don't let anyone ever tell you otherwise.
translations.chinese: 没错。你的技术是你自己的……这没毛病。

translations.chinese: 撬锁器无端折断，夜空中的云朵恰好消散……

translations.english: Think about the Guild... about the state it was in when you began. Think about all the little things you might have heard.
translations.chinese: 想想公会吧……你刚开始的时候是什么状态。回忆你可能听过的一切细节。

translations.english: Our access to those bits of luck are what separates us from common bandits.
translations.chinese: 我们获得的这些运气才是我们与普通强盗的区别所在。

translations.english: It's said that Mankar Camoran used the book to open a portal to a Paradise where all his followers would live forever.
translations.chinese: 据说曼卡·卡莫然用这本书打开了前往“乐园”的大门，他的追随者将在其中得到永生。

translations.english: That burned paper is all that remains of the fabled Mysterium Xarxes. The blasphemous book written by Mehrunes Dagon himself.
translations.chinese: 那张被烧过的纸，就是传说中的沙克斯秘典的残本。由梅鲁涅斯·大衮亲自撰写的渎神之书。

translations.chinese: 他向追随者许诺，死后会进入乐园，他们会在梅鲁涅斯·大衮身边获得重生。

translations.english: The Commentaries on the Mysterium Xarxes were written by the Mythic Dawn cult leader, Mankar Camoran.
translations.chinese: 《沙克斯秘典注解》是神话黎明教主，曼卡·卡莫然所写。

translations.english: The cult's greatest accomplishment was the assassination of the Septim Dynasty and the opening of the Oblivion Gates.
translations.chinese: 这个邪教的最大成就就是刺杀了塞普汀皇帝，并打开了湮灭之门。

translations.english: Our master craftsman are nothing compared to the perfection of the Daedra. Look at how it shines.
translations.chinese: 与迪德拉的完美造物相比，我们的那些工艺大师简直不值一哂。看看它光灿灿的样子。

translations.english: A little history, first. After the Oblivion Crisis, a number of groups cropped up dedicated to wiping out the remnants of the Mythic Dawn.
translations.chinese: 先讲点历史。在湮灭危机之后，一些团体突然出现，致力于消灭神话黎明的残党。

translations.english: One of these groups found Mehrunes' Razor, the artifact of Dagon. They split it into three fragments and pledged to keep them apart forever.
translations.chinese: 其中一组人发现了大衮的神器——梅鲁涅斯剃刀。他们将剃刀分成三份，并且发誓将碎片永远分开。

translations.english: That was almost 150 years ago, and the pieces are still being kept by the descendants of that group. And they're right here, in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 那是大概150年前的事了，这些碎片还被他们的后人保管着。他们恰好都在天际。

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't know what you're talking about, stranger. | ZH: 陌生人，我不懂你在说什么。 | SID: 009B45

translations.english: At least two of the owners, Ghunzul and Drascua, are dangerous marauders. And the third owner, Jorgen, I only know he lives in Morthal.
translations.chinese: 至少有两个持有者是危险的掠夺者，一个叫古祖尔，一个叫德拉斯库拉。至于第三个，乔根，我只知道他住在莫萨尔。

translations.english: Here are my notes about them. I'll gladly pay you for getting the pieces any way you can. No questions asked.
translations.chinese: 这是我关于他们的记录。不管你用什么手段，只要找回碎片我就付你一大笔钱。其他的不要问。

translations.english: And here's your payment for the shards.
translations.chinese: 这是你找回碎片的报酬。

translations.english: Look at them. The legendary sharpness of a deadric weapon. Marvelous.
translations.chinese: 看看吧。迪德拉武器是何等锋利。太不可思议了。

translations.english: Finally, all the pieces of Mehrunes' Razor are in my hands. It's time I let you in on something.
translations.chinese: 梅鲁涅斯剃刀的所有碎片总算都在我手里了。是时候告诉你一件事了。

translations.english: There's a fourth piece. That scabbard in the display case. Built to house the Razor. And there's more.
translations.chinese: 还有第四块碎片，就是陈列柜里的那个鞘，是用来装剃刀的。另外。

translations.english: I know how to put all the pieces together. We just need to take them to Dagon's shrine and contact the Lord of Change directly.
translations.chinese: 我知道如何把所有碎片整合起来。只需要带着它们到大衮的祭坛，直接联系变革之主。

translations.english: Good luck finding the fragments.
translations.chinese: 希望你找到碎片。

translations.english: I'll just be tending the museum if you need me.
translations.chinese: 如果需要的话，我可以带你参观本馆。

agentText:

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll just be tending the museum if you need me. | ZH: 如果需要的话，我可以带你参观本馆。 | SID: 0039CB

translations.english: What is it? Do you have one of the Razor fragments?
translations.chinese: 怎么了？你拿到剃刀碎片了？

translations.english: All right. Head to the pit when you think you're ready.
translations.chinese: 很好。准备好就去坑里吧。

translations.english: Luckily there's no shortage of Pit bait around here. Now get in there and earn your freedom.
translations.chinese: 还好这里不缺坑饵。想要自由就自己去争吧。

translations.english: If you want to fight your way out of here, you have to do it in the Pit.
translations.chinese: 如果你想从这里打出去，就去深坑竞技场吧。

translations.english: Gotta give the crowd a show.
translations.chinese: 去给观众表演一场。

translations.english: What is this, you think you're clever?
translations.chinese: 怎么，你觉得你很聪明？

translations.english: There are pockets brimming with coin and coffers overflowing with riches ripe for the picking.
translations.chinese: 有些人口袋里塞满金币，有些保险箱满载财富，等待着被采摘收割。

translations.english: We may be Nightingales, but in our hearts we're still thieves and we're damn good at what we do.
translations.chinese: 我们虽然是夜莺，但内心深处还是盗贼，而且还是很在行的盗贼。

translations.english: Why, perhaps the greatest crime spree Skyrim's ever known.
translations.chinese: 这可能是天际有史以来最大的犯罪狂欢。

translations.english: I wouldn't take that to heart. It's her way.
translations.chinese: 我就不会放在心上。她一向如此。

translations.english: Think of her as a scolding mother continually pushing you harder to be successful; outwardly sounding angry but silently content.
translations.chinese: 把她想成一个不停训斥你、督促你努力取得成功的母亲吧，表面上看起来很生气，但内心却很满足。

translations.english: I assure you, had she been displeased with you, we wouldn't be having this conversation.
translations.chinese: 我可以保证，如果她对你不满，那就不会有这次对话了。

translations.english: Be warned that once you've chosen, you can't reselect for at least a day.
translations.chinese: 请注意，一旦做出选择，一天内是无法再选的。

translations.english: If you ever feel the need to change your abilities, you can return to the Sepulcher and step onto a different circle.
translations.chinese: 如果你觉得需要改变能力，可以回坟墓再进不同的圈子里。

translations.english: This is Nocturnal's way of maintaining balance.
translations.chinese: 这是诺克图娜尔维系平衡的方法。

translations.english: The circles at the base of the Ebonmere imbue you with powers befitting a Nightingale Agent.
translations.chinese: 黑檀池底部的圆环会赋予你一个作为夜莺特使应有的能力。

translations.english: The crescent moon represents the Agent of Shadow, the half moon for the Agent of Subterfuge and the full moon for the Agent of Strife.
translations.chinese: 新月代表阴影特使，半月代表诡计特使，满月代表冲突特使。

translations.english: I only hope that this isn't an ending to things, but actually the beginning.
translations.chinese: 我只希望这不是结束，而是开始。

translations.english: The Guild has welcomed me back with open arms. I feel like a void in my life has finally been filled.
translations.chinese: 公会张开双臂欢迎我的回归。我生命中的空虚终于得以填补。

translations.english: Now, your life as a Nightingale begins. Should the need arise, you'll be summoned to the Sepulcher in order to defend it.
translations.chinese: 现在，你作为夜莺的生活就要开始了。如果有必要，你会被召唤到坟墓来捍卫它。

translations.english: I'm glad you were able to bring the Key back safely.
translations.chinese: 很高兴你能把钥匙安全带回来。

translations.english: Nocturnal seemed quite pleased with your efforts.
translations.chinese: 诺克图娜尔似乎对你的努力很是满意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Nocturnal seemed quite pleased with your efforts. | ZH: 诺克图娜尔似乎对你的努力很是满意。 | SID: 009B1D

translations.english: Yeah. I'm glad we can finally stand down- getting tired of looking over my shoulder all the time.
translations.chinese: 嗯。终于出来了，我都厌倦了一直处处提防了。

agentText:

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yeah. I'm glad we can finally stand down- getting tired of looking over my shoulder all the time. | ZH: 嗯。终于出来了，我都厌倦了一直处处提防了。 | SID: 009B1C

translations.english: Well, it's all over now. Lieutenant said you could see the smoke from Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 好了，现在都结束了。尉官说从这里能看见白漫的烟。

translations.english: I think we'll all feel better once we're back out to sea. Won't be long now.
translations.chinese: 我想到了海上会感觉好点。不会太久了。

translations.english: Dragons, murder, rebellion... and we sail right into the middle of it with the Emperor on board.
translations.chinese: 龙族、谋杀、烦乱……皇帝在船上，我们带着皇帝卷进来了。

translations.english: Gods, I'll be glad to see the last of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 神啊，终于要离开天际了。

translations.english: Arniel, stay on your guard. We can't let harm come to these people.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔，保持警惕。我们不能让这里的人受到伤害。

translations.english: Please remain calm!
translations.chinese: 请保持冷静！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00097A4F]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 请大家退后！

EDID: [00097A50]
Translations:

translations.english: Is he dead?
translations.chinese: 他死了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00097A51]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Is he dead? | ZH: 他死了？ | SID: 009B0F

translations.english: What's happened? He's not...
translations.chinese: 发生什么了？他不是……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00097A52]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What's happened? He's not... | ZH: 发生什么了？他不是…… | SID: 00619C

translations.english: You'd better get out of that Stormcloak gear. Today's not the day to go around dressed like a rebel.
translations.chinese: 你最好把风暴斗篷的装备脱下来。今天可不适合穿的像个叛军。

translations.english: Only Dagon can declare if a pawn is worth keeping. I. Have. Spoken.
translations.chinese: 只有大衮才能决定卒子是否值得保留。我，已经，发话了。

translations.english: The Mythic Dawn killed Uriel Septim VII and his heirs, triggering the events that lead to the Oblivion Crisis, when the Daedra invaded Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 神话黎明刺杀了尤瑞尔·塞普汀七世及其继承人们，引发了迪德拉入侵泰姆瑞尔的湮灭危机。

translations.english: All that remains of the infamous cult, I've gathered in my museum.
translations.chinese: 这个臭名昭著的邪教的遗物，都被我收藏到博物馆了。

translations.english: They were worshippers of Mehrunes Dagon, the Daedric Lord of Destruction and Change.
translations.chinese: 他们是毁灭与变革的迪德拉君王——梅鲁涅斯·大衮的崇拜者。

translations.english: I am pleased, mortal. I will give you my Razor. Use it to wreak havoc on Tamriel.
translations.chinese: 我很高兴，凡人。我把剃刀赠予你。用它在泰姆瑞尔肆意破坏吧。

translations.english: But Dagon does not declare a winner while there is a pawn on the board. Kill Silus. He and his family have served their purpose.
translations.chinese: 但大衮不会在棋盘上还有卒子的时候宣布胜者。杀了希鲁斯。他们一家已经完成了使命。

translations.english: You. Mortal. You are worthy of speaking to. You have claimed the pieces of my Razor. It has been an amusing game to witness.
translations.chinese: 你。凡人。你有资格与我交谈。你拿到了我之剃刀的全部碎片。真是一场有趣的游戏。

translations.english: Kill him. Take your rightful place as my champion, or I will crush you.
translations.chinese: 杀了他。尽你的本分，成为我的勇士，否则我就碾碎你。

translations.english: Destroy them quickly, and take out the archers in the towers along the way.

translations.english: You'd do well to remember that the next time you make such a stupid observation.
translations.chinese: 下次你做出这么愚蠢的评论前，最好想起这一点。

translations.english: Of course. Nothing gets done without my approval in this city. I have the Jarl's ear, and the guards in my pocket.
translations.chinese: 当然。在这座城市里，没我的许可，什么事都不能做。领主对我言听计从，卫兵们也在我掌控之中。

translations.english: Anyone makes trouble for me and I pay a visit to the Thieves Guild. Make me angry and I contact the Dark Brotherhood.
translations.chinese: 谁敢找我的麻烦，我就会去找盗贼公会。敢惹怒我，我就会联系黑暗兄弟会。

translations.chinese: 黑棘家族一直与公会联合。我们在帝国和天际的关系网对他们十分重要。

translations.english: I dare say the Guild owes its survival as much to my family as it does to its own people.
translations.chinese: 我敢说，在公会的存续方面，我们的贡献与公会成员的功劳同等重要。

translations.english: Mara's domain encompasses the emotions we strive the most to embrace; love, compassion and understanding.
translations.chinese: 玛拉的领域包括了我们最努力想要拥抱的情感：爱、同情还有理解。

translations.english: It's difficult to appreciate her gifts in these dark times, but you should consider her light a beacon in the storm.
translations.chinese: 在这个黑暗的时期，很难欣赏她的恩赐，但你可以把她看做暴风雨中的灯塔。

translations.chinese: 问题应该是，裂谷城还有哪儿不怎么了。

translations.english: This city is corrupt. Rotten to the core. No one cares about anything except themselves and how much coin they can make off the misery of others.
translations.chinese: 这座城市腐败了。烂透了。除了每个人自己和他们能从别人的痛苦里榨出多少钱外，没人会关心任何事。

translations.chinese: 工棚是给工人们住的，不是游客们下榻的豪华旅馆。

translations.english: This heap of matchsticks is what everyone calls Haelga's Bunkhouse. Can you stay here? No.
translations.chinese: 这个破火柴棚子就是大家说的“哈尔嘉的工棚”。你能待在这儿吗？不行。

translations.english: Of course not. You expect me to take care of it by myself?
translations.chinese: 当然不是。你觉得我能一个人料理开吗？

translations.english: My niece Svana helps me with the chores. She'd be more help if she kept her head out of the clouds.
translations.chinese: 我的侄女斯瓦纳帮我打扫这里。如果她不那么想入非非，可能会帮上更多忙。

translations.english: Honor me with a task, outlander. Bring the sword to my daughter, if you see her. It'll be all she needs to know.
translations.chinese: 帮我个忙吧，外来者。如果你见到我女儿，把这把剑给她。这里有她要知道的一切。

translations.english: When my daughter Lash chose to leave the stronghold, I forged a sword to channel all my shame and grief.
translations.chinese: 当我女儿拉什选择离开要塞的时候，我锻造了一把剑来引导我所有的耻辱和悲伤。

translations.english: Occasionally. But an Orc blade is a very personal thing. Anger, regret, pride. All these things are put into our steel.
translations.chinese: 偶尔吧。但兽人的武器是很私人的物品。愤怒、懊悔、骄傲。这一切都被融入了我们的武器当中。

translations.english: Now, if I'm not mistaken. Legate Rikke has a special assignment for you.
translations.chinese: 如果我没记错的话，瑞姬有特殊任务给你。

translations.english: Welcome to the Imperial Legion, soldier.
translations.chinese: 欢迎加入帝国军团，士兵。

translations.english: Just remember, we take care of our own. Once you're in the Legion, you're in it for life.
translations.chinese: 记住，我们要自己照顾自己。一日为兵，终生为兵。

translations.chinese: 我说得太多了。如果有人听到，会引起恐慌的。

translations.english: I would simply ask that you trust me and help me end Dawnstar's nightmares.
translations.chinese: 只求你相信我，帮我结束晨星的噩梦。

translations.english: Because the rituals would last for months or even years, the Miasma was designed to slow down the aging process.
translations.chinese: 因为这些仪式会持续几个月甚至数年，毒气还能延缓衰老。

translations.english: The Miasma was created by the priests of Vaermina for their rituals. It's a gas that places the affected in a deep sleep.
translations.chinese: 毒气是瓦尔迷纳祭司为他们的仪式创造的。能够让吸入者进入深度睡眠。

translations.english: Sadly, yes. The longer an individual is exposed to the Miasma, the more the mind can become damaged.
translations.chinese: 很遗憾，危险。在毒气中暴露的时间越长，他的思维就容易受损。

translations.english: Those who've been under the effect of it for extended periods of time have been known to lose their minds entirely.
translations.chinese: 那些长时间受其影响的人会完全失去理智。

translations.english: In some cases, a few never awoke at all.
translations.chinese: 某些情况下，一些人根本不会醒来。

translations.english: How quickly you've advanced. Most impressive.
translations.chinese: 你进步之快，令人惊叹啊。

translations.english: There are spells yet to be learned, powerful spells that can more closely and more permanently bind creatures to your will.
translations.chinese: 还有些魔法有待学习，这些强大的法术可以更紧密、永久地将召唤物与你的意志捆绑在一起。

translations.english: He had a way of enthralling people and built up a loyal army of followers. Good men fell under his spell and were forever twisted. Made... evil.
translations.chinese: 他有一种吸引他人的办法，并且建立了一支忠诚的追随者军队。善良的人会被他的法术迷惑，然后永远扭曲，变得……邪恶。

translations.english: After that, fear was enough to keep them in line. He could torture and humiliate them and they would not rebel. Even in death, they serve him still.
translations.chinese: 在那之后，小施恐惧就能让他们乖乖听话。即使折磨他们、羞辱他们，他们也不会反抗。就算死后，他们也会继续效忠于他。

translations.english: And so you fulfilled your destiny, which you once said you did not believe in.
translations.chinese: 所以你还是完成了自己的使命，当初你告诉我自己不信命。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C209]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And so you fulfilled your destiny, which you once said you did not believe in. | ZH: 所以你还是完成了自己的使命，当初你告诉我自己不信命。 | SID: 009857

translations.english: But I cannot celebrate his fall. Zu'u tiiraaz ahst ok mah. He was my brother once. This world will never be the same.
translations.chinese: 但我不能庆祝他的陨落。祖'乌 提拉兹 阿斯特 欧克 玛。他曾是我的兄弟。世界也在不断变化啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C20A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: But I cannot celebrate his fall. Zu'u tiiraaz ahst ok mah. He was my brother once. This world will never be the same. | ZH: 但我不能庆祝他的陨落。祖'乌 提拉兹 阿斯特 欧克 玛。他曾是我的兄弟。世界也在不断变化啊。 | SID: 00402B

translations.english: So, it is done. Alduin dilon. The Eldest is no more, he who came before all others, and has always been.
translations.chinese: 所以，结束了。奥杜因 蒂隆。前无来者、亘古存在的长子已经不存在了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C20B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So, it is done. Alduin dilon. The Eldest is no more, he who came before all others, and has always been. | ZH: 所以，结束了。奥杜因 蒂隆。前无来者、亘古存在的长子已经不存在了。 | SID: 00637A

translations.english: Perhaps. At least it will continue to exist. Grik los lein.
translations.chinese: 或许吧。至少世界会继续存在。格瑞克 洛斯 雷恩。

translations.english: And, as you told me once, the next world will have to take care of itself. Ful nii los. Even I cannot see past Time's ending.
translations.chinese: 而且，就如你告诉我的，彼世自有彼世福。富尔 尼依 洛斯。就连我也无法看穿时间的终结。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C20C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Perhaps. At least it will continue to exist. Grik los lein. | ZH: 或许吧。至少世界会继续存在。格瑞克 洛斯 雷恩。 | SID: 002A98
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And, as you told me once, the next world will have to take care of itself. Ful nii los. Even I cannot see past Time's ending. | ZH: 而且，就如你告诉我的，彼世自有彼世福。富尔 尼依 洛斯。就连我也无法看穿时间的终结。 | SID: 002D40

translations.english: Even I cannot see past Time's ending to what comes next. Niid koraav zeim dinoksetiid. We must do the best we can with this world.
translations.chinese: 就连我也无法看穿时间的终结。尼依德 寇拉夫 泽姆 迪诺克瑟提德。我们必须尽力在这个世界上做得最好。

translations.english: I am glad you believe that. At least it will continue to exist. Grik los lein.
translations.chinese: 很高兴你会相信这一点。至少世界会存续下去。格瑞克 洛斯 雷恩。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C20D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Even I cannot see past Time's ending to what comes next. Niid koraav zeim dinoksetiid. We must do the best we can with this world. | ZH: 就连我也无法看穿时间的终结。尼依德 寇拉夫 泽姆 迪诺克瑟提德。我们必须尽力在这个世界上做得最好。 | SID: 005F7E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I am glad you believe that. At least it will continue to exist. Grik los lein. | ZH: 很高兴你会相信这一点。至少世界会存续下去。格瑞克 洛斯 雷恩。 | SID: 009865

translations.english: As for myself, you've proven your mastery twice over. Thuri, Dovahkiin. I gladly acknowledge the power of your Thu'um.
translations.chinese: 至于我，你已经两次证明了自己的力量。图瑞，都瓦克因。我很高兴承认您的吐'目之力。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C20E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: As for myself, you've proven your mastery twice over. Thuri, Dovahkiin. I gladly acknowledge the power of your Thu'um. | ZH: 至于我，你已经两次证明了自己的力量。图瑞，都瓦克因。我很高兴承认您的吐'目之力。 | SID: 00C4B8

translations.english: And so Alduin's lordship passes to you. Thuri, Dovahkiin. I gladly submit to your mastery of the Thu'um.
translations.chinese: 因此奥杜因的主人身份移交于你。图瑞，都瓦克因。我很高兴承认您的吐'目之力。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C20F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: And so Alduin's lordship passes to you. Thuri, Dovahkiin. I gladly submit to your mastery of the Thu'um. | ZH: 因此奥杜因的主人身份移交于你。图瑞，都瓦克因。我很高兴承认您的吐'目之力。 | SID: 00DF74

translations.english: But I forget myself. Krosis. So los mid fahdon. Melancholy is an easy trap for a dovah to fall into.
translations.chinese: 但我有些忘我了。科洛西斯。索 洛斯 米德 法顿。都瓦很容易掉入哀伤的陷阱。

translations.english: You have won a mighty victory. Sahrot krongrah - one that will echo through all the ages of this world for those who have eyes to see.
translations.chinese: 你赢得了一场大胜。撒洛特 克隆格拉——会被此世所有明眼人永久传唱下去。

translations.english: Savor your triumph, Dovahkiin. This is not the last of what you will write upon the currents of Time.
translations.chinese: 尽情享受你的胜利吧，都瓦克因。这不会是你在时间之流中写下的终章。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C212]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: But I forget myself. Krosis. So los mid fahdon. Melancholy is an easy trap for a dovah to fall into. | ZH: 但我有些忘我了。科洛西斯。索 洛斯 米德 法顿。都瓦很容易掉入哀伤的陷阱。 | SID: 000F07
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: You have won a mighty victory. Sahrot krongrah - one that will echo through all the ages of this world for those who have eyes to see. | ZH: 你赢得了一场大胜。撒洛特 克隆格拉——会被此世所有明眼人永久传唱下去。 | SID: 009864
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Savor your triumph, Dovahkiin. This is not the last of what you will write upon the currents of Time. | ZH: 尽情享受你的胜利吧，都瓦克因。这不会是你在时间之流中写下的终章。 | SID: 009A19

translations.english: Happy? No, I am not happy. Zeymahi lost ont du'ul Bormahu. Alduin was once the crown of our father Akatosh's creation.
translations.chinese: 高兴？我当然不高兴。泽玛亥 洛斯特 昂特 都'乌尔 伯马胡。奥杜因曾经冠绝我父阿卡托什的造物。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C213]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Happy? No, I am not happy. Zeymahi lost ont du'ul Bormahu. Alduin was once the crown of our father Akatosh's creation. | ZH: 高兴？我当然不高兴。泽玛亥 洛斯特 昂特 都'乌尔 伯马胡。奥杜因曾经冠绝我父阿卡托什的造物。 | SID: 001306

translations.english: Zu'u Odahviing. Call me when you have need, and I will come if I can.
translations.chinese: 祖'乌 傲达威英。在你需要的时候召唤我，我会为你而来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C214]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Zu'u Odahviing. Call me when you have need, and I will come if I can. | ZH: 祖'乌 傲达威英。在你需要的时候召唤我，我会为你而来。 | SID: 0023D7

translations.english: Perhaps you begin to see the world as a dovah.
translations.chinese: 也许你开始以一个都瓦的眼光审视世界了。

translations.english: Perhaps now you have some insight into the forces that shape the vennesetiid... the currents of Time.
translations.chinese: 也许你现在对塑造温聂瑟提德……时间之流的力量有些理解了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C215]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Perhaps you begin to see the world as a dovah. | ZH: 也许你开始以一个都瓦的眼光审视世界了。 | SID: 003407
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Perhaps now you have some insight into the forces that shape the vennesetiid... the currents of Time. | ZH: 也许你现在对塑造温聂瑟提德……时间之流的力量有些理解了。 | SID: 00FC23

translations.english: Of course. Alduin wahlaan daanii. I would not have helped you if I thought otherwise.
translations.chinese: 当然。奥杜因 瓦兰 丹尼。如果我不这么想，也就不会帮你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C216]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Of course. Alduin wahlaan daanii. I would not have helped you if I thought otherwise. | ZH: 当然。奥杜因 瓦兰 丹尼。如果我不这么想，也就不会帮你了。 | SID: 003F36

translations.english: You once told me you did not believe in destiny.
translations.chinese: 你曾说过自己不信命运。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C217]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You once told me you did not believe in destiny. | ZH: 你曾说过自己不信命运。 | SID: 00639C

translations.english: Indeed, you saw more clearly than I - certainly more clearly than Alduin. Rok funta koraav.
translations.chinese: 的确，你现在比我，还有奥杜因看得都清楚。若克 芬塔 寇拉夫。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C218]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Indeed, you saw more clearly than I - certainly more clearly than Alduin. Rok funta koraav. | ZH: 的确，你现在比我，还有奥杜因看得都清楚。若克 芬塔 寇拉夫。 | SID: 00985D

translations.english: You did what was necessary. Alduin had flown far from the path of right action in his pahlok - the arrogance of his power.
translations.chinese: 你做了你应做的。奥杜因因为对自身力量的帕洛克……傲慢，已经偏离了正确行动的道路。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009C219]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You did what was necessary. Alduin had flown far from the path of right action in his pahlok - the arrogance of his power. | ZH: 你做了你应做的。奥杜因因为对自身力量的帕洛克……傲慢，已经偏离了正确行动的道路。 | SID: 00A057

translations.english: Indeed. Alduin wahlaan daanii.
translations.chinese: 确实。奥杜因 瓦兰 丹尼。

translations.english: His doom was written when he claimed for himself the lordship that properly belongs to Bormahu - our father Akatosh.
translations.chinese: 当他僭越称治，剽窃伯马胡——我等之父阿卡托什之权的时候，他就注定在劫难逃了。

translations.english: Oh, goodness me. You're a friend of Gabriella's, then. Well, I guess we both know why you're here.
translations.chinese: 哦，天啊。你是加布里艾拉的朋友啊。你来这儿的原因咱们心知肚明。

translations.english: I have this token for you.
translations.chinese: 我有个标记要给你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009CCCD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Token, you say? Let me see. | ZH: 你说标记？让我看看。 | SID: 009598
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Oh, goodness me. You're a friend of Gabriella's, then. Well, I guess we both know why you're here. | ZH: 哦，天啊。你是加布里艾拉的朋友啊。你来这儿的原因咱们心知肚明。 | SID: 0097F3
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I have this token for you. | ZH: 我有个标记要给你。 | SID: 0097F1

translations.english: Hmph. Yes. Yes, I surely can. It's not something I do lightly, mind you, and it's not as specific as you might want. But yes. I will do this for you.
translations.chinese: 嗯。对，对。我当然能。但提醒一下，这不是轻易能做到的事，也没你想象的那么具体明确。但确实没错。我能帮你。

translations.english: Please, relax. Free your mind. Yes, that's it...
translations.chinese: 请放松。放空精神。没错，就是这样……

translations.english: I was told you could see my future.
translations.chinese: 我听说你能看到我的未来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009CCCE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Hmph. Yes. Yes, I surely can. It's not something I do lightly, mind you, and it's not as specific as you might want. But yes. I will do this for you. | ZH: 嗯。对，对。我当然能。但提醒一下，这不是轻易能做到的事，也没你想象的那么具体明确。但确实没错。我能帮你。 | SID: 006473
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Please, relax. Free your mind. Yes, that's it... | ZH: 请放松。放空精神。没错，就是这样…… | SID: 007550
- INFO:RNAM | EN: I was told you could see my future. | ZH: 我听说你能看到我的未来。 | SID: 0097F4

translations.english: And you are not alone. There are others. A child of night... a stalker of the sands? Oh, but before you are family, there will be blood. Such blood.
translations.chinese: 你并不孤单。还有别的人在你身旁。一个黑夜之子……一个沙漠行者？哦，但在你们成为家人前，会有鲜血相伴。大量的鲜血。

translations.english: Through there is... Hag's End. The last resting place of an assassin of old. A Dark Brother, who bequeaths his ancient earthly possessions... to you.
translations.chinese: 穿过那里就是……鬼婆之终。古代刺客最后的安息之所。那位黑暗兄弟把他古老的尘世财产……留给了你。

translations.english: Wait! There's something else... A potential for adventure, and wealth. It is a ruin, ripe for the plunder. Deepwood Redoubt. Far to the northwest...
translations.chinese: 等等！还有别的东西……潜藏着冒险和财富。是座遗迹，时机已经成熟。深木据点。在遥远的西北方向……

translations.english: There's a cave. No, not a cave. A... home? A place you feel secure. You will find safety there... sanctuary. I see snow, lit by the star of dawn.
translations.chinese: 有一个山洞。不，不是山洞。是一个……家？一个让你感到安全的地方。你会在那里找到安全的……圣所。我看见了被黎明之星照亮的白雪。

translations.english: What do you see?
translations.chinese: 你看到了什么？

translations.english: It is the last resting place of an assassin of old. A Dark Brother, who bequeaths his ancient earthly possessions... to you.
translations.chinese: 那是古代刺客最后的安息之所。那位黑暗兄弟把他古老的尘世财产……留给了你。

translations.english: Wait! There's something else... A potential for adventure, and wealth. It is a ruin, ripe for the plunder. Deepwood Redoubt. Far to the northwest...
translations.chinese: 等等！还有别的东西……潜藏着冒险和财富。是座遗迹，时机已经成熟。深木据点。在遥远的西北方向……

translations.english: Your destiny is dark. Oh yes, so dark. But much of it has been fulfilled. You have found sanctuary, and the comforting words of a mother's love.
translations.chinese: 你的命运一片黑暗。哦没错，太黑暗了。但大部分目标已经实现。你找到了圣所，找到了母爱的慰藉。

translations.english: And you have companionship. A child of night, and a stalker of the sands. Together, you are a family.
translations.chinese: 你还有同伴。一个黑夜之子，还有个沙漠行者。你们现在是一家人了。

translations.english: What do you see?
translations.chinese: 你看到了什么？

translations.english: Oh, very well. But my energies are low. I warn you - I won't be able to see much. Give me... five gold, and I'll do what I can.
translations.chinese: 哦，很好。但我的能量状态太低了。我跟你说，这样是看不清楚的。给我……五枚金币，我会尽力而为的。

translations.english: I want you to read my fortune.
translations.chinese: 我想请你看看我的未来。

translations.english: Not much further. Come, little thing. Serve me in death.
translations.chinese: 不用前进了。来吧，小东西。以亡灵之姿侍奉我吧。

translations.english: Kind of fun to push people around sometimes, isn't it. Good work, brother.
translations.chinese: 有时候打人也挺好玩吧。干得好，兄弟。

translations.english: No more than that. I don't want to hear about a killing, understand?
translations.chinese: 仅此而已。我可不想听到有人被杀，明白吗？

translations.english: I don't know what the fight is about, and that's not our business anyway.
translations.chinese: 我不知道他们在吵什么，反正也不关我们的事。

translations.english: I just need you to go out there, look tough, and scare this milk drinker into submission.
translations.chinese: 只是要你过去，样子摆的凶点，把这个软蛋吓服了就行。

translations.english: I really thought you'd be able to save me.
translations.chinese: 我真的以为你能救我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD45]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I really thought you'd be able to save me. | ZH: 我真的以为你能救我。 | SID: 008C04

translations.english: Please, let's hurry.
translations.chinese: 拜托，请快点。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD46]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please, let's hurry. | ZH: 拜托，请快点。 | SID: 00A8A7

translations.english: Let's get to the stables before they find me.
translations.chinese: 趁他们还没找到我，赶紧去马厩。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD47]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let's get to the stables before they find me. | ZH: 趁他们还没找到我，赶紧去马厩。 | SID: 009DD2

translations.english: Any news of the Alik'r?
translations.chinese: 有阿里克'尔的消息吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD48]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Any news of the Alik'r? | ZH: 有阿里克'尔的消息吗？ | SID: 009AA0

translations.english: Do you have news of our quarry?
translations.chinese: 有我们猎物的消息吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD49]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do you have news of our quarry? | ZH: 有我们猎物的消息吗？ | SID: 00DD74

translations.english: I got one last special request of you. Finish this one and all of Skyrim's ours for the takin'.
translations.chinese: 我还有最后一个特别任务。完成这个，全天际就是咱们的了。

translations.english: Contacts are springin' up all over and I've got young footpads beatin' down the door to join up.
translations.chinese: 到处都是想要加入的人，很多年轻人希望入伙。

translations.english: Well, I never thought I'd see the Guild this way ever again. The place is growin' into what it used to be when Gallus was runnin' the show.
translations.chinese: 我从没想过公会还能是这个样子。这地方渐渐变回加卢斯掌舵的样子了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD53]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I got one last special request of you. Finish this one and all of Skyrim's ours for the takin'. | ZH: 我还有最后一个特别任务。完成这个，全天际就是咱们的了。 | SID: 00121C
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Contacts are springin' up all over and I've got young footpads beatin' down the door to join up. | ZH: 到处都是想要加入的人，很多年轻人希望入伙。 | SID: 001496
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well, I never thought I'd see the Guild this way ever again. The place is growin' into what it used to be when Gallus was runnin' the show. | ZH: 我从没想过公会还能是这个样子。这地方渐渐变回加卢斯掌舵的样子了。 | SID: 00975C

translations.english: Now, if you're ready, I got another special job for you.
translations.chinese: 现在，如果你准备好了，我这里有另一项特殊任务给你。

translations.english: I don't know what your made of, but I've never seen anyone tackle this many jobs without endin' up dead or in jail.
translations.chinese: 我不知道你有什么本事，但我还没见过谁干了这么多活儿还没死或者蹲号子。

translations.english: We've got half of Skyrim back under our wing and the coin's startin' to flow.
translations.chinese: 我们已经打下了天际的半壁江山，资金开始流动了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD54]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Now, if you're ready, I got another special job for you. | ZH: 现在，如果你准备好了，我这里有另一项特殊任务给你。 | SID: 009753
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I don't know what your made of, but I've never seen anyone tackle this many jobs without endin' up dead or in jail. | ZH: 我不知道你有什么本事，但我还没见过谁干了这么多活儿还没死或者蹲号子。 | SID: 009757
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: We've got half of Skyrim back under our wing and the coin's startin' to flow. | ZH: 我们已经打下了天际的半壁江山，资金开始流动了。 | SID: 00F0C6

translations.english: Your makin' a name for yourself, that's for sure. But more important, you're makin' a name for the Guild. Keep it up.
translations.chinese: 你已经开始扬名立万了，毋庸置疑。但更重要的是，你为公会打出名声了。好好坚持。

translations.english: I've got another special request and they specifically asked for you.
translations.chinese: 我这里有新的特殊任务，而且他们点名要你出马。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD55]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Your makin' a name for yourself, that's for sure. But more important, you're makin' a name for the Guild. Keep it up. | ZH: 你已经开始扬名立万了，毋庸置疑。但更重要的是，你为公会打出名声了。好好坚持。 | SID: 003D4B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I've got another special request and they specifically asked for you. | ZH: 我这里有新的特殊任务，而且他们点名要你出马。 | SID: 009751

translations.english: Well, it appears your actions are startin' to make waves out there. People are talkin' about the Guild again.
translations.chinese: 嗯，你的行动在外面掀起波澜了。人们开始重新谈论公会了。

translations.english: In fact, I just got a special job request in. I haven't gotten anythin' like it in years.
translations.chinese: 其实，我刚收到一份特殊工作的请求。我都好几年没接到过这种东西了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD56]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Well, it appears your actions are startin' to make waves out there. People are talkin' about the Guild again. | ZH: 嗯，你的行动在外面掀起波澜了。人们开始重新谈论公会了。 | SID: 006693
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: In fact, I just got a special job request in. I haven't gotten anythin' like it in years. | ZH: 其实，我刚收到一份特殊工作的请求。我都好几年没接到过这种东西了。 | SID: 009748

translations.english: Not only that but they're givin' us thieves a bad name by murderin' their marks.
translations.chinese: 不仅如此，他们还谋杀了自己的目标，给咱们盗贼业抹了黑。

translations.english: Got word from Torsten Cruel-Sea in Windhelm that a rival Guild is tryin' to get itself started.
translations.chinese: 我们从风舵城的托斯滕·酷海那里收到风儿了，一个敌对公会正试图开始活动。

translations.english: Get over there and see what you can do.
translations.chinese: 去看看能做些什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD57]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Not only that but they're givin' us thieves a bad name by murderin' their marks. | ZH: 不仅如此，他们还谋杀了自己的目标，给咱们盗贼业抹了黑。 | SID: 0025AC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Got word from Torsten Cruel-Sea in Windhelm that a rival Guild is tryin' to get itself started. | ZH: 我们从风舵城的托斯滕·酷海那里收到风儿了，一个敌对公会正试图开始活动。 | SID: 0032F2
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Get over there and see what you can do. | ZH: 去看看能做些什么。 | SID: 0054D3

translations.english: Don't make me the fool and let me down, all right?
translations.chinese: 别让我看上去很傻，也别让我失望，好吗？

translations.english: We actually got a request from one of the most powerful families in Whiterun, the Battle-Born's.
translations.chinese: 我们受到了白漫城最有权势的一个家族的请求，是战狂家。

translations.english: Make your way up there and look for Olfrid. He says he's got a matter that requires a delicate touch, and I suggested you for the job.
translations.chinese: 去找奥弗瑞德吧。他说有件事需要小心处理，我就推荐你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD58]
Translations:
