- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: We actually got a request from one of the most powerful families in Whiterun, the Battle-Born's. | ZH: 我们受到了白漫城最有权势的一个家族的请求，是战狂家。 | SID: 00976E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Make your way up there and look for Olfrid. He says he's got a matter that requires a delicate touch, and I suggested you for the job. | ZH: 去找奥弗瑞德吧。他说有件事需要小心处理，我就推荐你了。 | SID: 00B623

translations.english: His father was a good friend of the Guild back in the day, and we could really use his family's influence back on our side.
translations.chinese: 他父亲以前是公会的好朋友，我们可以利用他们家的影响力。

translations.english: I want you to head out to Markarth and speak to Endon. He's a silversmith... has some kind of a shop there.
translations.chinese: 我需要你去马卡斯和恩东谈谈。他是个银匠……在那儿开了家店。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD59]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: His father was a good friend of the Guild back in the day, and we could really use his family's influence back on our side. | ZH: 他父亲以前是公会的好朋友，我们可以利用他们家的影响力。 | SID: 009769
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I want you to head out to Markarth and speak to Endon. He's a silversmith... has some kind of a shop there. | ZH: 我需要你去马卡斯和恩东谈谈。他是个银匠……在那儿开了家店。 | SID: 00976A

translations.english: Now, he's not exactly goin' to welcome you with open arms, but keep your cool. Do this job right and we've just made an important friend out there.
translations.chinese: 他不会张开双臂欢迎你，但保持冷静。做好这件事，咱们就交到一个重要的伙伴。

translations.english: I need you to make your way to Solitude and talk to Erikur. He's lookin' to run some kind of a shill job.
translations.chinese: 我需要你去独孤城和艾瑞库尔谈谈。他在找人做一次设饵工作。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD5A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Now, he's not exactly goin' to welcome you with open arms, but keep your cool. Do this job right and we've just made an important friend out there. | ZH: 他不会张开双臂欢迎你，但保持冷静。做好这件事，咱们就交到一个重要的伙伴。 | SID: 009763
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I need you to make your way to Solitude and talk to Erikur. He's lookin' to run some kind of a shill job. | ZH: 我需要你去独孤城和艾瑞库尔谈谈。他在找人做一次设饵工作。 | SID: 009764

translations.english: Slow down, you have that special request in Windhelm to finish first. After that's done, I'll send you some more jobs.
translations.chinese: 别着急，你现在先去把风舵的特殊工作搞定。等完成后我会给你更多工作的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD5B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Slow down, you have that special request in Windhelm to finish first. After that's done, I'll send you some more jobs. | ZH: 别着急，你现在先去把风舵的特殊工作搞定。等完成后我会给你更多工作的。 | SID: 0069AA

translations.english: Before I'm goin' to give you any more work, you need to finish that job in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 在我给你更多工作前，先把独孤城的工作办完。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD5C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Before I'm goin' to give you any more work, you need to finish that job in Solitude. | ZH: 在我给你更多工作前，先把独孤城的工作办完。 | SID: 0087EA

translations.english: I want you to finish that job in Whiterun first. Then we'll talk about more work.
translations.chinese: 先完成白漫城的工作，之后再谈更多工作。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD5D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I want you to finish that job in Whiterun first. Then we'll talk about more work. | ZH: 先完成白漫城的工作，之后再谈更多工作。 | SID: 002357

translations.english: He's a powerful ally in Markarth. Should help the Guild regain a foothold in the west.
translations.chinese: 他会成为在马卡斯城的强大盟友。应该能帮公会在西边重新立足。

translations.english: I hear Endon's quite pleased to have his merchandise back.
translations.chinese: 我听说恩东很高兴货找回来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD68]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: He's a powerful ally in Markarth. Should help the Guild regain a foothold in the west. | ZH: 他会成为在马卡斯城的强大盟友。应该能帮公会在西边重新立足。 | SID: 00B866
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I hear Endon's quite pleased to have his merchandise back. | ZH: 我听说恩东很高兴货找回来了。 | SID: 00C78A

translations.english: More importanly, he's pledged the full support of the Battle-Born clan to the Thieves Guild.
translations.chinese: 更重要的是，他承诺战狂氏族会全力支持盗贼公会。

translations.english: Olfrid sent ahead his compliments. Looks like his friend Arn is soon to be released thanks to his brand new identity.
translations.chinese: 奥弗瑞德转达了他的问候。看起来因为新的身份，他的朋友阿恩马上就要被放了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD69]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: More importanly, he's pledged the full support of the Battle-Born clan to the Thieves Guild. | ZH: 更重要的是，他承诺战狂氏族会全力支持盗贼公会。 | SID: 009727
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Olfrid sent ahead his compliments. Looks like his friend Arn is soon to be released thanks to his brand new identity. | ZH: 奥弗瑞德转达了他的问候。看起来因为新的身份，他的朋友阿恩马上就要被放了。 | SID: 00FE62

translations.english: Best of all, he's also pledged to open doors for us in Solitude and to get things rollin' again.
translations.chinese: 最重要的是，他承诺为我们打开独孤城的大门，让一切重新开始。

translations.english: Erikur assures me that Captain Volf will spend pretty much the rest of his life clapped in irons.
translations.chinese: 艾瑞库尔保证，沃夫船长的下半辈子得在监狱里过了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Erikur assures me that Captain Volf will spend pretty much the rest of his life clapped in irons. | ZH: 艾瑞库尔保证，沃夫船长的下半辈子得在监狱里过了。 | SID: 00EBF3

translations.english: Burnin' that banner was a nice touch, too. Should send a clear message to the Summerset Shadows that we're a force to be reckoned with.
translations.chinese: 烧毁旗帜干得不错。这应该能向夏暮暗影发出明确的信号，我们是股不容忽视的力量。

translations.english: Torsten was gratified the death of his daughter was avenged and the heirloom was returned.
translations.chinese: 托斯滕很高兴女儿大仇得报，传家宝也回来了。

translations.english: At this very moment, he's layin' the groundwork for the Guild to reestablish itself in Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 此时此刻，他正在帮公会在风舵城的重建做准备。

agentText:

translations.english: Torsten was gratified the death of his daughter was avenged and the heirloom was returned.
translations.chinese: 托斯滕很高兴女儿大仇得报，传家宝也回来了。

translations.english: I wished you could have sent more of a message to those Summerset Shadows upstarts, but hopefully they'll stay out of our business.
translations.chinese: 真希望你能给那些夏暮暗影的暴发户释放点信号，但愿他们别再来插手咱们的事了。

translations.english: At this very moment, he's layin' the groundwork for the Guild to reestablish itself in Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 此时此刻，他正在帮公会在风舵城的重建做准备。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD6C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Torsten was gratified the death of his daughter was avenged and the heirloom was returned. | ZH: 托斯滕很高兴女儿大仇得报，传家宝也回来了。 | SID: 002C19
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I wished you could have sent more of a message to those Summerset Shadows upstarts, but hopefully they'll stay out of our business. | ZH: 真希望你能给那些夏暮暗影的暴发户释放点信号，但愿他们别再来插手咱们的事了。 | SID: 009730
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: At this very moment, he's layin' the groundwork for the Guild to reestablish itself in Windhelm. | ZH: 此时此刻，他正在帮公会在风舵城的重建做准备。 | SID: 009731

translations.english: The Guild's at full strength and we have you to thank for it. We've had our share of dark times, and now they seem like a distant memory.
translations.chinese: 公会现在羽翼丰满，都要感谢你。我们经历过黑暗的时光，但现在似乎成了遥远的记忆。

translations.english: When you walk through the Guild, don't be ashamed to hold your head high 'cause you're the best damn thief in the place.
translations.chinese: 当你行走在公会里，要昂首挺胸。因为你是这里最棒的小偷。

translations.english: I'm goin' to tell you'll somethin' you'll never hear me say again, and if you tell anyone I told you, I'll deny it.
translations.chinese: 我要告诉你一些我不会再重复的话。要是你传出去说是我说的，我就会否认。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD6D]
Translations:

translations.english: If you don't watch out, you might even earn Vex's respect. Now that'd be something, eh?
translations.chinese: 你要是不注意，甚至要赢得小烦的尊重了。这可是很了不起的。

translations.english: Success means that the Guild is gettin' stronger. We've picked up another merchant and a new recruit.
translations.chinese: 成功意味着公会变得更加强大。我们又招来了一个商人还有一个新人。

translations.english: Bein' a thief is like a second skin for you, ain't it? Never seen anythin' like it.
translations.chinese: 小偷这行对你来说简直就是量身打造，对吧？真稀奇啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD6E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: If you don't watch out, you might even earn Vex's respect. Now that'd be something, eh? | ZH: 你要是不注意，甚至要赢得小烦的尊重了。这可是很了不起的。 | SID: 00347C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Success means that the Guild is gettin' stronger. We've picked up another merchant and a new recruit. | ZH: 成功意味着公会变得更加强大。我们又招来了一个商人还有一个新人。 | SID: 009743
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Bein' a thief is like a second skin for you, ain't it? Never seen anythin' like it. | ZH: 小偷这行对你来说简直就是量身打造，对吧？真稀奇啊。 | SID: 00B2E2

translations.english: We're still growin' by leaps and bounds thanks to you. Another merchant's just moved into the space outside the Flagon.
translations.chinese: 多亏了你，我们还在飞速发展。新的商人刚刚搬到漏壶外面。

translations.english: We've got a long way to go, but don't let that bother you... it's a lot farther than we've been in years.
translations.chinese: 我们还有很长的路要走，但不要因此感到困扰……咱们已经比以前走过的路远多了。

translations.english: You're a natural. Never seen anythin' like it.
translations.chinese: 你真是天生的贼。从没见过这样的事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DD6F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: We're still growin' by leaps and bounds thanks to you. Another merchant's just moved into the space outside the Flagon. | ZH: 多亏了你，我们还在飞速发展。新的商人刚刚搬到漏壶外面。 | SID: 0011D7
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: We've got a long way to go, but don't let that bother you... it's a lot farther than we've been in years. | ZH: 我们还有很长的路要走，但不要因此感到困扰……咱们已经比以前走过的路远多了。 | SID: 00973E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: You're a natural. Never seen anythin' like it. | ZH: 你真是天生的贼。从没见过这样的事。 | SID: 00973F

translations.english: It's nice to shake the cobwebs off and get things rollin' again. Keep this up and I can see a bounty headed our way.
translations.chinese: 甩掉蜘蛛网，让一切重新开始，感觉真好。再这样下去，我都觉得有赏金要来了。

translations.english: I think you'll find that the Guild is beginnin' to grow. We've had a merchant move into the space right outside the Flagon.
translations.chinese: 我想你会发现公会开始了成长，有个商人搬到了漏壶外面。

translations.english: Need a ride?
translations.chinese: 要雇车吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DE57]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Need a ride? | ZH: 要雇车吗？ | SID: 009725

translations.english: I can take you to any of the hold capitals.
translations.chinese: 我可以带你去任意的领地首府。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DE8C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can take you to any of the hold capitals. | ZH: 我可以带你去任意的领地首府。 | SID: 001247

translations.english: Do some people look down on me? Have I made some enemies? You're damn right.
translations.chinese: 有人看不惯我？我有没有对头？你他妈说对了。

translations.english: I'm a woman living in Skyrim with six children and no husband. I don't have the time or patience to be "nice."
translations.chinese: 我就住在天际，六个孩子的妈，没有丈夫。我可没时间对你“好好”说话。

translations.english: It's all right. Just tell me what I need to know. (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 没关系。只需要告诉我我想知道的。（说服）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DEA1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Do some people look down on me? Have I made some enemies? You're damn right. | ZH: 有人看不惯我？我有没有对头？你他妈说对了。 | SID: 0000F9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm a woman living in Skyrim with six children and no husband. I don't have the time or patience to be "nice." | ZH: 我就住在天际，六个孩子的妈，没有丈夫。我可没时间对你“好好”说话。 | SID: 009712
- INFO:RNAM | EN: It's all right. Just tell me what I need to know. (Persuade) | ZH: 没关系。只需要告诉我我想知道的。（说服） | SID: 00970F

translations.english: But... But you're not going to kill me. Right?
translations.chinese: 但……但你不会杀我的。对吧？

translations.english: Okay, well... I guess it's possible. I've been selling my sword arm for years now. Killed a lot of people. Could be someone wanted revenge.
translations.chinese: 好吧，嗯……我想是有可能的。我当雇佣兵很多年了。杀了不少人。可能有人想要报仇。

translations.english: Shhh... Don't be afraid. You can tell me. (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 嘘……别害怕。你可以告诉我。（说服）

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Fool! Don't you get it? I live in the shadow of death every day. A knife in every doorway, a nocked arrow on every rooftop!
translations.chinese: 傻子！你还不明白？我每天都活在死亡的阴影中。每个门口都插着刀，屋顶上全是箭！

translations.english: If one of my enemies wouldn't pay to have me killed, I'd take it as a personal insult.
translations.chinese: 要是我的对头不愿意花钱杀我，我还会觉得羞耻呢。

translations.english: Answer me, or I'll paint this room with your blood! (Intimidate)
translations.chinese: 回答我，不然就用你的血去刷墙！（恐吓）

translations.english: What do you think, genius?
translations.chinese: 你觉得呢，小天才？

translations.english: I'm kneeling here with my hands bound and a sack over my head, and you have the gall to ask me that?
translations.chinese: 我被绑着双手套着麻袋，跪在这里，你还敢这样问我？

translations.english: One last time: Would. Someone. Pay. To. Have. You. Killed? (Intimidate)
translations.chinese: 我最后说一次：有人、出钱、要、杀你吗？（恐吓）

agentText:

translations.english: But war is war. Right? Nobody could blame me for that. Could they?
translations.chinese: 但战争就是战争。对吧？没人能指责我。对吧？

translations.english: Please! I don't know! I mean, I'm a soldier. I've killed people. When I was ordered to. Maybe there were some times... some times I got carried away?
translations.chinese: 求你了！我真不知道！我是说，我是个士兵。有人下令我当然要杀人。也许有时候……有时候我太忘乎所以了？

translations.english: Answer me, or die! (Intimidate)
translations.chinese: 回答我，不然就去死！（恐吓）

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Answer me, or die! (Intimidate) | ZH: 回答我，不然就去死！（恐吓） | SID: 001E0B

translations.english: A day goes by without someone trying to gut me in the street, I get disappointed.
translations.chinese: 在街上一天没人想杀我，我都会很失望啊。

translations.english: He he he he he he he. The real question is, "Would someone pay to have me killed... again."
translations.chinese: 呵呵呵呵呵呵。但真正的问题是“会有人再次花钱杀我吗。”

translations.english: Come on, you can tell me. We're all friends here. (Persuade)
translations.chinese: 来吧，你可以告诉我。咱们是朋友。（说服）

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: He he he he he he he. The real question is, "Would someone pay to have me killed... again." | ZH: 呵呵呵呵呵呵。但真正的问题是“会有人再次花钱杀我吗。” | SID: 0060CF

translations.english: I'll need to lock up the store. Thank you so much for agreeing to help us.
translations.chinese: 我得打烊了。非常感谢你同意帮我们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DEA9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll need to lock up the store. Thank you so much for agreeing to help us. | ZH: 我得打烊了。非常感谢你同意帮我们。 | SID: 00C2F4

translations.english: Mara, I forgot how late it was. We'll need to lock up the shop.
translations.chinese: 玛拉啊，我都忘了这么晚了。我得打烊了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DEAA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Mara, I forgot how late it was. We'll need to lock up the shop. | ZH: 玛拉啊，我都忘了这么晚了。我得打烊了。 | SID: 005C52

translations.english: Many used to come to these caves. The forgotten. The wretched.
translations.chinese: 很多被遗忘者和可怜人曾聚集在这些洞穴里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DEAB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Many used to come to these caves. The forgotten. The wretched. | ZH: 很多被遗忘者和可怜人曾聚集在这些洞穴里。 | SID: 009703

translations.english: Some of the Guild members have tried to locate them over the years, but they haven't been successful... well, until now.
translations.chinese: 多年来很多公会成员一直试图找齐它们，但都失败了……嗯，直到目前。

translations.english: I think there were twenty-four in all. Most people keep them as a curiosity.
translations.chinese: 一共二十四个。大多数人拿着它们只是出于好奇。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DFB1]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Some of the Guild members have tried to locate them over the years, but they haven't been successful... well, until now. | ZH: 多年来很多公会成员一直试图找齐它们，但都失败了……嗯，直到目前。 | SID: 0062E8

translations.english: The stone was pried off of Barenziah's ceremonial crown by a thief in order to cover his tracks.
translations.chinese: 为了掩盖踪迹，有个小偷从巴兰兹亚的仪式王冠上把宝石撬了下来。

translations.english: Not like that it isn't.
translations.chinese: 不是钱的问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DFB2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: The stone was pried off of Barenziah's ceremonial crown by a thief in order to cover his tracks. | ZH: 为了掩盖踪迹，有个小偷从巴兰兹亚的仪式王冠上把宝石撬了下来。 | SID: 004044
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Not like that it isn't. | ZH: 不是钱的问题。 | SID: 0096E4

translations.english: When I told you the set had to be complete, I left out a small detail... I honestly didn't think you'd ever get this far.
translations.chinese: 我告诉你必须完整一套的时候，我漏掉了一个小细节……真没想到你能走到这一步。

translations.english: If the stones were remounted on the crown, it would be of great benefit to the Thieves Guild.
translations.chinese: 如果这些宝石被重新安置在王冠上，将会对公会大有裨益。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If the stones were remounted on the crown, it would be of great benefit to the Thieves Guild. | ZH: 如果这些宝石被重新安置在王冠上，将会对公会大有裨益。 | SID: 00672A

translations.english: Well, I'm not one to welch on a deal, so here's your reward. I hope you put it to good use. I know I have.
translations.chinese: 我可不会在交易上敷衍了事，这是你的报酬。好好利用吧。

translations.english: I knew you had it in you. After all, finding the Stones was no easy feat.
translations.chinese: 我就知道你有这个本事。毕竟，找齐这些宝石可不容易。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DFB4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Well, I'm not one to welch on a deal, so here's your reward. I hope you put it to good use. I know I have. | ZH: 我可不会在交易上敷衍了事，这是你的报酬。好好利用吧。 | SID: 0096FD
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I knew you had it in you. After all, finding the Stones was no easy feat. | ZH: 我就知道你有这个本事。毕竟，找齐这些宝石可不容易。 | SID: 00AEF5

translations.english: Tell you what, if you find the rest of them, talk to me again. Otherwise, keep it and maybe it'll bring you luck.
translations.chinese: 这样吧，如果你能找到剩下的宝石再来找我吧。否则就自己留着，也许能给你带来好运呢。

translations.english: Look, I only buy things I can turn around quickly for a profit. And no one wants those stones unless they have the whole set.
translations.chinese: 听着，我只会买那些能够快速周转变现的东西。没人想要单独收这些石头，除非是一整套。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DFB5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Tell you what, if you find the rest of them, talk to me again. Otherwise, keep it and maybe it'll bring you luck. | ZH: 这样吧，如果你能找到剩下的宝石再来找我吧。否则就自己留着，也许能给你带来好运呢。 | SID: 009387

translations.english: Unbelievable! You must be the first person to set eyes on all twenty-four of them in... well, the last two eras.
translations.chinese: 难以置信！你一定是第一个集齐二十四块的……呃，过去两个纪元内。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DFB6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Unbelievable! You must be the first person to set eyes on all twenty-four of them in... well, the last two eras. | ZH: 难以置信！你一定是第一个集齐二十四块的……呃，过去两个纪元内。 | SID: 007406

translations.english: Been a while since I've seen one of those. What you've got there is a Stone of Barenziah.
translations.chinese: 很久没见过这种东西了。你手上的是巴兰兹亚宝石。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DFB9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Been a while since I've seen one of those. What you've got there is a Stone of Barenziah. | ZH: 很久没见过这种东西了。你手上的是巴兰兹亚宝石。 | SID: 00282D

translations.english: If you can bring it back, we could restore the paragon... and reap its benefits.
translations.chinese: 如果能够带回来，我们就能恢复典范……还能从中获益。

translations.english: I have it on good authority that the crown is within Tolvald's Cave; dropped by a Dunmer caravan leaving Morrowind long ago.
translations.chinese: 据可靠消息，王冠藏在托沃德洞穴里，从很久以前离开晨风的丹莫马车上掉下来的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009DFBA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If you can bring it back, we could restore the paragon... and reap its benefits. | ZH: 如果能够带回来，我们就能恢复典范……还能从中获益。 | SID: 0096FA
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I have it on good authority that the crown is within Tolvald's Cave; dropped by a Dunmer caravan leaving Morrowind long ago. | ZH: 据可靠消息，王冠藏在托沃德洞穴里，从很久以前离开晨风的丹莫马车上掉下来的。 | SID: 0096FB

translations.english: As to Potema herself, find what's left of her body, likely a skeleton. Remove it from the Catacombs and bring it back to be sanctified by Arkay.
translations.chinese: 至于波特玛本人，找到她的残骸，也可能是骷髅。把它从墓穴拿出来，让阿尔凯把它净化。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009E006]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: As to Potema herself, find what's left of her body, likely a skeleton. Remove it from the Catacombs and bring it back to be sanctified by Arkay. | ZH: 至于波特玛本人，找到她的残骸，也可能是骷髅。把它从墓穴拿出来，让阿尔凯把它净化。 | SID: 004187

translations.english: Summoned in spirit form is not raised from the dead. She'll need help before she can return to the living.
translations.chinese: 精魂形态的召唤不能让人起死回生。她需要帮助才能复活。

translations.english: A few days ago, one of her servants busted through a wall into the Temple of Divines. We'll need you to go into the Catacombs themselves.
translations.chinese: 几天前，她的一个仆人撞破了圣灵神殿的墙。我们需要你亲自到墓穴去。

translations.english: For the moment, the Wolf Queen has retreated to a place filled with dead eager to serve her. She has gone to her old Catacombs.
translations.chinese: 眼下，狼后已经撤退到自己的地下陵墓，那里满是渴望为她效劳的亡灵。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009E007]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Summoned in spirit form is not raised from the dead. She'll need help before she can return to the living. | ZH: 精魂形态的召唤不能让人起死回生。她需要帮助才能复活。 | SID: 008654
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: A few days ago, one of her servants busted through a wall into the Temple of Divines. We'll need you to go into the Catacombs themselves. | ZH: 几天前，她的一个仆人撞破了圣灵神殿的墙。我们需要你亲自到墓穴去。 | SID: 0096C1
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: For the moment, the Wolf Queen has retreated to a place filled with dead eager to serve her. She has gone to her old Catacombs. | ZH: 眼下，狼后已经撤退到自己的地下陵墓，那里满是渴望为她效劳的亡灵。 | SID: 0096C2

translations.english: Excellent! These things do have a way of working out when people take action. I'll sanctify the remains.
translations.chinese: 太好了！只要付诸行动，总会有办法解决的。我来净化她的遗骸。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009E008]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Excellent! These things do have a way of working out when people take action. I'll sanctify the remains. | ZH: 太好了！只要付诸行动，总会有办法解决的。我来净化她的遗骸。 | SID: 00E7F3

translations.english: Good. Being at the summoning created a connection to Potema, you are the one to do this.
translations.chinese: 好。在召唤的时候，你和波特玛建立了联系，这件事非你莫属。

translations.english: I can provide you with some help with her minions.
translations.chinese: 我可以帮你对付她的手下。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: But I doubt many will wish to exchange Alduin's lordship for the tyranny of Paarthurnax's "Way of the Voice".
translations.chinese: 但我怀疑有多少同类愿意用奥杜因的统治换来帕图纳克斯“吼声之道”的暴政。

translations.english: Pruzah wundunne wah Wuth Gein. I wish the old one luck in his... quest.
translations.chinese: 如扎 温登聂 瓦 乌斯 盖恩。希望那个老家伙能达成他的……追求吧。

translations.chinese: 如果奥杜因都无法对抗你的吐'目，我也就不对自己的失败感到羞耻了。

translations.english: But willing or no, they will hear it! Fare thee well, Dovahkiin!
translations.chinese: 但无论愿意与否，他们都会听到的！保重，都瓦克因！

translations.english: Many of the dovahhe are now scattered across Keizaal. Without Alduin's lordship, they may yet bow to the vahzen... rightness of my Thu'um.
translations.chinese: 还有很多都瓦分散在凯扎尔各处。失去了奥杜因的统治，他们或许会服从于我吐'目的瓦扎恩……正确性。

translations.english: Goraan! I feel younger than I have in many an age.
translations.chinese: 果兰！感觉自己年轻多了！

translations.english: It took me weeks to find that thieves' den. I can't stop now, and I can't get the sword on my own.
translations.chinese: 我花了好几周才找到那个贼窝。我现在不能收手，我也不是自己去拿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009E0AE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It took me weeks to find that thieves' den. I can't stop now, and I can't get the sword on my own. | ZH: 我花了好几周才找到那个贼窝。我现在不能收手，我也不是自己去拿。 | SID: 00965F

translations.english: So you're willing to starve your wife and daughter to reclaim some rusty old sword?
translations.chinese: 所以你宁愿让自己的妻女挨饿就为了拿回一把生锈的破剑？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009E0AF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So you're willing to starve your wife and daughter to reclaim some rusty old sword? | ZH: 所以你宁愿让自己的妻女挨饿就为了拿回一把生锈的破剑？ | SID: 005457

translations.english: I know your family's honor is important to you, but we can't afford it!
translations.chinese: 我知道你们家族的荣誉对你来说很重要，但我们负担不起！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009E0B1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I know your family's honor is important to you, but we can't afford it! | ZH: 我知道你们家族的荣誉对你来说很重要，但我们负担不起！ | SID: 0019EE

translations.english: I just need to hire one, maybe two good men. You won't starve.
translations.chinese: 我只需要雇一两个好手就行。你不会挨饿的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009E0B2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I just need to hire one, maybe two good men. You won't starve. | ZH: 我只需要雇一两个好手就行。你不会挨饿的。 | SID: 007962

translations.english: I'll put it plainly. You can claim your sword, or you can keep your wife. If you set foot outside the gate, I won't be here when you return.
translations.chinese: 我直说吧。要么去拿你的剑，要么要你的老婆孩子。如果你敢出城门，你回来就见不到我了。

translations.chinese: 等等……我……

translations.chinese: 萨菲尔！

translations.english: Careful if you cross the river to the east. Old Hajvarr Iron-Hand and his brigands are holed up in that cave, White River Watch.
translations.chinese: 如果你想往东过河，一定要小心。“铁手”哈瓦尔那帮匪徒就躲在白河监视哨的洞里。

translations.english: Thank you for your trust. I am eager to return to my homeland.
translations.chinese: 感谢你的信任。我正期盼回归故乡呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0009E1AB]

translations.english: I can send you into Azura's Star as soon as you're ready.
translations.chinese: 等你准备好，我就送你去阿祖拉之星。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 路上我再给你解释。

translations.chinese: 哎，伐莫在周围鬼鬼祟祟地，我一个人根本搞不定。我想你得和我一起去。

translations.chinese: 我们找上你们的时候，萨沃斯连个面都不露，现在你却来找我问东问西？

translations.english: You are, are you?

translations.english: Come on, I'll explain on the way.

translations.english: Secret, though. Official Synod business. Can't talk about it.

translations.english: I'm relieved you discovered a bottle intact; this place looks as though it was ransacked by the orcs.
translations.chinese: 能找到完好无损的一瓶太好了。这里好像被兽人彻底洗劫过。

translations.english: I understand your hesitation, but I promise you that it works.

translations.english: Indeed. My reverence for Vaermina's machinations should not take precedence over our mission. My apologies.
translations.chinese: 确实。我对瓦尔迷纳阴谋的敬畏不该阻碍任务。抱歉。

translations.english: The inner sanctum lies ahead. We must reach the Skull and put an end to Dawnstar's troubles. Lead on, my friend.
translations.chinese: 密室就在前面。我们必须摧毁头骨，终结晨星的麻烦。走吧，朋友。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well... I suppose important research is worth every coin. All right. You have yourself a deal. How's double and a half its value in trade? | ZH: 嗯……为了重要的研究还是值得的。好吧。就这么定了。再给你按市价加五成怎么样？ | SID: 00FBA1

translations.english: Come now, where's your sense of propriety? Extorting an old man like this.
translations.chinese: 得了吧，你还有点分寸没有？就这么敲诈老年人吗。

translations.english: With this the world could have a better understanding of the Dwemer!
translations.chinese: 有了这个，世界就能更好地了解锻莫！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A0E9D]

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: With this the world could have a better understanding of the Dwemer! | ZH: 有了这个，世界就能更好地了解锻莫！ | SID: 00868D

translations.english: A note from someone named Calcelmo, in Markarth.
translations.chinese: 是马卡斯一个叫卡塞莫的寄来的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A0E9E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A note from someone named Calcelmo, in Markarth. | ZH: 是马卡斯一个叫卡塞莫的寄来的。 | SID: 002AB4

translations.english: Wonderful. You've just made an important contribution to the advancement of a Dwemer scholarship.
translations.chinese: 太棒了。你刚刚为锻莫学术的发展做出了重要贡献。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A0F3C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wonderful. You've just made an important contribution to the advancement of a Dwemer scholarship. | ZH: 太棒了。你刚刚为锻莫学术的发展做出了重要贡献。 | SID: 009544

translations.english: I've got what I came for, I better get back to Dragon Bridge.
translations.chinese: 我已经得到想要的答复了，我得赶回龙桥去了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A1794]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I've got what I came for, I better get back to Dragon Bridge. | ZH: 我已经得到想要的答复了，我得赶回龙桥去了。 | SID: 002F1B

translations.english: All lovely young ladies, too. Let's hope the guards find that demon soon, and introduce him to the headsman's axe.
translations.chinese: 都是那些年轻可爱的姑娘。希望卫兵们赶紧找到那个恶魔，然后押到刽子手那儿正法。

translations.english: He's claimed three victims that I know of, though maybe there's more that haven't been found yet.
translations.chinese: 据我所知，他已经杀了三个人了，不过也许还有更多没被发现的。

translations.english: Terrible shame, that. Seems we have a killer on the loose here in Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 确实很丢脸。风舵城可能有个可怕的杀手在逃。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A17CB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: All lovely young ladies, too. Let's hope the guards find that demon soon, and introduce him to the headsman's axe. | ZH: 都是那些年轻可爱的姑娘。希望卫兵们赶紧找到那个恶魔，然后押到刽子手那儿正法。 | SID: 005E0D

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Terrible shame, that. Seems we have a killer on the loose here in Windhelm. | ZH: 确实很丢脸。风舵城可能有个可怕的杀手在逃。 | SID: 009506

translations.english: If anything actually happens, call a guard.
translations.chinese: 如果真的发生了什么，就喊卫兵。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A17E1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If anything actually happens, call a guard. | ZH: 如果真的发生了什么，就喊卫兵。 | SID: 0094FB

translations.english: My men have their orders. But it's a big city, and there's a war on. Plus these murders.
translations.chinese: 我的人会听命令的。但这城市太大，而且又在打仗。再加上这些谋杀案。

translations.english: A few dark elves getting shoved around doesn't really amount to much.
translations.chinese: 几个暗精灵被推来推去没什么大不了的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A17E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: My men have their orders. But it's a big city, and there's a war on. Plus these murders. | ZH: 我的人会听命令的。但这城市太大，而且又在打仗。再加上这些谋杀案。 | SID: 002A88
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: A few dark elves getting shoved around doesn't really amount to much. | ZH: 几个暗精灵被推来推去没什么大不了的。 | SID: 0094FE

translations.english: Good luck getting one of the guards to help with anything.
translations.chinese: 也不能指望卫兵们帮上什么忙。

translations.english: Well you see where we have to live. This forgotten alley. All the filth from the upper quarters flows downhill, like they say.
translations.chinese: 看看我们住在什么地方。被遗忘的小巷，就像他们说的，所有上层的污物都会流向这里。

translations.english: I tried to get Ulfric to even come down here to see the squalor, but the High Lord of His Mightiness couldn't find the time.
translations.chinese: 我甚至想让乌弗瑞克来亲自看看这肮脏的地方，但这位尊贵的大人可能没时间。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A17E3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Good luck getting one of the guards to help with anything. | ZH: 也不能指望卫兵们帮上什么忙。 | SID: 0058A8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well you see where we have to live. This forgotten alley. All the filth from the upper quarters flows downhill, like they say. | ZH: 看看我们住在什么地方。被遗忘的小巷，就像他们说的，所有上层的污物都会流向这里。 | SID: 007D4B
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I tried to get Ulfric to even come down here to see the squalor, but the High Lord of His Mightiness couldn't find the time. | ZH: 我甚至想让乌弗瑞克来亲自看看这肮脏的地方，但这位尊贵的大人可能没时间。 | SID: 00F36B

translations.english: If you're looking to pass the time, you can give Calixto a few septims and gawk at whater oddity he's come across lately.
translations.chinese: 如果想打发时间，可以给卡利斯托几个塞普汀，看看他最近搜集了什么怪东西。

translations.english: If you're need of goods, there's a market. If it's a soft bed and a hot meal you're after, there's Candlehearth Hall.
translations.chinese: 想要买些东西，可以去市场看看。如果想要张柔软的床或是热腾腾的饭菜，那就去烛炉堂吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: If you're looking to pass the time, you can give Calixto a few septims and gawk at whater oddity he's come across lately. | ZH: 如果想打发时间，可以给卡利斯托几个塞普汀，看看他最近搜集了什么怪东西。 | SID: 007A87

translations.english: None of that matters to me. Until someone takes a Dunmer, I let Windhelm deal with its own problems.
translations.chinese: 对我来说不重要。除非有丹莫遇害了，我觉得还是让风舵自己处理问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A17E5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: None of that matters to me. Until someone takes a Dunmer, I let Windhelm deal with its own problems. | ZH: 对我来说不重要。除非有丹莫遇害了，我觉得还是让风舵自己处理问题。 | SID: 0014B4

translations.english: If we had known the Nords would be so unwelcoming, we may have kept walking.
translations.chinese: 如果我们早点知道诺德人这么不好客，我们可能还会继续走下去。

translations.english: Where else would we be?
translations.chinese: 那我们还能去哪儿？

translations.english: Windhelm is the first city on that road, and here we are.
translations.chinese: 风舵是这条路上的第一座城市，我们就在这里了。

translations.english: When the Red Mountain burned, you could scarcely breathe in Morrowind. So we came west.
translations.chinese: 红山爆发的时候，晨风几乎没法呼吸。所以我们向西走了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A17E6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: If we had known the Nords would be so unwelcoming, we may have kept walking. | ZH: 如果我们早点知道诺德人这么不好客，我们可能还会继续走下去。 | SID: 0063D1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Where else would we be? | ZH: 那我们还能去哪儿？ | SID: 0091DB
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Windhelm is the first city on that road, and here we are. | ZH: 风舵是这条路上的第一座城市，我们就在这里了。 | SID: 00952F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: When the Red Mountain burned, you could scarcely breathe in Morrowind. So we came west. | ZH: 红山爆发的时候，晨风几乎没法呼吸。所以我们向西走了。 | SID: 009530

translations.english: Skyrim doesn't take kindly to being told what to do. And to try and forget Talos, well... they may as well ordered us all to cut off our ears.
translations.chinese: 天际不喜欢别人耳提面命该如何做。想要我们忘掉塔洛斯，哼……和命令我们割掉耳朵有什么区别。

translations.english: The Empire's elven puppetmasters never cared much for the idea of a human becoming a divine. So the worship of Talos is outlawed.
translations.chinese: 操纵帝国傀儡的精灵们从来不相信人族能变成神的说法。所以塔洛斯信仰是非法的。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Skyrim doesn't take kindly to being told what to do. And to try and forget Talos, well... they may as well ordered us all to cut off our ears. | ZH: 天际不喜欢别人耳提面命该如何做。想要我们忘掉塔洛斯，哼……和命令我们割掉耳朵有什么区别。 | SID: 00951C

translations.english: Watch that tongue, Rendar, or your whole lot could be down with the Argonians hauling ballast by tomorrow.
translations.chinese: 注意自己的话，仁达尔，否则你明天就得被阿尔贡拖着重物扔水里了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A17E9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Watch that tongue, Rendar, or your whole lot could be down with the Argonians hauling ballast by tomorrow. | ZH: 注意自己的话，仁达尔，否则你明天就得被阿尔贡拖着重物扔水里了。 | SID: 0094FF

translations.english: Typical Nord. Beard for brains.
translations.chinese: 典型的诺德人。一脑袋胡子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A17EA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Typical Nord. Beard for brains. | ZH: 典型的诺德人。一脑袋胡子。 | SID: 00861C

translations.english: He was rewarded for his deeds by being joined with the Divines in eternal glory. The only mortal to do so.
translations.chinese: 他因为其行受到奖赏，在永恒的荣耀中加入圣灵的行列。这是唯一达成如此成就的凡人。

translations.english: We worship him that we might follow in his path. We can't literally join him in the heavens, but we may do our best to know them here on Nirn.
translations.chinese: 我们崇拜他，希望追随他的道路。我们无法在天堂加入他，但我们可以在奈恩尽力去了解他们。

translations.english: Talos, who in life was known as Tiber Septim, united Tamriel and founded the Empire.
translations.chinese: 塔洛斯生前被叫做“泰伯·塞普汀”，他统一了泰姆瑞尔并建立了帝国。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A18C5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He was rewarded for his deeds by being joined with the Divines in eternal glory. The only mortal to do so. | ZH: 他因为其行受到奖赏，在永恒的荣耀中加入圣灵的行列。这是唯一达成如此成就的凡人。 | SID: 007660
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: We worship him that we might follow in his path. We can't literally join him in the heavens, but we may do our best to know them here on Nirn. | ZH: 我们崇拜他，希望追随他的道路。我们无法在天堂加入他，但我们可以在奈恩尽力去了解他们。 | SID: 009511
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Talos, who in life was known as Tiber Septim, united Tamriel and founded the Empire. | ZH: 塔洛斯生前被叫做“泰伯·塞普汀”，他统一了泰姆瑞尔并建立了帝国。 | SID: 00BD3D

translations.english: Like anyone, a crisis will push them towards devotion. I've been seeing a lot of the Shatter-Shields, since they lost their daughter.
translations.chinese: 危机总会把人民推向虔诚，任何人都是如此。自称碎盾家失去女儿后，我就经常看到他们。

translations.english: Ulfric prays for strength. I speak to Captain Lonely-Gale, but he doesn't spend much time here. Too busy.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克会为力量而祈祷。我和孤风船长谈过，但他不常来这里。可能太忙了。

translations.english: Hillevi Cruel-Sea comes in a lot, but I haven't seen her husband here in years.
translations.chinese: 希勒维·酷海倒是经常来，但我很多年没看见过她丈夫了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A1929]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Like anyone, a crisis will push them towards devotion. I've been seeing a lot of the Shatter-Shields, since they lost their daughter. | ZH: 危机总会把人民推向虔诚，任何人都是如此。自称碎盾家失去女儿后，我就经常看到他们。 | SID: 005A0D
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Ulfric prays for strength. I speak to Captain Lonely-Gale, but he doesn't spend much time here. Too busy. | ZH: 乌弗瑞克会为力量而祈祷。我和孤风船长谈过，但他不常来这里。可能太忙了。 | SID: 009521
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Hillevi Cruel-Sea comes in a lot, but I haven't seen her husband here in years. | ZH: 希勒维·酷海倒是经常来，但我很多年没看见过她丈夫了。 | SID: 00952C

translations.english: Oh, and that busybody Viola Giordano. She's got her nose in everyone's business, which I guess is one way of being prominent.
translations.chinese: 还有那个爱管闲事的维欧拉·乔尔丹诺。她对每个人的事都很关心，我想这应该是她彰显自己的一种方式吧。

translations.english: The clans Shatter-Shield and Cruel-Sea see most of the gold that passes through the city.
translations.chinese: 碎盾氏族和酷海氏族掌握着大部分流过城市的黄金。

translations.english: There's an author named Adonato staying at the inn. He's published a few works of historical fiction.
translations.chinese: 有个叫阿多纳托的作家住在旅馆里。他出版过好几本历史小说。

translations.english: And obviously you have Ulfric, the Jarl and future High King.
translations.chinese: 当然，你肯定知道乌弗瑞克，我们的领主和未来的至高王。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A193B]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: And obviously you have Ulfric, the Jarl and future High King. | ZH: 当然，你肯定知道乌弗瑞克，我们的领主和未来的至高王。 | SID: 0098F2

translations.english: If the guards in the Gray Quarter weren't a bunch of n'wahs, I wouldn't be here talking to you.
translations.chinese: 要不是灰民区的卫兵不是一群恩'瓦，我也不会在这儿跟你说了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A1959]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If the guards in the Gray Quarter weren't a bunch of n'wahs, I wouldn't be here talking to you. | ZH: 要不是灰民区的卫兵不是一群恩'瓦，我也不会在这儿跟你说了。 | SID: 0094FD

translations.english: Well, nothing. At least not any more. Folk just call me that because of what I used to do.
translations.chinese: 嗯，不是什么船长。至少现在不是了。大伙儿这么叫我是因为我以前的工作。

translations.english: When I retired here in Windhelm, most folk already knew me as Captain Lonely-Gale, and the name just stuck.
translations.chinese: 我退休回到风舵城，大家就叫我“孤风船长”，这个名字就这么传开了。

translations.english: I was a sailor for many a year. I made my coin as a trader and in time, I bought my own ship.
translations.chinese: 我当过很多年的水手。我做商人赚了钱，后来自己买了船。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A195A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well, nothing. At least not any more. Folk just call me that because of what I used to do. | ZH: 嗯，不是什么船长。至少现在不是了。大伙儿这么叫我是因为我以前的工作。 | SID: 000229
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: When I retired here in Windhelm, most folk already knew me as Captain Lonely-Gale, and the name just stuck. | ZH: 我退休回到风舵城，大家就叫我“孤风船长”，这个名字就这么传开了。 | SID: 009500

translations.english: We need to find out what Ancano's up to.
translations.chinese: 我们得弄清楚安卡诺在干什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A1A5D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We need to find out what Ancano's up to. | ZH: 我们得弄清楚安卡诺在干什么。 | SID: 0102EF

translations.english: That should do. Now - Inhale deeply.
translations.chinese: 好了，现在，深呼吸。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A1A65]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That should do. Now - Inhale deeply. | ZH: 好了，现在，深呼吸。 | SID: 0094F8

translations.english: Yes, yes. This will create a fine fume.
translations.chinese: 很好，很好。能产生一股不错的烟气。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A1A71]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, yes. This will create a fine fume. | ZH: 很好，很好。能产生一股不错的烟气。 | SID: 0094F7

translations.english: Ah, have you? Let Kesh have them.
translations.chinese: 啊，是吗？给凯石吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A1A93]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, have you? Let Kesh have them. | ZH: 啊，是吗？给凯石吧。 | SID: 0094F9

translations.english: First, we're mounting an attack on the Fort. We aim to confiscate it from the rebels.
translations.chinese: 首先，我们要从叛军手里夺取堡垒。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A1F82]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: First, we're mounting an attack on the Fort. We aim to confiscate it from the rebels. | ZH: 首先，我们要从叛军手里夺取堡垒。 | SID: 0004D7

translations.english: First, we're attacking the fort. I want that fort.
translations.chinese: 首先，我有个很想夺过来的堡垒。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A1F83]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: First, we're attacking the fort. I want that fort. | ZH: 首先，我有个很想夺过来的堡垒。 | SID: 00F0DF

translations.english: Secondly, we're mounting an attack on the Fort. I want to gain a fortified position here before we launch our final attack on the capital.
translations.chinese: 其次，我们要进攻堡垒。在向敌军首府发动总攻前需要有个坚固阵地。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A1FA0]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 有什么事吗，武卫阁下？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A2C70]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What do you need, my Thane? | ZH: 有什么事吗，武卫阁下？ | SID: 003DC9

translations.english: Honored to see you again, my Thane.
translations.chinese: 很荣幸再次见到您，武卫大人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A2C71]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Honored to see you again, my Thane. | ZH: 很荣幸再次见到您，武卫大人。 | SID: 00674C

translations.english: No one in the Jarl's court is above the charge of conspiring against the city. You're coming with us.
translations.chinese: 在领主的宫廷没人能逃脱阴谋反抗城市的指控。你跟我们走。

translations.english: Then by my right as Jarl, I name you Thane of Eastmarch. Congratulations.
translations.chinese: 那么我以领主之名，任命你为东陲武卫。恭喜。

translations.english: I'll also notify my guards of your new title.
translations.chinese: 我也会通知卫兵们你获得了新的头衔。

translations.english: I grant you a personal Housecarl to watch over your home and this weapon from my armory to serve as your badge of office.
translations.chinese: 我会授予你一名私人侍卫照看你家，并从我的军械库中取出这把武器作为你的贵族身份象征。

translations.english: Hmph. When most would speak, you listen. You think. You understand that the only thing that matters is you following my orders. To kill.
translations.chinese: 嗯。当大多数人说话的时候，你选择了倾听。还有思考。你知道唯一重要的是，你要服从我的命令。去杀人。

translations.chinese: 很好，很好。超额完成。三个可能，三名死者。反正就是其中之一，对吧？干什么要做选择呢……

translations.chinese: 那就不劳你费心了。我会找个更仁慈的人。

translations.chinese: 这样你就能去悬旗母马喝酒了？如果需要食物，那就去要。

translations.chinese: 不敢相信。你已经拿到了？

translations.chinese: 要不你再回鹰维尔德找找剩下的？

translations.english: It's a good start, but you need all four of the volumes or the set isn't complete.
translations.chinese: 这是个好的开始，但你得凑齐四卷才行。否则不完整啊。

translations.chinese: 那就这么定了。

translations.english: In his later years, Andoril moved into some ice caves known as Yngvild. He prefered the solitude in which to perform his, um... experiments.
translations.chinese: 阿荣迪尔晚年搬进了有个叫鹰维尔德的冰洞。他喜欢独来独往完成他的……实验。

translations.chinese: 我听说是些疯子的胡言乱语……一个叫阿荣迪尔的巫师和他奇怪的欲望。

translations.english: It's said to be spread across four volumes and very hard to come by. My client is offering quite a reward for them, which I'd split with you.
translations.chinese: 据说这本书有四卷，很难找到。我的客户下了一笔可观的赏金，我愿意和你平分。

translations.english: As promised, here's your payment for bringing them to me. Got it as part of a fair trade from my client.
translations.chinese: 我答应过你，这是你把它们带来的报酬。是我客户交易的一部分。

translations.chinese: 我有个买家，怎么说呢，他对文学品位很奇怪，想要找一些特别的书。

translations.chinese: 卫兵从她那里得到的唯一信息就是奇怪的实验故事和阿荣迪尔在日记上的涂鸦。

translations.english: Recently, a woman was found... naked and shivering along the road to Dawnstar.
translations.chinese: 最近，有个女人……光着身子瑟瑟发抖地走在通向晨星的路上。

translations.english: After he made for Yngvild, he was never heard from again.
translations.chinese: 在他前往鹰维尔德之后，就再没有消息了。

translations.english: Only rumors. He used to have a home in Dawnstar until they burned it down.

translations.english: Then by my right as Jarl, I name you Thane of Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 那么我现在以领主之名，任命你为冬堡武卫。

translations.english: I'll also notify the guards of your new title. Wouldn't want them to think you're part of the common rabble, now.
translations.chinese: 我也会告知卫兵你获得了新的头衔。我可不想让他们拿你当成平民百姓。

translations.english: I grant you this weapon from the armory to serve as your badge of office.
translations.chinese: 我将我军械库中的这把武器作为你的勋章。

translations.english: I hereby grant you permission to purchase property in my city. Talk to my steward if you're interested.

translations.english: They took his shield to those Hagraven beasts they consort with. I need you to bring it home where it belongs.
translations.chinese: 他们把我父亲的盾牌带到乌鸦鬼婆那里去了。我要你把它夺回来，物归原主。

translations.english: I do. A personal matter. My father died trying to negotiate with the Forsworn, back when that was possible.
translations.chinese: 确实有。是私事。我父亲在尝试和弃誓者谈判的时候被杀害了，那阵还是有可能谈判的。

translations.english: I warn you, it's dangerous work. No man of mine has ever faced a Hagraven and lived. I'll understand if you decline.
translations.chinese: 我得警告你，这是个危险的工作。我手下没人能面对乌鸦鬼婆然后幸存回来。如果你想拒绝，我也能理解。

translations.chinese: 克拉科是先驱，作为整个团队的顾问，但这里无论男女，都是独立自主的。

translations.chinese: 直到有勇敢的英雄们站出来消灭这些怪物，我们能做的也就这些了。

translations.english: But our greatest weapon? Courage. For if we cannot kill the beast, we must at least have the tenacity to drive it back.
translations.chinese: 但我们最大的武器是什么？勇气。就算我们不能杀死这些畜生，至少也有毅力把它赶出去。

translations.english: We must have ample reserves of water to combat the fires that will surely spread after an attack.
translations.chinese: 我们必须储备足够的水来扑灭龙袭后蔓延的大火。

translations.english: With good planning and constant vigilance.
translations.chinese: 紧密筹划，保持警惕。

translations.chinese: 去悬旗母马吧。找老胡尔达，她会让你在蜜酒的海洋里荡漾的。

translations.chinese: 不管怎么说，我们店里的货都很结实，而且价格公道。还有什么问题吗？

translations.english: Tried making some myself, but I'm no good with the forge and anvil.
translations.chinese: 我也试着自己打过，但我就是不擅长摆弄锻炉和铁砧。

translations.english: Since Adrianne's death, I've had to buy them from the Khajiit caravans.
translations.chinese: 自从阿德里安死后，我就不得不从卡吉特商队那里进货了。

translations.english: Not long ago it was my husband Eorlund. There was no finer smith in the nine holds.
translations.chinese: 不久之前还是我丈夫厄伦德。九大领地就没有比他更好的铁匠。

translations.english: Now he's dead and gone and the Skyforge of Jorrvaskr lies cold.
translations.chinese: 现在他死了，月瓦斯卡的天空锻炉也冷了。

translations.english: Curse you for bringing up that bitter memory.
translations.chinese: 你真该死，让我想起那段痛苦的回忆。

translations.chinese: 去找悬旗母马的新老板奥菲娜试试吧，那家店就在这条路上的市场附近。

translations.english: You should check in at Dragonsreach, too. There's so much going on these days, the Jarl or his Steward might have need of help.
translations.chinese: 你也可以去拜访一下龙临宫。这几天发生了很多事，领主和总管可能会需要帮助。

translations.english: But tomorrow. Definitely.

translations.english: Ah, splendid, splendid. It's for a special brew I'm working on. A love elixir like none other.
translations.chinese: 啊，太好了，太好了。这正是我现在需要的原料。无与伦比的爱之灵药。

translations.chinese: 你现在在跟一个悲伤的寡妇说话。有事吗？我很有趣？还是你正在盘算着其他的事情。

translations.chinese: 我兄弟乔恩以前做得对，加入吟游诗人学院，然后躲开这场毫无意义的战争。可惜还没来得及他就去世了。

translations.chinese: 将军频频失去优秀的士兵，就是因为他没有正视乌弗瑞克和他的士兵。

translations.english: If this continues, and the worst comes to pass, Solitude will pay the price. The Empire is headquartered here, after all.
translations.chinese: 如果这种情况再持续下去，一旦最坏情况发生，独孤城可能会付出代价。毕竟帝国的总部就设置在这里。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I must protest, my Jarl. | ZH: 我必须抗议，领主大人。 | SID: 00E4BD

translations.english: Speak your mind, Bryling. You're among friends here.
translations.chinese: 说出你的想法吧，白灵。在这里都是你的朋友。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A92D2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Speak your mind, Bryling. You're among friends here. | ZH: 说出你的想法吧，白灵。在这里都是你的朋友。 | SID: 006456

translations.english: A wise course of action, my Jarl. However, we have little food or water to spare.
translations.chinese: 明智之举，领主。然而我们几乎没有富裕的食物和水了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A92D3]
Translations:

translations.english: Oh, well done. Very subtle.
translations.chinese: 哦，很好。非常妙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A92D4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, well done. Very subtle. | ZH: 哦，很好。非常妙。 | SID: 00A758

translations.english: What a... fine idea, my Jarl. However, I would suggest we wait until the war has ended.
translations.chinese: 真是个……好主意，领主大人。然而我还是建议咱们等到战争结束。

translations.english: After all, the General needs his soldiers out in the field, fighting battles against the Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 毕竟，将军需要将士们在战场上和风暴斗篷作战。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: After all, the General needs his soldiers out in the field, fighting battles against the Stormcloaks. | ZH: 毕竟，将军需要将士们在战场上和风暴斗篷作战。 | SID: 008FE3

translations.english: There's something that's been troubling me, Falk. I am hesitant to share it, but I feel that I must.
translations.chinese: 佛可，有件事一直困扰着我。我不太愿意说，但觉得还是必须说出来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9301]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There's something that's been troubling me, Falk. I am hesitant to share it, but I feel that I must. | ZH: 佛可，有件事一直困扰着我。我不太愿意说，但觉得还是必须说出来。 | SID: 00A795

translations.english: I want to begin stockpiling food and water in the event we come under siege, and I would like you to oversee this work personally.
translations.chinese: 我打算储存食物和水，以防被围困，希望你能亲自监督这项工作。

translations.english: Steward Falk, I have a task for you.
translations.chinese: 佛可总管，我有个任务交给你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9305]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I want to begin stockpiling food and water in the event we come under siege, and I would like you to oversee this work personally. | ZH: 我打算储存食物和水，以防被围困，希望你能亲自监督这项工作。 | SID: 008FCE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Steward Falk, I have a task for you. | ZH: 佛可总管，我有个任务交给你。 | SID: 00F6C3

translations.english: It comforts me to know that, Bolgeir.
translations.chinese: 能知道这点让我很欣慰，波盖尔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9329]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It comforts me to know that, Bolgeir. | ZH: 能知道这点让我很欣慰，波盖尔。 | SID: 00A439

translations.english: Very well, let's meet this evening and make the arrangements.
translations.chinese: 很好，我们今晚见面做安排吧。

translations.english: Is it that time again already?
translations.chinese: 又到这时候了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9332]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Is it that time again already? | ZH: 又到这时候了吗？ | SID: 008FC7

translations.english: Make your way to our camp in the Rift. We have a few surprises for the Stormcloaks lined up.
translations.chinese: 去我们裂痕领的营地吧。我们为风暴斗篷准备了点惊喜。

translations.english: What are my new orders, sir?
translations.chinese: 长官，我的新命令是什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9364]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Make your way to our camp in the Rift. We have a few surprises for the Stormcloaks lined up. | ZH: 去我们裂痕领的营地吧。我们为风暴斗篷准备了点惊喜。 | SID: 00550B
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What are my new orders, sir? | ZH: 长官，我的新命令是什么？ | SID: 00C01C

translations.english: Get over to our camp in the Reach. They need every able body they can muster.
translations.chinese: 到我们在瑞驰领的营地去。他们需要集结有生力量。

translations.english: What's our next move against the Empire?
translations.chinese: 我们对抗帝国的下一步是什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9365]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Get over to our camp in the Reach. They need every able body they can muster. | ZH: 到我们在瑞驰领的营地去。他们需要集结有生力量。 | SID: 00903B
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What's our next move against the Empire? | ZH: 我们对抗帝国的下一步是什么？ | SID: 0054F0

translations.english: Steward, I have an idea that might help to bolster the morale of our people in this difficult time.
translations.chinese: 总管，我有个办法也许能在这个困难时期鼓舞士气。

translations.english: I think we shall have a grand parade, and let General Tullius march his troops from the Blue Palace to Castle Dour in all their finery.
translations.chinese: 我想我们应该举行一次盛大的阅兵，让图留斯将军把军队盛装打扮起来从蓝宫行军到阴郁堡。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9375]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Steward, I have an idea that might help to bolster the morale of our people in this difficult time. | ZH: 总管，我有个办法也许能在这个困难时期鼓舞士气。 | SID: 000707
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I think we shall have a grand parade, and let General Tullius march his troops from the Blue Palace to Castle Dour in all their finery. | ZH: 我想我们应该举行一次盛大的阅兵，让图留斯将军把军队盛装打扮起来从蓝宫行军到阴郁堡。 | SID: 008FDE

translations.english: In any case he won't be turnin' me into no Imperial soldier. I know my place, and it's at your side.
translations.chinese: 无论如何，他都别想把我变成帝国士兵。我明白我的值守就是在您身边。

translations.english: No disrespect toward the general, but sometimes I wonder if he's got your best interests at heart.
translations.chinese: 我无意冒犯将军，但有时我还是怀疑他是否真心为您着想。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9377]

translations.english: I will make the arrangements, my Jarl.
translations.chinese: 我会安排的，领主大人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9378]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I will make the arrangements, my Jarl. | ZH: 我会安排的，领主大人。 | SID: 00766C

translations.english: The Jarl would be wise to remember that it is her thanes - and my profits - that are paying for this war.
translations.chinese: 领主最好记得，是她的武卫们还有我的利益在为这场战争买单。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9379]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Jarl would be wise to remember that it is her thanes - and my profits - that are paying for this war. | ZH: 领主最好记得，是她的武卫们还有我的利益在为这场战争买单。 | SID: 00D819

translations.english: However, if we lose the war, the guardsmen of Solitude will make little difference in the end.
translations.chinese: 无论如何，如果我们输了这场战争，独孤城卫兵多寡也无济于事。

translations.english: I'm aware of that, Bolgeir, and I appreciate your dedication.
translations.chinese: 我明白，波盖尔。我很欣赏你的奉献精神。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm aware of that, Bolgeir, and I appreciate your dedication. | ZH: 我明白，波盖尔。我很欣赏你的奉献精神。 | SID: 009003

translations.english: We'll need to visit each home for an assessment.
translations.chinese: 我们要去每家做评估。

translations.english: It's nearly time to collect taxes on your properties here in the city, Bryling.
translations.chinese: 是时候对你在城里的财产征税了，白灵。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A937C]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's nearly time to collect taxes on your properties here in the city, Bryling. | ZH: 是时候对你在城里的财产征税了，白灵。 | SID: 008FC6

translations.english: There's no need for an apology, and you're right about the war.
translations.chinese: 没必要道歉，你关于战争的看法是正确的。

translations.english: Perhaps this is a matter best discussed with with the general in person.
translations.chinese: 也许我最好亲自和将军讨论这个问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A937D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: There's no need for an apology, and you're right about the war. | ZH: 没必要道歉，你关于战争的看法是正确的。 | SID: 005651
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Perhaps this is a matter best discussed with with the general in person. | ZH: 也许我最好亲自和将军讨论这个问题。 | SID: 008FD7

translations.english: Thankfully, Jarl Elisif cares far less about your lost profits than she does about winning the war!
translations.chinese: 所幸艾利西弗领主并不在乎你损失的利润。她更在乎战争的胜败！

translations.english: I've also heard troubling rumors about dealings between you and the crew of that pirate ship, the Red Wave.
translations.chinese: 我还听说你和赤红波浪号那艘海盗船船员之间交易的不安谣言。

translations.english: We know full well about your investment in shipping ventures, Erikur.
translations.chinese: 我们很了解你在船运上的投资，艾瑞库尔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A937E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Thankfully, Jarl Elisif cares far less about your lost profits than she does about winning the war! | ZH: 所幸艾利西弗领主并不在乎你损失的利润。她更在乎战争的胜败！ | SID: 008FB0
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I've also heard troubling rumors about dealings between you and the crew of that pirate ship, the Red Wave. | ZH: 我还听说你和赤红波浪号那艘海盗船船员之间交易的不安谣言。 | SID: 008FB3
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: We know full well about your investment in shipping ventures, Erikur. | ZH: 我们很了解你在船运上的投资，艾瑞库尔。 | SID: 00E5DC

translations.english: Men who, I might add, we're precious short on.
translations.chinese: 我必须得补充一句，我们现在急缺这样的人。

translations.english: Told you that, did he?
translations.chinese: 他告诉你的吗？

translations.english: I'm sworn to protect you, my Jarl, but I'm the last line of defense.
translations.chinese: 我发誓要保护你，领主大人，但我只是最后的防线。

translations.english: The first line is the walls around this city and the men who patrol them.
translations.chinese: 第一道防线是围绕这座城的城墙和墙上的巡逻卫兵。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9380]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Men who, I might add, we're precious short on. | ZH: 我必须得补充一句，我们现在急缺这样的人。 | SID: 0027E3
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Told you that, did he? | ZH: 他告诉你的吗？ | SID: 003A19
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: I'm sworn to protect you, my Jarl, but I'm the last line of defense. | ZH: 我发誓要保护你，领主大人，但我只是最后的防线。 | SID: 004466
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: The first line is the walls around this city and the men who patrol them. | ZH: 第一道防线是围绕这座城的城墙和墙上的巡逻卫兵。 | SID: 00F02A

translations.english: Have faith, Bryling. When this war is over and Ulfric is dead, you'll see that you were jumping at shadows, and nothing more.
translations.chinese: 要有信心，白灵。等战争结束，乌弗瑞克死掉，你就会发现你只是在阴影中跳来跳去，仅此而已。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9381]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have faith, Bryling. When this war is over and Ulfric is dead, you'll see that you were jumping at shadows, and nothing more. | ZH: 要有信心，白灵。等战争结束，乌弗瑞克死掉，你就会发现你只是在阴影中跳来跳去，仅此而已。 | SID: 00F785

translations.english: Then let's increase the taxes on the farms and merchants. We can't afford to lose the loyalty of the ship captains.
translations.chinese: 那我们还是增加农场和商人的税收吧。我们不能失去船长们的忠诚。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9382]

translations.english: Stop it, both of you. You're acting like children.
translations.chinese: 你俩都停吧。像个小孩子似的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9383]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Stop it, both of you. You're acting like children. | ZH: 你俩都停吧。像个小孩子似的。 | SID: 0071CB

translations.english: It is vital that we bring Ulfric to justice, but that cannot happen until his army of Stormcloaks is defeated utterly.
translations.chinese: 我们必须把乌弗瑞克绳之以法，但在他的风暴斗篷军备彻底击败前，是不可能的。

translations.english: Yes, I know. The general acted with my blessing.
translations.chinese: 我知道。将军的行动得到了我的同意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9384]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: It is vital that we bring Ulfric to justice, but that cannot happen until his army of Stormcloaks is defeated utterly. | ZH: 我们必须把乌弗瑞克绳之以法，但在他的风暴斗篷军备彻底击败前，是不可能的。 | SID: 0015D0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Yes, I know. The general acted with my blessing. | ZH: 我知道。将军的行动得到了我的同意。 | SID: 005F51

translations.english: Yes, of course, but Ulfric's message is a powerful one. More of our people flock to his cause every day.
translations.chinese: 是的，当然。但乌弗瑞克的宣言很有力。我们每天都有更多的民众支持他的事业。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, of course, but Ulfric's message is a powerful one. More of our people flock to his cause every day. | ZH: 是的，当然。但乌弗瑞克的宣言很有力。我们每天都有更多的民众支持他的事业。 | SID: 008FC0

translations.english: My apologies, Jarl Elisif. I was thinking only of the importance of the war effort.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，艾利西弗领主。我想的只是战争的重要性。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9386]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My apologies, Jarl Elisif. I was thinking only of the importance of the war effort. | ZH: 抱歉，艾利西弗领主。我想的只是战争的重要性。 | SID: 008FD5

translations.english: General Tullius needs more money for the war effort. We need the funds to arm and provision more troops.
translations.chinese: 图留斯将军需要更多资金投入战争。我们需要更多资金来武装更多士兵。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9387]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: General Tullius needs more money for the war effort. We need the funds to arm and provision more troops. | ZH: 图留斯将军需要更多资金投入战争。我们需要更多资金来武装更多士兵。 | SID: 000504

translations.english: I should very much like to see you try it, my dear steward.
translations.chinese: 我很想看你尝尝它，亲爱的总管。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9388]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I should very much like to see you try it, my dear steward. | ZH: 我很想看你尝尝它，亲爱的总管。 | SID: 006C90

translations.english: If General Tullius continues to conscript our men and send them off to battle, we'll have none left to protect the city.
translations.chinese: 如果图留斯将军继续征召我们的人去打仗，我们就没人能保卫城市了。

translations.english: We lost another five guardsmen, my Jarl.
translations.chinese: 我们又折损了五名卫兵，领主大人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A9389]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If General Tullius continues to conscript our men and send them off to battle, we'll have none left to protect the city. | ZH: 如果图留斯将军继续征召我们的人去打仗，我们就没人能保卫城市了。 | SID: 0070B0
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We lost another five guardsmen, my Jarl. | ZH: 我们又折损了五名卫兵，领主大人。 | SID: 008FF0

translations.english: General Tullius does not run this city, Thane Erikur. Or have you forgotten your oaths of fealty?
translations.chinese: 图留斯将军无权管理这座城市，艾瑞库尔武卫。还是说你忘了你的效忠誓言了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A938A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: General Tullius does not run this city, Thane Erikur. Or have you forgotten your oaths of fealty? | ZH: 图留斯将军无权管理这座城市，艾瑞库尔武卫。还是说你忘了你的效忠誓言了？ | SID: 008FD4

translations.english: I've heard the Empire plans to levy a tax on our trading ships. Falk, you've got to do something about this.
translations.chinese: 我听说帝国计划对我们的商船征税。佛可，你得做些什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A938B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I've heard the Empire plans to levy a tax on our trading ships. Falk, you've got to do something about this. | ZH: 我听说帝国计划对我们的商船征税。佛可，你得做些什么。 | SID: 00A956

translations.english: Hold your tongue, Wizard, or you're likely to lose it.
translations.chinese: 管好你的舌头吧，巫师。否则你就该失去它了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A938C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hold your tongue, Wizard, or you're likely to lose it. | ZH: 管好你的舌头吧，巫师。否则你就该失去它了。 | SID: 008FCD

translations.english: Yes, my Jarl.
translations.chinese: 遵命，领主。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000A938D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, my Jarl. | ZH: 遵命，领主。 | SID: 008FEF

translations.english: We don't have the luxury of hanging back to see who wins before choosing our friends, Bryling. You know this.
translations.chinese: 我们没时间在选择盟友前观望胜败，白灵，你应该明白。

translations.english: And besides, no Nord with a shred of honor would consider it. We're no cowards.
translations.chinese: 再说，每个拥有一丝荣誉感的诺德人都不会考虑这些。我们可不是懦夫。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: We left to help with the war and these filth bags swooped in and seized the place. My family is in there.
translations.chinese: 我们离开去参战，那群肮脏的家伙突然闯进来占了这里。我的家人还在里面。

translations.english: No. I don't have any idea. I was just shopping for a pendant for my sister back in the Imperial City.
translations.chinese: 不，我也不知道。我只是来给我在帝都的妹妹选个项链。

translations.chinese: 他……他打算在我面前，杀了玛格丽特。

translations.english: By the Divines, the Forsworn are here in the city!
translations.chinese: 圣灵啊，弃誓者居然在城里！

agentText:

EDID: [000AB6F1]

translations.english: Thank you. Here, I was going to bring this to my sister, but I think you should have it.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。给，我本想把它带给我的妹妹，我觉得应该送给你。

translations.english: By the gods, that man nearly killed me. You saved my life.
translations.chinese: 神啊，那个人差点杀了我。你救了我的命。

translations.english: Why would anyone want to kill her? It doesn't make any sense.
translations.chinese: 为什么会有人想杀她？没意义的啊。

translations.english: No. She's such a nice woman. Comes by every day looking for jewelry for her family in Cyrodiil. Is it because she's a noble?
translations.chinese: 不。她是个好人。每天都来为希罗帝尔的家人挑选珠宝。难道因为她是贵族？

translations.english: Do you know why he was after her?
translations.chinese: 你知道她为什么被盯上吗？

translations.chinese: 抱歉。我知道的也不多。我刚刚从希罗帝尔旅行到这里。

translations.english: I've heard of them. Something about the men who live in the hills and attack caravans.
translations.chinese: 我听说过。那些躲在山里袭击商队的人。

translations.english: Oh, this pendant would look lovely on my sister.
translations.chinese: 哦，这个项链戴在我妹妹身上肯定很漂亮。

translations.english: Everyone stay back. The Markarth city guard have this all under control. There are no Forsworn here.
translations.chinese: 所有人都退后。这里都在马卡斯卫兵的掌控下。这里没有什么弃誓者。

translations.english: Pfft. Ungrateful milk drinker.
translations.chinese: 呸，忘恩负义的懦夫。

translations.english: Watch your words next time.
translations.chinese: 下次说话注意点。

translations.chinese: 当然了。不然你以为我是什么，酒馆女仆吗？

translations.english: Ah, don't let my words cut you too deep. I've just been working the forge too hard. Trying to set this sword right.
translations.chinese: 啊，别在意我的话。我在锻炉上工作太辛苦了。我正试着复原一把剑。

translations.english: You're the castle blacksmith?
translations.chinese: 你是城堡的铁匠？

translations.english: I hope Arkay grants my wife some comfort. Thank you. Here. I always pay my debts.
translations.chinese: 希望阿尔凯能带给我妻子一些慰藉。谢谢你。来，我这人是有债必偿的。

translations.english: Here's an amulet of Arkay.

translations.chinese: 我晚点会把这个交给领主的。还有，我来给你展示些锻造技术。

translations.english: Look at that edge. Still sharp.
translations.chinese: 看看这剑锋。锋利如故啊。

translations.english: I found Queen Freydis's sword.
translations.chinese: 我找到了芙瑞迪丝女王的剑。

translations.english: There's a group of cutthroats out there right now that Ulfric doesn't lift a finger to bring to justice, as long as they don't threaten Nord land.
translations.chinese: 现在就有一群杀人犯逍遥法外，但只要他们不威胁诺德的地盘，乌弗瑞克也懒得动动手指把他们绳之以法。

translations.english: But a group of Dark Elf refugees gets ambushed? A group of Argonians, or a Khajiit caravan? No troops. No investigation. Nothing.
translations.chinese: 但如果是群暗精灵难民被袭击？一群阿尔贡，或者卡吉特车队？没有军队，没有调查。什么都没有。

translations.english: Whenever a group of marauders attack a Nord village, Ulfric is the first to sound the horn and send the men.
translations.chinese: 每当劫掠者袭击诺德人的村庄，乌弗瑞克总是第一个吹响号角并派人过去。

translations.english: Ulfric doesn't care about outsiders?
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克不在乎外来者？

translations.english: You deal with them, I'll make sure you get paid. Maybe this old soldier will throw in some lessons as well.
translations.chinese: 你去搞定他们，我来付你钱。也许我这个老兵还能给你上一课。

translations.english: That's a brave offer. I'd be happy to throw in my coin behind that.
translations.chinese: 真是个勇敢的提议。我很乐意出钱。

translations.english: What if I took care of these bandits?
translations.chinese: 如果我去对付这些强盗呢？

translations.english: If you find that sword, traveler, I'd be grateful.
translations.chinese: 旅行者，如果你找到了那把剑。我会很感激你的。

translations.english: Getting the real sword would be even better than making a copy, but no one wants to risk getting it from its resting place.
translations.chinese: 参考真的那把，我可以仿制得更好些，但没人愿意冒险把它拿回来。

translations.english: Jarl wants it to look like an ancient blade. High Queen Freydis ruled over Windhelm in the Second Era, and her sword was legendary.
translations.chinese: 领主希望它能看起来像一把古代的剑。第二纪元时，至高女王芙瑞迪丝统治着风舵城，她的剑十分传奇。

translations.english: What's special about this sword?
translations.chinese: 这把剑有什么特别之处吗？

EDID: [000AB83F]

translations.chinese: 希望你不要打扰我妻子托娃。她还在服丧。

translations.english: That's too bad.
translations.chinese: 那太糟糕了。

translations.english: Now that's good work. Everyone will be a lot safer with them gone, Dark Elf and Nord alike.
translations.chinese: 干得很好。没了他们，大家就安全多了，对暗精灵和诺德都一样。

translations.english: Here, some gold as promised, and let me show you a bit about wearing heavy armor. Save you some aches on a long march.
translations.chinese: 给。这是我承诺过的金币，让我来展示一下该怎么穿重甲吧。省得你在长途跋涉之后感觉浑身酸痛。

translations.english: Our little girl died recently. I've been shouldering my days with strong mead, but nothing gives my Tova peace.
translations.chinese: 我们的小女儿最近去世了。我每天都借酒浇愁，但没有什么东西能为我家托娃带去安慰。

translations.english: I've been looking for an Amulet of Arkay to remind my wife that our child is with the gods now, but I can't find one.
translations.chinese: 我一直想找一件阿尔凯的护身符来提醒我妻子，我们的孩子已经与众神同在了，但我还没找到。

translations.english: Your wife is in mourning?
translations.chinese: 你妻子在服丧？

EDID: [000ABC8C]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: So you like to hurt people, huh? The town is still talking about what you did. | ZH: 所以你很喜欢伤害别人，是吗？镇上的人还在谈论你的所作所为。 | SID: 00FD1F

translations.english: Got someone I want you to hurt. Don't worry, I can pay.
translations.chinese: 我想让你去打个人。别担心，我付得起。

translations.english: Yeah. You beat people up.
translations.chinese: 哈。你刚揍过人吧。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000ABC8D]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 嗯……没错。我知道你不介意去伤害某人。看看你刚干了是吗……嗯，你懂得。

translations.english: I ended up killing your enemy.

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: By helping me, you're helping the good folk of Whiterun. How could I say no to that? | ZH: 帮助我，就是帮助白漫城的好人们。我怎么能拒绝呢？ | SID: 003ED5

translations.english: I'll take your money, but I make no promises of a large return on your investment. These are troubled times, after all.
translations.chinese: 你的钱我可以收，但我不能保证投资就能有高收益。毕竟，现在世道太乱。

translations.chinese: 太好了！有了这些钱，我就能进比平时多一倍的货了。

translations.english: Ah, the sound of clinking coins. Even better, the sound of clinking coins in my hand!
translations.chinese: 啊，金币叮当作响。而且还是我手中的金币叮当作响！

translations.english: Yes. Your reward is waiting for you, mortal. Further down.
translations.chinese: 没错。你的奖赏正在等着，凡人。再往深处走。

translations.english: But a Daedric Lord has his enemies, and my rival Boethiah had her priest desecrate it. Left it here to decay. Until you came.
translations.chinese: 但迪德拉君王也有自己的敌人，我的对头波耶西亚让她的祭司亵渎了它，把它放在这里腐烂。直到你来。

translations.english: Rusted. Dry. There was a time when this mace dripped with the blood of the feeble and the worthless.
translations.chinese: 生锈了，干涸了。曾几何时，这把钉锤沾满了弱者和废物的鲜血。

translations.english: But a Daedric Lord has his enemies, and my rival Boethiah had her priest desecrate the altar. Until you came.
translations.chinese: 但迪德拉君王也有自己的敌人，我的对头波耶西亚派祭司亵渎了这个祭坛。直到你来。

translations.english: Yes. It's an altar. Men would come and sacrifice the wretched in my name. The weak would be punished by the strong.
translations.chinese: 没错。这是个祭坛。人们以我的名义来牺牲那些倒霉蛋。弱者就该受到强者的惩罚。

translations.english: Now, I have a soul in Oblivion to claim. Take care of the house while I'm gone. Ha ha ha!
translations.chinese: 现在，湮灭里还有个灵魂等着我去收取。我不在的时候照看一下房子。哈哈哈！

translations.english: Know your place, mortal. Or Molag Bal may just send another champion to claim his mace from your broken corpse.
translations.chinese: 认清自己的位置，凡人。不然，莫拉格·巴尔不介意派另一个勇士从你的残尸上拿回钉锤。
